{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:32:20.505Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_aLFdH3X4PsJuXzxGqGZwYxuI","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.4 seconds\nOutput:\n===== CELL 40 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 02 — Step 1: Schema Validation\r\n# Validates that every S2_YYYY.parquet has a consistent structure.\r\n# No H0 files are used; the baseline is the most common column set\r\n# across all available S2 files.\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom IPython.display import display\r\n\r\nBASE = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\n\r\n# Required columns that MUST be present in every file\r\nREQUIRED_COLS = [\"exporter\", \"importer\", \"commoditycode\", TRADE_VALUE_COL]\r\n\r\ndef _describe(con, path):\r\n    return con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\r\n\r\ndef _sample(con, path, n=3):\r\n    return con.execute(f\"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}') LIMIT {n}\").df()\r\n\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\ncon.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\r\n\r\n# Pass 1 — collect schemas\r\nschema_rows, missing_files = [], []\r\n\r\nfor y in range(TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END + 1):\r\n    path = os.path.join(BASE, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        missing_files.append(y)\r\n        continue\r\n    sch = _describe(con, path)\r\n    for _, r in sch.iterrows():\r\n        schema_rows.append({\"year\": y, \"column_name\": r[\"column_name\"],\r\n                            \"column_type\": r[\"column_type\"]})\r\n\r\nif not schema_rows:\r\n    con.close()\r\n    raise RuntimeError(\r\n        f\"No S2_YYYY.parquet files found in {BASE} for \"\r\n        f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}–{TRADE_YEAR_END}. Check DATAVERSE_DIR.\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\nschema_long = pd.DataFrame(schema_rows)\r\n\r\n# Derive canonical column set (most common across all years)\r\ncols_by_year = (\r\n    schema_long.groupby(\"year\")[\"column_name\"]\r\n    .apply(lambda s: tuple(sorted(set(s))))\r\n    .to_dict()\r\n)\r\ncanonical_colset = set(\r\n    pd.Series(list(cols_by_year.values())).value_counts().index[0]\r\n)\r\n\r\n# Pass 2 — check each year\r\nreport_rows = []\r\nfor y, coltuple in sorted(cols_by_year.items()):\r\n    cset = set(coltuple)\r\n    miss_req    = [c for c in REQUIRED_COLS   if c not in cset]\r\n    miss_canon  = sorted(canonical_colset - cset)\r\n    extra_canon = sorted(cset - canonical_colset)\r\n    path = os.path.join(BASE, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\r\n    try:\r\n        _ = _sample(con, path, n=2)\r\n        readable = True\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        readable = False\r\n    report_rows.append({\r\n        \"year\":                 y,\r\n        \"n_cols\":               len(cset),\r\n        \"missing_required\":     miss_req,\r\n        \"missing_vs_canonical\": miss_canon,\r\n        \"extra_vs_canonical\":   extra_canon,\r\n        \"readable\":             readable,\r\n        \"ok\": (len(miss_req) == 0 and len(miss_canon) == 0 and readable),\r\n    })\r\n\r\ncon.close()\r\n\r\nreport = pd.DataFrame(report_rows).sort_values(\"year\")\r\nn_ok   = report[\"ok\"].sum()\r\nn_tot  = len(report)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"\\n{'─'*55}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Schema validation: {TRADE_YEAR_START}–{TRADE_YEAR_END}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Files checked : {n_tot}  |  OK: {n_ok}  |  Issues: {n_tot - n_ok}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Missing files : {len(missing_files)}\")\r\nif missing_files:\r\n    print(f\"    Years with no file: {missing_files}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Canonical column count: {len(canonical_colset)}\")\r\nprint(f\"{'─'*55}\\n\")\r\n\r\ndisplay(report[[\"year\",\"n_cols\",\"missing_required\",\r\n                \"missing_vs_canonical\",\"extra_vs_canonical\",\"readable\",\"ok\"]])\r\n\r\nlogger.info(\"Schema validation — %d/%d OK, %d missing files\",\r\n            n_ok, n_tot, len(missing_files))\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 43 =====\r\n# --- 0) Optional: install packages into THIS notebook kernel ---\r\nimport sys, subprocess\r\n\r\ndef ensure(pkg):\r\n    try:\r\n        __import__(pkg)\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, \"-m\", \"pip\", \"install\", pkg])\r\n\r\nensure(\"duckdb\")\r\nensure(\"pandas\")\r\n\r\n# --- 1) imports ---\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom IPython.display import display  # ensures display() works in VS Code notebooks\r\n\r\n# --- 2) paths / params ---\r\nBASE = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)  # S2_YYYY.parquet files\r\nS2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Helper: map DuckDB types to broad categories\r\n# -------------------------\r\ndef map_type(t: str) -> str:\r\n    t = str(t).upper()\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"CHAR\", \"VARCHAR\", \"STRING\", \"TEXT\"]):\r\n        return \"character\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"TINYINT\", \"SMALLINT\", \"INTEGER\", \"BIGINT\", \"HUGEINT\", \"INT\"]):\r\n        return \"integer\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"DOUBLE\", \"FLOAT\", \"REAL\", \"DECIMAL\", \"NUMERIC\"]):\r\n        return \"float\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"DATE\", \"TIME\", \"TIMESTAMP\"]):\r\n        return \"date/time\"\r\n    if \"BOOL\" in t:\r\n        return \"boolean\"\r\n    return \"other\"\r\n\r\ndef describe_parquet(con, path):\r\n    return con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Collect schema info for all S2 files\r\n# -------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\ncon.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")  # optional speed-up\r\n\r\nrows = []\r\n\r\nfor y in range(S2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    path = os.path.join(BASE, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    sch = describe_parquet(con, path)\r\n\r\n    for _, r in sch.iterrows():\r\n        rows.append({\r\n            \"year\": y,\r\n            \"variable\": r[\"column_name\"],\r\n            \"duckdb_type\": r[\"column_type\"],\r\n            \"broad_type\": map_type(r[\"column_type\"]),\r\n        })\r\n\r\ncon.close()\r\n\r\nschema_long = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"year\", \"variable\"])\r\n\r\ndisplay(schema_long)\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 44 =====\r\n# --- 0) Optional: install packages into THIS notebook kernel ---\r\nimport sys, subprocess\r\n\r\ndef ensure(pkg):\r\n    try:\r\n        __import__(pkg)\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, \"-m\", \"pip\", \"install\", pkg])\r\n\r\nensure(\"duckdb\")\r\nensure(\"pandas\")\r\n\r\n# --- 1) imports ---\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom IPython.display import display  # ensures display() works in VS Code notebooks\r\n\r\n# --- 2) paths / params ---\r\nBASE = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)  # S2_YYYY.parquet files\r\nS2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Helper: map DuckDB types to broad \"nature\"\r\n# -------------------------\r\ndef map_nature(t: str) -> str:\r\n    t = str(t).upper()\r\n\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"CHAR\", \"VARCHAR\", \"STRING\", \"TEXT\"]):\r\n        return \"character\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"TINYINT\", \"SMALLINT\", \"INTEGER\", \"BIGINT\", \"HUGEINT\", \"INT\"]):\r\n        return \"integer\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"DOUBLE\", \"FLOAT\", \"REAL\", \"DECIMAL\", \"NUMERIC\"]):\r\n        return \"float\"\r\n    if any(x in t for x in [\"DATE\", \"TIME\", \"TIMESTAMP\"]):\r\n        return \"date/time\"\r\n    if \"BOOL\" in t:\r\n        return \"boolean\"\r\n\r\n    return \"other\"\r\n\r\ndef describe_parquet(con, path):\r\n    return con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 1) Read schemas for all S2 files\r\n# -------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\ncon.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")  # optional speed-up\r\n\r\nrows = []\r\nmissing_files = []\r\n\r\nfor y in range(S2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    path = os.path.join(BASE, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        missing_files.append(y)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    sch = describe_parquet(con, path)\r\n    for _, r in sch.iterrows():\r\n        rows.append({\r\n            \"year\": y,\r\n            \"variable\": r[\"column_name\"],\r\n            \"duckdb_type\": r[\"column_type\"],\r\n            \"nature\": map_nature(r[\"column_type\"]),\r\n        })\r\n\r\ncon.close()\r\n\r\nschema_long = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"year\", \"variable\"])\r\n\r\nif schema_long.empty:\r\n    raise RuntimeError(\"No S2 parquet files were found/read. Check BASE path and filenames.\")\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 2) Define the canonical variable list (mode column set)\r\n# -------------------------\r\ncols_by_year = (\r\n    schema_long.groupby(\"year\")[\"variable\"]\r\n    .apply(lambda s: tuple(sorted(set(s))))\r\n    .to_dict()\r\n)\r\n\r\ncolset_counts = pd.Series(list(cols_by_year.values())).value_counts()\r\ncanonical_colset = set(colset_counts.index[0])\r\n\r\n# If you prefer a specific baseline year instead, uncomment:\r\n# BASELINE_YEAR = min(cols_by_year.keys())\r\n# canonical_colset = set(cols_by_year[BASELINE_YEAR])\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 3) Check: all years have the same variables\r\n# -------------------------\r\nmissing_vars_by_year = {}\r\nextra_vars_by_year = {}\r\n\r\nfor y, coltuple in cols_by_year.items():\r\n    cset = set(coltuple)\r\n    miss = sorted(canonical_colset - cset)\r\n    extra = sorted(cset - canonical_colset)\r\n    if miss:\r\n        missing_vars_by_year[y] = miss\r\n    if extra:\r\n        extra_vars_by_year[y] = extra\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 4) Check: variables have the same \"nature\" across years\r\n# -------------------------\r\nnature_by_var = (\r\n    schema_long.groupby(\"variable\")[\"nature\"]\r\n    .apply(lambda x: sorted(set(x)))\r\n    .reset_index(name=\"natures\")\r\n)\r\n\r\nunstable_nature = nature_by_var[nature_by_var[\"natures\"].apply(len) > 1].copy()\r\n\r\ntype_by_var = (\r\n    schema_long.groupby(\"variable\")[\"duckdb_type\"]\r\n    .apply(lambda x: sorted(set(x)))\r\n    .reset_index(name=\"duckdb_types\")\r\n)\r\n\r\nunstable_storage_type = type_by_var[type_by_var[\"duckdb_types\"].apply(len) > 1].copy()\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 5) Year-level summary table\r\n# -------------------------\r\nsummary_rows = []\r\nfor y in sorted(cols_by_year.keys()):\r\n    s = schema_long[schema_long[\"year\"] == y]\r\n    summary_rows.append({\r\n        \"year\": y,\r\n        \"n_cols\": s[\"variable\"].nunique(),\r\n        \"missing_vs_canonical\": len(missing_vars_by_year.get(y, [])),\r\n        \"extra_vs_canonical\": len(extra_vars_by_year.get(y, [])),\r\n    })\r\n\r\nsummary = pd.DataFrame(summary_rows)\r\n\r\nprint(\"Missing S2 files (first 30):\", missing_files[:30], \"...\" if len(missing_files) > 30 else \"\")\r\nprint(\"\\nCanonical column set size:\", len(canonical_colset))\r\nprint(\"Years with missing vars vs canonical:\", len(missing_vars_by_year))\r\nprint(\"Years with extra vars vs canonical:\", len(extra_vars_by_year))\r\nprint(\"\\nVariables with unstable NATURE across years:\", len(unstable_nature))\r\nprint(\"Variables with unstable STORAGE TYPE across years:\", len(unstable_storage_type))\r\n\r\ndisplay(summary)\r\n\r\nif missing_vars_by_year:\r\n    print(\"\\nExample years missing variables (up to 5):\")\r\n    for y in list(missing_vars_by_year.keys())[:5]:\r\n        print(y, \"missing:\", missing_vars_by_year[y][:20], \"...\" if len(missing_vars_by_year[y]) > 20 else \"\")\r\n\r\nif extra_vars_by_year:\r\n    print(\"\\nExample years with extra variables (up to 5):\")\r\n    for y in list(extra_vars_by_year.keys())[:5]:\r\n        print(y, \"extra:\", extra_vars_by_year[y][:20], \"...\" if len(extra_vars_by_year[y]) > 20 else \"\")\r\n\r\ndisplay(unstable_nature)\r\ndisplay(unstable_storage_type)\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# 6) Optional: enforce strictness (raise errors)\r\n# -------------------------\r\nSTRICT_VARIABLES = False   # set True to fail if any year differs in variable set\r\nSTRICT_NATURE = True       # set True to fail if any variable changes nature across years\r\n\r\nif STRICT_VARIABLES and (missing_vars_by_year or extra_vars_by_year):\r\n    raise ValueError(\"Variable-set inconsistency detected across years (missing/extra columns). See diagnostics above.\")\r\n\r\nif STRICT_NATURE and not unstable_nature.empty:\r\n    raise TypeError(\"Nature inconsistency detected (e.g., character vs numeric across years). See unstable_nature table above.\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 46 =====\r\n# --- 0) Optional: ensure duckdb is installed in THIS notebook kernel ---\r\nimport sys, subprocess\r\n\r\ndef ensure(pkg):\r\n    try:\r\n        __import__(pkg)\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, \"-m\", \"pip\", \"install\", pkg])\r\n\r\nensure(\"duckdb\")\r\n\r\n# --- 1) imports ---\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\n\r\n# --- 2) paths ---\r\nOUT_DIR = str(OUT_02_AUDIT / \"data\" / \"dictionaries\")\r\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\nS2_GLOB = str(DATAVERSE_DIR / \"S2_*.parquet\")\r\n\r\nOUT_COUNTRIES = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, \"country_codes_all_sorted.csv\")\r\nOUT_PRODUCTS  = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, \"product_codes_all_sorted.csv\")\r\n\r\n# --- 3) build sorted dictionaries (overwrites existing files by default) ---\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\ncon.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\r\n\r\n# A) All country codes (exporter ∪ importer), sorted\r\ncon.execute(f\"\"\"\r\nCOPY (\r\n  WITH all_s2 AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n      exporter::VARCHAR AS exporter_code,\r\n      importer::VARCHAR AS importer_code\r\n    FROM read_parquet('{S2_GLOB}')\r\n  )\r\n  SELECT DISTINCT code AS country_code\r\n  FROM (\r\n    SELECT exporter_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE exporter_code IS NOT NULL AND exporter_code <> ''\r\n    UNION\r\n    SELECT importer_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE importer_code IS NOT NULL AND importer_code <> ''\r\n  )\r\n  ORDER BY country_code\r\n) TO '{OUT_COUNTRIES}' (HEADER, DELIMITER ',');\r\n\"\"\")\r\n\r\n# B) All product (commodity) codes, sorted\r\ncon.execute(f\"\"\"\r\nCOPY (\r\n  SELECT DISTINCT commoditycode::VARCHAR AS product_code\r\n  FROM read_parquet('{S2_GLOB}')\r\n  WHERE commoditycode IS NOT NULL AND commoditycode <> ''\r\n  ORDER BY product_code\r\n) TO '{OUT_PRODUCTS}' (HEADER, DELIMITER ',');\r\n\"\"\")\r\n\r\ncon.close()\r\n\r\nprint(\"Wrote (overwritten if existed) to:\", OUT_DIR)\r\nprint(\" -\", os.path.basename(OUT_COUNTRIES))\r\nprint(\" -\", os.path.basename(OUT_PRODUCTS))\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 48 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 02 — Step 4: Symmetry Audit  (OPTIONAL — run separately)\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# This audit is computationally intensive (scans all parquet files for\r\n# export/import symmetry across bilateral dyads and products).\r\n# It has been moved to a standalone notebook to keep the main pipeline fast.\r\n#\r\n# To run it on demand:\r\n#   1. Open  symmetry_audit_optional.ipynb  (same folder as this notebook)\r\n#   2. Confirm BASE_DIR at the top of that notebook matches your project root\r\n#   3. Run all cells\r\n#\r\n# Outputs land in:  output/02_symmetry_audit/data/\r\n# ============================================================\r\nprint(\"[INFO] Symmetry audit is optional — see symmetry_audit_optional.ipynb\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 50 =====\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport os\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\n\r\nBASE = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\nS2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# ---- quick sanity: list a few matching files\r\nall_files = [f for f in os.listdir(BASE) if f.startswith(\"S2_\") and f.endswith(\".parquet\")]\r\nprint(\"Found S2 parquet files:\", len(all_files))\r\nprint(\"First 5:\", all_files[:5])\r\n\r\nif len(all_files) == 0:\r\n    raise RuntimeError(f\"No S2_*.parquet files found in {BASE}. Check the folder path.\")\r\n\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\ncon.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\r\n\r\nrows = []\r\nmissing_years = []\r\nyears_processed = 0\r\nt0 = datetime.now()\r\n\r\nfor y in range(S2_START_YEAR, S2_END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    path = os.path.join(BASE, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        missing_years.append(y)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    years_processed += 1\r\n    if years_processed % 5 == 0:\r\n        elapsed = (datetime.now() - t0).total_seconds()\r\n        print(f\"Processed {years_processed} files so far... (latest year {y}, elapsed {elapsed:.1f}s)\")\r\n\r\n    # Check that value_final exists in this file (fast schema check)\r\n    sch = con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\r\n    cols = set(sch[\"column_name\"].tolist())\r\n    if \"value_final\" not in cols:\r\n        print(f\"WARNING: {os.path.basename(path)} has no 'value_final'. Columns include: {sorted(list(cols))[:10]} ...\")\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        tmp = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n            WITH exports AS (\r\n                SELECT exporter AS country, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS exports\r\n                FROM read_parquet('{path}')\r\n                GROUP BY exporter\r\n            ),\r\n            imports AS (\r\n                SELECT importer AS country, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS imports\r\n                FROM read_parquet('{path}')\r\n                GROUP BY importer\r\n            )\r\n            SELECT\r\n                {y} AS year,\r\n                COALESCE(e.country, i.country) AS country,\r\n                COALESCE(e.exports, 0) AS exports,\r\n                COALESCE(i.imports, 0) AS imports,\r\n                COALESCE(e.exports, 0) - COALESCE(i.imports, 0) AS trade_balance\r\n            FROM exports e\r\n            FULL JOIN imports i\r\n              ON e.country = i.country\r\n        \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n        rows.append(tmp)\r\n\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR in year {y}: {e}\")\r\n        # keep going so you get a partial output instead of nothing\r\n        continue\r\n\r\ncon.close()\r\n\r\nprint(\"Missing years (count):\", len(missing_years))\r\nprint(\"Years processed (files found):\", years_processed)\r\nprint(\"Rows tables collected:\", len(rows))\r\n\r\nif len(rows) == 0:\r\n    raise RuntimeError(\"No yearly tables were produced. Most likely: no files found, or 'value_final' missing in all files.\")\r\n\r\npanel = pd.concat(rows, ignore_index=True)\r\n\r\nprint(\"Panel shape:\", panel.shape)\r\nprint(panel.head(10))\r\n\r\nOUT_FILE = str(AUDIT_DATA / \"country_trade_totals_value_final.csv\")\r\npanel.to_csv(OUT_FILE, index=False)\r\nprint(\"Wrote:\", OUT_FILE)\r\nprint(\"File exists now?:\", os.path.exists(OUT_FILE))\r\n\r\n\r\n"}}

annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import duckdb\n+import pandas as pd\n+\n+from geoanalisis.config import Path\n+    schema_long_path: Path\n+    dictionary_dir: Path\n+    country_dictionary_path: Path\n+    product_dictionary_path: Path\n+    trade_totals_path: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_validation_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ValidationArtifacts:\n+    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\n+    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\n+    dictionary_dir = data_dir / \"dictionaries\"\n+    return ValidationArtifacts(\n+        stage_dir=stage_dir,\n+        data_dir=data_dir,\n+        fig_dir=fig_dir,\n+        schema_report_path=data_dir / \"schema_validation_report.csv\",\n+ country_dictionary_path=dictionary_dir / \"country_codes_all_sorted.csv\",\n+        product_dictionary_path=dictionary_dir / \"product_codes_all_sorted.csv\",\n+        trade_totals_path=data_dir / con\n+\n+\n+def _year_paths(config: ProjectConfig) -> list[tuple[int, Path]]:\n+    return [\n+        (year, config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\n+        for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1)\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+def validate_schema(config: ProjectConfig, artifacts: ValidationArtifacts) -> dict[str, object]:\n+    required_cols = [\"exporter\", \"importer\", \"commoditycode\", config.trade_value_column]\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    schema_rows = []\n+    missing_files = []\n+\n+    for year, path in _year_paths(config):\n+        if not path.exists():\n+            missing_files.append(year)\n+            continue\n+        sch = con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\n+        for _, row in sch.iterrows():\n+            schema_rows.append(\n+                {\n+                    \"year\": year,\n+                    \"column_name\": row[\"column_name\"],\n+                    \"column_type\": row[\"column_type\"],\n+                }\n+            )\n+\n+    if not schema_rows:\n+        con.close()\n+        raise RuntimeError(f\"No S2 parquet files found in {config.dataset_trade_dir}\")\n+\n+    schema_long = pd.DataFrame(schema_rows).sort_values([\"year\", \"column_name\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\n+    schema_long.to_csv(artifacts.schema_long_path, index=False)\n+\n+    cols_by_year = (\n+        schema_long.groupby(\"year\")[\"column_name\"].apply(lambda s: tuple(sorted(set(s)))).to_dict()\n+    )\n+    canonical_colset = set(pd.Series(list(cols_by_year.values())).value_counts().index[0])\n+\n+    report_rows = []\n+    for year, coltuple in sorted(cols_by_year.items()):\n+        cset = set(coltuple)\n+        path = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\n+        miss_req = [c for c in required_cols if c not in cset]\n+        miss_canon = sorted(canonical_colset - cset)\n+        extra_canon = sorted(cset - canonical_colset)\n+        try:\n+            con.execute(f\"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}') LIMIT 2\").df()\n+            readable = True\n+        except Exception:\n+            readable = False\n+        report_rows.append(\n+            {\n+                \"year\": year,\n+                \"n_cols\": len(cset),\n+                \"missing_required\": \"|\".join(miss_req),\n+                \"missing_vs_canonical\": \"|\".join(miss_canon),\n+                \"extra_vs_canonical\": \"|\".join(extra_canon),\n+                \"readable\": readable,\n+                \"ok\": len(miss_req) == 0 and len(miss_canon) == 0 and readable,\n+            }\n+        )\n+\n+    con.close()\n+    report = pd.DataFrame(report_rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\n+    report.to_csv(artifacts.schema_report_path, index=False)\n+\n+    summary = pd.DataFrame(\n+        [\n+            {\n+                \"trade_year_start\": config.trade_year_start,\n+                \"trade_year_end\": config.trade_year_end,\n+                \"files_checked\": len(report),\n+                \"ok_files\": int(report[\"ok\"].sum()),\n+                \"issue_files\": int((~report[\"ok\"]).sum()),\n+                \"missing_files_count\": len(missing_files),\n+                \"missing_files\": \"|\".join(map(str, missing_files)),\n+                \"canonical_column_count\": len(canonical_colset),\n+                \"canonical_columns\": \"|\".join(sorted(canonical_colset)),\n+            }\n+        ]\n+    )\n+    summary.to_csv(artifacts.schema_summary_path, index=False)\n+    return {\n+        \"schema_long\": schema_long,\n+        \"schema_report\": report,\n+        \"schema_summary\": summary,\n+        \"missing_files\": missing_files,\n+        \"canonical_columns\": sorted(canonical_colset),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def build_dictionaries(config: ProjectConfig, artifacts: ValidationArtifacts) -> dict[str, Path]:\n+    artifacts.dictionary_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    s2_glob = str(config.dataset_trade_dir / \"S2_*.parquet\")\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        COPY (\n+          WITH all_s2 AS (\n+            SELECT\n+              exporter::VARCHAR AS exporter_code,\n+              importer::VARCHAR AS importer_code\n+            FROM read_parquet('{s2_glob}')\n+          )\n+          SELECT DISTINCT code AS country_code\n+          FROM (\n+            SELECT exporter_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE exporter_code IS NOT NULL AND exporter_code <> ''\n+            UNION\n+            SELECT importer_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE importer_code IS NOT NULL AND importer_code <> ''\n+          )\n+          ORDER BY country_code\n+        ) TO '{artifacts.country_dictionary_path}' (HEADER, DELIMITER ',');\n+        \"\"\"\n+    )\n+    con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        COPY (\n+          SELECT DISTINCT commoditycode::VARCHAR AS product_code\n+          FROM read_parquet('{s2_glob}')\n+          WHERE commoditycode IS NOT NULL AND commoditycode <> ''\n+          ORDER BY product_code\n+        ) TO '{artifacts.product_dictionary_path}' (HEADER, DELIMITER ',');\n+        \"\"\"\n+    )\n+    con.close()\n+    return {\n+        \"country_dictionary_path\": artifacts.country_dictionary_path,\n+        \"product_dictionary_path\": artifacts.product_dictionary_path,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def compute_country_trade_totals(config: ProjectConfig, artifacts: ValidationArtifacts) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    rows = []\n+    for year, path in _year_paths(config):\n+        if not path.exists():\n+            continue\n+        sch = con.execute(f\"DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{path}')\").df()\n+        cols = set(sch[\"column_name\"].tolist())\n+        if config.trade_value_column not in cols:\n+            continue\n+        tmp = con.execute(\n+            f\"\"\"\n+            WITH exports AS (\n+                SELECT exporter AS country, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS exports\n+                FROM read_parquet('{path}')\n+                GROUP BY exporter\n+            ),\n+            imports AS (\n+                SELECT importer AS country, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS imports\n+                FROM read_parquet('{path}')\n+                GROUP BY importer\n+            )\n+            SELECT\n+  COALESCE(e.exports, 0) - COALESCE(i.imports, 0) AS trade_balance\n+            FROM exports e\n+            FULL JOIN imports i\n+              ON e.country = i.country\n+            \"\"\"\n+        ).df()\n+        rows.append(tmp)\n+    con.close()\n+    if not rows:\n+        raise RuntimeError(\"No yearly trade total tables were produced.\")\n+    panel = pd.concat(rows, ignore_index=True)\n+ {"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:35:59.568Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_HvyuMsx2kA8B0TXu7Cjs3X9b","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\pipelines\\run_pipeline.py\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import logging\n+from collections.abc import Iterable\n+\n+from geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\n+from geoanalisis.pipelines import stage_01_geo, stage_02_validation\n+\n+\n+STAGE_RUNNERS = {\n+    \"stage_01_geo\": stage_01_geo.run,\n+    \"stage_02_validation\": stage_02_validation.run,\n+}\n+\n+\n+def run_selected_stages(\n+    config: ProjectConfig,\n+    run_id: str,\n+    stages: Iterable[str],\n+    *,\n+    make_stage_01_figures: bool = True,\n+) -> dict[str, dict[str, str]]:\n+    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.run_pipeline\")\n+    results: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {}\n+\n+    for stage_name in stages:\n+        if stage_name not in STAGE_RUNNERS:\n+            raise ValueError(f\"Stage not available yet: {stage_name}\")\n+\n+        logger.info(\"Running %s under run_id=%s\", stage_name, run_id)\n+        if stage_name == \"stage_01_geo\":\n+            results[stage_name] = STAGE_RUNNERS[stage_name](\n+                config,\n+                run_id=run_id,\n+                make_figures=make_stage_01_figures,\n+            )\n+        else:\n+            results[stage_name] = STAGE_RUNNERS[stage_name](config, run_id=run_id)\n+\n+    return results\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\pipelines\\__init__.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Pipeline stage entry points.\"\"\"\n+\"\"\"Pipeline stage entry points.\"\"\"\n+\n+from .run_pipeline import run_selected_stages\n+\n+__all__ = [\"run_selected_stages\"]\n*** End Patch\n"}}

output lines: 7758\nOutput:\n===== CELL 54 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Authoritative paths\r\n# -------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\r\n\r\n# Trade files directory (adjust if your parquet files are elsewhere)\r\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\n\r\nOUT_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\nOUT_FILE = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n\r\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\r\n# -------------------------\r\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n# Basic sanity: drop rows with missing coords (do not impute)\r\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Helper: weighted mean (safe)\r\n# -------------------------\r\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\r\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\n# -------------------------\r\n# Main loop\r\n# -------------------------\r\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\n\r\nrows = []\r\n\r\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\r\n        # Keep a record if you want; otherwise skip silently\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    # Aggregate with DuckDB for speed\r\n    # Exports: sum by exporter\r\n    exports_df = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS exports_value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n        GROUP BY exporter\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    # Imports: sum by importer\r\n    imports_df = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS imports_value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n        GROUP BY importer\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    # Ensure code is str\r\n    exports_df[\"code\"] = exports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    imports_df[\"code\"] = imports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n    # Merge with fixed centroids (no geographic modifications)\r\n    ex = exports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n    im = imports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n\r\n    # Unmatched codes (trade present but no centroid)\r\n    ex_unmatched = ex[\"lat\"].isna() | ex[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n    im_unmatched = im[\"lat\"].isna() | im[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n\r\n    n_ex_total = len(ex)\r\n    n_im_total = len(im)\r\n    n_ex_matched = int((~ex_unmatched).sum())\r\n    n_im_matched = int((~im_unmatched).sum())\r\n    n_ex_unmatched = int(ex_unmatched.sum())\r\n    n_im_unmatched = int(im_unmatched.sum())\r\n\r\n    # Drop unmatched for barycenter calculation\r\n    exm = ex.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\r\n    imm = im.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\r\n\r\n    # Totals (over matched set used for barycenter)\r\n    total_exports_matched = float(exm[\"exports_value\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0\r\n    total_imports_matched = float(imm[\"imports_value\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0\r\n\r\n    # Barycenters (simple weighted mean in lat/lon)\r\n    lat_exports = weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan\r\n    lon_exports = weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan\r\n\r\n    lat_imports = weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan\r\n    lon_imports = weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan\r\n\r\n    # Optional: list unmatched codes (truncated) for auditing\r\n    # Keep them as a semicolon-delimited string; cap length to avoid huge CSV cells\r\n    ex_unmatched_codes = ex.loc[ex_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n    im_unmatched_codes = im.loc[im_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n\r\n    def truncate_codes(codes, max_codes=50):\r\n        if not codes:\r\n            return \"\"\r\n        if len(codes) <= max_codes:\r\n            return \";\".join(codes)\r\n        return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\r\n\r\n    rows.append({\r\n        \"year\": year,\r\n\r\n        \"lat_exports\": lat_exports,\r\n        \"lon_exports\": lon_exports,\r\n        \"lat_imports\": lat_imports,\r\n        \"lon_imports\": lon_imports,\r\n\r\n        \"total_exports_value_matched\": total_exports_matched,\r\n        \"total_imports_value_matched\": total_imports_matched,\r\n\r\n        \"n_exporter_nodes_total\": n_ex_total,\r\n        \"n_importer_nodes_total\": n_im_total,\r\n        \"n_exporter_nodes_matched\": n_ex_matched,\r\n        \"n_importer_nodes_matched\": n_im_matched,\r\n        \"n_exporter_nodes_unmatched\": n_ex_unmatched,\r\n        \"n_importer_nodes_unmatched\": n_im_unmatched,\r\n\r\n        \"unmatched_exporter_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(ex_unmatched_codes),\r\n pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_CSV).sort_values(\"year\")\r\ndf = df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n crs=crs_med\r\n).total_bounds\r\n\r\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # must match your USA/global figure buffer\r\nX_LIM = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\nY_LIM = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n# path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> partner-weighted barycenters per year\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\nrows = []\r\n\r\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\r\n con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n        WHERE exporter = '{USA_CODE}'\r\n        GROUP BY importer\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    # USA imports: importer=USA, partner is exporter\r\n    usm = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n        FROM   \"lon_us_exports\": lon_us_exports,\r\n        \"lat_us_imports\": lat_us_imports,\r\n        \"lon_us_imports\": lon_us_imports,\r\n        \"total_us_exports_value_final_matched\": total_us_exports,\r\n        \"total_us_imports_value_final_matched\": total_us_imports,\r\n        \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(usxg)),\r\n        \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(usmg)),\r\n        \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(usx_unmatched.sum()),\r\n        \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(usm_unmatched.sum()),\r\n        \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usxg.loc[usx_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n        \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usmg.loc[usm_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n    })\r\n\r\nout = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\")\r\nout.to_csv(OUT_CSV, index=False)\r\nprint(f\"Wrote: {OUT_CSV} | Years: {out['year'].nunique()}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Plot: SAME projection + SAME zoom logic as your global map\r\n# (Mediterranean-centered AEQD; zoom to barycenter bounds + buffer)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\ndfp = out.dropna(subset=[\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]).copy()\r\ndfp = dfp.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_exports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_exports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_imports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_imports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nexports_line = LineString(list(exports.geometry.values))\r\nimports_line = LineString(list(imports.geometry.values))\r\n\r\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"exports_path\"]}, geometry=[exports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"imports_path\"]}, geometry=[imports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n# Mediterranean-centered projection (same as your global map)\r\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n\r\n# Plot\r\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\r\n\r\nworld_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n\r\nimports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\r\nexports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\r\n\r\nimports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\r\nexports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\r\n\r\n# Legend\r\nlegend_elements = [\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA imports barycenter (partners)\",\r\n           markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA exports barycenter (partners)\",\r\n           markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\r\n]\r\nax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\r\n\r\n# Decade labels in black + endpoints (same labeling logic)\r\nyears = dfp[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\r\nymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\r\nlabel_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\r\nlabel_years.update([ymin, ymax])\r\n\r\ndx, dy = 35000, 35000  # same default as your global map\r\n\r\ndef label_decades(gdf_sorted):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in label_years:\r\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\r\n            ax.text(x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y), fontsize=8, color=\"black\", alpha=0.9, zorder=10)\r\n\r\nlabel_decades(imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\r\nlabel_decades(exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\r\n\r\n# Zoom: bounds + buffer (same approach)\r\nall_geom = pd.concat([imports_p.geometry, exports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True)\r\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(all_geom, crs=imports_p.crs).total_bounds\r\n\r\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # same as your global map; adjust if you want tighter crop\r\nax.set_xlim(minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\nax.set_ylim(miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\nax.set_axis_off()\r\nplt.tight_layout()\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.close(fig)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\r\n\r\n===== CELL 59 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Paths (USA barycenters already computed)\r\n# --------------------------------------------------------…59550 tokens truncated…ARCHAR','distance_km':'DOUBLE'},\r\n            header  = TRUE,\r\n            delim   = ','\r\n        )\r\n        \"\"\",\r\n        [str(od_path)],\r\n    )\r\n    _cols = [r[1] for r in con.execute(\"PRAGMA table_info('od')\").fetchall()]\r\n    if not {\"origin\",\"destination\",\"distance_km\"}.issubset(set(_cols)):\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"OD_Matrix.csv missing required columns; found {_cols}\")\r\n    _n_null = con.execute(\r\n        \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM od \"\r\n        \"WHERE origin IS NULL OR destination IS NULL OR distance_km IS NULL\"\r\n    ).fetchone()[0]\r\n    if _n_null:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"OD matrix has {_n_null} null rows in key fields.\")\r\n    _mn, _mx = con.execute(\"SELECT MIN(distance_km), MAX(distance_km) FROM od\").fetchone()\r\n    if _mn is None or _mx is None or _mn < 0 or _mx <= 0:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"OD distances look invalid: min={_mn}, max={_mx}\")\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: OD matrix loaded (%d pairs).\",\r\n                con.execute(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM od\").fetchone()[0])\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── PER-YEAR COMPUTATION ─────────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s07_compute_year(con, year, trade_dir, value_col):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Returns (country_year_df, global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, diag_df) or None if file missing.\r\n    Uses TRADE_VALUE_COL throughout — no hardcoded column names.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    fpath = trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n    if not fpath.exists():\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS flows;\")\r\n    con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        CREATE TABLE flows AS\r\n        SELECT\r\n            CAST(exporter     AS VARCHAR) AS exporter,\r\n            CAST(importer     AS VARCHAR) AS importer,\r\n            LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0') AS commoditycode,\r\n            CAST({value_col}  AS DOUBLE)  AS value_final\r\n        FROM read_parquet(?)\r\n        WHERE {value_col} IS NOT NULL AND {value_col} >= 0\r\n        \"\"\",\r\n        [str(fpath)],\r\n    )\r\n    if S07_EXCLUDE_SELF:\r\n        con.execute(\"DELETE FROM flows WHERE exporter = importer;\")\r\n\r\n    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS flows_coded;\")\r\n    con.execute(\"\"\"\r\n        CREATE TABLE flows_coded AS\r\n        SELECT exporter, importer, commoditycode,\r\n               SUBSTR(commoditycode, 1, 2) AS sitc2,\r\n               SUBSTR(commoditycode, 1, 3) AS sitc3,\r\n               value_final\r\n        FROM flows\r\n    \"\"\")\r\n\r\n    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS joined;\")\r\n    con.execute(\"\"\"\r\n        CREATE TABLE joined AS\r\n        SELECT f.exporter, f.importer, f.sitc2, f.sitc3, f.value_final, o.distance_km\r\n        FROM flows_coded f\r\n        LEFT JOIN od o ON f.exporter = o.origin AND f.importer = o.destination\r\n    \"\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Diagnostics — warn on missing distances, then drop those rows\r\n    diag = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        SELECT ?::INT AS year,\r\n               COUNT(*) AS n_flows,\r\n               SUM(value_final) AS total_trade_value,\r\n               SUM(CASE WHEN distance_km IS NULL THEN 1   ELSE 0 END) AS n_missing_distance,\r\n               SUM(CASE WHEN distance_km IS NULL THEN value_final ELSE 0 END) AS value_missing_distance\r\n        FROM joined\r\n        \"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n\r\n    _n_miss = int(diag.loc[0,\"n_missing_distance\"])\r\n    if _n_miss > 0:\r\n        _tot = float(diag.loc[0,\"total_trade_value\"] or 1)\r\n        _vm  = float(diag.loc[0,\"value_missing_distance\"] or 0)\r\n        if _vm / _tot > S07_MAX_MISSING_FRAC:\r\n            logger.warning(\r\n                \"Stage 07 [%d]: %.1f%% of trade value has no OD distance. Check OD coverage.\",\r\n                year, 100 * _vm / _tot\r\n            )\r\n        con.execute(\"DELETE FROM joined WHERE distance_km IS NULL;\")\r\n\r\n    # A) Country-year\r\n    exp_cy = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, exporter AS country,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS avg_export_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY exporter\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n\r\n    imp_cy = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, importer AS country,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_imports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS avg_import_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY importer\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n\r\n    cy = pd.merge(exp_cy, imp_cy, on=[\"year\",\"country\"], how=\"outer\")\r\n\r\n    # B) Global series\r\n    tot_x = cy[\"total_exports\"].sum(skipna=True)\r\n    tot_m = cy[\"total_imports\"].sum(skipna=True)\r\n    gx = ((cy[\"total_exports\"]*cy[\"avg_export_distance_km\"]).sum(skipna=True)/tot_x\r\n          if tot_x else float(\"nan\"))\r\n    gm = ((cy[\"total_imports\"]*cy[\"avg_import_distance_km\"]).sum(skipna=True)/tot_m\r\n          if tot_m else float(\"nan\"))\r\n\r\n    global_df = pd.DataFrame([{\r\n        \"year\": year,\r\n        \"global_export_distance_km\":             gx,\r\n        \"global_import_distance_km\":             gm,\r\n        \"global_total_exports\":                  tot_x,\r\n        \"global_total_imports\":                  tot_m,\r\n        \"global_exports_minus_imports\":          tot_x - tot_m,\r\n        \"global_export_minus_import_distance_km\": gx - gm,\r\n    }])\r\n\r\n    # C) SITC-2\r\n    s2x = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc2,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS global_export_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY sitc2\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n    s2m = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc2,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_imports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS global_import_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY sitc2\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.merge(s2x, s2m, on=[\"year\",\"sitc2\"], how=\"outer\")\r\n\r\n    # D) SITC-3\r\n    s3x = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc3,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS global_export_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY sitc3\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n    s3m = con.execute(\r\n        \"\"\"SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc3,\r\n                   SUM(value_final) AS total_imports,\r\n                   SUM(value_final*distance_km)/NULLIF(SUM(value_final),0) AS global_import_distance_km\r\n             FROM joined GROUP BY sitc3\"\"\", [year]).fetchdf()\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.merge(s3x, s3m, on=[\"year\",\"sitc3\"], how=\"outer\")\r\n\r\n    return cy, global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, diag\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── MAIN LOOP ────────────────────────────────────────────────\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 07: starting average distance computation.\")\r\n_s07_con = _s07_build_con()\r\n_s07_load_od(_s07_con, OD_OUT)\r\n\r\n_s07_cy_p=[]; _s07_gl_p=[]; _s07_s2_p=[]; _s07_s3_p=[]; _s07_dg_p=[]\r\n_s07_done = 0\r\n\r\nfor _yr in range(TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END + 1):\r\n    _res = _s07_compute_year(_s07_con, _yr, DATAVERSE_DIR, TRADE_VALUE_COL)\r\n    if _res is None:\r\n        continue\r\n    _cy,_gl,_s2,_s3,_dg = _res\r\n    _s07_cy_p.append(_cy); _s07_gl_p.append(_gl)\r\n    _s07_s2_p.append(_s2); _s07_s3_p.append(_s3); _s07_dg_p.append(_dg)\r\n    _s07_done += 1\r\n    if _s07_done % 10 == 0:\r\n        print(f\"  [Stage 07] year {_yr}: global export dist = {float(_gl.loc[0,'global_export_distance_km']):,.1f} km\")\r\n\r\n_s07_con.close()\r\n\r\nif _s07_done == 0:\r\n    raise RuntimeError(\r\n        \"Stage 07: no yearly files processed. \"\r\n        f\"Check TRADE_YEAR_START ({TRADE_YEAR_START}), TRADE_YEAR_END ({TRADE_YEAR_END}), \"\r\n        f\"DATAVERSE_DIR ({DATAVERSE_DIR}).\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n_s07_cy_df   = pd.concat(_s07_cy_p, ignore_index=True).sort_values([\"year\",\"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n_s07_gl_df   = pd.concat(_s07_gl_p, ignore_index=True).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n_s07_s2_df   = pd.concat(_s07_s2_p, ignore_index=True).sort_values([\"year\",\"sitc2\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n_s07_s3_df   = pd.concat(_s07_s3_p, ignore_index=True).sort_values([\"year\",\"sitc3\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n_s07_diag_df = pd.concat(_s07_dg_p, ignore_index=True).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n_s07_max_diff = (_s07_gl_df[\"global_export_distance_km\"]\r\n                 - _s07_gl_df[\"global_import_distance_km\"]).abs().max()\r\n\r\n_s07_cy_df.to_csv(S07_OUT_COUNTRY_YEAR, index=False)\r\n_s07_gl_df.to_csv(S07_OUT_GLOBAL,       index=False)\r\n_s07_s2_df.to_csv(S07_OUT_SITC2,        index=False)\r\n_s07_s3_df.to_csv(S07_OUT_SITC3,        index=False)\r\n_s07_diag_df.to_csv(S07_OUT_DIAG,       index=False)\r\n\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 07: complete. %d years processed. Max |exp-imp dist| = %.4f km\",\r\n            _s07_done, _s07_max_diff)\r\nprint(\"\\n\" + \"─\"*55)\r\nprint(\"  Stage 07 — Average Trade Distance\")\r\nprint(f\"  Years processed   : {_s07_done}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Country-year rows : {len(_s07_cy_df):,}\")\r\nprint(f\"  SITC-2 rows       : {len(_s07_s2_df):,}\")\r\nprint(f\"  SITC-3 rows       : {len(_s07_s3_df):,}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Max |exp-imp dist|: {_s07_max_diff:.4f} km  (symmetric distances → near-zero expected)\")\r\nprint(f\"  Outputs -> {DIST_DATA}\")\r\nfor _f in [S07_OUT_COUNTRY_YEAR, S07_OUT_GLOBAL, S07_OUT_SITC2, S07_OUT_SITC3, S07_OUT_DIAG]:\r\n    print(f\"    {_f.name}\")\r\n===== CELL 135 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 07 — Visualizations\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport re\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\n\r\n_DPI            = 300\r\n_EXP_COLOR      = \"steelblue\"\r\n_IMP_COLOR      = \"tomato\"\r\n_CMAP_EXP       = \"Blues\"\r\n_CMAP_IMP       = \"Reds\"\r\n_FONT_COUNTRY   = 4\r\n_FONT_SITC2     = 5\r\n_FONT_SITC3     = 4\r\n_FSIZ_GLOBAL    = (12, 5)\r\n_FSIZ_CY        = (14, 18)\r\n_FSIZ_SITC2     = (20, 14)\r\n_FSIZ_SITC3     = (14, 40)\r\n_s07_tag        = f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_read_code_dict(path, code_col):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Load a SITC reference dict. Auto-detects delimiter.\r\n    Returns DataFrame with columns [code_col, 'name', 'nickname'].\r\n    Gracefully returns an empty frame if file is missing.\r\n    Accepts str or Path.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    path = Path(path)  # Option A: coerce str -> Path\r\n\r\n    if not path.exists():\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: ref dict not found: %s — nicknaming unavailable.\", path)\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\r\n\r\n    with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\") as fh:\r\n        lines = [ln.strip() for ln in fh if ln.strip() and not ln.strip().startswith(\"#\")]\r\n\r\n    for _delim in [\"\\t\", \"|\", \";\", \",\"]:\r\n        rows = [ln.split(_delim) for ln in lines]\r\n        k = max(len(r) for r in rows) if rows else 0\r\n        if k >= 3:\r\n            rows = [r + [\"\"] * max(0, k - len(r)) for r in rows]\r\n            df = pd.DataFrame(rows).iloc[:, :3]\r\n            df.columns = [code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"]\r\n\r\n            for c in df.columns:\r\n                df[c] = df[c].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n\r\n            # If first row looks like a header (code is not 1-4 digits), drop it\r\n            if len(df) and not re.fullmatch(r\"\\d{1,4}\", str(df.iloc[0][code_col])):\r\n                df = df.iloc[1:].reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n            return df\r\n\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_make_matrix(df, row_col, col_col, val_col):\r\n    df2 = df[[row_col, col_col, val_col]].groupby([row_col, col_col], as_index=False)[val_col].mean()\r\n    return df2.pivot(index=row_col, columns=col_col, values=val_col).sort_index(axis=1)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_plot_heatmap(mat, cmap, outpath, vmin, vmax, ytick_fs, figsize, yticklabels=None):\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)\r\n    im = ax.imshow(\r\n        mat.to_numpy(dtype=float),\r\n        aspect=\"auto\",\r\n        interpolation=\"nearest\",\r\n        cmap=cmap,\r\n        vmin=vmin,\r\n        vmax=vmax,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    years = mat.columns.tolist()\r\n    ax.set_xticks(range(len(years)))\r\n    ax.set_xticklabels([str(y) for y in years], rotation=90, fontsize=8)\r\n\r\n    rows = mat.index.tolist()\r\n    ax.set_yticks(range(len(rows)))\r\n    ax.set_yticklabels(yticklabels if yticklabels is not None else rows, fontsize=ytick_fs)\r\n\r\n    cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax)\r\n    cbar.set_label(\"Average distance (km)\")\r\n\r\n    fig.tight_layout()\r\n    outpath = Path(outpath)  # safe if passed as str\r\n    fig.savefig(outpath, dpi=_DPI)\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 1) Global line plot (exports + imports) ──────────────────\r\n_g = _s07_gl_df.copy()\r\n_g[\"year\"] = _g[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=_FSIZ_GLOBAL)\r\nax.plot(\r\n    _g[\"year\"],\r\n    _g[\"global_export_distance_km\"],\r\n    label=\"Exports\",\r\n    color=_EXP_COLOR,\r\n    linewidth=2,\r\n)\r\nax.plot(\r\n    _g[\"year\"],\r\n    _g[\"global_import_distance_km\"],\r\n    label=\"Imports\",\r\n    color=_IMP_COLOR,\r\n    linewidth=2,\r\n    linestyle=\"--\",\r\n)\r\n\r\nax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\r\nax.set_ylabel(\"Average distance (km)\")\r\nax.legend()\r\nax.grid(True, linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.4)\r\n\r\n_out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_global_line_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\nfig.tight_layout()\r\nfig.savefig(_out, dpi=_DPI)\r\nplt.close(fig)\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 2) Country heatmaps ──────────────────────────────────────\r\n_cy = _s07_cy_df.copy()\r\n_cy[\"year\"] = _cy[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n_cy[\"country\"] = _cy[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\nfor _flow, _col, _cmap in [\r\n    (\"exports\", \"avg_export_distance_km\", _CMAP_EXP),\r\n    (\"imports\", \"avg_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _cy[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_cy[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_cy, \"country\", \"year\", _col)\r\n    if _mat.empty:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: country heatmap skipped (empty) for %s\", _flow)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    _vmin = _mat.loc[_mat.median(axis=1).sort_values(ascending=False).index]\r\n\r\n    _out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_country_heatmap_{_flow}_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\n    _s07_plot_heatmap(_mat, _cmap, _out, _vmin, _vmax, _FONT_COUNTRY, _FSIZ_CY)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 3) SITC-2 heatmaps ───────────────────────────────────────\r\n_s2 = \"global_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _s2[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_s2[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_s2, \"sitc2\", \"year\", _col).sort_index()\r\n    if float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 99))\r\n\r\n    _lbls = []\r\n    for _c in _mat.index:\r\n        if _s2d.empty:\r\n            _lbls.append(_c)\r\n        else:\r\n            _n = _s3[\"sitc3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n\r\n_s3d = _s07_read_code_dict(SITC3_DICT_PATH, \"sitc3\")\r\nif not _s3d.empty:\r\n    _s3d[\"sitc3\"] = _s3d[\"sitc3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n\r\nfor _flow, _col, _cmap in [\r\n    (\"exports\", \"global_export_distance_km\", _CMAP_EXP),\r\n    (\"imports\", \"global_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _s3[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_s3[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_s3, \"sitc3\", \"year\", _col).sort_index()\r\n    if _mat.empty:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: SITC3 heatmap skipped (empty) for %s\", _flow)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    _vmin = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 1))\r\n    _vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 99))\r\n\r\n    _lbls = []\r\n    for _c in _mat.index:\r\n        if _s3d.empty:\r\n            _lbls.append(_c)\r\n        else:\r\n            _n = _s3d.loc[_s3d[\"sitc3\"] == _c, \"nickname\"].values\r\n            _lbls.append(f\"{_c}-{_n[0]}\" if len(_n) and str(_n[0]).strip() else _c)\r\n\r\n    _out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_sitc3_heatmap_{_flow}_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\n    _s07_plot_heatmap(_mat, _cmap, _out, _vmin, _vmax, _FONT_SITC3, _FSIZ_SITC3, _lbls)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"[Stage 07] All visualizations saved -> {DIST_FIG}\")\r\n===== CELL 137 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 07 — Country Export Distance Panel Figures\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\n\r\n_s07_tag = f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_country_panels(country_list, outfile):\r\n    \"\"\"2×4 (or smaller) panel of avg_export_distance_km lines, one subplot per country.\"\"\"\r\n    cy = _s07_cy_df.copy()\r\n    cy[\"year\"]    = pd.to_numeric(cy[\"year\"], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    cy[\"country\"] = cy[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n    cy[\"avg_export_distance_km\"] = pd.to_numeric(cy[\"avg_export_distance_km\"], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    cy = cy.dropna(subset=[\"year\",\"avg_export_distance_km\"])\r\n    cy[\"year\"] = cy[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    missing = [c for c in country_list if c not in cy[\"country\"].unique()]\r\n    if missing:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07 panels: missing countries in data: %s\", missing)\r\n    country_list = [c for c in country_list if c not in missing]\r\n    if not country_list:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07 panels: no valid countries — skipping %s\", outfile.name)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    sub  = cy[cy[\"country\"].isin(country_list)].copy()\r\n    ymin = sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"].min()\r\n    ymax = sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"].max()\r\n    n    = len(country_list)\r\n    ncol = min(4, n)\r\n    nrow = (n + ncol - 1) // ncol\r\n\r\n    fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrow, ncol, figsize=(4*ncol, 3*nrow), sharex=True, sharey=True)\r\n    axes = np.array(axes).flatten()\r\n\r\n    for ax, c in zip(axes, country_list):\r\n        _d = sub[sub[\"country\"] == c].sort_values(\"year\")\r\n        ax.plot(_d[\"year\"], _d[\"avg_export_distance_km\"], linewidth=1.8)\r\n        ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\r\n        ax.set_xlabel(\"\"); ax.set_ylabel(\"\")\r\n        ax.text(0.05, 0.90, c, transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n                fontsize=10, fontweight=\"bold\", ha=\"left\", va=\"top\")\r\n        ax.tick_params(axis=\"both\", labelsize=8)\r\n    for ax in axes[n:]:\r\n        ax.axis(\"off\")\r\n\r\n    fig.tight_layout()\r\n    fig.savefig(outfile, dpi=300)\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved panel %s\", outfile.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n_s07_country_panels(\r\n    [\"USA\",\"CHN\",\"DEU\",\"JPN\",\"FRA\",\"GBR\",\"CAN\",\"KOR\"],\r\n    DIST_FIG / f\"distance_panels_exports_major_economies_{_s07_tag}.png\",\r\n)\r\n_s07_country_panels(\r\n    [\"ARG\",\"BRA\",\"CHL\",\"COL\",\"DOM\",\"MEX\",\"PER\",\"URY\"],\r\n    DIST_FIG / f\"distance_panels_exports_latin_america_{_s07_tag}.png\",\r\n)\r\n_s07_country_panels(\r\n    [\"VNM\",\"THA\",\"IND\",\"IDN\",\"SAU\",\"EGY\",\"NGA\",\"ZAF\"],\r\n    DIST_FIG / f\"distance_panels_exports_emerging_{_s07_tag}.png\",\r\n)\r\nprint(f\"[Stage 07] Country panels saved -> {DIST_FIG}\")\r\n"}}
