{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:39:25.639Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_tCEo6ZopH5bhsj1JFFSs4CFj","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.2 seconds\nTotal output lines: 5960\nOutput:\n===== CELL 64 first 400 lines =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CONFIG (edit TRADE_DIR if needed; add ISO3 codes in FOCUS_CODES)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\r\n\r\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\nOUT_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n# Add / remove ISO3 codes here (manual control)\r\nFOCUS_CODES = [\"BRA\", \"ARG\", \"MEX\", \"COL\", \"CHL\", \"CAN\", \"USA\", \"CHN\", \"JPN\", \"GBR\",\"DEU\", \"FRA\"]\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\r\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> str:\r\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\r\n    if not codes:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\r\n        return \";\".join(codes)\r\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# DuckDB connection\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\n\r\n# Collect rows per country, then write one file per ISO3\r\nrows_by_country = {c: [] for c in FOCUS_CODES}\r\n\r\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    for c in FOCUS_CODES:\r\n        # Exports: exporter=c, partner is importer\r\n        ex = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            WHERE exporter = '{c}'\r\n            GROUP BY importer\r\n        \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n        # Imports: importer=c, partner is exporter\r\n        im = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            WHERE importer = '{c}'\r\n            GROUP BY exporter\r\n        \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n        ex[\"partner\"] = ex[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n        im[\"partner\"] = im[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n        exg = ex.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        img = im.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n\r\n        ex_unmatched = exg[\"lat\"].isna() | exg[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n        im_unmatched = img[\"lat\"].isna() | img[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n\r\n        exm = exg.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\r\n        imm = img.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\r\n\r\n        total_exports = float(exm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0\r\n        total_imports = float(imm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0\r\n\r\n        lat_exports = weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan\r\n        lon_exports = weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan\r\n\r\n        lat_imports = weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan\r\n        lon_imports = weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan\r\n\r\n        rows_by_country[c].append({\r\n            \"year\": year,\r\n\r\n            \"lat_exports\": lat_exports,\r\n            \"lon_exports\": lon_exports,\r\n            \"lat_imports\": lat_imports,\r\n            \"lon_imports\": lon_imports,\r\n\r\n            \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": total_exports,\r\n            \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": total_imports,\r\n\r\n            \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(exg)),\r\n            \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(img)),\r\n            \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\r\n            \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\r\n\r\n            \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(exg.loc[ex_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n            \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(img.loc[im_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n        })\r\n\r\n# Write one CSV per ISO3 (overwrite)\r\nfor c, rows in rows_by_country.items():\r\n    out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\n    out_file = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, f\"barycenter_{c}_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n    out.to_csv(out_file, index=False)\r\n\r\n    if len(out):\r\n        print(f\"Wrote: {out_file} | years {int(out['year'].min())}-{int(out['year'].max())} | rows={len(out)}\")\r\n    else:\r\n        print(f\"Wrote: {out_file} | no rows (code may be absent in trade files)\")\r\n\r\nprint(\"\\nTo add more countries, edit FOCUS_CODES at the top (ISO3 codes).\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 66 first 400 lines =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString, box\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\n\r\nCOUNTRIES = [\"BRA\", \"ARG\", \"MEX\", \"COL\", \"CHL\", \"CAN\", \"JPN\", \"GBR\", \"DEU\", \"FRA\"]\r\nCOUNTRY_NAMES = {\r\n    \"BRA\": \"Brazil\", \"ARG\": \"Argentina\", \"MEX\": \"Mexico\", \"COL\": \"Colombia\", \"CHL\": \"Chile\",\r\n    \"CAN\": \"Canada\", \"JPN\": \"Japan\", \"GBR\": \"United Kingdom\", \"DEU\": \"Germany\", \"FRA\": \"France\"\r\n}\r\n\r\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1980, 1985, 1994, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2023}\r\nLABEL_FONTSIZE = 5\r\n\r\nOUT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_panel_exploratory_mercator.png\")\r\nOUT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_panel_exploratory_mercator.pdf\")\r\n\r\n# Mercator\r\nCRS_MERC = CRS.from_epsg(3857)\r\n\r\n# Global frame (Mercator-safe latitudes)\r\nGLOBAL_LON_MIN, GLOBAL_LON_MAX = -180, 180\r\nGLOBAL_LAT_MIN, GLOBAL_LAT_MAX = -60, 85  # avoid near-pole blow-up\r\n\r\n# Precompute projected bounds for consistent axes across panels\r\nbbox_ll = gpd.GeoSeries([box(GLOBAL_LON_MIN, GLOBAL_LAT_MIN, GLOBAL_LON_MAX, GLOBAL_LAT_MAX)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nbbox_p = bbox_ll.to_crs(CRS_MERC).iloc[0]\r\nXMIN, YMIN, XMAX, YMAX = bbox_p.bounds\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx=40000, dy=40000, fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\r\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y),\r\n                fontsize=fontsize, color=\"black\", alpha=0.8, zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\ndef load_country_barycenters(iso3: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    fp = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_{iso3}_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fp):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file for {iso3}: {fp}\")\r\n\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(fp).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    needed = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    missing = [c for c in needed if c not in df.columns]\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"{iso3} file missing columns: {missing}\")\r\n\r\n    return df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\ndef plot_country(ax, world_p, iso3: str):\r\n    df = load_country_barycenters(iso3)\r\n\r\n    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_exports\"], df[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MERC).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\n    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_imports\"], df[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MERC).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\n    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=CRS_MERC)\r\n    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=CRS_MERC)\r\n\r\n    # Basemap\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.25, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    # Trajectories\r\n    imports_path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.9, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\r\n    exports_path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.9, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Points\r\n    imports.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=4, zorder=5)\r\n    exports.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=4, zorder=6)\r\n\r\n    # Labels\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, imports, dx=40000, dy=40000, fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE)\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, exports, dx=40000, dy=40000, fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE)\r\n\r\n    # Consistent global extent\r\n    ax.set_xlim(XMIN, XMAX)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(YMIN, YMAX)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    ax.set_title(f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3})\", fontsize=10)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap (remove Antarctica) and project once\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\n# Clip to Mercator-safe latitudes for cleaner rendering\r\nclip_poly = gpd.GeoSeries([box(-180, GLOBAL_LAT_MIN, 180, GLOBAL_LAT_MAX)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nworld = gpd.clip(world, clip_poly)\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(CRS_MERC)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Panel layout: 5 rows x 2 cols (10 countries)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfig, axes = plt.subplots(5, 2, figsize=(12, 18), constrained_layout=True)\r\naxes = axes.flatten()\r\n\r\nfor ax, iso3 in zip(axes, COUNTRIES):\r\n    plot_country(ax, world_p, iso3)\r\n\r\n# Shared legend (bottom)\r\nlegend_elements = [\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker='o', color='w', label='Imports barycenter',\r\n           markerfacecolor='red', markersize=6),\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker='o', color='w', label='Exports barycenter',\r\n           markerfacecolor='dodgerblue', markersize=6),\r\n]\r\nfig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower center\", ncol=2, frameon=False, fontsize=10)\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.close(fig)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 68 first 400 lines =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString, box\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\n\r\nCOUNTRIES = [\"BRA\",\"ARG\",\"CHL\",\"COL\",\"MEX\",\"CAN\",\"JPN\",\"GBR\",\"DEU\",\"FRA\"]\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_NAMES = {\r\n    \"BRA\": \"Brazil\",\r\n    \"ARG\": \"Argentina\",\r\n    \"CHL\": \"Chile\",\r\n    \"COL\": \"Colombia\",\r\n    \"MEX\": \"Mexico\",\r\n    \"CAN\": \"Canada\",\r\n    \"JPN\": \"Japan\",\r\n    \"GBR\": \"United Kingdom\",\r\n    \"DEU\": \"Germany\",\r\n    \"FRA\": \"France\",\r\n}\r\n\r\n# Labels (updated): use 2022 (not 2023)\r\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1981, 1985, 1988, 1994, 1997, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2022}\r\nEMPH_YEARS = {1977, 2022}  # bold + italic\r\n\r\n# Visuals\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"lightgray\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nBASEMAP_LW = 0.35\r\nPATH_LW = 1.1\r\nPATH_ALPHA = 0.28\r\nPOINT_SIZE = 8\r\n\r\n# Smaller year labels\r\nLABEL_FONTSIZE = 4\r\nLABEL_ALPHA = 0.8\r\n\r\n# Output filename format: barycenter_<ISO3>_exports/imports\r\n# Output filename templates (per-country, per-flow)\r\nOUT_FMT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.png\")\r\nOUT_FMT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.pdf\")\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CRS helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef aeqd(lat0, lon0) -> CRS:\r\n    return CRS.from_proj4(f\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0={lat0} +lon_0={lon0} +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Projection + extent rules (lon/lat)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# 1) Argentina, Brazil, Chile:\r\n#    Center North Africa; N=southern France (~43N), S=equatorial Africa (0),\r\n#    W=eastern tip of Brazil (~-35), E=Iraq (~44E)\r\nCRS_N_AFRICA = aeqd(20, 10)\r\nBBOX_N_AFRICA = (-35, 0, 44, 43)\r\n\r\n# 2) Colombia:\r\n#    N=UK (~58N), S=Ecuador (~-5), W=Yucatan (~-92), E=France (~2)\r\nCRS_COL = aeqd(15, -40)\r\nBBOX_COL = (-92, -5, 2, 58)\r\n\r\n# 3) Mexico:\r\n#    Projection centered around NY (ok)\r\n#    Extent: N=southern Canada (~49N), S=southern Mexico (~14N),\r\n#            W=California (~-125), E=Spain (~3E)\r\nCRS_MEX = aeqd(40.7, -74.0)\r\nBBOX_MEX = (-125, 14, 3, 49)\r\n\r\n# 4) Canada: use same projection and extent as Mexico\r\nCRS_CAN = CRS_MEX\r\nBBOX_CAN = BBOX_MEX\r\n\r\n# 5) Japan:\r\n#    Center Egypt; N=southern Europe (~45N), S=Yemen (~12N),\r\n#    W=Canary Islands (~-16), E=Pakistan (~75E)\r\nCRS_JPN = aeqd(26, 30)\r\nBBOX_JPN = (-16, 12, 75, 45)\r\n\r\n# 6) European countries: use Mediterranean projection + extent from USA logic\r\nCRS_MED = aeqd(35, 18)\r\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\nEU_ISOS = {\"GBR\", \"DEU\", \"FRA\"}\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_SETTINGS = {\r\n    \"ARG\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"BRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"CHL\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n\r\n    \"COL\": {\"crs\": CRS_COL,      \"bbox\": BBOX_COL},\r\n\r\n    \"MEX\": {\"crs\": CRS_MEX,      \"bbox\": BBOX_MEX},\r\n    \"CAN\": {\"crs\": CRS_CAN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_CAN},\r\n\r\n    \"JPN\": {\"crs\": CRS_JPN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_JPN},\r\n\r\n    # EU: bbox ignored; extent computed from global barycenter file under CRS_MED\r\n    \"GBR\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"DEU\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"FRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n}\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef load_barycenter_df(iso3: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    fp = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_{iso3}_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fp):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing barycenter file: {fp}\")\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(fp).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    needed = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    missing = [c for c in needed if c not in df.columns]\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"{iso3}: missing columns {missing} in {fp}\")\r\n    return df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx, dy):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\r\n            is_emph = y in EMPH_YEARS\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                r.geometry.x + dx,\r\n                r.geometry.y + dy,\r\n                str(y),\r\n                fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE,\r\n                color=\"black\",\r\n                alpha=LABEL_ALPHA,\r\n                fontweight=(\"bold\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                fontstyle=(\"italic\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\ndef project_bbox(crs_target: CRS, bbox_lonlat):\r\n    lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max = bbox_lonlat\r\n    bbox_ll = gpd.GeoSeries([box(lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    bbox_p = bbox_ll.to_crs(crs_target).iloc[0]\r\n    return bbox_p.bounds  # xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax\r\n\r\ndef compute_med_extent_from_global():\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Reproduce the USA Mediterranean extent logic:\r\n    project global import+export barycenters to CRS_MED and take bounds + buffer.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    if not os.path.exists(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing global barycenter file for EU extent: {GLOBAL_BARY_FILE}\")\r\n\r\n    g = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(\r\n        subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ge = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_exports\"], g[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    gi = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_imports\"], g[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([ge.geometry, gi.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=CRS_MED\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n\r\n    buffer = 1.2e6\r\n    return (minx - buffer, miny - buffer, maxx + buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\nEU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX = compute_med_extent_from_global()\r\n\r\ndef get_extent_for_country(iso3: str):\r\n    s = COUNTRY_SETTINGS[iso3]\r\n    crs = s[\"crs\"]\r\n    if iso3 in EU_ISOS:\r\n        return crs, (EU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX)\r\n    xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax = project_bbox(crs, s[\"bbox\"])\r\n    return crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)\r\n\r\ndef render_map_for_country_flow(world_ll, iso3: str, flow: str):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    flow: \"imports\" or \"exports\"\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) = get_extent_for_country(iso3)\r\n    df = load_barycenter_df(iso3)\r\n\r\n    if flow == \"imports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"\r\n        color = \"red\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) — Imports barycenter\"\r\n    elif flow == \"exports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"\r\n        color = \"dodgerblue\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) — Exports barycenter\"\r\n    else:\r\n        raise ValueError(\"flow must be 'imports' or 'exports'\")\r\n\r\n    gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_col], df[lat_col])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\").to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(gdf.geometry.tolist())], crs=crs)\r\n\r\n    world_p = world_ll.to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=BASEMAP_LW, edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE, color=BASEMAP_FACE, zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=PATH_LW, color=color, alpha=PATH_ALPHA, zorder=3)\r\n    gdf.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=POINT_SIZE, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Labels (smaller) with emphasis on 1977 and 2022\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, gdf, dx=15000, dy=15000)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_xlim(xmin, xmax)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\r\n\r\n    # Lower-left legend text\r\n    ax.text(\r\n        0.02, 0.02, footer,\r\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n        fontsize=9,\r\n        color=\"black\",\r\n        ha=\"left\",\r\n        va=\"bottom\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n\r\n    out_png = OUT_FMT_PNG.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n    out_pdf = OUT_FMT_PDF.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_png}\")\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_pdf}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n …42350 tokens truncated…rip()\r\n\r\n    # Drop header-like first row if code isn't numeric-ish\r\n    if len(df):\r\n        first_code = str(df.loc[0, \"code\"]).strip()\r\n        if not re.fullmatch(r\"\\d{1,4}\", first_code or \"\"):\r\n            df = df.iloc[1:].reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n    return df\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_sitc3_labels(dict_df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    dict_df = dict_df.copy()\r\n\r\n    # Keep numeric part only; preserve leading zeros via zfill(3)\r\n    dict_df[\"code\"] = dict_df[\"code\"].str.extract(r\"(\\d+)\")[0].fillna(dict_df[\"code\"])\r\n    dict_df[\"code\"] = dict_df[\"code\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n\r\n    # Validate 3-digit\r\n    lens = dict_df[\"code\"].str.len().value_counts().to_dict()\r\n    if set(lens.keys()) - {3}:\r\n        raise ValueError(\r\n            f\"Dictionary codes are not strictly 3-digit after zfill. Length distribution: {lens}. \"\r\n            f\"Check SITC3_DICT_PATH points to the 3-digit file.\"\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    # Display label: \"000 – Nickname\"\r\n    dict_df[\"display\"] = dict_df[\"nickname\"].replace({\"\": np.nan})\r\n    dict_df[\"display\"] = dict_df[\"display\"].fillna(dict_df[\"name\"].replace({\"\": np.nan}))\r\n    dict_df[\"display\"] = dict_df[\"display\"].fillna(dict_df[\"code\"])\r\n    dict_df[\"display\"] = dict_df[\"code\"] + \" – \" + dict_df[\"display\"]\r\n\r\n    dict_df = dict_df.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"code\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return dict_df[[\"code\", \"display\"]]\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# HEATMAP PLOTTER\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef plot_sitc3_heatmap(moran_csv: str, labels_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, out_path: str):\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(moran_csv, dtype={\"sitc3\": str, \"flow\": str})\r\n    required = {\"year\", \"flow\", \"sitc3\", \"moran_i\"}\r\n    missing = required - set(df.columns)\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"Moran SITC-3 CSV missing columns: {missing}\")\r\n\r\n    df[\"sitc3\"] = df[\"sitc3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n    df[\"year\"] = pd.to_numeric(df[\"year\"], errors=\"raise\")\r\n\r\n    d = df[df[\"flow\"].str.lower() == flow.lower()].copy()\r\n    if d.empty:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No rows found for flow='{flow}'\")\r\n\r\n    # Pivot to matrix\r\n    mat = d.pivot(index=\"sitc3\", columns=\"year\", values=\"moran_i\")\r\n    mat = mat.sort_index()\r\n    mat = mat.reindex(sorted(mat.columns), axis=1)\r\n\r\n    # Labels\r\n    label_map = dict(zip(labels_df[\"code\"], labels_df[\"display\"]))\r\n    y_labels = [label_map.get(code, code) for code in mat.index]\r\n\r\n    # FIXED SCALE (-0.5 to 0.5) + keep arr defined\r\n    arr = mat.values.astype(float)\r\n    norm = TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=-0.20, vcenter=0.0, vmax=0.20)\r\n\r\n    # Plot (no title)\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 14), dpi=200)\r\n    im = ax.imshow(arr, aspect=\"auto\", interpolation=\"nearest\", norm=norm, cmap=\"RdBu_r\")\r\n\r\n    # X axis (years) with reduced tick density\r\n    years = mat.columns.tolist()\r\n    ax.set_xticks(range(len(years)))\r\n    show_every = 2\r\n    ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) if (i % show_every == 0) else \"\" for i, y in enumerate(years)], rotation=90)\r\n\r\n    # Y axis (sectors)\r\n    ax.set_yticks(range(len(y_labels)))\r\n    ax.set_yticklabels(y_labels, fontsize=4)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_xlabel(\"\")\r\n    ax.set_ylabel(\"\")\r\n\r\n    cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax)\r\n    cbar.set_label(\"Moran's I\")\r\n\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    fig.savefig(out_path, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# RUN\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndict_raw = read_code_dictionary(SITC3_DICT_PATH)\r\nlabels = build_sitc3_labels(dict_raw)\r\n\r\nplot_sitc3_heatmap(MORAN_SITC3_CSV, labels, flow=\"exports\", out_path=OUT_EXPORTS)\r\nplot_sitc3_heatmap(MORAN_SITC3_CSV, labels, flow=\"imports\", out_path=OUT_IMPORTS)\r\n\r\nprint(\"Saved:\")\r\nprint(OUT_EXPORTS)\r\nprint(OUT_IMPORTS)\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 125 first 400 lines =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 06 — Prerequisite check\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport glob as _glob\r\n\r\n_s06_pattern = str(BARY_DATA / f\"barycenter_*_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n_s06_files   = _glob.glob(_s06_pattern)\r\n\r\nif not _s06_files:\r\n    raise FileNotFoundError(\r\n        f\"Stage 06 requires per-country barycenter files in:\\n  {BARY_DATA}\\n\"\r\n        f\"  Pattern: barycenter_<ISO3>_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\\n\"\r\n        \"  Run Stage 03 (Multi-Country Barycenters, Cell 64) first.\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 06 prerequisite OK: %d barycenter files found.\", len(_s06_files))\r\nprint(f\"[OK] {len(_s06_files)} per-country barycenter files found in {BARY_DATA}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 126 first 400 lines =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 06 — Drift & Speed Computation  (COMPLETE, FIXED)\r\n#   - Works with per-country barycenter CSVs that DO NOT include a 'country' column\r\n#   - Infers ISO3 country code from filename: barycenter_<ISO3>_<START>_<END>.csv\r\n#   - Computes steps + indices for exports and imports\r\n# ============================================================\r\n\r\nimport os\r\nimport re\r\nimport glob as _glob\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# ── CONFIG ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\r\n_S06_BARY_GLOB  = str(BARY_DATA / f\"barycenter_*_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\nS06_MIN_STEP_KM = 75.0   # steps shorter than this are treated as noise\r\nS06_MIN_STEPS   = 8      # countries with fewer valid steps are excluded from indices\r\nS06_DROP_CODES  = {\"WLD\", \"WORLD\", \"ALL\"}\r\n_S06_R_EARTH    = 6371.0088\r\n\r\n_s06_tag          = f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}\"\r\nS06_OUT_STEPS_EXP = DRIFT_DATA / f\"drift_steps_exports_{_s06_tag}.csv\"\r\nS06_OUT_STEPS_IMP = DRIFT_DATA / f\"drift_steps_imports_{_s06_tag}.csv\"\r\nS06_OUT_IDX_EXP   = DRIFT_DATA / f\"drift_indices_exports_{_s06_tag}.csv\"\r\nS06_OUT_IDX_IMP   = DRIFT_DATA / f\"drift_indices_imports_{_s06_tag}.csv\"\r\n\r\n# ── FALLBACK LOGGER (if not defined earlier) ────────────────\r\ntry:\r\n    logger  # noqa: F821\r\nexcept NameError:\r\n    import logging\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"trade-stage06\")\r\n    logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)\r\n    if not logger.handlers:\r\n        h = logging.StreamHandler()\r\n        h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter(\"[%(levelname)s] %(message)s\"))\r\n        logger.addHandler(h)\r\n\r\n# ── GEO HELPERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s06_gc_dist(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    \"\"\"Haversine great-circle distance (km). Vectorised.\"\"\"\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float)); p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float)); l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2)**2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2)**2\r\n    return _S06_R_EARTH * 2.0 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\ndef _s06_bearing(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    \"\"\"Initial bearing point1->point2, degrees [0,360). Vectorised.\"\"\"\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float)); p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y  = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x  = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\ndef _s06_east_km(dist_km, bearing_deg):\r\n    \"\"\"Signed eastward component: dist*sin(bearing). Positive = east.\"\"\"\r\n    return np.asarray(dist_km, float) * np.sin(np.deg2rad(np.asarray(bearing_deg, float)))\r\n\r\n# ── COUNTRY FROM FILENAME ───────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s06_infer_country_from_filename(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Expect filenames like:\r\n      barycenter_MEX_1976_2023.csv\r\n      barycenter_usa_1976_2023.csv\r\n    Returns ISO3 uppercase or None if not inferable.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    base = os.path.basename(fp)\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", base)\r\n    if not m:\r\n        return None\r\n    return m.group(1).upper()\r\n\r\n# ── DATA LOADING ─────────────────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s06_load_panel(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Load all per-country barycenter files matching glob.\r\n\r\n    Your file schema (no 'country' column) must include at least:\r\n      year, lat_exports, lon_exports, lat_imports, lon_imports\r\n\r\n    Country is inferred from filename.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    files = sorted(_glob.glob(bary_glob))\r\n    if not files:\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No files matching: {bary_glob}\")\r\n\r\n    need = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    parts = []\r\n    skipped = []\r\n\r\n    for fp in files:\r\n        iso3 = _s06_infer_country_from_filename(fp)\r\n        if not iso3:\r\n            skipped.append((fp, \"cannot infer ISO3 from filename\"))\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            cols = list(pd.read_csv(fp, nrows=0).columns)\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            skipped.append((fp, f\"failed to read header: {e}\"))\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        if not set(need).issubset(cols):\r\n            skipped.append((fp, f\"missing required cols; has: {cols}\"))\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp, usecols=need)\r\n        df[\"country\"] = iso3\r\n        parts.append(df)\r\n\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        msg = \"Stage 06: No compatible barycenter files were found.\\n\"\r\n        msg += f\"Pattern: {bary_glob}\\n\"\r\n        msg += \"Skipped examples (up to 10):\\n\"\r\n        for fp, why in skipped[:10]:\r\n            msg += f\"  - {fp}: {why}\\n\"\r\n        raise ValueError(msg)\r\n\r\n    panel = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n\r\n    # Standardize\r\n    panel[\"country\"] = panel[\"country\"].astype(str).str.strip().str.upper()\r\n    panel[\"year\"]    = pd.to_numeric(panel[\"year\"], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    panel = panel.dropna(subset=[\"year\"])\r\n    panel[\"year\"] = panel[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    panel = panel[~panel[\"country\"].isin(S06_DROP_CODES)]\r\n    panel = panel.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"year\"], keep=\"last\")\r\n\r\n    for c in [\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]:\r\n        panel[c] = pd.to_numeric(panel[c], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 06: loaded %d rows, %d countries (matched files: %d).\",\r\n        len(panel), panel[\"country\"].nunique(), len(parts)\r\n    )\r\n    return panel\r\n\r\n# ── STEP CONSTRUCTION ────────────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s06_build_steps(panel: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Build consecutive-year steps for one flow ('exports' or 'imports').\r\n    Only t -> t+1 pairs are kept (no gap-year steps).\r\n    Steps shorter than S06_MIN_STEP_KM are dropped as noise.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    assert flow in (\"exports\", \"imports\")\r\n    lat_c, lon_c = f\"lat_{flow}\", f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n\r\n    df = (\r\n        panel[[\"country\", \"year\", lat_c, lon_c]]\r\n        .dropna(subset=[lat_c, lon_c])\r\n        .sort_values([\"country\", \"year\"])\r\n        .reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    )\r\n    df[\"year_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[\"year\"].shift(-1)\r\n    df[\"lat_next\"]  = df.groupby(\"country\")[lat_c].shift(-1)\r\n    df[\"lon_next\"]  = df.groupby(\"country\")[lon_c].shift(-1)\r\n\r\n    # only consecutive years\r\n    df = df[df[\"year_next\"] == df[\"year\"] + 1].copy()\r\n\r\n    dist    = _s06_gc_dist(df[lat_c].values, df[lon_c].values,\r\n                           df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values)\r\n    bearing = _s06_bearing(df[lat_c].values, df[lon_c].values,\r\n                           df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values)\r\n    east    = _s06_east_km(dist, bearing)\r\n\r\n    steps = pd.DataFrame({\r\n        \"country\":     df[\"country\"].values,\r\n        \"t0\":          df[\"year\"].astype(int).values,\r\n        \"t1\":          df[\"year_next\"].astype(int).values,\r\n        \"dist_km\":     dist,\r\n        \"bearing_deg\": bearing,\r\n        \"east_km\":     east,\r\n    })\r\n\r\n    # Drop tiny steps (noise)\r\n    steps = steps[steps[\"dist_km\"] >= S06_MIN_STEP_KM].copy()\r\n\r\n    # Sign for instability index (ignore exactly zero east component)\r\n    steps[\"sign\"] = np.sign(steps[\"east_km\"])\r\n    steps = steps[steps[\"sign\"] != 0].copy()\r\n    steps[\"sign\"] = steps[\"sign\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    return steps.reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n# ── INDEX COMPUTATION ────────────────────────────────────────\r\ndef _s06_compute_indices(steps: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    One summary row per country. Countries with < S06_MIN_STEPS valid steps excluded.\r\n\r\n    Output columns:\r\n      country, n_steps, avg_speed_km, median_speed_km,\r\n      EW_index, instability_index, start_year, end_year\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    cols = [\r\n        \"country\", \"n_steps\", \"avg_speed_km\", \"median_speed_km\",\r\n        \"EW_index\", \"instability_index\", \"start_year\", \"end_year\"\r\n    ]\r\n    if steps.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)\r\n\r\n    out = []\r\n    for country, g in steps.sort_values([\"country\", \"t0\"]).groupby(\"country\", sort=False):\r\n        g = g.sort_values(\"t0\")\r\n        n = len(g)\r\n        if n < S06_MIN_STEPS:\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        denom_ew = float(np.abs(g[\"east_km\"]).sum())\r\n        signs = g[\"sign\"].values\r\n\r\n        out.append({\r\n            \"country\":           country,\r\n            \"n_steps\":           int(n),\r\n            \"avg_speed_km\":      float(g[\"dist_km\"].mean()),\r\n            \"median_speed_km\":   float(g[\"dist_km\"].median()),\r\n            \"EW_index\":          float(g[\"east_km\"].sum() / denom_ew) if denom_ew > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n            \"instability_index\": float(np.sum(signs[1:] != signs[:-1]) / (n - 1)) if n > 1 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n            \"start_year\":        int(g[\"t0\"].min()),\r\n            \"end_year\":          int(g[\"t1\"].max()),\r\n        })\r\n\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(out, columns=cols).sort_values(\"country\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n# ── RUN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 06: loading barycenter panel from %s\", BARY_DATA)\r\n_s06_panel     = _s06_load_panel(_S06_BARY_GLOB)\r\n_s06_steps_exp = _s06_build_steps(_s06_panel, \"exports\")\r\n_s06_steps_imp = _s06_build_steps(_s06_panel, \"imports\")\r\n_s06_idx_exp   = _s06_compute_indices(_s06_steps_exp)\r\n_s06_idx_imp   = _s06_compute_indices(_s06_steps_imp)\r\n\r\n# Ensure output dir exists\r\nDRIFT_DATA.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n_s06_steps_exp.to_csv(S06_OUT_STEPS_EXP, index=False)\r\n_s06_steps_imp.to_csv(S06_OUT_STEPS_IMP, index=False)\r\n_s06_idx_exp.to_csv(S06_OUT_IDX_EXP,     index=False)\r\n_s06_idx_imp.to_csv(S06_OUT_IDX_IMP,     index=False)\r\n\r\n_s06_nc = _s06_panel[\"country\"].nunique()\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 06: complete. %d export-idx rows, %d import-idx rows.\", len(_s06_idx_exp), len(_s06_idx_imp))\r\n\r\nprint(\"\\n\" + \"─\"*55)\r\nprint(\"  Stage 06 — Barycenter Motion Indices\")\r\nprint(f\"  Countries in panel      : {_s06_nc}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Export steps (valid)    : {len(_s06_steps_exp):,}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Import steps (valid)    : {len(_s06_steps_imp):,}\")\r\nprint(f\"  Countries w/ exp indices: {len(_s06_idx_exp)}  (excluded <{S06_MIN_STEPS} steps: {_s06_nc - len(_s06_idx_exp)})\")\r\nprint(f\"  Countries w/ imp indices: {len(_s06_idx_imp)}  (excluded <{S06_MIN_STEPS} steps: {_s06_nc - len(_s06_idx_imp)})\")\r\nprint(f\"  Outputs -> {DRIFT_DATA}\")\r\nfor _f in [S06_OUT_STEPS_EXP, S06_OUT_STEPS_IMP, S06_OUT_IDX_EXP, S06_OUT_IDX_IMP]:\r\n    print(f\"    {_f.name}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 128 first 400 lines =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 06 — Motion Maps  (Equal Earth projection, 8 maps)\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom matplotlib.colors import TwoSlopeNorm\r\n\r\n_S06_EQEARTH = \"+proj=eqearth +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\"\r\n_S06_MAP_METRICS = [\r\n    (\"avg_speed_km\",      \"YlOrRd\", None),   # sequential — high = fast\r\n    (\"median_speed_km\",   \"YlOrRd\", None),\r\n    (\"EW_index\",          \"RdBu_r\", 0.0),    # diverging — red=east, blue=west\r\n    (\"instability_index\", \"PuRd\",   None),\r\n]\r\n_s06_tag = f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s06_robust_lims(series, qlo=0.01, qhi=0.99):\r\n    s = series.replace([float(\"inf\"), float(\"-inf\")], float(\"nan\")).dropna()\r\n    if s.empty:\r\n        return 0.0, 1.0\r\n    lo, hi = float(s.quantile(qlo)), float(s.quantile(qhi))\r\n    if np.isclose(lo, hi):\r\n        lo, hi = float(s.min()), float(s.max())\r\n        if np.isclose(lo, hi):\r\n            lo, hi = lo - 1.0, hi + 1.0\r\n    return lo, hi\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s06_csk_fallback(df_m, source=\"CSK\", targets=(\"CZE\",\"SVK\")):\r\n    \"\"\"Proxy CZE/SVK with CSK values for choropleth coverage of historic successor states.\"\"\"\r\n    src = df_m[df_m[\"country\"] == source]\r\n    if src.empty:\r\n        return df_m\r\n    result = df_m.copy()\r\n    for t in targets:\r\n        if t not in result[\"country\"].values:\r\n            row = src.iloc[0].copy(); row[\"country\"] = t\r\n            result = pd.concat([result, row.to_frame().T], ignore_index=True)\r\n    return result\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s06_plot_choropleth(world_p, metrics_df, col, cmap, center, outpath):\r\n    m   = metrics_df[[\"country\", col]].rename(columns={\"country\": \"_iso3\"})\r\n    gdf = world_p.merge(m, left_on=\"_join_iso3\", right_on=\"_iso3\", how=\"left\")\r\n    if center is not None:\r\n        lo, hi = _s06_robust_lims(gdf[col])\r\n        lo = min(lo, center - 0.01); hi = max(hi, center + 0.01)\r\n        norm = TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=lo, vcenter=center, vmax=hi)\r\n        vmin = vmax = None\r\n    else:\r\n        norm = None\r\n        vmin, vmax = _s06_robust_lims(gdf[col])\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 7), dpi=220)\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#eeeeee\", edgecolor=\"none\")\r\n    gdf.plot(ax=ax, column=col, cmap=cmap, norm=norm, vmin=vmin, vmax=vmax,\r\n             legend=False, edgecolor=\"none\",\r\n             missing_kwds={\"color\": \"#eeeeee\", \"edgecolor\": \"none\"})\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout(pad=0)\r\n    fig.savefig(outpath, bbox_inches=\"tight\", pad_inches=0)\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n    logger.debug(\"Stage 06: saved map %s\", outpath.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# Load and project world basemap\r\nif not NE_SHP.exists():\r\n    raise FileNotFoundError(\r\n        f\"Natural Earth shapefile not found at {NE_SHP}.\\n\"\r\n        \"Run Stage 01 (download Natural Earth, Cell 20) first.\"\r\n    )\r\n_s06_world = gpd.read_file(NE_SHP)\r\n_s06_world = _s06_world[_s06_world.get(\"ISO_A3\", \"-99\") != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif _s06_world.crs is None:\r\n    _s06_world = _s06_world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n_s06_iso = _s06_world[\"ISO_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n_s06_adm = _s06_world[\"ADM0_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n_s06_world[\"_join_iso3\"] = np.where(_s06_iso.isin([\"-99\",\"\"]), _s06_adm, _s06_iso)\r\n# Do NOT filter on FCLASS_ISO — that silently drops Norway and other valid sovereigns\r\n_s06_world_p = _s06_world.to_crs(_S06_EQEARTH)\r\n\r\n_s06_idx_exp_m = _s06_csk_fallback(_s06_idx_exp)\r\n_s06_idx_imp_m = _s06_csk_fallback(_s06_idx_imp)\r\n\r\n_s06_n_maps = 0\r\nfor _flow, _idf in [(\"exports\", _s06_idx_exp_m), (\"imports\", _s06_idx_imp_m)]:\r\n    for _col, _cmap, _ctr in _S06_MAP_METRICS:\r\n        if _col not in _idf.columns:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Stage 06: column %s not in %s — skipped.\", _col, _flow)\r\n            continue\r\n        _op = DRIFT_FIG / f\"drift_map_{_flow}_{_col}_{_s06_tag}.png\"\r\n        _s06_plot_choropleth(_s06_world_p, _idf, _col, _cmap, _ctr, _op)\r\n        _s06_n_maps += 1\r\n\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 06: %d choropleth maps saved.\", _s06_n_maps)\r\nprint(f\"[Stage 06] {_s06_n_maps} choropleth maps saved -> {DRIFT_FIG}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:41:00.866Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_IpBzKrLq79DL0af6mvgWa3Wc","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\barycenters.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Servicios para calculo de barycentros.\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import duckdb\n+import geopandas as gpd\n+import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n+import numpy as np\n+import pandas as pd\n+from pyproj import CRS\n+from shapely.geometry import LineString, Point, box\n+\n+from geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class BarycenterArtifacts:\n+    stage_dir: Path\n+    data_dir: Path\n+    fig_dir: Path\n+    global_barycenter_path: Path\n+    usa_trade_path: Path\n+    china_trade_path: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_barycenter_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> BarycenterArtifacts:\n+    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\n+    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\n+    return BarycenterArtifacts(\n+        stage_dir=stage_dir,\n+        data_dir=data_dir,\n+        fig_dir=fig_dir,\n+        global_barycenter_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_imports_exports_1976_2023.csv\",\n+        usa_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\n+        china_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_china_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _connect_duckdb():\n+    con = duckdb.connect()\n+    con.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\n+    return con\n+\n+\n+def weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\n+    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n+    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n+    s = np.nansum(w)\n+    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\n+        return np.nan\n+    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\n+\n+\n+def truncate_codes(codes, max_codes: int = 50) -> str:\n+    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\n+    if not codes:\n+        return \"\"\n+    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\n+        return \";\".join(codes)\n+    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes) - max_codes} more)\"\n+\n+\n+def load_centroids(centroids_path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    centroids = pd.read_csv(centroids_path, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\n+    centroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    return centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\n+\n+\n+def compute_global_barycenters(\n+    config: ProjectConfig, centroids: pd.DataFrame, output_path: Path\n+) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    rows = []\n+    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\n+        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\n+        if not fpath.exists():\n+            continue\n+        exports_df = con.execute(\n+            f\"\"\"\n+            SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS exports_value\n+            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n+            GROUP BY exporter\n+            \"\"\"\n+        ).df()\n+        imports_df = con.execute(\n+            f\"\"\"\n+            SELECT importer AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS imports_value\n+            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n+            GROUP BY importer\n+            \"\"\"\n+        ).df()\n+        exports_df[\"code\"] = exports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+        imports_df[\"code\"] = imports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+        ex = exports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+        im = imports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+        ex_unmatched = ex[\"lat\"].isna() | ex[\"lon\"].isna()\n+        im_unmatched = im[\"lat\"].isna() | im[\"lon\"].isna()\n+        exm = ex.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\n+        imm = im.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\n+        rows.append(\n+            {\n+                \"year\": year,\n+                \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                \"total_exports_value_matched\": float(exm[\"exports_value\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\n+                \"total_imports_value_matched\": float(imm[\"imports_value\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\n+                \"n_exporter_nodes_total\": len(ex),\n+                \"n_importer_nodes_total\": len(im),\n+                \"n_exporter_nodes_matched\": int((~ex_unmatched).sum()),\n+                \"n_importer_nodes_matched\": int((~im_unmatched).sum()),\n+                \"n_exporter_nodes_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\n+                \"n_importer_nodes_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\n+                \"unmatched_exporter_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                    ex.loc[ex_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\n+                ),\n+                \"unmatched_importer_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                    im.loc[im_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\n+                ),\n+            }\n+        )\n+    con.close()\n+    out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\n+    out.to_csv(output_path, index=False)\n+    return out\n+\n+\n+def compute_country_barycenters(\n+    config: ProjectConfig,\n+    centroids: pd.DataFrame,\n+    focus_codes: list[str],\n+    output_dir: Path,\n+) -> dict[str, Path]:\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    rows_by_country = {code: [] for code in focus_codes}\n+    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\n+        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\n+        if not fpath.exists():\n+            continue\n+        for code in focus_codes:\n+            ex = con.execute(\n+                f\"\"\"\n+                SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\n+                FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n+                WHERE exporter = '{code}'\n+                GROUP BY importer\n+                \"\"\"\n+            ).df()\n+            im = con.execute(\n+                f\"\"\"\n+                SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\n+                FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n+                WHERE importer = '{code}'\n+                GROUP BY exporter\n+                \"\"\"\n+            ).df()\n+            ex[\"partner\"] = ex[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n+            im[\"partner\"] = im[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n+            exg = ex.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+            img = im.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+            ex_unmatched = exg[\"lat\"].isna() | exg[\"lon\"].isna()\n+            im_unmatched = img[\"lat\"].isna() | img[\"lon\"].isna()\n+            exm = exg.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\n+            imm = img.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\n+            rows_by_country[code].append(\n+                {\n+                    \"year\": year,\n+                    \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": float(exm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\n+                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": float(imm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\n+                    \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(exg)),\n+                    \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(img)),\n+                    \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\n+                    \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\n+                    \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                        exg.loc[ex_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\n+                    ),\n+                    \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                        img.loc[im_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\n+                    ),\n+                }\n+            )\n+    con.close()\n+    written = {}\n+    for code, rows in rows_by_country.items():\n+        out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\n+        out_path = output_dir / f\"barycenter_{code}_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\n+        out.to_csv(out_path, index=False)\n+        written[code] = out_path\n+    return written\n+\n+\n+def detect_all_country_codes(config: ProjectConfig) -> list[str]:\n+    con = _connect_duckdb()\n+    s2_glob = str(config.dataset_trade_dir / \"S2_*.parquet\")\n+    df = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        WITH all_s2 AS (\n+            SELECT exporter::VARCHAR AS exporter_code, importer::VARCHAR AS importer_code\n+            FROM read_parquet('{s2_glob}')\n+        )\n+        SELECT DISTINCT code\n+        FROM (\n+            SELECT exporter_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE exporter_code IS NOT NULL AND exporter_code <> ''\n+            UNION\n+            SELECT importer_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE importer_code IS NOT NULL AND importer_code <> ''\n+        )\n+        ORDER BY code\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    con.close()\n+    return df[\"code\"].astype(str).tolist()\n+\n+\n+def render_global_maps(global_df: pd.DataFrame, shapefile_path: Path, fig_dir: Path) -> None:\n+    world = gpd.read_file(shapefile_path)\n+    if \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n+        world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\n+    if world.crs is None:\n+        world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n+    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n+        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]].dropna().copy(),\n+        geometry=[\n+            Point(xy)\n+            for xy in zip(\n+                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lon_exports\"],\n+                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lat_exports\"],\n+            )\n+        ],\n+        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n+    ).sort_values(\"year\")\n+    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n+        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]].dropna().copy(),\n+        geometry=[\n+            Point(xy)\n+            for xy in zip(\n+                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lon_imports\"],\n+                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lat_imports\"],\n+            )\n+        ],\n+        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n+    ).sort_values(\"year\")\n+    if exports.empty or imports.empty:\n+        return\n+    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n+    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n+    crs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n+    world_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    exports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    imports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    exports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    imports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\n+        pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True),\n+        crs=crs_med,\n+    ).total_bounds\n+    buffer = 1.2e6\n+    xlim = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\n+    ylim = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n+\n+    def render(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, basename):\n+        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\n+        world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n+        path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\n+        points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\n+        ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\n+        ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\n+        ax.text(0.02, 0.02, footer_label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, ha=\"left\", va=\"bottom\")\n+        ax.set_axis_off()\n+        plt.tight_layout()\n+        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.pdf\", bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+        plt.close(fig)\n+\n+    render(imports_p, imports_path_p, \"red\", \"Global imports barycenter\", \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean\")\n+    render(\n+        exports_p,\n+        exports_path_p,\n+        \"dodgerblue\",\n+        \"Global exports barycenter\",\n+     im_all[\"country\"] = im_all[\"country\"].astype(str)\n+        im_all[\"partner\"] = im_all[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n+\n+        ex_focus = ex_all[ex_all[\"country\"].isin(focus_codes)].copy()\n+        im_focus = im_all[im_all[\"country\"].isin(focus_codes)].copy()\n+\n+        ex_focus = ex_focus.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+        im_focus = im_focus.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n+\n+        for code in focus_codes:\n+            exg = ex_focus[ex_focus[\"country\"] == code].copy()\n+            img = im_focus[im_focus[\"country\"] == code].copy()\n+            ex_unmatched = exg[\"lat\"].isna() | exg[\"lon\"].isna()\n+            im_unmatched = img[\"lat\"].isna() | img[\"lon\"].isna()\n+            exm = exg.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\n+            imm = img.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\n+            rows_by_country[code].append(\n+                {\n+                    \"year\": year,\n+                    \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\n+                    \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": float(exm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\n+                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": float(imm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\n+                    \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(exg)),\n+                    \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(img)),\n+                    \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\n+                    \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\n+                    \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                        exg.loc[ex_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\n+                    ),\n+                    \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\n+                        img.loc[im_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\n+                    ),\n+                }\n+            )\n*** End Patch\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:52:31.268Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_fc9GGKa1YTxyETAw4kjkjAmH","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\drift.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Servicios para drift y metricas de movimiento.\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import glob\n+import os\n+import re\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import geopandas as gpd\n+import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n+import numpy as np\n+import pandas as pd\n+from matplotlib.colors import TwoSlopeNorm\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class DriftArtifacts:\n+    stage_dir: Path\n+    data_dir: Path\n+    fig_dir: Path\n+    steps_exports_path: Path\n+    steps_imports_path: Path\n+    indices_exports_path: Path\n+    indices_imports_path: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_drift_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path, tag: str) -> DriftArtifacts:\n+    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\n+    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\n+    return DriftArtifacts(\n+        stage_dir=stage_dir,\n+        data_dir=data_dir,\n+        fig_dir=fig_dir,\n+        steps_exports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_steps_exports_{tag}.csv\",\n+        steps_imports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_steps_imports_{tag}.csv\",\n+        indices_exports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_indices_exports_{tag}.csv\",\n+        indices_imports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_indices_imports_{tag}.csv\",\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def gc_dist(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\n+    radius = 6371.0088\n+    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\n+    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\n+    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\n+    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\n+    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\n+    return radius * 2.0 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\n+\n+\n+def bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\n+    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\n+    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\n+    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\n+    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\n+    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\n+    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\n+\n+\n+def east_km(dist_km, bearing):\n+    return np.asarray(dist_km, float) * np.sin(np.deg2rad(np.asarray(bearing, float)))\n+\n+\n+def infer_country_from_filename(fp: str) -> str | None:\n+    base = os.path.basename(fp)\n+    match = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", base)\n+    if not match:\n+        return None\n+    return match.group(1).upper()\n+\n+\n+def load_barycenter_panel(bary_glob: str, drop_codes: set[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    files = sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob))\n+    if not files:\n+        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No files matching: {bary_glob}\")\n+    need = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\n+    parts = []\n+    for fp in files:\n+        iso3 = infer_country_from_filename(fp)\n+        if not iso3:\n+            continue\n+        cols = list(pd.read_csv(fp, nrows=0).columns)\n+        if not set(need).issubset(cols):\n+            continue\n+        df = pd.read_csv(fp, usecols=need)\n+        df[\"country\"] = iso3\n+        parts.append(df)\n+    if not parts:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files for {bary_glob}\")\n+    panel = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\n+    panel[\"country\"] = panel[\"country\"].astype(str).str.strip().str.upper()\n+    panel[\"year\"] = pd.to_numeric(panel[\"year\"], errors=\"coerce\")\n+    panel = panel.dropna(subset=[\"year\"])\n+    panel[\"year\"] = panel[\"year\"].astype(int)\n+    panel = panel[~panel[\"country\"].isin(drop_codes)]\n+    panel = panel.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"year\"], keep=\"last\")\n+    for col in [\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]:\n+        panel[col] = pd.to_numeric(panel[col], errors=\"coerce\")\n+    return panel\n+\n+\n+def build_steps(panel: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, min_step_km: float) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    lat_col, lon_col = f\"lat_{flow}\", f\"lon_{flow}\"\n+    df = (\n+        panel[[\"country\", \"year\", lat_col, lon_col]]\n+        .dropna(subset=[lat_col, lon_col])\n+        .sort_values([\"country\", \"year\"])\n+        .reset_index(drop=True)\n+    )\n+    df[\"year_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[\"year\"].shift(-1)\n+    df[\"lat_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[lat_col].shift(-1)\n+    df[\"lon_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[lon_col].shift(-1)\n+    df = df[df[\"year_next\"] == df[\"year\"] + 1].copy()\n+\n+    dist = gc_dist(df[lat_col].values, df[lon_col].values, df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values)\n+    bearing = bearing_deg(\n+        df[lat_col].values, df[lon_col].values, df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values\n+    )\n+    east = east_km(dist, bearing)\n+    steps = pd.DataFrame(\n+        {\n+            \"country\": df[\"country\"].values,\n+            \"t0\": df[\"year\"].astype(int).values,\n+            \"t1\": df[\"year_next\"].astype(int).values,\n+            \"dist_km\": dist,\n+            \"bearing_deg\": bearing,\n+            \"east_km\": east,\n+        }\n+    )\n+    steps = steps[steps[\"dist_km\"] >= min_step_km].copy()\n+    steps[\"sign\"] = np.sign(steps[\"east_km\"])\n+    steps = steps[steps[\"sign\"] != 0].copy()\n+    steps[\"sign\"] = steps[\"sign\"].astype(int)\n+    return steps.reset_index(drop=True)\n+\n+\n+def compute_indices(steps: pd.DataFrame, min_steps: int) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    cols = [\n+        \"country\",\n+        \"n_steps\",\n+        \"avg_speed_km\",\n+        \"median_speed_km\",\n+        \"EW_index\",\n+        \"instability_index\",\n+        \"start_year\",\n+        \"end_year\",\n+    ]\n+    if steps.empty:\n+        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)\n+    out = []\n+    for country, group in steps.sort_values([\"country\", \"t0\"]).groupby(\"country\", sort=False):\n+        group = group.sort_values(\"t0\")\n+        n = len(group)\n+        if n < min_steps:\n+            continue\n+        denom_ew = float(np.abs(group[\"east_km\"]).sum())\n+        signs = group[\"sign\"].values\n+        out.append(\n+            {\n+                \"country\": country,\n+                \"n_steps\": int(n),\n+                \"avg_speed_km\": float(group[\"dist_km\"].mean()),\n+                \"median_speed_km\": float(group[\"dist_km\"].median()),\n+                \"EW_index\": float(group[\"east_km\"].sum() / denom_ew) if denom_ew > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\n+                \"instability_index\": float(np.sum(signs[1:] != signs[:-1]) / (n - 1)) if n > 1 else float(\"nan\"),\n+                \"start_year\": int(group[\"t0\"].min()),\n+                \"end_year\": int(group[\"t1\"].max()),\n+            }\n+        )\n+    return pd.DataFrame(out, columns=cols).sort_values(\"country\").reset_index(drop=True)\n+\n+\n+def robust_lims(series, qlo=0.01, qhi=0.99):\n+    s = series.replace([float(\"inf\"), float(\"-inf\")], float(\"nan\")).dropna()\n+    if s.empty:\n+        return 0.0, 1.0\n+    lo, hi = float(s.quantile(qlo)), float(s.quantile(qhi))\n+    if np.isclose(lo, hi):\n+        lo, hi = float(s.min()), float(s.max())\n+        if np.isclose(lo, hi):\n+            lo, hi = lo - 1.0, hi + 1.0\n+    return lo, hi\n+\n+\n+def csk_fallback(df_m, source=\"CSK\", targets=(\"CZE\", \"SVK\")):\n+    src = df_m[df_m[\"country\"] == source]\n+    if src.empty:\n+        return df_m\n+    result = df_m.copy()\n+    for target in targets:\n+        if target not in result[\"country\"].values:\n+            row = src.iloc[0].copy()\n+            row[\"country\"] = target\n+            result = pd.concat([result, row.to_frame().T], ignore_index=True)\n+    return result\n+\n+\n+def plot_choropleths(\n+    world_shapefile: Path,\n+    idx_exp: pd.DataFrame,\n+    idx_imp: pd.DataFrame,\n+    fig_dir: Path,\n+    tag: str,\n+) -> int:\n+    world = gpd.read_file(world_shapefile)\n+    iso = world[\"ISO_A3\"].astype(str)\n+    adm = world[\"ADM0_A3\"].astype(str)\n+    world = world[np.where(iso.isin([\"-99\", \"\"]), adm, iso) != \"ATA\"].copy()\n+    if world.crs is None:\n+        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\n+    world[\"_join_iso3\"] = np.where(iso.isin([\"-99\", \"\"]), adm, iso)\n+    world_p = world.to_crs(\"+proj=eqearth +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n+    metrics = [\n+        (\"avg_speed_km\", \"YlOrRd\", None),\n+        (\"median_speed_km\", \"YlOrRd\", None),\n+        (\"EW_index\", \"RdBu_r\", 0.0),\n+        (\"instability_index\", \"PuRd\", None),\n+    ]\n+    count = 0\n+    for flow, idf in [(\"exports\", csk_fallback(idx_exp)), (\"imports\", csk_fallback(idx_imp))]:\n+        for col, cmap, center in metrics:\n+            m = idf[[\"country\", col]].rename(columns={\"country\": \"_iso3\"})\n+            gdf = world_p.merge(m, left_on=\"_join_iso3\", right_on=\"_iso3\", how=\"left\")\n+            if center is not None:\n+                lo, hi = robust_lims(gdf[col])\n+                lo = min(lo, center - 0.01)\n+                hi = max(hi, center + 0.01)\n+                norm = TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=lo, vcenter=center, vmax=hi)\n+                vmin = vmax = None\n+            else:\n+                norm = None\n+                vmin, vmax = robust_lims(gdf[col])\n+            fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 7), dpi=220)\n+            world_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#eeeeee\", edgecolor=\"none\")\n+            gdf.plot(\n+                ax=ax,\n+                column=col,\n+                cmap=cmap,\n+                norm=norm,\n+                vmin=vmin,\n+                vmax=vmax,\n+                legend=False,\n+                edgecolor=\"none\",\n+                missing_kwds={\"color\": \"#eeeeee\", \"edgecolor\": \"none\"},\n+            )\n+            ax.set_axis_off()\n+            plt.tight_layout(pad=0)\n+            fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"drift_map_{flow}_{col}_{tag}.png\", bbox_inches=\"tight\", pad_inches=0)\n+            plt.close(fig)\n+            count += 1\n+    return count\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\pipelines\\stage_06_drift.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Stage 06: drift y speed de barycentros.\"\"\"\n-\n-from geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\n-\n-\n-def run(config: ProjectConfig) -> None:\n-    raise NotImplementedError(\"Stage 06 aun no ha sido migrado.\")\n+\"\"\"Stage 06: drift y speed de barycentros.\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import logging\n+\n+from geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\n+from geoanalisis.services.drift import (\n+    build_drift_artifact_paths,\n+    build_steps,\n+    compute_indices,\n+    load_barycenter_panel,\n+    plot_choropleths,\n+)\n+from geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\n+from geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\n+\n+\n+def run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\n+    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_06_drift\")\n+    initialize_project_tree(config)\n+    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\n+    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\n+    artifacts = build_drift_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"06_drift\", tag)\n+    bary_glob = str(\n+        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\n+        / \"data\"\n+        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\n+    )\n+\n+    panel = load_barycenter_panel(bary_glob, {\"WLD\", \"WORLD\", \"ALL\"})\n+    steps_exp = build_steps(panel, \"exports\", min_step_km=75.0)\n+    steps_imp = build_steps(panel, \"imports\", min_step_km=75.0)\n+    idx_exp = compute_indices(steps_exp, min_steps=8)\n+    idx_imp = compute_indices(steps_imp, min_steps=8)\n+\n+    steps_exp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_exports_path, index=False)\n+    steps_imp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_imports_path, index=False)\n+    idx_exp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_exports_path, index=False)\n+    idx_imp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_imports_path, index=False)\n+    map_count = plot_choropleths(\n+        config.natural_earth_shapefile_path, idx_exp, idx_imp, artifacts.fig_dir, tag\n+    )\n+\n+    logger.info(\n+        \"Stage 06 complete. export_idx=%d import_idx=%d maps=%d output=%s\",\n+        len(idx_exp),\n+        len(idx_imp),\n+        map_count,\n+        artifacts.stage_dir,\n+    )\n+    return {\n+        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\n+        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\n+        \"steps_exports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_exports_path),\n+        \"steps_imports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_imports_path),\n+        \"indices_exports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_exports_path),\n+        \"indices_imports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_imports_path),\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T18:54:10.052Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_k4SkKwtXw9L8fa3WEkDgqnin","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\distance.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Servicios para distancia promedio del comercio.\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import re\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import duckdb\n+import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n+import numpy as np\n+import pandas as pd\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class DistanceArtifacts:\n+    stage_dir: Path\n+    data_dir: Path\n+    fig_dir: Path\n+    country_year_path: Path\n+    global_path: Path\n+    sitc2_path: Path\n+    sitc3_path: Path\n+    diagnostics_path: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_distance_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path, tag: str) -> DistanceArtifacts:\n+    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\n+    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\n+    return DistanceArtifacts(\n+        stage_dir=stage_dir,\n+        data_dir=data_dir,\n+        fig_dir=fig_dir,\n+        country_year_path=data_dir / f\"distance_country_year_{tag}.csv\",\n+        global_path=data_dir / f\"distance_global_{tag}.csv\",\n+        sitc2_path=data_dir / f\"distance_global_sitc2_{tag}.csv\",\n+        sitc3_path=data_dir / f\"distance_global_sitc3_{tag}.csv\",\n+        diagnostics_path=data_dir / f\"distance_diagnostics_{tag}.csv\",\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def build_con():\n+    con = duckdb.connect(database=\":memory:\")\n+    con.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8;\")\n+    return con\n+\n+\n+def load_od(con, od_path: Path) -> None:\n+    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS od;\")\n+    con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        CREATE TABLE od AS\n+        SELECT\n+            CAST(origin AS VARCHAR) AS origin,\n+            CAST(destination AS VARCHAR) AS destination,\n+            CAST(distance_km AS DOUBLE) AS distance_km\n+        FROM read_csv(\n+            ?,\n+            columns = {'origin':'VARCHAR','destination':'VARCHAR','distance_km':'DOUBLE'},\n+            header  = TRUE,\n+            delim   = ','\n+        )\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [str(od_path)],\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def compute_year(con, year: int, trade_dir: Path, value_col: str, exclude_self: bool = True):\n+    fpath = trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\n+    if not fpath.exists():\n+        return None\n+    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS flows;\")\n+    con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        CREATE TABLE flows AS\n+        SELECT\n+            CAST(exporter AS VARCHAR) AS exporter,\n+            CAST(importer AS VARCHAR) AS importer,\n+            LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0') AS commoditycode,\n+            CAST({value_col} AS DOUBLE) AS value_final\n+        FROM read_parquet(?)\n+        WHERE {value_col} IS NOT NULL AND {value_col} >= 0\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [str(fpath)],\n+    )\n+    if exclude_self:\n+        con.execute(\"DELETE FROM flows WHERE exporter = importer;\")\n+    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS flows_coded;\")\n+    con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        CREATE TABLE flows_coded AS\n+        SELECT exporter, importer, commoditycode,\n+               SUBSTR(commoditycode, 1, 2) AS sitc2,\n+               SUBSTR(commoditycode, 1, 3) AS sitc3,\n+               value_final\n+        FROM flows\n+        \"\"\"\n+    )\n+    con.execute(\"DROP TABLE IF EXISTS joined;\")\n+    con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        CREATE TABLE joined AS\n+        SELECT f.exporter, f.importer, f.sitc2, f.sitc3, f.value_final, o.distance_km\n+        FROM flows_coded f\n+        LEFT JOIN od o ON f.exporter = o.origin AND f.importer = o.destination\n+        \"\"\"\n+    )\n+    diag = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year,\n+               COUNT(*) AS n_flows,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_trade_value,\n+               SUM(CASE WHEN distance_km IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS n_missing_distance,\n+               SUM(CASE WHEN distance_km IS NULL THEN value_final ELSE 0 END) AS value_missing_distance\n+        FROM joined\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    con.execute(\"DELETE FROM joined WHERE distance_km IS NULL;\")\n+    exp_cy = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year, exporter AS country,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\n+               SUM(value_final * distance_km) / NULLIF(SUM(value_final), 0) AS avg_export_distance_km\n+        FROM joined GROUP BY exporter\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    imp_cy = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year, importer AS country,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_imports,\n+               SUM(value_final * distance_km) / NULLIF(SUM(value_final), 0) AS avg_import_distance_km\n+        FROM joined GROUP BY importer\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    cy = pd.merge(exp_cy, imp_cy, on=[\"year\", \"country\"], how=\"outer\")\n+    tot_x = cy[\"total_exports\"].sum(skipna=True)\n+    tot_m = cy[\"total_imports\"].sum(skipna=True)\n+    gx = (\n+        (cy[\"total_exports\"] * cy[\"avg_export_distance_km\"]).sum(skipna=True) / tot_x\n+        if tot_x\n+        else float(\"nan\")\n+    )\n+    gm = (\n+        (cy[\"total_imports\"] * cy[\"avg_import_distance_km\"]).sum(skipna=True) / tot_m\n+        if tot_m\n+        else float(\"nan\")\n+    )\n+    global_df = pd.DataFrame(\n+        [\n+            {\n+                \"year\": year,\n+                \"global_export_distance_km\": gx,\n+                \"global_import_distance_km\": gm,\n+                \"global_total_exports\": tot_x,\n+                \"global_total_imports\": tot_m,\n+                \"global_exports_minus_imports\": tot_x - tot_m,\n+                \"global_export_minus_import_distance_km\": gx - gm,\n+            }\n+        ]\n+    )\n+    s2x = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc2,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\n+               SUM(value_final * distance_km) / NULLIF(SUM(value_final), 0) AS global_export_distance_km\n+        FROM joined GROUP BY sitc2\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    s2m = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc2,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_imports,\n+               SUM(value_final * distance_km) / NULLIF(SUM(value_final), 0) AS global_import_distance_km\n+        FROM joined GROUP BY sitc2\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    sitc2_df = pd.merge(s2x, s2m, on=[\"year\", \"sitc2\"], how=\"outer\")\n+    s3x = con.execute(\n+        \"\"\"\n+        SELECT ?::INT AS year, sitc3,\n+               SUM(value_final) AS total_exports,\n+               SUM(value_final * distance_km) / NULLIF(SUM(value_final), 0) AS global_export_distance_km\n+        FROM joined GROUP BY sitc3\n+        \"\"\",\n+        [year],\n+    ).fetchdf()\n+    s3m how=\"outer\")\n+    return cy, global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, diag\n+\n+\n+def read_code_dict(path: Path, code_col: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    if not path.exists():\n+        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\n+    with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\") as fh:\n+        lines = [ln.strip() for ln in fh if ln.strip() and not ln.strip().startswith(\"#\")]\n+    for delim in [\"\\t\", \"|\", \";\", \",\"]:\n+        rows = [ln.split(delim) for ln in lines]\n+        k = max(len(r) for r in rows) if rows else 0\n+        if k >= 3:\n+            rows = [r + [\"\"] * max(0, k - len(r)) for r in rows]\n+            df = pd.DataFrame(rows).iloc[:, :3]\n+            df.columns = [code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"]\n+            for c in df.columns:\n+                df[c] = df[c].astype(str).str.strip()\n+            if len(df) and not re.fullmatch(r\"\\d{1,4}\", str(df.iloc[0][code_col])):\n+                df = df.iloc[1:].reset_index(drop=True)\n+            return df\n+    return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\n+\n+\n+def make_matrix(df, row_col, col_col, val_col):\n+    df2 = df[[row_col, col_col, val_col]].groupby([row_col, col_col], as_index=False)[val_col].mean()\n+    return df2.pivot(index=row_col, columns=col_col, values=val_col).sort_index(axis=1)\n+\n+\n+def plot_heatmap(mat, cmap, outpath, vmin, vmax, ytick_fs, figsize, yticklabels=None):\n+    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)\n+    im = ax.imshow(\n+        mat.to_numpy(dtype=float),\n+ ax.set_yticklabels(yticklabels if yticklabels is not None else rows, fontsize=ytick_fs)\n+    cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax)\n+    cbar.set_label(\"Average distance (km)\")\n+    fig.tight_layout()\n+ continue\n+        cy, gl, s2, s3, dg = res\n+        cy_parts.append(cy)\n+        gl_parts.append(gl)\n+        s2_parts.append(s2)\n+        s3_parts.append(s3)\n+        dg_parts.append(dg)\n+
