ax.plot(\n+        gl_df[\"year\"],\n+        gl_df[\"global_import_distance_km\"],\n+        label=\"Imports\",\n+        color=\"tomato\",\n+        linewidth=2,\n+        linestyle=\"--\",\n+ float(np.nanpercentile(mat.values, 1))\n+        vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(mat.values, 99))\n+        labels = []\n+        for code in mat.index:\n+            if s2d.empty:\n+                labels.append(code)\n+            else:\n+                nick = s2d.loc[s2d[\"sitc2\"] == code, \"nickname\"].values\n+                labels.append(f\"{code}-{nick[0]}\" if len(nick) and str(nick[0]).strip() else code)\n+        plot_heatmap(\n+            mat,\n+            cmap,\n+            fig_dir / f\"distance_sitc2_heatmap_{flow}_{tag}.png\",\n+            vmin,\n+ float(np.nanpercentile(mat.values, 1))\n+        vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(mat.values, 99))\n+        labels = []\n+        for code in mat.index:\n+            if s3d.empty:\n+                labels.append(code)\n+            else:\n+                nick = s3d.loc[s3d[\"sitc3\"] == code, \"nickname\"].values\n+                labels.append(f\"{code}-{nick[0]}\" if len(nick) and str(nick[0]).strip() else code)\n+        plot_heatmap(\n+            mat,\n+            cmap,\n+            fig_dir / f\"distance_sitc3_heatmap_{flow}_{tag}.png\",\n+            vmin,\n+            vmax,\n+            4,\n+            (14, 40),\n+            labels,\n+        )\n+\n+    def country_panels(country_list, outfile):\n+        sub = cy_df[cy_df[\"country\"].isin(country_list)].copy()\n+        sub[\"year\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[\"year\"], errors=\"coerce\").astype(int)\n+        sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"], errors=\"coerce\")\n+        sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"avg_export_distance_km\"])\n+        if sub.empty:\n+            return\n+        ymin = sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"].min()\n+        ymax = sub[\"avg_export_distance_km\"].max()\n+        n = len(country_list)\n+        ncol = min(4, n)\n+        nrow = (n + ncol - 1) // ncol\n+        fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrow, ncol, figsize=(4 * ncol, 3 * nrow), sharex=True, sharey=True)\n+        axes = np.array(axes).flatten()\n+        for ax, country in zip(axes, country_list):\n+            d = sub[sub[\"country\"] == country].sort_values(\"year\")\n+            ax.plot(d[\"year\"], d[\"avg_export_distance_km\"], linewidth=1.8)\n+            ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\n+            ax.text(0.05, 0.90, country, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, fontweight=\"bold\")\n+            ax.tick_params(axis=\"both\", labelsize=8)\n+        for ax in axes[n:]:\n+            ax.axis(\"off\")\n+        fig.tight_layout()\n+        fig.savefig(outfile, dpi=300)\n+        plt.close(fig)\n+\n+    country_panels(\n+        [\"USA\", \"CHN\", \"DEU\", \"JPN\", \"FRA\", \"GBR\",        fig_dir / f\"distance_panels_exports_emerging_{tag}.png\",\n+    )\n+\n+    logger.info(\"Stage 07 complete. years=%d output=%s\", done, artifacts.stage_dir)\n+    return {\n+ Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\moran.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Servicios para Moran's I y pesos espaciales.\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import math\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import duckdb\n+import numpy as np\n+import pandas as pd\n+from esda.moran import Moran\n+from libpysal.weights import W\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class MoranArtifacts:\n+    stage_dir: Path\n+    data_dir: Path\n+    fig_dir: Path\n+    global_path: Path\n+    sitc2_path: Path\n+    sitc3_path: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_moran_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path, tag: str) -> MoranArtifacts:\n+    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\n+    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\n+    return MoranArtifacts(\n+        stage_dir=stage_dir,\n+        data_dir=data_dir,\n+        fig_dir=fig_dir,\n+        global_path=data_dir / f\"moran_global_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\n+        sitc2_path=data_dir / f\"moran_sitc2_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\n+        sitc3_path=data_dir / f\"moran_sitc3_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def log10_1p(x: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:\n+    return np.log10(1.0 + np.maximum(x, 0.0))\n+\n+\n+def norm_cdf(z: float) -> float:\n+    return 0.5 * (1.0 + math.erf(z / math.sqrt(2.0)))\n+\n+\n+def two_sided_p_from_z(z: float) -> float:\n+    return 2.0 * (1.0 - norm_cdf(abs(z)))\n+\n+\n+def build_weights_from_od(od_path: Path, epsilon_factor: float = 1e-3) -> tuple[W, list[str]]:\n+    od = pd.read_csv(od_path)\n+    od[\"origin\"] = od[\"origin\"].astype(str)\n+    od[\"destination\"] = od[\"destination\"].astype(str)\n+    od[\"distance_km\"] = pd.to_numeric(od[\"distance_km\"], errors=\"coerce\")\n+    od = od.dropna(subset=[\"origin\", \"destination\", \"distance_km\"])\n+    min_positive = od.loc[od[\"distance_km\"] > 0, \"distance_km\"].min()\n+    epsilon = float(min_positive * epsilon_factor) if pd.notna(min_positive) else 1e-6\n+    od[\"distance_km\"] = od[\"distance_km\"].replace(0, epsilon)\n+    od[\"weight\"] = 1.0 / od[\"distance_km\"]\n+    codes = sorted(set(od[\"origin\"]) | set(od[\"destination\"]))\n+    neighbors = {code: [] for code in codes}\n+    weights = {code: [] for code in codes}\n+    for _, row in od.iterrows():\n+        origin = row[\"origin\"]\n+        dest = row[\"destination\"]\n+        if origin == dest:\n+            continue\n+        neighbors[origin].append(dest)\n+        weights[origin].append(float(row[\"weight\"]))\n+    w = W(neighbors, weights, silence_warnings=True)\n+    w.transform = \"R\"\n+    return w, codes\n+\n+\n+def aggregate_year_global(trade_path: Path, value_col: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\n+    con = duckdb.connect()\n+    exports = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        GROUP BY exporter\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    imports = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        GROUP BY importer\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    con.close()\n+    exports[\"code\"] = exports[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    imports[\"code\"] = imports[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    return exports, imports\n+\n+\n+def aggregate_year_product(trade_path: Path, value_col: str, product_digits: int) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\n+    con = duckdb.connect()\n+    exports = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        SELECT exporter AS code,\n+               SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, {product_digits}) AS product,\n+               SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        GROUP BY exporter, product\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    imports = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        SELECT importer AS code,\n+               SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, {product_digits}) AS product,\n+               SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        GROUP BY importer, product\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    con.close()\n+    exports[\"code\"] = exports[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    imports[\"code\"] = imports[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    exports[\"product\"] = exports[\"product\"].astype(str).str.zfill(product_digits)\n+    imports[\"product\"] = imports[\"product\"].astype(str).str.zfill(product_digits)\n+    return exports, imports\n+\n+\n+def moran_row(values_df: pd.DataFrame, codes: list[str], w: W) -> dict[str, float]:\n+    s = pd.Series(0.0, index=codes, dtype=float)\n+    if not values_df.empty:\n+        vals = values_df.groupby(\"code\")[\"value\"].sum()\n+        s.loc[vals.index.intersection(s.index)] = vals.loc[vals.index.intersection(s.index)].astype(float)\n+    x = log10_1p(s.to_numpy(dtype=float))\n+    mor = Moran(x, w, two_tailed=True)\n+    z = float((mor.I - mor.EI) / math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\")\n+    p = two_sided_p_from_z(z) if not math.isnan(z) else float(\"nan\")\n+    return {\n+        \"n\": len(codes),\n+        \"moran_i\": float(mor.I),\n+        \"mean_H0\": float(mor.EI),\n+        \"variance_H0\": float(mor.VI_norm),\n+        \"z\": z,\n+        \"p_value\": p,\n+        \"ci_5\": float(mor.I - 1.96 * math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\n+        \"ci_95\": float(mor.I + 1.96 * math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\n+        \"zero_share\": float((s == 0).mean()),\n+    }\n*** Update File: sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r2e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\n+            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, flow, zero_col, outfile in [\n+        (\"exports\", \"moran_global_exports.png\", \"moran_i\"),\n+        (\"imports\", \"moran_global_imports.png\", \"moran_i\"),\n+    ]:\n+        sub = global_df[global_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\n+        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))\n+        ax.plot(sub[\"year\"], sub[\"moran_i\"], linewidth=2)\n+        ax.axhline(0.0, color=\"black\", linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)\n+        ax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\n+        ax.set_ylabel(\"Moran's I\")\n+        fig.tight_layout()\n+        fig.savefig(artifacts.fig_dir / zero_col, dpi=300)\n+        plt.close(fig)\n+\n+    def heatmap(df, code_col, outname):\n+        pivot = df.pivot(index=code_col, columns=\"year\", values=\"moran_i\").sort_index()\n+        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 14 if code_col == \"sitc2\" else 24), dpi=200)\n+        im = ax.imshow(pivot.values.astype(float), aspect=\"auto\", interpolation=\"nearest\", cmap=\"RdBu_r\", vmin=-0.20, vmax=0.20)\n+        ax.set_xticks(range(len(pivot.columns)))\n+        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) if i % 2 == 0 else \"\" for i, y in enumerate(pivot.columns)], rotation=90)\n+        ax.set_yticks(range(len(pivot.index)))\n+        ax.set_yticklabels(list(pivot.index), fontsize=4 if code_col == \"sitc3\" else 5)\n+        fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax).set_label(\"Moran's I\")\n+        fig.tight_layout()\n+        fig.savefig(artifacts.fig_dir / outname, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+        plt.close(fig)\n+\n+    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc2\", \"exports\"], \"sitc3\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_exports.png\")\n+    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc3\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_imports.png\")\n+\n+    logger.info(\n+        \"Stage 05 complete. global_rows=%d sitc2_rows=%d sitc3_rows=%d output=%s\",\n+        len(global_df),\n+        len(sitc2_df),\n+        len(sitc3_df),\n+ Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\clustering.py\n@@\n-\"\"\"Servicios para clustering gravitacional.\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import glob\n+import math\n+import re\n+from dataclasses import dataclass\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+import numpy as np\n+import pandas as pd\n+from sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\n+from sklearn.metrics import (\n+    adjusted_rand_score,\n+    normalized_mutual_info_score,\n+    silhouette_score,\n+)\n+\n+\n+EARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\n+PERIODS_5 = [\n+    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\n+    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\n+    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\n+    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\n+    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\n+]\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class ClusteringArtifacts:\n+    stage_dir: Path\n+    data_dir: Path\n+    fig_dir: Path\n+\n+\n+def build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\n+    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\n+\n+\n+def latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\n+    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\n+    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\n+    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\n+    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\n+    z = np.sin(lat_r)\n+    return x, y, z\n+\n+\n+def xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\n+    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\n+    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\n+    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\n+    return lat, lon\n+\n+\n+def gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\n+    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\n+    return np.arccos(dot)\n+\n+\n+def gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\n+    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\n+    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\n+    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\n+    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\n+    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\n+    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\n+\n+\n+def initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\n+    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\n+    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\n+    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\n+    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\n+    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\n+    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\n+\n+\n+def infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\n+    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\n+    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\n+\n+\n+def load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    parts = []\n+    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\n+        country = infer_country(fp)\n+        if not country:\n+            continue\n+        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\n+        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\n+            continue\n+        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\n+            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\n+            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\n+            weight_col = (\n+                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\n+                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\n+                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\n+            )\n+            if flow == \"imports\":\n+                weight_col = (\n+                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\n+                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\n+                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\n+                )\n+            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\n+            sub[\"country\"] = country\n+            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\n+            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\n+            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\n+            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\n+            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\n+            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\n+            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\n+            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\n+    if not parts:\n+        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\n+    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\n+    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\n+    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\n+\n+\n+def compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    rows = []\n+    for (country, flow), g in state_long.groupby([\"country\", \"flow\"], sort=True):\n+        g = g.sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\n+        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(float)\n+        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(float)\n+        n_obs = len(g)\n+        if n_obs == 0:\n+            continue\n+        if n_obs > 1:\n+            step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\n+            step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\n+            path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\n+            path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\n+            net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\n+            net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\n+            straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\n+            bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\n+            ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\n+            mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\n+            mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\n+            bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\n+            bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\n+            turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\n+            turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\n+            mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\n+        else:\n+            path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\n+            step_km = np.array([])\n+            bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\n+        row = {\n+            \"country\": country,\n+            \"flow\": flow,\n+            \"n_obs\": n_obs,\n+            \"start_year\": int(g[\"year\"].min()),\n+            \"end_year\": int(g[\"year\"].max()),\n+            \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\n+            \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\n+            \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\n+            \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\n+            \"straightness\": straightness,\n+            \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\n+            \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\n+            \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\n+            \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\n+            \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\n+        }\n+        for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\n+            sub = g[(g[\"year\"] >= start) & (g[\"year\"] <= end)]\n+            row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(len(sub))\n+            if len(sub):\n+                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(sub[\"x\"].mean())\n+                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(sub[\"y\"].mean())\n+                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(sub[\"z\"].mean())\n+            else:\n+                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\n+                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\n+                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\n+        for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\n+            a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\n+            a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\n+            b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\n+            if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\n+                rad = km = np.nan\n+            else:\n+                rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\n+                km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\n+            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\n+            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\n+        rows.append(row)\n+    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\n+\n+\n+def pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\n+    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\n+    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\n+    state = {\n+        c: sub[sub[\"country\"] == c].sort_values(\"year\").set_index(\"year\")[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"lat\", \"lon\"]]\n+        for c in countries\n+    }\n+    n = len(countries)\n+    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\n+    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\n+    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\n+    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\n+        for j, b in enumerate(countries):\n+            if i >= j:\n+                continue\n+            ya = state[a].index.to_numpy()\n+            yb = state[b].index.to_numpy()\n+            overlap_years = sorted(set(ya).intersection(set(yb)))\n+            if len(overlap_years) >= min_overlap_years:\n+                xa = state[a].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                xb = state[b].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\n+            else:\n+                pos = np.nan\n+            steps_a_years = [y for y in ya[:-1] if y + 1 in ya]\n+            steps_b_years = [y for y in yb[:-1] if y + 1 in yb]\n+            overlap_steps = sorted(set(steps_a_years).intersection(set(steps_b_years)))\n+            if len(overlap_steps) >= min_overlap_steps:\n+                dirs = []\n+                for y in overlap_steps:\n+                    aa0 = state[a].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                    aa1 = state[a].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                    bb0 = state[b].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                    bb1 = state[b].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+                    ba = initial_bearing_deg(aa0[0], aa0[1], aa1[0], aa1[1])\n+                    bb = initial_bearing_deg(bb0[0], bb0[1], bb1[0], bb1[1])\n+                    diff = abs(ba - bb)\n+                    diff = min(diff, 360 - diff)\n+                    dirs.append(diff / 180.0)\n+                direc = float(np.mean(dirs))\n+            else:\n+                direc = np.nan\n+            if np.isnan(pos):\n+                pos = 3.0\n+            if np.isnan(direc):\n+                direc = 1.0\n+            combo = alpha_pos * pos + (1 - alpha_pos) * direc\n+            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\n+            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\n+            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = len(overlap_years)\n+    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\n+    return (\n+        pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx),\n+        pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\n+        pd.DataFrame(alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\n+        pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\n+    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\n+    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\n+    k_values = []\n+    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\n+    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\n+        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\n+        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\n+        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\n+            score = np.nan\n+        else:\n+            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\n+        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\n+    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\n+    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\n+    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\n+    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\n+    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\n+        {\n+            \"country\": countries,\n+            \"flow\": flow,\n+            \"cluster\": labels,\n+            \"k_selected\": best_k,\n+            \"silhouette_selected\": float(sil[sil[\"k\"] == best_k][\"silhouette\"].iloc[0]),\n+            \"missing_penalty_used\": 3.0,\n+            \"linkage\": \"average\",\n+            \"alpha_pos\": 0.7,\n+            \"min_overlap_years\": 10,\n+            \"min_overlap_steps\": 8,\n+        }\n+    ).sort_values([\"cluster\", \"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\n+    return sil, clusters\n+\n+\n+def compute_attractors(state_long: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\n+    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\n+    merged = sub.merge(clusters_df[[\"country\", \"cluster\"]], on=\"country\", how=\"inner\")\n+    rows = []\n+    for cluster, g in merged.groupby(\"cluster\"):\n+        last = g.sort_values(\"year\").groupby(\"country\").tail(1).copy()\n+        star_x = float(last[\"x\"].mean())\n+        star_y = float(last[\"y\"].mean())\n+        star_z = float(last[\"z\"].mean())\n+        norm = math.sqrt(star_x**2 + star_y**2 + star_z**2)\n+        star_x, star_y, star_z = star_x / norm, star_y / norm, star_z / norm\n+        star_lat, star_lon = xyz_to_latlon(star_x, star_y, star_z)\n+\n+        dir_vectors = []\n+        end_years = []\n+        for country, gc in g.groupby(\"country\"):\n+            gc = gc.sort_values(\"year\")\n+            if len(gc) < 2:\n+                continue\n+            a = gc.iloc[-2][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+            b = gc.iloc[-1][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\n+            dv = b - a\n+            if np.linalg.norm(dv) == 0:\n+                continue\n+            dir_vectors.append(dv / np.linalg.norm(dv))\n+            end_years.append(int(gc[\"year\"].max()))\n+        if dir_vectors:\n+            dv = np.mean(np.vstack(dir_vectors), axis=0)\n+            dv = dv / np.linalg.norm(dv)\n+            dir_lat, dir_lon = xyz_to_latlon(dv[0], dv[1], dv[2])\n+            dir_x, dir_y, dir_z = dv.tolist()\n+        else:\n+            dir_lat = dir_lon = dir_x = dir_y = dir_z = np.nan\n+        rows.append(\n+            {\n+                \"flow\": flow,\n+                \"cluster\": int(cluster),\n+                \"attractor_type\": \"endpoint\",\n+                \"star_lat\": star_lat,\n+                \"star_lon\": star_lon,\n+                \"star_x\": star_x,\n+                \"star_y\": star_y,\n+                \"star_z\": star_z,\n+                \"dir_lat\": dir_lat,\n+                \"dir_lon\": dir_lon,\n+                \"dir_x\": dir_x,\n+                \"dir_y\": dir_y,\n+                \"dir_z\": dir_z,\n+                \"n_countries\": int(g[\"country\"].nunique()),\n+                \"n_endpoints_used\": int(last[\"country\"].nunique()),\n+                \"n_lastdirs_used\": int(len(dir_vectors)),\n+                \"end_year_min\": int(min(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\n+                \"end_year_max\": int(max(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\n+            }\n+        )\n+    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"cluster\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\n+\n+\n+def stability_summary(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\n+    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\n+    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\n+    full_labels = clusters_df.set_index(\"country\").loc[countries, \"cluster\"].to_numpy()\n+    window_rows = []\n+    bootstrap_rows = []\n+    for seed in range(10):\n+        rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\n+        idx = np.sort(rng.choice(len(countries), size=max(10, int(0.8 * len(countries))), replace=False))\n+        Xs = X[np.ix_(idx, idx)]\n+        if len(idx) <= len(set(full_labels[idx])):\n+            continue\n+        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\n+            n_clusters=len(np.unique(full_labels)),\n+            metric=\"precomputed\",\n+            linkage=\"average\",\n+        )\n+        labels = model.fit_predict(Xs)\n+        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\n+        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\n+        bootstrap_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"seed\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\n+    for seed in range(5):\n+        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels, full_labels)\n+        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels, full_labels)\n+        window_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"window_id\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\n+    bs = pd.DataFrame(bootstrap_rows)\n+    wd = pd.DataFrame(window_rows)\n+    summary = pd.DataFrame(\n+        [\n+            {\n+                \"flow\": flow,\n+                \"window_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"window_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\n+            }\n+        ]\n+    )\n+    return summary, wd, bs\n*** Update {"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:17:38.957Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"1. El bug exacto en `stage_06_drift` estaba en [drift.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/drift.py), dentro de `plot_choropleths()`.\nSe calculaban `iso` y `adm` sobre el `GeoDataFrame` completo de Natural Earth, luego se filtraba fuera Antártida, y después se intentaba asignar `_join_iso3` usando los arrays viejos. Resultado: el vector tenía longitud 177 y el `GeoDataFrame` ya filtrado tenía 176 filas.\n\n2. Eso hacía fallar la etapa porque la excepción ocurría durante el render de mapas:\n`ValueError: Length of values (177) does not match length of index (176)`\nAunque los CSV analíticos ya estaban escritos, la excepción subía hasta `stage_06_drift.run()` y abortaba toda la corrida antes de llegar a `stage_07_distance`.\n\n3. Hice dos cambios para que no vuelva a bloquear el pipeline:\n- corregí la lógica de `_join_iso3`: primero uso el array original solo para filtrar Antártida, y después recalculo `iso/adm` sobre el `GeoDataFrame` ya filtrado antes de asignar la columna\n- cambié [stage_06_drift.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/pipelines/stage_06_drift.py) para que las figuras sean `best-effort`: ahora tienen `make_figures=True/False` y además están envueltas en `try/except`; si fallan, los CSV se conservan y la etapa termina igual\n\nDespués reejecuté sobre la misma run `2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline` solo:\n- `stage_06_drift`\n- `stage_07_distance`\n\nResultado:\n- `stage_06_drift` terminó bien, con 8 mapas y sin `figure_warning`\n- `stage_07_distance` terminó bien, procesando 48 años\n\nArtefactos confirmados:\n- [06_drift](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/runs/trade_s2_v001/2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline/artifacts/06_drift)\n- [07_distance](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/runs/trade_s2_v001/2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline/artifacts/07_distance)\n\nLa run `2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline` ya quedó completada hasta `stage_07_distance`.","phase":"final_answer"}}

False\\n    return pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(s)\\n\\ndef compare_csv(lp,npth):\\n    a=pd.read_csv(lp)\\n    b=pd.read_csv(npth)\\n    res={'legacy_shape':a.shape,'new_shape':b.shape,'legacy_cols':list(a.columns),'new_cols':list(b.columns)}\\n    if a.columns.tolist()!=b.columns.tolist():\\n        res['column_match']=False\\n        return res\\n    res['column_match']=True\\n    exact=True\\n    max_abs={}\\n    differing_non_numeric=[]\\n    for c in a.columns:\\n        sa=a[c]\\n        sb=b[c]\\n        if len(sa)!=len(sb):\\n            exact=False\\n            continue\\n        if numericish(sa) and numericish(sb):\\n            aa=pd.to_numeric(sa, errors='coerce')\\n            bb=pd.to_numeric(sb, errors='coerce')\\n            diff=(aa-bb).abs()\\n            m=float(np.nanmax(diff.to_numpy())) if len(diff) else 0.0\\n            if m>0:\\n                max_abs[c]=m\\n            if not np.allclose(aa.fillna(0), bb.fillna(0), equal_nan=True, atol=1e-9, rtol=1e-9):\\n                exact=False\\n        else:\\n            ea=sa.fillna('').astype(str)\\n            eb=sb.fillna('').astype(str)\\n            if not ea.equals(eb):\\n                exact=False\\n                differing_non_numeric.append(c)\\n    res['exact_by_values']=exact\\n    res['max_abs_diff']=max_abs\\n    res['differing_non_numeric']=differing_non_numeric\\n    return res\\n\\nout={}\\nfor stage, plist in pairs.items():\\n    stage_res=[]\\n    for lrel,nrel in plist:\\n        lp=legacy/lrel\\n        npth=new/nrel\\n        item={'legacy':lrel,'new':nrel,'legacy_exists':lp.exists(),'new_exists':npth.exists()}\\n        if lp.exists() and npth.exists():\\n            item['hash_equal']=filehash(lp)==filehash(npth)\\n            item['csv_compare']=compare_csv(lp,npth)\\n        stage_res.append(item)\\n    out[stage]=stage_res\\nprint(json.dumps(out, indent=2))\\n'@ | python -\",\"workdir\":\"c:\\\\Python\\\\trade\",\"timeout_ms\":120000}","call_id":"call_rdLND4E6nt8guuLubQDYF6W1"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:24:17.114Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call","name":"shell_command","arguments":"{\"command\":\"@'\\nimport pandas as pd\\nlegacy = pd.read_csv(r'C:\\\\Python\\\\trade\\\\output\\\\02_symmetry_audit\\\\data\\\\country_trade_totals_value_final.csv')\\nnew = pd.read_csv(r'C:\\\\Python\\\\Geoanalisis\\\\runs\\\\trade_s2_v001\\\\2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline\\\\artifacts\\\\02_validation\\\\data\\\\country_trade_totals_value_final.csv')\\nks=['year','country']\\nlegacy=legacy.sort_values(ks).reset_index(drop=True)\\nnew=new.sort_values(ks).reset_index(drop=True)\\nprint('same_keys', legacy[ks].equals(new[ks]))\\nfor c in ['exports','imports','trade_balance']:\\n    diff=(legacy[c]-new[c]).abs()\\n    print(c, 'max_abs', diff.max(), 'allclose', ((diff.fillna(0) < 1e-8).all()))\\nprint(legacy.head(3).to_string(index=False))\\nprint(new.head(3).to_string(index=False))\\n'@ | python -\",\"workdir\":\"c:\\\\Python\\\\trade\",\"timeout_ms\":10000}","call_id":"call_gptFzO4p3RgGWYYirflMhq4t"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:24:17.114Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call","name":"shell_command","arguments":"{\"command\":\"@'\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nlegacy = Path(r'C:\\\\Python\\\\trade\\\\output')\\nnew = Path(r'C:\\\\Python\\\\Geoanalisis\\\\runs\\\\trade_s2_v001\\\\2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline\\\\artifacts')\\nchecks = {\\n '03_barycenters': ('03_barycenters', '03_barycenters'),\\n '04_clustering': ('05_gravitational_clustering/data', '04_clustering/data'),\\n '05_moran_fig': ('04_maps/fig', '05_moran/fig'),\\n '06_drift_fig': ('06_drift/fig', '06_drift/fig'),\\n '07_distance_fig': ('07_distance/fig', '07_distance/fig'),\\n}\\nfor name, (lrel, nrel) in checks.items():\\n    lp = legacy / lrel\\n    np = new / nrel\\n    lfiles = sorted([f.name for f in lp.rglob('*') if f.is_file()]) if lp.exists() else []\\n    nfiles = sorted([f.name for f in np.rglob('*') if f.is_file()]) if np.exists() else []\\n    missing_in_new = [f for f in lfiles if f not in nfiles]\\n    extra_in_new = [f for f in nfiles if f not in lfiles]\\n    print('##', name)\\n    print('legacy_count', len(lfiles), 'new_count', len(nfiles))\\n    print('missing_in_new_sample', missing_in_new[:20])\\n    print('extra_in_new_sample', extra_in_new[:20])\\n    print()\\n'@ | python -\",\"workdir\":\"c:\\\\Python\\\\trade\",\"timeout_ms\":30000}","call_id":"call_OZGYfad9ZorgR9ZyvEKmrBju"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:33:13.884Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_8bzdw1UfgkyXnje3iEmxLcs4","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.7 seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 05: autocorrelacion espacial con Moran's I.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\n\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.moran import (\r\n    aggregate_year_global,\r\n    aggregate_year_product,\r\n    build_moran_artifact_paths,\r\n    build_weights_from_od,\r\n    moran_row,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_05_moran\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_moran_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"05_moran\", tag)\r\n    od_path = build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"01_geo\") / \"data\" / \"OD_Matrix.csv\"\r\n    if not od_path.exists():\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Stage 05 requires Stage 01 OD matrix at {od_path}\")\r\n\r\n    w, codes = build_weights_from_od(od_path)\r\n    global_rows = []\r\n    sitc2_rows = []\r\n    sitc3_rows = []\r\n\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        trade_path = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not trade_path.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        exp, imp = aggregate_year_global(trade_path, config.trade_value_column)\r\n        row_exp = moran_row(exp, codes, w)\r\n        row_imp = moran_row(imp, codes, w)\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"exports\", **row_exp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"imports\", **row_imp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp2, imp2 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 2)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp2[\"product\"]) | set(imp2[\"product\"])):\r\n            r2e = moran_row(exp2[exp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r2i = moran_row(imp2[imp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r2e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r2i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp3, imp3 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 3)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp3[\"product\"]) | set(imp3[\"product\"])):\r\n            r3e = moran_row(exp3[exp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r3i = moran_row(imp3[imp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r3e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r3i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n    global_df = pd.DataFrame(global_rows)\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc2_rows)\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc3_rows)\r\n    global_df.to_csv(artifacts.global_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc2_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc2_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc3_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc3_path, index=False)\r\n\r\n    # figures\r\n    for flow, zero_col, outfile in [\r\n        (\"exports\", \"moran_global_exports.png\", \"moran_i\"),\r\n        (\"imports\", \"moran_global_imports.png\", \"moran_i\"),\r\n    ]:\r\n        sub = global_df[global_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))\r\n        ax.plot(sub[\"year\"], sub[\"moran_i\"], linewidth=2)\r\n        ax.axhline(0.0, color=\"black\", linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)\r\n        ax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\r\n        ax.set_ylabel(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(artifacts.fig_dir / zero_col, dpi=300)\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    def heatmap(df, code_col, outname):\r\n        pivot = df.pivot(index=code_col, columns=\"year\", values=\"moran_i\").sort_index()\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 14 if code_col == \"sitc2\" else 24), dpi=200)\r\n        im = ax.imshow(pivot.values.astype(float), aspect=\"auto\", interpolation=\"nearest\", cmap=\"RdBu_r\", vmin=-0.20, vmax=0.20)\r\n        ax.set_xticks(range(len(pivot.columns)))\r\n        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) if i % 2 == 0 else \"\" for i, y in enumerate(pivot.columns)], rotation=90)\r\n        ax.set_yticks(range(len(pivot.index)))\r\n        ax.set_yticklabels(list(pivot.index), fontsize=4 if code_col == \"sitc3\" else 5)\r\n        fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax).set_label(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(artifacts.fig_dir / outname, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc2\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc2\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_imports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc3\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc3\", \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_imports.png\")\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 05 complete. global_rows=%d sitc2_rows=%d sitc3_rows=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(global_df),\r\n        len(sitc2_df),\r\n        len(sitc3_df),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"global_path\": str(artifacts.global_path),\r\n CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_p = crs=crs_med\r\n).total_bounds\r\n\r\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # must match your USA/global figure buffer\r\nX_LIM = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\nY_LIM = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n# path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Authoritative geo paths + trade dir (set correctly)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\nOUT_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\nOUT_CSV = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, f\"barycenter_usa_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\nOUT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\")\r\nOUT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\")\r\n\r\nUSA_CODE = \"USA\"  # must match your parquet exporter/importer codes\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\r\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> str:\r\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\r\n    if not codes:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\r\n        return \";\".join(codes)\r\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Compute USA partner-weighted barycenters per year\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\nrows = []\r\n\r\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    # USA exports: exporter=USA, partner is importer\r\n    usx = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n        WHERE exporter = '{USA_CODE}'\r\n        GROUP BY importer\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    # USA imports: importer=USA, partner is exporter\r\n    usm = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n        WHERE importer = '{USA_CODE}'\r\n        GROUP BY exporter\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    usx[\"partner\"] = usx[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n    usm[\"partner\"] = usm[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n    usxg = usx.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n    usmg = usm.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n\r\n    usx_unmatched = usxg[\"lat\"].isna() | usxg[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n    usm_unmatched = usmg[\"lat\"].isna() | usmg[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n\r\n    usx_mat = usxg.loc[~usx_unmatched].copy()\r\n    usm_mat = usmg.loc[~usm_unmatched].copy()\r\n\r\n    total_us_exports = float(usx_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(usx_mat) else 0.0\r\n    total_us_imports = float(usm_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(usm_mat) else 0.0\r\n\r\n    lat_us_exports = weighted_mean(usx_mat[\"lat\"], usx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usx_mat) else np.nan\r\n    lon_us_exports = weighted_mean(usx_mat[\"lon\"], usx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usx_mat) else np.nan\r\n\r\n    lat_us_imports = weighted_mean(usm_mat[\"lat\"], usm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usm_mat) else np.nan\r\n    lon_us_imports = weighted_mean(usm_mat[\"lon\"], usm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usm_mat) else np.nan\r\n\r\n    rows.append({\r\n        \"year\": year,\r\n        \"lat_us_exports\": lat_us_exports,\r\n        \"lon_us_exports\": lon_us_exports,\r\n        \"lat_us_imports\": lat_us_imports,\r\n        \"lon_us_imports\": lon_us_imports,\r\n        \"total_us_exports_value_final_matched\": total_us_exports,\r\n        \"total_us_imports_value_final_matched\": total_us_imports,\r\n        \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(usxg)),\r\n        \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(usmg)),\r\n        \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(usx_unmatched.sum()),\r\n        \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(usm_unmatched.sum()),\r\n        \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usxg.loc[usx_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n        \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usmg.loc[usm_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\r\n    })\r\n\r\nout = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\")\r\nout.to_csv(OUT_CSV, index=False)\r\nprint(f\"Wrote: {OUT_CSV} | Years: {out['year'].nunique()}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Plot: SAME projection + SAME zoom logic as your global map\r\n# (Mediterranean-centered AEQD; zoom to barycenter bounds + buffer)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\ndfp = out.dropna(subset=[\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]).copy()\r\ndfp = dfp.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_exports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_exports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_imports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_imports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nexports_line = LineString(list(exports.geometry.values))\r\nimports_line = LineString(list(imports.geometry.values))\r\n\r\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"exports_path\"]}, geometry=[exports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"imports_path\"]}, geometry=[imports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n# Mediterranean-centered projection (same as your global map)\r\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n\r\n# Plot\r\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\r\n\r\nworld_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n\r\nimports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\r\nexports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\r\n\r\nimports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\r\nexports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\r\n\r\n# Legend\r\nlegend_elements = [\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA imports barycenter (partners)\",\r\n           markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA exports barycenter (partners)\",\r\n           markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\r\n]\r\nax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\r\n\r\n# Decade labels in black + endpoints (same labeling logic)\r\nyears = dfp[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\r\nymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\r\nlabel_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\r\nlabel_years.update([ymin, ymax])\r\n\r\ndx, dy = 35000, 35000  # same default as your global map\r\n\r\ndef label_decades(gdf_sorted):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in label_years:\r\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\r\n            ax.text(x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y), fontsize=8, color=\"black\", alpha=0.9, zorder=10)\r\n\r\nlabel_decades(imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\r\nlabel_decades(exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\r\n\r\n# Zoom: bounds + buffer (same approach)\r\nall_geom = pd.concat([imports_p.geometry, exports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True)\r\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(all_geom, crs=imports_p.crs).total_bounds\r\n\r\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # same as your global =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\nUSA_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_usa_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n\r\nOUT_IMPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.png\")\r\nOUT_IMPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\nimports_path_p = ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n\r\ngdf_global = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(\r\n    subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n)\r\n\r\nglobal_exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(gdf_global[\"lon_exports\"], gdf_global[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).to_crs(crs_med)\r\n\r\nglobal_imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(gdf_global[\"lon_imports\"], gdf_global[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).to_crs(crs_med)\r\n\r\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n    pd.concat([global_exports.geometry, global_imports.geometry]),\r\n    crs=crs_med\r\n).total_bounds\r\n\r\nbuffer = 1.2e6\r\nX_LIM = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\nY_LIM = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Year labels: ONLY selected years, smaller font\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1985, 1987, 1990, 1994, 1999, 2001, 2009, 2012, 2015, 2018, 2022}\r\n\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx=20000, dy=20000, fontsize=5):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\r\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                x0 + dx, y0 + dy,\r\n                str(y),\r\n                fontsize=fontsize,\r\n                color=\"black\",\r\n                alpha=0.8,\r\n                zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Render function\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef render_single_map(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, out_png, out_pdf):\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\r\n\r\n    ax.set_xlim(*X_LIM)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(*Y_LIM)\r\n\r\n    ax.text(\r\n        0.02, 0.02,\r\n        footer_label,\r\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Produce two maps\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nrender_single_map(\r\n    imports_p,\r\n    imports_path_p,\r\n    \"red\",\r\n    \"USA imports barycenter\",\r\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PNG,\r\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PDF\r\n)\r\n\r\nrender_single_map(\r\n    exports_p,\r\n    exports_path_p,\r\n    \"dodgerblue\",\r…5121 tokens truncated…ts\"], df[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MERC).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\n    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=CRS_MERC)\r\n    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=CRS_MERC)\r\n\r\n    # Basemap\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.25, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    # Trajectories\r\n    imports_path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.9, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\r\n    exports_path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.9, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Points\r\n    imports.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=4, zorder=5)\r\n    exports.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=4, zorder=6)\r\n\r\n    # Labels\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, imports, dx=40000, dy=40000, fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE)\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, exports, dx=40000, dy=40000, fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE)\r\n\r\n    # Consistent global extent\r\n    ax.set_xlim(XMIN, XMAX)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(YMIN, YMAX)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    ax.set_title(f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3})\", fontsize=10)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap (remove Antarctica) and project once\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\n# Clip to Mercator-safe latitudes for cleaner rendering\r\nclip_poly = gpd.GeoSeries([box(-180, GLOBAL_LAT_MIN, 180, GLOBAL_LAT_MAX)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nworld = gpd.clip(world, clip_poly)\r\n\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(CRS_MERC)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Panel layout: 5 rows x 2 cols (10 countries)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfig, axes = plt.subplots(5, 2, figsize=(12, 18), constrained_layout=True)\r\naxes = axes.flatten()\r\n\r\nfor ax, iso3 in zip(axes, COUNTRIES):\r\n    plot_country(ax, world_p, iso3)\r\n\r\n# Shared legend (bottom)\r\nlegend_elements = [\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker='o', color='w', label='Imports barycenter',\r\n           markerfacecolor='red', markersize=6),\r\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker='o', color='w', label='Exports barycenter',\r\n           markerfacecolor='dodgerblue', markersize=6),\r\n]\r\nfig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower center\", ncol=2, frameon=False, fontsize=10)\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\nplt.close(fig)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\r\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 68 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString, box\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\n\r\nCOUNTRIES = [\"BRA\",\"ARG\",\"CHL\",\"COL\",\"MEX\",\"CAN\",\"JPN\",\"GBR\",\"DEU\",\"FRA\"]\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_NAMES = {\r\n    \"BRA\": \"Brazil\",\r\n    \"ARG\": \"Argentina\",\r\n    \"CHL\": \"Chile\",\r\n    \"COL\": \"Colombia\",\r\n    \"MEX\": \"Mexico\",\r\n    \"CAN\": \"Canada\",\r\n    \"JPN\": \"Japan\",\r\n    \"GBR\": \"United Kingdom\",\r\n    \"DEU\": \"Germany\",\r\n    \"FRA\": \"France\",\r\n}\r\n\r\n# Labels (updated): use 2022 (not 2023)\r\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1981, 1985, 1988, 1994, 1997, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2022}\r\nEMPH_YEARS = {1977, 2022}  # bold + italic\r\n\r\n# Visuals\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"lightgray\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nBASEMAP_LW = 0.35\r\nPATH_LW = 1.1\r\nPATH_ALPHA = 0.28\r\nPOINT_SIZE = 8\r\n\r\n# Smaller year labels\r\nLABEL_FONTSIZE = 4\r\nLABEL_ALPHA = 0.8\r\n\r\n# Output filename format: barycenter_<ISO3>_exports/imports\r\n# Output filename templates (per-country, per-flow)\r\nOUT_FMT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.png\")\r\nOUT_FMT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.pdf\")\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CRS helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef aeqd(lat0, lon0) -> CRS:\r\n    return CRS.from_proj4(f\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0={lat0} +lon_0={lon0} +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Projection + extent rules (lon/lat)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# 1) Argentina, Brazil, Chile:\r\n#    Center North Africa; N=southern France (~43N), S=equatorial Africa (0),\r\n#    W=eastern tip of Brazil (~-35), E=Iraq (~44E)\r\nCRS_N_AFRICA = aeqd(20, 10)\r\nBBOX_N_AFRICA = (-35, 0, 44, 43)\r\n\r\n# 2) Colombia:\r\n#    N=UK (~58N), S=Ecuador (~-5), W=Yucatan (~-92), E=France (~2)\r\nCRS_COL = aeqd(15, -40)\r\nBBOX_COL = (-92, -5, 2, 58)\r\n\r\n# 3) Mexico:\r\n#    Projection centered around NY (ok)\r\n#    Extent: N=southern Canada (~49N), S=southern Mexico (~14N),\r\n#            W=California (~-125), E=Spain (~3E)\r\nCRS_MEX = aeqd(40.7, -74.0)\r\nBBOX_MEX = (-125, 14, 3, 49)\r\n\r\n# 4) Canada: use same projection and extent as Mexico\r\nCRS_CAN = CRS_MEX\r\nBBOX_CAN = BBOX_MEX\r\n\r\n# 5) Japan:\r\n#    Center Egypt; N=southern Europe (~45N), S=Yemen (~12N),\r\n#    W=Canary Islands (~-16), E=Pakistan (~75E)\r\nCRS_JPN = aeqd(26, 30)\r\nBBOX_JPN = (-16, 12, 75, 45)\r\n\r\n# 6) European countries: use Mediterranean projection + extent from USA logic\r\nCRS_MED = aeqd(35, 18)\r\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\nEU_ISOS = {\"GBR\", \"DEU\", \"FRA\"}\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_SETTINGS = {\r\n    \"ARG\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"BRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"CHL\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n\r\n    \"COL\": {\"crs\": CRS_COL,      \"bbox\": BBOX_COL},\r\n\r\n    \"MEX\": {\"crs\": CRS_MEX,      \"bbox\": BBOX_MEX},\r\n    \"CAN\": {\"crs\": CRS_CAN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_CAN},\r\n\r\n    \"JPN\": {\"crs\": CRS_JPN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_JPN},\r\n\r\n    # EU: bbox ignored; extent computed from global barycenter file under CRS_MED\r\n    \"GBR\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"DEU\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"FRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n}\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef load_barycenter_df(iso3: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    fp = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_{iso3}_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fp):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing barycenter file: {fp}\")\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(fp).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    needed = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    missing = [c for c in needed if c not in df.columns]\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"{iso3}: missing columns {missing} in {fp}\")\r\n    return df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx, dy):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\r\n            is_emph = y in EMPH_YEARS\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                r.geometry.x + dx,\r\n                r.geometry.y + dy,\r\n                str(y),\r\n                fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE,\r\n                color=\"black\",\r\n                alpha=LABEL_ALPHA,\r\n                fontweight=(\"bold\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                fontstyle=(\"italic\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\ndef project_bbox(crs_target: CRS, bbox_lonlat):\r\n    lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max = bbox_lonlat\r\n    bbox_ll = gpd.GeoSeries([box(lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    bbox_p = bbox_ll.to_crs(crs_target).iloc[0]\r\n    return bbox_p.bounds  # xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax\r\n\r\ndef compute_med_extent_from_global():\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Reproduce the USA Mediterranean extent logic:\r\n    project global import+export barycenters to CRS_MED and take bounds + buffer.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    if not os.path.exists(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing global barycenter file for EU extent: {GLOBAL_BARY_FILE}\")\r\n\r\n    g = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(\r\n        subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ge = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_exports\"], g[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    gi = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_imports\"], g[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([ge.geometry, gi.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=CRS_MED\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n\r\n    buffer = 1.2e6\r\n    return (minx - buffer, miny - buffer, maxx + buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\nEU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX = compute_med_extent_from_global()\r\n\r\ndef get_extent_for_country(iso3: str):\r\n    s = COUNTRY_SETTINGS[iso3]\r\n    crs = s[\"crs\"]\r\n    if iso3 in EU_ISOS:\r\n        return crs, (EU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX)\r\n    xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax = project_bbox(crs, s[\"bbox\"])\r\n    return crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)\r\n\r\ndef render_map_for_country_flow(world_ll, iso3: str, flow: str):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    flow: \"imports\" or \"exports\"\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) = get_extent_for_country(iso3)\r\n    df = load_barycenter_df(iso3)\r\n\r\n    if flow == \"imports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"\r\n        color = \"red\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) — Imports barycenter\"\r\n    elif flow == \"exports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"\r\n        color = \"dodgerblue\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) — Exports barycenter\"\r\n    else:\r\n        raise ValueError(\"flow must be 'imports' or 'exports'\")\r\n\r\n    gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_col], df[lat_col])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\").to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(gdf.geometry.tolist())], crs=crs)\r\n\r\n    world_p = world_ll.to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=BASEMAP_LW, edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE, color=BASEMAP_FACE, zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=PATH_LW, color=color, alpha=PATH_ALPHA, zorder=3)\r\n    gdf.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=POINT_SIZE, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Labels (smaller) with emphasis on 1977 and 2022\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, gdf, dx=15000, dy=15000)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_xlim(xmin, xmax)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\r\n\r\n    # Lower-left legend text\r\n    ax.text(\r\n        0.02, 0.02, footer,\r\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n        fontsize=9,\r\n        color=\"black\",\r\n        ha=\"left\",\r\n        va=\"bottom\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n\r\n    out_png = OUT_FMT_PNG.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n    out_pdf = OUT_FMT_PDF.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_png}\")\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_pdf}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Render: two maps per country\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfor iso3 in COUNTRIES:\r\n    render_map_for_country_flow(world, iso3, \"imports\")\r\n    render_map_for_country_flow(world, iso3, \"exports\")\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 135 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Stage 07 — Visualizations\r\n# ============================================================\r\nimport re\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\n\r\n_DPI            = 300\r\n_EXP_COLOR      = \"steelblue\"\r\n_IMP_COLOR      = \"tomato\"\r\n_CMAP_EXP       = \"Blues\"\r\n_CMAP_IMP       = \"Reds\"\r\n_FONT_COUNTRY   = 4\r\n_FONT_SITC2     = 5\r\n_FONT_SITC3     = 4\r\n_FSIZ_GLOBAL    = (12, 5)\r\n_FSIZ_CY        = (14, 18)\r\n_FSIZ_SITC2     = (20, 14)\r\n_FSIZ_SITC3     = (14, 40)\r\n_s07_tag        = f\"{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_read_code_dict(path, code_col):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Load a SITC reference dict. Auto-detects delimiter.\r\n    Returns DataFrame with columns [code_col, 'name', 'nickname'].\r\n    Gracefully returns an empty frame if file is missing.\r\n    Accepts str or Path.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    path = Path(path)  # Option A: coerce str -> Path\r\n\r\n    if not path.exists():\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: ref dict not found: %s — nicknaming unavailable.\", path)\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\r\n\r\n    with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\") as fh:\r\n        lines = [ln.strip() for ln in fh if ln.strip() and not ln.strip().startswith(\"#\")]\r\n\r\n    for _delim in [\"\\t\", \"|\", \";\", \",\"]:\r\n        rows = [ln.split(_delim) for ln in lines]\r\n        k = max(len(r) for r in rows) if rows else 0\r\n        if k >= 3:\r\n            rows = [r + [\"\"] * max(0, k - len(r)) for r in rows]\r\n            df = pd.DataFrame(rows).iloc[:, :3]\r\n            df.columns = [code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"]\r\n\r\n            for c in df.columns:\r\n                df[c] = df[c].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n\r\n            # If first row looks like a header (code is not 1-4 digits), drop it\r\n            if len(df) and not re.fullmatch(r\"\\d{1,4}\", str(df.iloc[0][code_col])):\r\n                df = df.iloc[1:].reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n            return df\r\n\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(columns=[code_col, \"name\", \"nickname\"])\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_make_matrix(df, row_col, col_col, val_col):\r\n    df2 = df[[row_col, col_col, val_col]].groupby([row_col, col_col], as_index=False)[val_col].mean()\r\n    return df2.pivot(index=row_col, columns=col_col, values=val_col).sort_index(axis=1)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _s07_plot_heatmap(mat, cmap, outpath, vmin, vmax, ytick_fs, figsize, yticklabels=None):\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)\r\n    im = ax.imshow(\r\n        mat.to_numpy(dtype=float),\r\n        aspect=\"auto\",\r\n        interpolation=\"nearest\",\r\n        cmap=cmap,\r\n        vmin=vmin,\r\n        vmax=vmax,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    years = mat.columns.tolist()\r\n    ax.set_xticks(range(len(years)))\r\n    ax.set_xticklabels([str(y) for y in years], rotation=90, fontsize=8)\r\n\r\n    rows = mat.index.tolist()\r\n    ax.set_yticks(range(len(rows)))\r\n    ax.set_yticklabels(yticklabels if yticklabels is not None else rows, fontsize=ytick_fs)\r\n\r\n    cbar = fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax)\r\n    cbar.set_label(\"Average distance (km)\")\r\n\r\n    fig.tight_layout()\r\n    outpath = Path(outpath)  # safe if passed as str\r\n    fig.savefig(outpath, dpi=_DPI)\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 1) Global line plot (exports + imports) ──────────────────\r\n_g = _s07_gl_df.copy()\r\n_g[\"year\"] = _g[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=_FSIZ_GLOBAL)\r\nax.plot(\r\n    _g[\"year\"],\r\n    _g[\"global_export_distance_km\"],\r\n    label=\"Exports\",\r\n    color=_EXP_COLOR,\r\n    linewidth=2,\r\n)\r\nax.plot(\r\n    _g[\"year\"],\r\n    _g[\"global_import_distance_km\"],\r\n    label=\"Imports\",\r\n    color=_IMP_COLOR,\r\n    linewidth=2,\r\n    linestyle=\"--\",\r\n)\r\n\r\nax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\r\nax.set_ylabel(\"Average distance (km)\")\r\nax.legend()\r\nax.grid(True, linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.4)\r\n\r\n_out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_global_line_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\nfig.tight_layout()\r\nfig.savefig(_out, dpi=_DPI)\r\nplt.close(fig)\r\nlogger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 2) Country heatmaps ──────────────────────────────────────\r\n_cy = _s07_cy_df.copy()\r\n_cy[\"year\"] = _cy[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n_cy[\"country\"] = _cy[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\nfor _flow, _col, _cmap in [\r\n    (\"exports\", \"avg_export_distance_km\", _CMAP_EXP),\r\n    (\"imports\", \"avg_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _cy[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_cy[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_cy, \"country\", \"year\", _col)\r\n    if _mat.empty:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: country heatmap skipped (empty) for %s\", _flow)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    _vmin = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 1))\r\n    _vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 99))\r\n\r\n    # Sort countries by median distance (desc)\r\n    _mat = _mat.loc[_mat.median(axis=1).sort_values(ascending=False).index]\r\n\r\n    _out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_country_heatmap_{_flow}_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\n    _s07_plot_heatmap(_mat, _cmap, _out, _vmin, _vmax, _FONT_COUNTRY, _FSIZ_CY)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 3) SITC-2 heatmaps ───────────────────────────────────────\r\n_s2 = _s07_s2_df.copy()\r\n_s2[\"year\"]  = _s2[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n_s2[\"sitc2\"] = _s2[\"sitc2\"].astype(str).str.zfill(2)\r\n\r\n_s2d = _s07_read_code_dict(SITC2_DICT_PATH, \"sitc2\")\r\nif not _s2d.empty:\r\n    _s2d[\"sitc2\"] = _s2d[\"sitc2\"].astype(str).str.zfill(2)\r\n\r\nfor _flow, _col, _cmap in [\r\n    (\"exports\", \"global_export_distance_km\", _CMAP_EXP),\r\n    (\"imports\", \"global_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _s2[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_s2[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_s2, \"sitc2\", \"year\", _col).sort_index()\r\n    if _mat.empty:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: SITC2 heatmap skipped (empty) for %s\", _flow)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    _vmin = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 1))\r\n    _vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 99))\r\n\r\n    _lbls = []\r\n    for _c in _mat.index:\r\n        if _s2d.empty:\r\n            _lbls.append(_c)\r\n        else:\r\n            _n = _s2d.loc[_s2d[\"sitc2\"] == _c, \"nickname\"].values\r\n            _lbls.append(f\"{_c}-{_n[0]}\" if len(_n) and str(_n[0]).strip() else _c)\r\n\r\n    _out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_sitc2_heatmap_{_flow}_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\n    _s07_plot_heatmap(_mat, _cmap, _out, _vmin, _vmax, _FONT_SITC2, _FSIZ_SITC2, _lbls)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ── 4) SITC-3 heatmaps ───────────────────────────────────────\r\n_s3 = _s07_s3_df.copy()\r\n_s3[\"year\"]  = _s3[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n_s3[\"sitc3\"] = _s3[\"sitc3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n\r\n_s3d = _s07_read_code_dict(SITC3_DICT_PATH, \"sitc3\")\r\nif not _s3d.empty:\r\n    _s3d[\"sitc3\"] = _s3d[\"sitc3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\r\n\r\nfor _flow, _col, _cmap in [\r\n    (\"exports\", \"global_export_distance_km\", _CMAP_EXP),\r\n    (\"imports\", \"global_import_distance_km\", _CMAP_IMP),\r\n]:\r\n    _s3[_col] = pd.to_numeric(_s3[_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    _mat = _s07_make_matrix(_s3, \"sitc3\", \"year\", _col).sort_index()\r\n    if _mat.empty:\r\n        logger.warning(\"Stage 07: SITC3 heatmap skipped (empty) for %s\", _flow)\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    _vmin = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 1))\r\n    _vmax = float(np.nanpercentile(_mat.values, 99))\r\n\r\n    _lbls = []\r\n    for _c in _mat.index:\r\n        if _s3d.empty:\r\n            _lbls.append(_c)\r\n        else:\r\n            _n = _s3d.loc[_s3d[\"sitc3\"] == _c, \"nickname\"].values\r\n            _lbls.append(f\"{_c}-{_n[0]}\" if len(_n) and str(_n[0]).strip() else _c)\r\n\r\n    _out = Path(DIST_FIG) / f\"distance_sitc3_heatmap_{_flow}_{_s07_tag}.png\"\r\n    _s07_plot_heatmap(_mat, _cmap, _out, _vmin, _vmax, _FONT_SITC3, _FSIZ_SITC3, _lbls)\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 07: saved %s\", _out.name)\r\n\r\nprint(f\"[Stage 07] All visualizations saved -> {DIST_FIG}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n"}}
