{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:56:26.528Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_SpEbVsVYTwHN8ZfE7ycaTHpS","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.8 seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 03: barycentros globales y por pais.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.barycenters import (\r\n    build_barycenter_artifact_paths,\r\n    compute_country_barycenters,\r\n    compute_global_barycenters,\r\n    detect_all_country_codes,\r\n    load_centroids,\r\n    render_global_maps,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str, make_figures: bool = True) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_03_barycenters\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    artifacts = build_barycenter_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"03_barycenters\")\r\n    stage01_dir = build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"01_geo\") / \"data\"\r\n    centroids_path = stage01_dir / \"country_centroids_augmented.csv\"\r\n    if not centroids_path.exists():\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Stage 03 requires Stage 01 centroids at {centroids_path}\")\r\n    centroids = load_centroids(centroids_path)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 03 started for dataset %s and run %s\", config.dataset_version, run_id)\r\n    global_df = compute_global_barycenters(config, centroids, artifacts.global_barycenter_path)\r\n    focus_written = compute_country_barycenters(\r\n        config, centroids, list(config.focus_countries), artifacts.data_dir\r\n    )\r\n    all_codes = detect_all_country_codes(config)\r\n    all_written = compute_country_barycenters(config, centroids, all_codes, artifacts.data_dir)\r\n\r\n    # compatibility copies for legacy-named special files\r\n    import shutil\r\n\r\n    usa_path = artifacts.data_dir / f\"barycenter_USA_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    if usa_path.exists():\r\n        shutil.copyfile(usa_path, artifacts.usa_trade_path)\r\n\r\n    china_path = artifacts.data_dir / f\"barycenter_CHN_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    if china_path.exists():\r\n        shutil.copyfile(china_path, artifacts.china_trade_path)\r\n\r\n    if make_figures:\r\n        render_global_maps(global_df, config.natural_earth_shapefile_path, artifacts.fig_dir)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 03 complete. focus=%d all=%d global_rows=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(focus_written),\r\n        len(all_written),\r\n        len(global_df),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"global_barycenter_path\": str(artifacts.global_barycenter_path),\r\n        \"usa_trade_path\": str(artifacts.usa_trade_path),\r\n        \"china_trade_path\": str(artifacts.china_trade_path),\r\n    }\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-10T23:56:32.037Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_2njrRMjqMg02qOBE3rk0Iev6","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import LineString, Point, box\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass BarycenterArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n    global_barycenter_path: Path\r\n    usa_trade_path: Path\r\n    china_trade_path: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_barycenter_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> BarycenterArtifacts:\r\n    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\r\n    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\r\n    return BarycenterArtifacts(\r\n        stage_dir=stage_dir,\r\n        data_dir=data_dir,\r\n        fig_dir=fig_dir,\r\n        global_barycenter_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_imports_exports_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n        usa_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n        china_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_china_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _connect_duckdb():\r\n    con = duckdb.connect()\r\n    con.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\r\n    return con\r\n\r\n\r\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\r\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef truncate_codes(codes, max_codes: int = 50) -> str:\r\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\r\n    if not codes:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\r\n        return \";\".join(codes)\r\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes) - max_codes} more)\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_centroids(centroids_path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    centroids = pd.read_csv(centroids_path, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n    centroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    return centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_global_barycenters(\r\n    config: ProjectConfig, centroids: pd.DataFrame, output_path: Path\r\n) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    con = _connect_duckdb()\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not fpath.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n        exports_df = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS exports_value\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY exporter\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        imports_df = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT importer AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS imports_value\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY importer\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        exports_df[\"code\"] = exports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n        imports_df[\"code\"] = imports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n        ex = exports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        im = imports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        ex_unmatched = ex[\"lat\"].isna() | ex[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n        im_unmatched = im[\"lat\"].isna() | im[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n        exm = ex.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\r\n        imm = im.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"year\": year,\r\n                \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"total_exports_value_matched\": float(exm[\"exports_value\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\r\n                \"total_imports_value_matched\": float(imm[\"imports_value\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_total\": len(ex),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_total\": len(im),\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_matched\": int((~ex_unmatched).sum()),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_matched\": int((~im_unmatched).sum()),\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                \"unmatched_exporter_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                    ex.loc[ex_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                ),\r\n                \"unmatched_importer_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                    im.loc[im_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                ),\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    con.close()\r\n    out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    out.to_csv(output_path, index=False)\r\n    return out\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_country_barycenters(\r\n    config: ProjectConfig,\r\n    centroids: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    focus_codes: list[str],\r\n    output_dir: Path,\r\n) -> dict[str, Path]:\r\n    con = _connect_duckdb()\r\n    rows_by_country = {code: [] for code in focus_codes}\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not fpath.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n        ex_all = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT exporter AS country, importer AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY exporter, importer\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        im_all = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT importer AS country, exporter AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY importer, exporter\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        ex_all[\"country\"] = ex_all[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n        ex_all[\"partner\"] = ex_all[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n        im_all[\"country\"] = im_all[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n        im_all[\"partner\"] = im_all[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n        ex_focus = ex_all[ex_all[\"country\"].isin(focus_codes)].copy()\r\n        im_focus = im_all[im_all[\"country\"].isin(focus_codes)].copy()\r\n\r\n        ex_focus = ex_focus.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        im_focus = im_focus.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n\r\n        for code in focus_codes:\r\n            exg = ex_focus[ex_focus[\"country\"] == code].copy()\r\n            img = im_focus[im_focus[\"country\"] == code].copy()\r\n            ex_unmatched = exg[\"lat\"].isna() | exg[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n            im_unmatched = img[\"lat\"].isna() | img[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n            exm = exg.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\r\n            imm = img.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\r\n            rows_by_country[code].append(\r\n                {\r\n                    \"year\": year,\r\n                    \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                    \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"w\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                    \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                    \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"w\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                    \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": float(exm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": float(imm[\"w\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\r\n                    \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(exg)),\r\n                    \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(img)),\r\n                    \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                    \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                    \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                        exg.loc[ex_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                    ),\r\n                    \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                        img.loc[im_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                    ),\r\n                }\r\n            )\r\n    con.close()\r\n    written = {}\r\n    for code, rows in rows_by_country.items():\r\n        out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n        out_path = output_dir / f\"barycenter_{code}_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n        out.to_csv(out_path, index=False)\r\n        written[code] = out_path\r\n    return written\r\n\r\n\r\ndef detect_all_country_codes(config: ProjectConfig) -> list[str]:\r\n    con = _connect_duckdb()\r\n    s2_glob = str(config.dataset_trade_dir / \"S2_*.parquet\")\r\n    df = con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        WITH all_s2 AS (\r\n            SELECT exporter::VARCHAR AS exporter_code, importer::VARCHAR AS importer_code\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{s2_glob}')\r\n        )\r\n        SELECT DISTINCT code\r\n        FROM (\r\n            SELECT exporter_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE exporter_code IS NOT NULL AND exporter_code <> ''\r\n            UNION\r\n            SELECT importer_code AS code FROM all_s2 WHERE importer_code IS NOT NULL AND importer_code <> ''\r\n        )\r\n        ORDER BY code\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n    ).df()\r\n    con.close()\r\n    return df[\"code\"].astype(str).tolist()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef render_global_maps(global_df: pd.DataFrame, shapefile_path: Path, fig_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(shapefile_path)\r\n    if \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n        world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]].dropna().copy(),\r\n        geometry=[\r\n            Point(xy)\r\n            for xy in zip(\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lon_exports\"],\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lat_exports\"],\r\n            )\r\n        ],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]].dropna().copy(),\r\n        geometry=[\r\n            Point(xy)\r\n            for xy in zip(\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lon_imports\"],\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lat_imports\"],\r\n            )\r\n        ],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    if exports.empty or imports.empty:\r\n        return\r\n    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    crs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n    world_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    exports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    imports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    exports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    imports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=crs_med,\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n    buffer = 1.2e6\r\n    xlim = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\n    ylim = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n    def render(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, basename):\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n        world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n        path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n        points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n        ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\r\n        ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\r\n        ax.text(0.02, 0.02, footer_label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, ha=\"left\", va=\"bottom\")\r\n        ax.set_axis_off()\r\n        plt.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.pdf\", bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    render(imports_p, imports_path_p, \"red\", \"Global imports barycenter\", \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean\")\r\n    render(\r\n        exports_p,\r\n        exports_path_p,\r\n        \"dodgerblue\",\r\n        \"Global exports barycenter\",\r\n        \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean\",\r\n    )\r\n"}}

shutil.copyfile(china_path, artifacts.china_trade_path)\r\n49:\r\n50:    if make_figures:\r\n51:        render_global_maps(global_df, config.natural_earth_shapefile_path, {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T00:02:10.572Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"**GA-COMP-004**\n\n**Code changes**\nEdited only Stage 03 files:\n- [barycenters.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/barycenters.py#L205)\n- [stage_03_barycenters.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/pipelines/stage_03_barycenters.py#L41)\n\nKey changes:\n- added `write_legacy_special_country_trade_file(...)` in [barycenters.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/barycenters.py#L205)\n- changed Stage 03 so the special USA compatibility file is no longer a raw copy of `barycenter_USA_...`\n- Stage 03 now writes [barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/runs/trade_s2_v001/2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline/artifacts/03_barycenters/data/barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv) with the legacy schema:\n  - `lat_us_exports`\n  - `lon_us_exports`\n  - `lat_us_imports`\n  - `lon_us_imports`\n  - `total_us_exports_value_final_matched`\n  - `total_us_imports_value_final_matched`\n\n**What was modified**\nPreviously, the USA special file was produced by `shutil.copyfile(...)`, so it inherited the generic country barycenter schema. {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T00:02:50.286Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_K8Hr3sn1ALQUtI4UjxlN5SSH","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 05: autocorrelacion espacial con Moran's I.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.moran import (\r\n    aggregate_year_global,\r\n    aggregate_year_product,\r\n    build_moran_artifact_paths,\r\n    build_weights_from_od,\r\n    moran_row,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _load_sitc_labels(reference_path: Path, code_col: str, label_col: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(reference_path, sep=\"\\t\", dtype=str).fillna(\"\")\r\n    df[code_col] = df[code_col].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n    df[label_col] = df[label_col].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n    labels = {}\r\n    for row in df[[code_col, label_col]].itertuples(index=False):\r\n        code, label = row\r\n        labels[code] = f\"{code}-{label}\" if label else code\r\n    return labels\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _render_figures(\r\n    global_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    sitc2_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    sitc3_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    fig_dir: Path,\r\n    config: ProjectConfig,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    sitc2_labels = _load_sitc_labels(\r\n        config.dataset_reference_dir / \"sitc2-2digit.txt\",\r\n        \"sitc2\",\r\n        \"nickname2\",\r\n    )\r\n    sitc3_labels = _load_sitc_labels(\r\n        config.dataset_reference_dir / \"sitc2-3digit.txt\",\r\n        \"sitc3\",\r\n        \"nickname3\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    for flow, outfile in [\r\n        (\"exports\", \"moran_global_exports.png\"),\r\n        (\"imports\", \"moran_global_imports.png\"),\r\n    ]:\r\n        sub = global_df[global_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))\r\n        ax.plot(sub[\"year\"], sub[\"moran_i\"], linewidth=2)\r\n        ax.axhline(0.0, color=\"black\", linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)\r\n        ax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\r\n        ax.set_ylabel(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / outfile, dpi=300)\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    def heatmap(df: pd.DataFrame, code_col: str, labels: dict[str, str], outname: str) -> None:\r\n        pivot = df.pivot(index=code_col, columns=\"year\", values=\"moran_i\").sort_index()\r\n        ylabels = [labels.get(str(code), str(code)) for code in pivot.index]\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 14 if code_col == \"sitc2\" else 24), dpi=200)\r\n        im = ax.imshow(\r\n            pivot.values.astype(float),\r\n            aspect=\"auto\",\r\n            interpolation=\"nearest\",\r\n            cmap=\"RdBu_r\",\r\n            vmin=-0.20,\r\n            vmax=0.20,\r\n        )\r\n        ax.set_xticks(range(len(pivot.columns)))\r\n        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) if i % 2 == 0 else \"\" for i, y in enumerate(pivot.columns)], rotation=90)\r\n        ax.set_yticks(range(len(pivot.index)))\r\n        ax.set_yticklabels(ylabels, fontsize=4 if code_col == \"sitc3\" else 5)\r\n        fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax).set_label(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / outname, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc2\", sitc2_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc2\", sitc2_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_imports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc3\", sitc3_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc3\", sitc3_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_imports.png\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef rerender_figures(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_moran_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"05_moran\", tag)\r\n    global_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.global_path)\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.sitc2_path, dtype={\"sitc2\": str})\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.sitc3_path, dtype={\"sitc3\": str})\r\n    _render_figures(global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, artifacts.fig_dir, config)\r\n    return {\"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir), \"fig_dir\": str(artifacts.fig_dir)}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_05_moran\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_moran_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"05_moran\", tag)\r\n    od_path = build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"01_geo\") / \"data\" / \"OD_Matrix.csv\"\r\n    if not od_path.exists():\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Stage 05 requires Stage 01 OD matrix at {od_path}\")\r\n\r\n    w, codes = build_weights_from_od(od_path)\r\n    global_rows = []\r\n    sitc2_rows = []\r\n    sitc3_rows = []\r\n\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        trade_path = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not trade_path.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        exp, imp = aggregate_year_global(trade_path, config.trade_value_column)\r\n        row_exp = moran_row(exp, codes, w)\r\n        row_imp = moran_row(imp, codes, w)\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"exports\", **row_exp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"imports\", **row_imp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp2, imp2 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 2)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp2[\"product\"]) | set(imp2[\"product\"])):\r\n            r2e = moran_row(exp2[exp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r2i = moran_row(imp2[imp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r2e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r2i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp3, imp3 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 3)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp3[\"product\"]) | set(imp3[\"product\"])):\r\n            r3e = moran_row(exp3[exp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r3i = moran_row(imp3[imp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r3e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r3i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n    global_df = pd.DataFrame(global_rows)\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc2_rows)\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc3_rows)\r\n    global_df.to_csv(artifacts.global_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc2_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc2_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc3_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc3_path, index=False)\r\n    _render_figures(global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, artifacts.fig_dir, config)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 05 complete. global_rows=%d sitc2_rows=%d sitc3_rows=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(global_df),\r\n        len(sitc2_df),\r\n        len(sitc3_df),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"global_path\": str(artifacts.global_path),\r\n        \"sitc2_path\": str(artifacts.sitc2_path),\r\n        \"sitc3_path\": str(artifacts.sitc3_path),\r\n    }\r\n"}}

output lines: 1521\nOutput:\nimport os\nimport pandas as pd\nimport geopandas as gpd\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\nfrom pyproj import CRS\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Paths (GLOBAL barycenters already computed)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\n\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\nGLOBAL_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\n\nOUT_IMPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.png\")\nOUT_IMPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.pdf\")\n\nOUT_EXPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean.png\")\nOUT_EXPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean.pdf\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\nif world.crs is None:\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load GLOBAL barycenters\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndf = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_CSV).sort_values(\"year\")\ndf = df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]).copy()\n\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]],\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_exports\"], df[\"lat_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]],\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_imports\"], df[\"lat_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\n)\n\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\n)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# SAME Mediterranean projection (as USA map)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# SAME zoom window logic as USA map:\n# derive extent from GLOBAL points themselves (then apply same buffer)\n# This reproduces the exact global \"Mediterranean zoom\" frame you used.\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\n    pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry]),\n    crs=crs_med\n).total_bounds\n\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # must match your USA/global figure buffer\nX_LIM = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\nY_LIM = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Year labels: SAME as USA map, same font size\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1980, 1985, 1994, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2023}\n\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx=20000, dy=20000, fontsize=5):\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\n            ax.text(\n                x0 + dx, y0 + dy,\n                str(y),\n                fontsize=fontsize,\n                color=\"black\",\n                alpha=0.8,\n                zorder=10\n            )\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Render function (same as USA map)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef render_single_map(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, out_png, out_pdf):\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\n\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\n\n    add_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\n\n    ax.set_xlim(*X_LIM)\n    ax.set_ylim(*Y_LIM)\n\n    ax.text(\n        0.02, 0.02,\n        footer_label,\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\n        fontsize=9,\n        color=\"black\",\n        ha=\"left\",\n        va=\"bottom\"\n    )\n\n    ax.set_axis_off()\n    plt.tight_layout()\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n    plt.close(fig)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Produce two maps: GLOBAL imports-only and exports-only\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nrender_single_map(\n    imports_p,\n    imports_path_p,\n    \"red\",\n    \"Global imports barycenter\",\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PNG,\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PDF\n)\n\nrender_single_map(\n    exports_p,\n    exports_path_p,\n    \"dodgerblue\",\n    \"Global exports barycenter\",\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PNG,\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PDF\n)\nimport os\nimport duckdb\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nimport geopandas as gpd\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\nfrom pyproj import CRS\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Authoritative geo paths + trade dir (set correctly)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\n\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\n\nOUT_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\n\nOUT_CSV = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, f\"barycenter_usa_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\nOUT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\")\nOUT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\")\n\nUSA_CODE = \"USA\"  # must match your parquet exporter/importer codes\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Helpers\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    s = np.nansum(w)\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\n        return np.nan\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\n\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> str:\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\n    if not codes:\n        return \"\"\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\n        return \";\".join(codes)\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Compute USA partner-weighted barycenters per year\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncon = duckdb.connect()\nrows = []\n\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\n        continue\n\n    # USA exports: exporter=USA, partner is importer\n    usx = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE exporter = '{USA_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY importer\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    # USA imports: importer=USA, partner is exporter\n    usm = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE importer = '{USA_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY exporter\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    usx[\"partner\"] = usx[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n    usm[\"partner\"] = usm[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n\n    usxg = usx.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n    usmg = usm.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n\n    usx_unmatched = usxg[\"lat\"].isna() | usxg[\"lon\"].isna()\n    usm_unmatched = usmg[\"lat\"].isna() | usmg[\"lon\"].isna()\n\n    usx_mat = usxg.loc[~usx_unmatched].copy()\n    usm_mat = usmg.loc[~usm_unmatched].copy()\n\n    total_us_exports = float(usx_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(usx_mat) else 0.0\n    total_us_imports = float(usm_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(usm_mat) else 0.0\n\n    lat_us_exports = weighted_mean(usx_mat[\"lat\"], usx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usx_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_us_exports = weighted_mean(usx_mat[\"lon\"], usx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usx_mat) else np.nan\n\n    lat_us_imports = weighted_mean(usm_mat[\"lat\"], usm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usm_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_us_imports = weighted_mean(usm_mat[\"lon\"], usm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(usm_mat) else np.nan\n\n    rows.append({\n        \"year\": year,\n        \"lat_us_exports\": lat_us_exports,\n        \"lon_us_exports\": lon_us_exports,\n        \"lat_us_imports\": lat_us_imports,\n        \"lon_us_imports\": lon_us_imports,\n        \"total_us_exports_value_final_matched\": total_us_exports,\n        \"total_us_imports_value_final_matched\": total_us_imports,\n        \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(usxg)),\n        \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(usmg)),\n        \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(usx_unmatched.sum()),\n        \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(usm_unmatched.sum()),\n        \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usxg.loc[usx_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\n        \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(usmg.loc[usm_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\n    })\n\nout = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\")\nout.to_csv(OUT_CSV, index=False)\nprint(f\"Wrote: {OUT_CSV} | Years: {out['year'].nunique()}\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Plot: SAME projection + SAME zoom logic as your global map\n# (Mediterranean-centered AEQD; zoom to barycenter bounds + buffer)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\nif world.crs is None:\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n\ndfp = out.dropna(subset=[\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]).copy()\ndfp = dfp.sort_values(\"year\")\n\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_exports\",\"lon_us_exports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_exports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_us_imports\",\"lon_us_imports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_us_imports\"], dfp[\"lat_us_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nexports_line = LineString(list(exports.geometry.values))\nimports_line = LineString(list(imports.geometry.values))\n\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"exports_path\"]}, geometry=[exports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"imports_path\"]}, geometry=[imports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n\n# Mediterranean-centered projection (same as your global map)\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n\n# Plot\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\n\nworld_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n\nimports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\nexports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\n\nimports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\nexports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\n\n# Legend\nlegend_elements = [\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA imports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA exports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\n]\nax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\n\n# Decade labels in black + endpoints (same labeling logic)\nyears = dfp[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\nymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\nlabel_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\nlabel_years.update([ymin, ymax])\n\ndx, dy = 35000, 35000  # same default as your global map\n\ndef label_decades(gdf_sorted):\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\n        if y in label_years:\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\n            ax.text(x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y), fontsize=8, color=\"black\", alpha=0.9, zorder=10)\n\nlabel_decades(imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\nlabel_decades(exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\n\n# Zoom: bounds + buffer (same approach)\nall_geom = pd.concat([imports_p.geometry, exports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True)\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(all_geom, crs=imports_p.crs).total_bounds\n\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # same as your global map; adjust if you want tighter crop\nax.set_xlim(minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\nax.set_ylim(miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n\nax.set_axis_off()\nplt.tight_layout()\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.close(fig)\n\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\nimport os\nimport duckdb\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nimport geopandas as gpd\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\nfrom pyproj import CRS\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# CONFIG (edit only TRADE_DIR if needed)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\n\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)  # <-- set to where S2_YYYY.parquet lives\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\n\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\n\n# Use the SAME map window as your global map by reading its barycenter file:\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\n\n# Output for China\nOUT_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_china_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\nOUT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\")\nOUT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\")\n\n# China code (ISO3). We'll validate it exists in your trade files.\nFOCUS_CODE = \"CHN\"\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Helpers\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    s = np.nansum(w)\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\n        return np.nan\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\n\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> str:\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\n    if not codes:\n        return \"\"\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\n        return \";\".join(codes)\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\n\ndef first_existing_parquet(trade_dir: str, start: int, end: int):\n    for y in range(start, end + 1):\n        fp = os.path.join(trade_dir, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\n        if os.path.exists(fp):\n            return y, fp\n    return None, None\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Connect DuckDB + validate that FOCUS_CODE exists (less guess)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncon = duckdb.connect()\n\ny0, fp0 = first_existing_parquet(TRADE_DIR, START_YEAR, END_YEAR)\nif fp0 is None:\n    raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No S2_YYYY.parquet files found in {TRADE_DIR} for {TRADE_YEAR_START}-{TRADE_YEAR_END}.\")\n\nexists = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n    SELECT\n      SUM(CASE WHEN exporter = '{FOCUS_CODE}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_exporter,\n      SUM(CASE WHEN importer = '{FOCUS_CODE}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_importer\n    FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n\"\"\").fetchone()\n\nif (exists[0] == 0) and (exists[1] == 0):\n    # Show likely candidates by volume (top 20) so you can pick the correct code if different\n    top_exporters = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS v\n        FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n        GROUP BY exporter\n        ORDER BY v DESC\n        LIMIT 20\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    top_importers = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS v\n        FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n        GROUP BY importer\n        ORDER BY v DESC\n        LIMIT 20\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    msg = (\n        f\"FOCUS_CODE='{FOCUS_CODE}' not found as exporter or importer in the first available file \"\n        f\"(S2_{y0}.parquet). Your dataset may use a different code.\\n\\n\"\n        f\"Top exporters in {y0}:\\n{top_exporters.to_string(index=False)}\\n\\n\"\n        f\"Top importers in {y0}:\\n{top_importers.to_string(index=False)}\\n\"\n    )\n    raise ValueError(msg)\n\nprint(f\"Validated: {FOCUS_CODE} appears in S2_{y0}.parquet (exporter count={exists[0]}, importer count={exists[1]}).\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Compute partner-weighted barycenters for China per year\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nrows = []\n\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\n        continue\n\n    # Exports barycenter for China: exporter=CHN, partners are importers\n    cx = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE exporter = '{FOCUS_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY importer\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    # Imports barycenter for China: importer=CHN, partners are exporters\n    cm = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE importer = '{FOCUS_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY exporter\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    cx[\"partner\"] = cx[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n    cm[\"partner\"] = cm[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n\n    cxg = cx.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n    cmg = cm.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n\n    cx_unmatched = cxg[\"lat\"].isna() | cxg[\"lon\"].isna()\n    cm_unmatched = cmg[\"lat\"].isna() | cmg[\"lon\"].isna()\n\n    cx_mat = cxg.loc[~cx_unmatched].copy()\n    cm_mat = cmg.loc[~cm_unmatched].copy()\n\n    total_exports = float(cx_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(cx_mat) else 0.0\n    total_imports = float(cm_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(cm_mat) else 0.0\n\n    lat_exports = weighted_mean(cx_mat[\"lat\"], cx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cx_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_exports = weighted_mean(cx_mat[\"lon\"], cx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cx_mat) else np.nan\n\n    lat_imports = weighted_mean(cm_mat[\"lat\"], cm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cm_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_imports = weighted_mean(cm_mat[\"lon\"], cm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cm_mat) else np.nan\n\n    rows.append({\n        \"year\": year,\n        \"lat_exports…4068 tokens truncated…_line = LineString(list(imports.geometry.values))\n\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"exports_path\"]}, geometry=[exports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"imports_path\"]}, geometry=[imports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n\n# Mediterranean-centered projection (same as your global map)\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n\n# Plot\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\n\nworld_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n\nimports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\nexports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\n\nimports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\nexports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\n\n# Legend\nlegend_elements = [\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA imports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"USA exports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\n]\nax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\n\n# Decade labels in black + endpoints (same labeling logic)\nyears = dfp[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\nymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\nlabel_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\nlabel_years.update([ymin, ymax])\n\ndx, dy = 35000, 35000  # same default as your global map\n\ndef label_decades(gdf_sorted):\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\n        if y in label_years:\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\n            ax.text(x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y), fontsize=8, color=\"black\", alpha=0.9, zorder=10)\n\nlabel_decades(imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\nlabel_decades(exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\n\n# Zoom: bounds + buffer (same approach)\nall_geom = pd.concat([imports_p.geometry, exports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True)\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(all_geom, crs=imports_p.crs).total_bounds\n\nbuffer = 1.2e6  # same as your global map; adjust if you want tighter crop\nax.set_xlim(minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\nax.set_ylim(miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n\nax.set_axis_off()\nplt.tight_layout()\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.close(fig)\n\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\nimport os\nimport pandas as pd\nimport geopandas as gpd\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\nfrom pyproj import CRS\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Paths (USA barycenters already computed)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\n\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\nUSA_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_usa_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\n\nOUT_IMPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.png\")\nOUT_IMPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.pdf\")\n\nOUT_EXPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_exports_mediterranean.png\")\nOUT_EXPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_usa_exports_mediterranean.pdf\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\nif world.crs is None:\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load USA barycenters\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndf = pd.read_csv(USA_CSV).sort_values(\"year\")\ndf = df.dropna(\n    subset=[\"lat_us_exports\", \"lon_us_exports\", \"lat_us_imports\", \"lon_us_imports\"]\n).copy()\n\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_us_exports\", \"lon_us_exports\"]],\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_us_exports\"], df[\"lat_us_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_us_imports\", \"lon_us_imports\"]],\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_us_imports\"], df[\"lat_us_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\n)\n\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\n)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# SAME Mediterranean projection\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# SAME zoom window (derived from global barycenter map)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\n\ngdf_global = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(\n    subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\n)\n\nglobal_exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(gdf_global[\"lon_exports\"], gdf_global[\"lat_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).to_crs(crs_med)\n\nglobal_imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(gdf_global[\"lon_imports\"], gdf_global[\"lat_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).to_crs(crs_med)\n\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\n    pd.concat([global_exports.geometry, global_imports.geometry]),\n    crs=crs_med\n).total_bounds\n\nbuffer = 1.2e6\nX_LIM = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\nY_LIM = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Year labels: ONLY selected years, smaller font\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1985, 1987, 1990, 1994, 1999, 2001, 2009, 2012, 2015, 2018, 2022}\n\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx=20000, dy=20000, fontsize=5):\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\n            ax.text(\n                x0 + dx, y0 + dy,\n                str(y),\n                fontsize=fontsize,\n                color=\"black\",\n                alpha=0.8,\n                zorder=10\n            )\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Render function\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef render_single_map(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, out_png, out_pdf):\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\n\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\n\n    add_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\n\n    ax.set_xlim(*X_LIM)\n    ax.set_ylim(*Y_LIM)\n\n    ax.text(\n        0.02, 0.02,\n        footer_label,\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\n        fontsize=9,\n        color=\"black\",\n        ha=\"left\",\n        va=\"bottom\"\n    )\n\n    ax.set_axis_off()\n    plt.tight_layout()\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n    plt.close(fig)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Produce two maps\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nrender_single_map(\n    imports_p,\n    imports_path_p,\n    \"red\",\n    \"USA imports barycenter\",\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PNG,\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PDF\n)\n\nrender_single_map(\n    exports_p,\n    exports_path_p,\n    \"dodgerblue\",\n    \"USA exports barycenter\",\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PNG,\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PDF\n)\nimport os\nimport duckdb\nimport pandas as pd\nimport numpy as np\nimport geopandas as gpd\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString\nfrom pyproj import CRS\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# CONFIG (edit only TRADE_DIR if needed)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\nCENTROIDS_CSV = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)  # authoritative centroids output\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\n\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)  # <-- set to where S2_YYYY.parquet lives\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\n\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\n\n# Use the SAME map window as your global map by reading its barycenter file:\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\n\n# Output for China\nOUT_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_china_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\nOUT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\")\nOUT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\")\n\n# China code (ISO3). We'll validate it exists in your trade files.\nFOCUS_CODE = \"CHN\"\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Helpers\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    s = np.nansum(w)\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\n        return np.nan\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\n\ndef trunc_codes(codes, max_codes=50) -> str:\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\n    if not codes:\n        return \"\"\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\n        return \";\".join(codes)\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes)-max_codes} more)\"\n\ndef first_existing_parquet(trade_dir: str, start: int, end: int):\n    for y in range(start, end + 1):\n        fp = os.path.join(trade_dir, f\"S2_{y}.parquet\")\n        if os.path.exists(fp):\n            return y, fp\n    return None, None\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Load centroids (single source of truth)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROIDS_CSV, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\ncentroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\ncentroids = centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Connect DuckDB + validate that FOCUS_CODE exists (less guess)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ncon = duckdb.connect()\n\ny0, fp0 = first_existing_parquet(TRADE_DIR, START_YEAR, END_YEAR)\nif fp0 is None:\n    raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No S2_YYYY.parquet files found in {TRADE_DIR} for {TRADE_YEAR_START}-{TRADE_YEAR_END}.\")\n\nexists = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n    SELECT\n      SUM(CASE WHEN exporter = '{FOCUS_CODE}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_exporter,\n      SUM(CASE WHEN importer = '{FOCUS_CODE}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_importer\n    FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n\"\"\").fetchone()\n\nif (exists[0] == 0) and (exists[1] == 0):\n    # Show likely candidates by volume (top 20) so you can pick the correct code if different\n    top_exporters = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS v\n        FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n        GROUP BY exporter\n        ORDER BY v DESC\n        LIMIT 20\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    top_importers = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS v\n        FROM read_parquet('{fp0}')\n        GROUP BY importer\n        ORDER BY v DESC\n        LIMIT 20\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    msg = (\n        f\"FOCUS_CODE='{FOCUS_CODE}' not found as exporter or importer in the first available file \"\n        f\"(S2_{y0}.parquet). Your dataset may use a different code.\\n\\n\"\n        f\"Top exporters in {y0}:\\n{top_exporters.to_string(index=False)}\\n\\n\"\n        f\"Top importers in {y0}:\\n{top_importers.to_string(index=False)}\\n\"\n    )\n    raise ValueError(msg)\n\nprint(f\"Validated: {FOCUS_CODE} appears in S2_{y0}.parquet (exporter count={exists[0]}, importer count={exists[1]}).\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Compute partner-weighted barycenters for China per year\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nrows = []\n\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\n    fpath = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\n    if not os.path.exists(fpath):\n        continue\n\n    # Exports barycenter for China: exporter=CHN, partners are importers\n    cx = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT importer AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE exporter = '{FOCUS_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY importer\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    # Imports barycenter for China: importer=CHN, partners are exporters\n    cm = con.execute(f\"\"\"\n        SELECT exporter AS partner, SUM({TRADE_VALUE_COL}) AS w\n        FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\n        WHERE importer = '{FOCUS_CODE}'\n        GROUP BY exporter\n    \"\"\").df()\n\n    cx[\"partner\"] = cx[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n    cm[\"partner\"] = cm[\"partner\"].astype(str)\n\n    cxg = cx.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n    cmg = cm.merge(centroids, left_on=\"partner\", right_on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\n\n    cx_unmatched = cxg[\"lat\"].isna() | cxg[\"lon\"].isna()\n    cm_unmatched = cmg[\"lat\"].isna() | cmg[\"lon\"].isna()\n\n    cx_mat = cxg.loc[~cx_unmatched].copy()\n    cm_mat = cmg.loc[~cm_unmatched].copy()\n\n    total_exports = float(cx_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(cx_mat) else 0.0\n    total_imports = float(cm_mat[\"w\"].sum()) if len(cm_mat) else 0.0\n\n    lat_exports = weighted_mean(cx_mat[\"lat\"], cx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cx_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_exports = weighted_mean(cx_mat[\"lon\"], cx_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cx_mat) else np.nan\n\n    lat_imports = weighted_mean(cm_mat[\"lat\"], cm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cm_mat) else np.nan\n    lon_imports = weighted_mean(cm_mat[\"lon\"], cm_mat[\"w\"]) if len(cm_mat) else np.nan\n\n    rows.append({\n        \"year\": year,\n        \"lat_exports\": lat_exports,\n        \"lon_exports\": lon_exports,\n        \"lat_imports\": lat_imports,\n        \"lon_imports\": lon_imports,\n        \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": total_exports,\n        \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": total_imports,\n        \"n_export_partners_total\": int(len(cxg)),\n        \"n_import_partners_total\": int(len(cmg)),\n        \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(cx_unmatched.sum()),\n        \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(cm_unmatched.sum()),\n        \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(cxg.loc[cx_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\n        \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": trunc_codes(cmg.loc[cm_unmatched, \"partner\"].unique()),\n    })\n\nout = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\")\nout.to_csv(OUT_CSV, index=False)\nprint(f\"Wrote: {OUT_CSV} | Years: {out['year'].nunique()}\")\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Plot: SAME projection + SAME map window as the global map\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\nif world.crs is None:\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n\n# Mediterranean-centered projection (same as global map)\ncrs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n\n# Build China barycenter point layers\ndfp = out.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]).copy()\n\nexports_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_exports\"], dfp[\"lat_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nimports_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    dfp[[\"year\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(dfp[\"lon_imports\"], dfp[\"lat_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).sort_values(\"year\")\n\nexports_line = LineString(list(exports_gdf.geometry.values))\nimports_line = LineString(list(imports_gdf.geometry.values))\n\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"exports_path\"]}, geometry=[exports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame({\"name\":[\"imports_path\"]}, geometry=[imports_line], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n\n# Project layers\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_p = exports_gdf.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_p = imports_gdf.to_crs(crs_med)\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\n\n# Compute the global map extent in the SAME projection (so the window matches exactly)\nglobal_df = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]).copy()\n\nglobal_exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    global_df[[\"year\",\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(global_df[\"lon_exports\"], global_df[\"lat_exports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).to_crs(crs_med)\n\nglobal_imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n    global_df[[\"year\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]].copy(),\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(global_df[\"lon_imports\"], global_df[\"lat_imports\"])],\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n).to_crs(crs_med)\n\nall_global_geom = pd.concat([global_exports.geometry, global_imports.geometry], ignore_index=True)\nminx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(all_global_geom, crs=crs_med).total_bounds\n\n# Use the same buffer you used for the global figure (adjust if you changed it)\nbuffer = 1.2e6\n\n# Plot\nfig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\n\nworld_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n\nimports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\nexports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\n\nimports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\nexports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\n\nlegend_elements = [\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"China imports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\n    Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=\"China exports barycenter (partners)\",\n           markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\n]\nax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\n\n# Decade labels in black + endpoints\nyears = dfp[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\nymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\nlabel_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\nlabel_years.update([ymin, ymax])\n\ndx, dy = 35000, 35000\n\ndef label_decades(gdf_sorted):\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\n        if y in label_years:\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\n            ax.text(x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y), fontsize=8, color=\"black\", alpha=0.9, zorder=10)\n\nlabel_decades(imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\nlabel_decades(exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"))\n\n# Apply SAME map window as the global map\nax.set_xlim(minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\nax.set_ylim(miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n\nax.set_axis_off()\nplt.tight_layout()\nplt.savefig(OUT_PNG, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.savefig(OUT_PDF, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\nplt.close(fig)\n\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PNG}\")\nprint(f\"Saved: {OUT_PDF}\")\n\r\n=== PATTERN: barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean ===\r\nCELL 56\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== PATTERN: usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom ===\r\nCELL 58\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== PATTERN: china_trade_mediterranean_zoom ===\r\nCELL 61\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== PATTERN: barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv ===\r\n\r\n=== PATTERN: barycenter_china_trade_1976_2023.csv ===\r\n\r\n=== PATTERN: +proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 ===\r\nCELL 56\r\n\r\n---\r\nCELL 58\r\n\r\n---\r\nCELL 59\r\n\r\n---\r\nCELL 61\r\n\r\n---\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:36:09.535Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_h4q8wD6Qq5yeTFhKwthp7VUZ","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\src\\geoanalisis\\services\\barycenters.py\n@@\n from dataclasses import dataclass\n from pathlib import Path\n \n import duckdb\n import geopandas as gpd\n import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n import numpy as np\n import pandas as pd\n from pyproj import CRS\n from shapely.geometry import LineString, Point, box\n+from matplotlib.lines import Line2D\n@@\n def render_global_maps(global_df: pd.DataFrame, shapefile_path: Path, fig_dir: Path) -> None:\n@@\n     render(\n         exports_p,\n         exports_path_p,\n         \"dodgerblue\",\n         \"Global exports barycenter\",\n         \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean\",\n     )\n+\n+\n+def _load_world_projected(shapefile_path: Path, crs_med: CRS) -> gpd.GeoDataFrame:\n+    world = gpd.read_file(shapefile_path)\n+    if \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\n+        world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\n+    if world.crs is None:\n+        world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\n+    return world.to_crs(crs_med)\n+\n+\n+def _load_barycenter_points(\n+    csv_path: Path,\n+    lat_exports_col: str,\n+    lon_exports_col: str,\n+    lat_imports_col: str,\n+    lon_imports_col: str,\n+) -> tuple[gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame]:\n+    df = pd.read_csv(csv_path).sort_values(\"year\")\n+    df = df.dropna(subset=[lat_exports_col, lon_exports_col, lat_imports_col, lon_imports_col]).copy()\n+    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n+        df[[\"year\", lat_exports_col, lon_exports_col]].copy(),\n+        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_exports_col], df[lat_exports_col])],\n+        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n+    ).sort_values(\"year\")\n+    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n+        df[[\"year\", lat_imports_col, lon_imports_col]].copy(),\n+        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_imports_col], df[lat_imports_col])],\n+        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\n+    ).sort_values(\"year\")\n+    return exports, imports\n+\n+\n+def _build_projected_paths(\n+    exports: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    imports: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    crs_med: CRS,\n+) -> tuple[gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame]:\n+    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n+    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\n+    return (\n+        exports.to_crs(crs_med),\n+        imports.to_crs(crs_med),\n+        exports_path.to_crs(crs_med),\n+        imports_path.to_crs(crs_med),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def _global_extent_from_global_barycenters(global_csv_path: Path, crs_med: CRS, buffer: float = 1.2e6) -> tuple[tuple[float, float], tuple[float, float]]:\n+    exports, imports = _load_barycenter_points(\n+        global_csv_path,\n+        \"lat_exports\",\n+        \"lon_exports\",\n+        \"lat_imports\",\n+        \"lon_imports\",\n+    )\n+    exports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    imports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\n+    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\n+        pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True),\n+        crs=crs_med,\n+    ).total_bounds\n+    return (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer), (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\n+\n+\n+def _selected_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted: gpd.GeoDataFrame, years: set[int], dx: int, dy: int, fontsize: int) -> None:\n+    for _, row in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\n+        year = int(row[\"year\"])\n+        if year in years:\n+            ax.text(\n+                row.geometry.x + dx,\n+                row.geometry.y + dy,\n+                str(year),\n+                fontsize=fontsize,\n+                color=\"black\",\n+                alpha=0.8 if fontsize <= 5 else 0.9,\n+                zorder=10,\n+            )\n+\n+\n+def _render_single_footer_map(\n+    world_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    points_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    color: str,\n+    footer_label: str,\n+    out_png: Path,\n+    out_pdf: Path,\n+    xlim: tuple[float, float],\n+    ylim: tuple[float, float],\n+    label_years: set[int],\n+    dx: int,\n+    dy: int,\n+    fontsize: int,\n+) -> None:\n+    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\n+    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n+    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\n+    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\n+    _selected_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, dx, dy, fontsize)\n+    ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\n+    ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\n+    ax.text(0.02, 0.02, footer_label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, color=\"black\", ha=\"left\", va=\"bottom\")\n+    ax.set_axis_off()\n+    plt.tight_layout()\n+    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+    plt.close(fig)\n+\n+\n+def _render_combined_country_map(\n+    world_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    exports_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    imports_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    exports_path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    imports_path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\n+    xlim: tuple[float, float],\n+    ylim: tuple[float, float],\n+    title_prefix: str,\n+    out_png: Path,\n+    out_pdf: Path,\n+) -> None:\n+    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\n+    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\n+    imports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\n+    exports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\n+    imports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\n+    exports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\n+    legend_elements = [\n+        Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=f\"{title_prefix} imports barycenter (partners)\", markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\n+        Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=f\"{title_prefix} exports barycenter (partners)\", markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\n+    ]\n+    ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\n+    years = sorted(set(exports_p[\"year\"].astype(int)).union(set(imports_p[\"year\"].astype(int))))\n+    ymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\n+    label_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\n+    label_years.update([ymin, ymax])\n+    _selected_year_labels(ax, imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, 35000, 35000, 8)\n+    _selected_year_labels(ax, exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, 35000, 35000, 8)\n+    ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\n+    ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\n+    ax.set_axis_off()\n+    plt.tight_layout()\n+    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\n+    plt.close(fig)\n+\n+\n+def render_legacy_special_maps(\n+    global_csv_path: Path,\n+    usa_csv_path: Path,\n+    china_csv_path: Path,\n+    shapefile_path: Path,\n+    fig_dir: Path,\n+) -> None:\n+    crs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\n+    world_p = _load_world_projected(shapefile_path, crs_med)\n+    xlim, ylim = _global_extent_from_global_barycenters(global_csv_path, crs_med, buffer=1.2e6)\n+\n+    global_exports, global_imports = _load_barycenter_points(\n+        global_csv_path,\n+        \"lat_exports\",\n+        \"lon_exports\",\n+        \"lat_imports\",\n+        \"lon_imports\",\n+    )\n+    global_exports_p, global_imports_p, global_exports_path_p, global_imports_path_p = _build_projected_paths(\n+        global_exports,\n+        global_imports,\n+        crs_med,\n+    )\n+    global_label_years = {1977, 1980, 1985, 1994, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2023}\n+    _render_single_footer_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        global_imports_p,\n+        global_imports_path_p,\n+        \"red\",\n+        \"Global imports barycenter\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.png\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.pdf\",\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        global_label_years,\n+        20000,\n+        20000,\n+        5,\n+    )\n+    _render_single_footer_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        global_exports_p,\n+        global_exports_path_p,\n+        \"dodgerblue\",\n+        \"Global exports barycenter\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean.png\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean.pdf\",\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        global_label_years,\n+        20000,\n+        20000,\n+        5,\n+    )\n+\n+    usa_exports, usa_imports = _load_barycenter_points(\n+        usa_csv_path,\n+        \"lat_us_exports\",\n+        \"lon_us_exports\",\n+        \"lat_us_imports\",\n+        \"lon_us_imports\",\n+    )\n+    usa_exports_p, usa_imports_p, usa_exports_path_p, usa_imports_path_p = _build_projected_paths(\n+        usa_exports,\n+        usa_imports,\n+        crs_med,\n+    )\n+    _render_combined_country_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        usa_exports_p,\n+        usa_imports_p,\n+        usa_exports_path_p,\n+        usa_imports_path_p,\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        \"USA\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\",\n+    )\n+    usa_label_years = {1977, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1985, 1987, 1990, 1994, 1999, 2001, 2009, 2012, 2015, 2018, 2022}\n+    _render_single_footer_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        usa_imports_p,\n+        usa_imports_path_p,\n+        \"red\",\n+        \"USA imports barycenter\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.png\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.pdf\",\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        usa_label_years,\n+        20000,\n+        20000,\n+        5,\n+    )\n+    _render_single_footer_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        usa_exports_p,\n+        usa_exports_path_p,\n+        \"dodgerblue\",\n+        \"USA exports barycenter\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_exports_mediterranean.png\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_exports_mediterranean.pdf\",\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        usa_label_years,\n+        20000,\n+        20000,\n+        5,\n+    )\n+\n+    china_exports, china_imports = _load_barycenter_points(\n+        china_csv_path,\n+        \"lat_exports\",\n+        \"lon_exports\",\n+        \"lat_imports\",\n+        \"lon_imports\",\n+    )\n+    china_exports_p, china_imports_p, china_exports_path_p, china_imports_path_p = _build_projected_paths(\n+        china_exports,\n+        china_imports,\n+        crs_med,\n+    )\n+    _render_combined_country_map(\n+        world_p,\n+        china_exports_p,\n+        china_imports_p,\n+        china_exports_path_p,\n+        china_imports_path_p,\n+        xlim,\n+        ylim,\n+        \"China\",\n+        fig_dir / \"barycenter_china_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\",\n+        fig_dir /
