seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 06: drift y speed de barycentros.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.drift import (\r\n    build_drift_artifact_paths,\r\n    build_steps,\r\n    compute_indices,\r\n    load_barycenter_panel,\r\n    plot_choropleths,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str, make_figures: bool = True) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_06_drift\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_drift_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"06_drift\", tag)\r\n    bary_glob = str(\r\n        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\r\n        / \"data\"\r\n        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    panel = load_barycenter_panel(bary_glob, {\"WLD\", \"WORLD\", \"ALL\"})\r\n    steps_exp = build_steps(panel, \"exports\", min_step_km=75.0)\r\n    steps_imp = build_steps(panel, \"imports\", min_step_km=75.0)\r\n    idx_exp = compute_indices(steps_exp, min_steps=8)\r\n    idx_imp = compute_indices(steps_imp, min_steps=8)\r\n\r\n    steps_exp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_exports_path, index=False)\r\n    steps_imp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_imports_path, index=False)\r\n    idx_exp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_exports_path, index=False)\r\n    idx_imp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_imports_path, index=False)\r\n    map_count = 0\r\n    figure_warning = \"\"\r\n    if make_figures:\r\n        try:\r\n            map_count = plot_choropleths(\r\n                config.natural_earth_shapefile_path, idx_exp, idx_imp, artifacts.fig_dir, tag\r\n            )\r\n        except Exception as exc:\r\n            figure_warning = str(exc)\r\n            logger.exception(\"Stage 06 figure generation failed; CSV artifacts were preserved.\")\r\n    else:\r\n        logger.info(\"Stage 06 figure generation skipped by configuration.\")\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 06 complete. export_idx=%d import_idx=%d maps=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(idx_exp),\r\n        len(idx_imp),\r\n        map_count,\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"steps_exports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_exports_path),\r\n        \"steps_imports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_imports_path),\r\n        \"indices_exports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_exports_path),\r\n        \"indices_imports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_imports_path),\r\n        \"figure_warning\": figure_warning,\r\n    }\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:42:14.077Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_48zLIEgJGm0nRcO8muDp9E6c","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport os\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom matplotlib.colors import TwoSlopeNorm\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass DriftArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n    steps_exports_path: Path\r\n    steps_imports_path: Path\r\n    indices_exports_path: Path\r\n    indices_imports_path: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_drift_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path, tag: str) -> DriftArtifacts:\r\n    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\r\n    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\r\n    return DriftArtifacts(\r\n        stage_dir=stage_dir,\r\n        data_dir=data_dir,\r\n        fig_dir=fig_dir,\r\n        steps_exports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_steps_exports_{tag}.csv\",\r\n        steps_imports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_steps_imports_{tag}.csv\",\r\n        indices_exports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_indices_exports_{tag}.csv\",\r\n        indices_imports_path=data_dir / f\"drift_indices_imports_{tag}.csv\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_dist(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    radius = 6371.0088\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return radius * 2.0 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef east_km(dist_km, bearing):\r\n    return np.asarray(dist_km, float) * np.sin(np.deg2rad(np.asarray(bearing, float)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country_from_filename(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    base = os.path.basename(fp)\r\n    match = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", base)\r\n    if not match:\r\n        return None\r\n    return match.group(1).upper()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_barycenter_panel(bary_glob: str, drop_codes: set[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    files = sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob))\r\n    if not files:\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No files matching: {bary_glob}\")\r\n    need = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in files:\r\n        iso3 = infer_country_from_filename(fp)\r\n        if not iso3:\r\n            continue\r\n        cols = list(pd.read_csv(fp, nrows=0).columns)\r\n        if not set(need).issubset(cols):\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp, usecols=need)\r\n        df[\"country\"] = iso3\r\n        parts.append(df)\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    panel = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    panel[\"country\"] = panel[\"country\"].astype(str).str.strip().str.upper()\r\n    panel[\"year\"] = pd.to_numeric(panel[\"year\"], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    panel = panel.dropna(subset=[\"year\"])\r\n    panel[\"year\"] = panel[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    panel = panel[~panel[\"country\"].isin(drop_codes)]\r\n    panel = panel.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"year\"], keep=\"last\")\r\n    for col in [\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]:\r\n        panel[col] = pd.to_numeric(panel[col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    return panel\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_steps(panel: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, min_step_km: float) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    lat_col, lon_col = f\"lat_{flow}\", f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n    df = (\r\n        panel[[\"country\", \"year\", lat_col, lon_col]]\r\n        .dropna(subset=[lat_col, lon_col])\r\n        .sort_values([\"country\", \"year\"])\r\n        .reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    )\r\n    df[\"year_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[\"year\"].shift(-1)\r\n    df[\"lat_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[lat_col].shift(-1)\r\n    df[\"lon_next\"] = df.groupby(\"country\")[lon_col].shift(-1)\r\n    df = df[df[\"year_next\"] == df[\"year\"] + 1].copy()\r\n\r\n    dist = gc_dist(df[lat_col].values, df[lon_col].values, df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values)\r\n    bearing = bearing_deg(\r\n        df[lat_col].values, df[lon_col].values, df[\"lat_next\"].values, df[\"lon_next\"].values\r\n    )\r\n    east = east_km(dist, bearing)\r\n    steps = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": df[\"country\"].values,\r\n            \"t0\": df[\"year\"].astype(int).values,\r\n            \"t1\": df[\"year_next\"].astype(int).values,\r\n            \"dist_km\": dist,\r\n            \"bearing_deg\": bearing,\r\n            \"east_km\": east,\r\n        }\r\n    )\r\n    steps = steps[steps[\"dist_km\"] >= min_step_km].copy()\r\n    steps[\"sign\"] = np.sign(steps[\"east_km\"])\r\n    steps = steps[steps[\"sign\"] != 0].copy()\r\n    steps[\"sign\"] = steps[\"sign\"].astype(int)\r\n    return steps.reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_indices(steps: pd.DataFrame, min_steps: int) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    cols = [\r\n        \"country\",\r\n        \"n_steps\",\r\n        \"avg_speed_km\",\r\n        \"median_speed_km\",\r\n        \"EW_index\",\r\n        \"instability_index\",\r\n        \"start_year\",\r\n        \"end_year\",\r\n    ]\r\n    if steps.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=cols)\r\n    out = []\r\n    for country, group in steps.sort_values([\"country\", \"t0\"]).groupby(\"country\", sort=False):\r\n        group = group.sort_values(\"t0\")\r\n        n = len(group)\r\n        if n < min_steps:\r\n            continue\r\n        denom_ew = float(np.abs(group[\"east_km\"]).sum())\r\n        signs = group[\"sign\"].values\r\n        out.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"country\": country,\r\n                \"n_steps\": int(n),\r\n                \"avg_speed_km\": float(group[\"dist_km\"].mean()),\r\n                \"median_speed_km\": float(group[\"dist_km\"].median()),\r\n                \"EW_index\": float(group[\"east_km\"].sum() / denom_ew) if denom_ew > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n                \"instability_index\": float(np.sum(signs[1:] != signs[:-1]) / (n - 1)) if n > 1 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n                \"start_year\": int(group[\"t0\"].min()),\r\n                \"end_year\": int(group[\"t1\"].max()),\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(out, columns=cols).sort_values(\"country\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef robust_lims(series, qlo=0.01, qhi=0.99):\r\n    s = series.replace([float(\"inf\"), float(\"-inf\")], float(\"nan\")).dropna()\r\n    if s.empty:\r\n        return 0.0, 1.0\r\n    lo, hi = float(s.quantile(qlo)), float(s.quantile(qhi))\r\n    if np.isclose(lo, hi):\r\n        lo, hi = float(s.min()), float(s.max())\r\n        if np.isclose(lo, hi):\r\n            lo, hi = lo - 1.0, hi + 1.0\r\n    return lo, hi\r\n\r\n\r\ndef csk_fallback(df_m, source=\"CSK\", targets=(\"CZE\", \"SVK\")):\r\n    src = df_m[df_m[\"country\"] == source]\r\n    if src.empty:\r\n        return df_m\r\n    result = df_m.copy()\r\n    for target in targets:\r\n        if target not in result[\"country\"].values:\r\n            row = src.iloc[0].copy()\r\n            row[\"country\"] = target\r\n            result = pd.concat([result, row.to_frame().T], ignore_index=True)\r\n    return result\r\n\r\n\r\ndef plot_choropleths(\r\n    world_shapefile: Path,\r\n    idx_exp: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    idx_imp: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    fig_dir: Path,\r\n    tag: str,\r\n) -> int:\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(world_shapefile)\r\n    iso = world[\"ISO_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n    adm = world[\"ADM0_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n    join_iso3 = np.where(iso.isin([\"-99\", \"\"]), adm, iso)\r\n    world = world[join_iso3 != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    iso = world[\"ISO_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n    adm = world[\"ADM0_A3\"].astype(str)\r\n    world[\"_join_iso3\"] = np.where(iso.isin([\"-99\", \"\"]), adm, iso)\r\n    world_p = world.to_crs(\"+proj=eqearth +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n    metrics = [\r\n        (\"avg_speed_km\", \"YlOrRd\", None),\r\n        (\"median_speed_km\", \"YlOrRd\", None),\r\n        (\"EW_index\", \"RdBu_r\", 0.0),\r\n        (\"instability_index\", \"PuRd\", None),\r\n    ]\r\n    count = 0\r\n    for flow, idf in [(\"exports\", csk_fallback(idx_exp)), (\"imports\", csk_fallback(idx_imp))]:\r\n        for col, cmap, center in metrics:\r\n            m = idf[[\"country\", col]].rename(columns={\"country\": \"_iso3\"})\r\n            gdf = world_p.merge(m, left_on=\"_join_iso3\", right_on=\"_iso3\", how=\"left\")\r\n            if center is not None:\r\n                lo, hi = robust_lims(gdf[col])\r\n                lo = min(lo, center - 0.01)\r\n                hi = max(hi, center + 0.01)\r\n                norm = TwoSlopeNorm(vmin=lo, vcenter=center, vmax=hi)\r\n                vmin = vmax = None\r\n            else:\r\n                norm = None\r\n                vmin, vmax = robust_lims(gdf[col])\r\n            fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 7), dpi=220)\r\n            world_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#eeeeee\", edgecolor=\"none\")\r\n            gdf.plot(\r\n                ax=ax,\r\n                column=col,\r\n                cmap=cmap,\r\n                norm=norm,\r\n                vmin=vmin,\r\n                vmax=vmax,\r\n                legend=False,\r\n                edgecolor=\"none\",\r\n                missing_kwds={\"color\": \"#eeeeee\", \"edgecolor\": \"none\"},\r\n            )\r\n            ax.set_axis_off()\r\n            plt.tight_layout(pad=0)\r\n            fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"drift_map_{flow}_{col}_{tag}.png\", bbox_inches=\"tight\", pad_inches=0)\r\n            plt.close(fig)\r\n            count += 1\r\n    return count\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:43:48.821Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_oBirGXTpRusTiP4efp38FadN","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 4 seconds\nOutput:\n1:\"\"\"Stage 06: drift y speed de barycentros.\"\"\"\r\n2:\r\n3:from __future__ import annotations\r\n4:\r\n5:import logging\r\n6:\r\n7:from geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\n8:from geoanalisis.services.drift import (\r\n9:    build_drift_artifact_paths,\r\n10:    build_steps,\r\n11:    compute_indices,\r\n12:    load_barycenter_panel,\r\n13:    plot_choropleths,\r\n14:)\r\n15:from geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\n16:from geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n17:\r\n18:\r\n19:def run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str, make_figures: bool = True) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n20:    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_06_drift\")\r\n21:    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n22:    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n23:    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n24:    artifacts = build_drift_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"06_drift\", tag)\r\n25:    bary_glob = str(\r\n26:        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\r\n27:        / \"data\"\r\n28:        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n29:    )\r\n30:    if config.drift_mode == \"legacy_focus\":\r\n31:        include_codes = set(config.focus_countries)\r\n32:        baseline_compatible = True\r\n33:    elif config.drift_mode == \"expanded_coverage\":\r\n34:        include_codes = None\r\n35:        baseline_compatible = False\r\n36:    else:\r\n37:        raise ValueError(\r\n38:            f\"Unsupported drift_mode={config.drift_mode!r}. Expected 'legacy_focus' or 'expanded_coverage'.\"\r\n39:        )\r\n40:\r\n41:    panel = load_barycenter_panel(bary_glob, {\"WLD\", \"WORLD\", \"ALL\"}, include_codes=include_codes)\r\n42:    steps_exp = build_steps(panel, \"exports\", min_step_km=75.0)\r\n43:    steps_imp = build_steps(panel, \"imports\", min_step_km=75.0)\r\n44:    idx_exp = compute_indices(steps_exp, min_steps=8)\r\n45:    idx_imp = compute_indices(steps_imp, min_steps=8)\r\n46:\r\n47:    steps_exp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_exports_path, index=False)\r\n48:    steps_imp.to_csv(artifacts.steps_imports_path, index=False)\r\n49:    idx_exp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_exports_path, index=False)\r\n50:    idx_imp.to_csv(artifacts.indices_imports_path, index=False)\r\n51:    map_count = 0\r\n52:    figure_warning = \"\"\r\n53:    if make_figures:\r\n54:        try:\r\n55:            map_count = plot_choropleths(\r\n56:                config.natural_earth_shapefile_path, idx_exp, idx_imp, artifacts.fig_dir, tag\r\n57:            )\r\n58:        except Exception as exc:\r\n59:            figure_warning = str(exc)\r\n60:            logger.exception(\"Stage 06 figure generation failed; CSV artifacts were preserved.\")\r\n61:    else:\r\n62:        logger.info(\"Stage 06 figure generation skipped by configuration.\")\r\n63:\r\n64:    logger.info(\r\n65:        \"Stage 06 complete. export_idx=%d import_idx=%d maps=%d output=%s\",\r\n66:        len(idx_exp),\r\n67:        len(idx_imp),\r\n68:        map_count,\r\n69:        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n70:    )\r\n71:    return {\r\n72:        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n73:        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n74:        \"steps_exports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_exports_path),\r\n75:        \"steps_imports_path\": str(artifacts.steps_imports_path),\r\n76:        \"indices_exports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_exports_path),\r\n77:        \"indices_imports_path\": str(artifacts.indices_imports_path),\r\n78:        \"drift_mode\": config.drift_mode,\r\n79:        \"baseline_compatible\": str(baseline_compatible),\r\n80:        \"figure_warning\": figure_warning,\r\n81:    }\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:45:01.028Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_rApQTsimrSIH1WNkH9PlJYcm","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 3.4 seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 04: clustering gravitacional.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.clustering import (\r\n    build_clustering_artifact_paths,\r\n    compute_attractors,\r\n    compute_features,\r\n    load_state_long,\r\n    pairwise_distance_matrices,\r\n    select_clusters,\r\n    stability_summary,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_04_clustering\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    artifacts = build_clustering_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"04_clustering\")\r\n    bary_glob = str(\r\n        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\r\n        / \"data\"\r\n        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    )\r\n    state_long = load_state_long(bary_glob)\r\n    state_long.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    features = compute_features(state_long)\r\n    features.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    summaries = []\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        dpos, ddir, dcombo, dover = pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long, flow=flow)\r\n        dpos.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dpos.csv\")\r\n        ddir.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Ddir.csv\")\r\n        dcombo.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dcombo.csv\")\r\n        dover.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_overlap_years.csv\")\r\n\r\n        sil, clusters = select_clusters(dcombo, flow=flow)\r\n        sil.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_silhouette.csv\", index=False)\r\n        clusters.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_clusters.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        attractors = compute_attractors(state_long, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        attractors.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_attractors.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        summary, wd, bs = stability_summary(dcombo, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        summaries.append(summary)\r\n        wd.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_window_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n        bs.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_bootstrap_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    pd.concat(summaries, ignore_index=True).to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_stability_summary.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 04 complete. states=%d features=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(state_long),\r\n        len(features),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"state_long_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\"),\r\n        \"features_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\"),\r\n    }\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:45:01.029Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_WwflZ4SRTkFX2Y2nsONR4n02","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.6 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import (\r\n    adjusted_rand_score,\r\n    normalized_mutual_info_score,\r\n    silhouette_score,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\nPERIODS_5 = [\r\n    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\r\n    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\r\n    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\r\n    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\r\n    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat_r)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\n\r\ndef xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\r\n    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\r\n    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\r\n    return lat, lon\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\r\n    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\r\n    return np.arccos(dot)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\r\n    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\r\n        country = infer_country(fp)\r\n        if not country:\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\r\n            continue\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\r\n            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n            weight_col = (\r\n                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\r\n            )\r\n            if flow == \"imports\":\r\n                weight_col = (\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\r\n                )\r\n            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\r\n            sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\r\n            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\r\n            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for (country, flow), g in state_long.groupby([\"country\", \"flow\"], sort=True):\r\n        g = g.sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        n_obs = len(g)\r\n        if n_obs == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        if n_obs > 1:\r\n            step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\r\n            step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\r\n            path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\r\n            net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\r\n            net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\r\n            bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\r\n            ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\r\n            mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\r\n            mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\r\n            bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n            bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\r\n            turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\r\n            turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\r\n            mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\r\n            step_km = np.array([])\r\n            bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\r\n        row = {\r\n            \"country\": country,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"n_obs\": n_obs,\r\n            \"start_year\": int(g[\"year\"].min()),\r\n            \"end_year\": int(g[\"year\"].max()),\r\n            \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\r\n            \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\r\n            \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\r\n            \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\r\n            \"straightness\": straightness,\r\n            \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\r\n            \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\r\n            \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\r\n        }\r\n        for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\r\n            sub = g[(g[\"year\"] >= start) & (g[\"year\"] <= end)]\r\n            row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(len(sub))\r\n            if len(sub):\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(sub[\"x\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(sub[\"y\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(sub[\"z\"].mean())\r\n            else:\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\r\n        for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\r\n            a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\r\n            a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\r\n                rad = km = np.nan\r\n            else:\r\n                rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\r\n                km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\r\n        rows.append(row)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\r\n    state = {\r\n        c: sub[sub[\"country\"] == c].sort_values(\"year\").set_index(\"year\")[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"lat\", \"lon\"]]\r\n        for c in countries\r\n    }\r\n    n = len(countries)\r\n    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\r\n        for j, b in enumerate(countries):\r\n            if i >= j:\r\n                continue\r\n            ya = state[a].index.to_numpy()\r\n            yb = state[b].index.to_numpy()\r\n            overlap_years = sorted(set(ya).intersection(set(yb)))\r\n            if len(overlap_years) >= min_overlap_years:\r\n                xa = state[a].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                xb = state[b].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\r\n            else:\r\n                pos = np.nan\r\n            steps_a_years = [y for y in ya[:-1] if y + 1 in ya]\r\n            steps_b_years = [y for y in yb[:-1] if y + 1 in yb]\r\n            overlap_steps = sorted(set(steps_a_years).intersection(set(steps_b_years)))\r\n            if len(overlap_steps) >= min_overlap_steps:\r\n                dirs = []\r\n                for y in overlap_steps:\r\n                    aa0 = state[a].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    aa1 = state[a].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb0 = state[b].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb1 = state[b].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    ba = initial_bearing_deg(aa0[0], aa0[1], aa1[0], aa1[1])\r\n                    bb = initial_bearing_deg(bb0[0], bb0[1], bb1[0], bb1[1])\r\n                    diff = abs(ba - bb)\r\n                    diff = min(diff, 360 - diff)\r\n                    dirs.append(diff / 180.0)\r\n                direc = float(np.mean(dirs))\r\n            else:\r\n                direc = np.nan\r\n            if np.isnan(pos):\r\n                pos = 3.0\r\n            if np.isnan(direc):\r\n                direc = 1.0\r\n            combo = alpha_pos * pos + (1 - alpha_pos) * direc\r\n            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\r\n            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\r\n            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = len(overlap_years)\r\n    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\r\n    return (\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    k_values = []\r\n    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\r\n    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\r\n            score = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\r\n    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\r\n    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\r\n    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": countries,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"cluster\": labels,\r\n            \"k_selected\": best_k,\r\n            \"silhouette_selected\": float(sil[sil[\"k\"] == best_k][\"silhouette\"].iloc[0]),\r\n            \"missing_penalty_used\": 3.0,\r\n            \"linkage\": \"average\",\r\n            \"alpha_pos\": 0.7,\r\n            \"min_overlap_years\": 10,\r\n            \"min_overlap_steps\": 8,\r\n        }\r\n    ).sort_values([\"cluster\", \"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    return sil, clusters\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_attractors(state_long: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    merged = sub.merge(clusters_df[[\"country\", \"cluster\"]], on=\"country\", how=\"inner\")\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for cluster, g in merged.groupby(\"cluster\"):\r\n        last = g.sort_values(\"year\").groupby(\"country\").tail(1).copy()\r\n        star_x = float(last[\"x\"].mean())\r\n        star_y = float(last[\"y\"].mean())\r\n        star_z = float(last[\"z\"].mean())\r\n        norm = math.sqrt(star_x**2 + star_y**2 + star_z**2)\r\n        star_x, star_y, star_z = star_x / norm, star_y / norm, star_z / norm\r\n        star_lat, star_lon = xyz_to_latlon(star_x, star_y, star_z)\r\n\r\n        dir_vectors = []\r\n        end_years = []\r\n        for country, gc in g.groupby(\"country\"):\r\n            gc = gc.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n            if len(gc) < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            a = gc.iloc[-2][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            b = gc.iloc[-1][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            dv = b - a\r\n            if np.linalg.norm(dv) == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            dir_vectors.append(dv / np.linalg.norm(dv))\r\n            end_years.append(int(gc[\"year\"].max()))\r\n        if dir_vectors:\r\n            dv = np.mean(np.vstack(dir_vectors), axis=0)\r\n            dv = dv / np.linalg.norm(dv)\r\n            dir_lat, dir_lon = xyz_to_latlon(dv[0], dv[1], dv[2])\r\n            dir_x, dir_y, dir_z = dv.tolist()\r\n        else:\r\n            dir_lat = dir_lon = dir_x = dir_y = dir_z = np.nan\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"cluster\": int(cluster),\r\n                \"attractor_type\": \"endpoint\",\r\n                \"star_lat\": star_lat,\r\n                \"star_lon\": star_lon,\r\n                \"star_x\": star_x,\r\n                \"star_y\": star_y,\r\n                \"star_z\": star_z,\r\n                \"dir_lat\": dir_lat,\r\n                \"dir_lon\": dir_lon,\r\n                \"dir_x\": dir_x,\r\n                \"dir_y\": dir_y,\r\n                \"dir_z\": dir_z,\r\n                \"n_countries\": int(g[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_endpoints_used\": int(last[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_lastdirs_used\": int(len(dir_vectors)),\r\n                \"end_year_min\": int(min(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n                \"end_year_max\": int(max(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"cluster\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stability_summary(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    full_labels = clusters_df.set_index(\"country\").loc[countries, \"cluster\"].to_numpy()\r\n    window_rows = []\r\n    bootstrap_rows = []\r\n    for seed in range(10):\r\n        rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\r\n        idx = np.sort(rng.choice(len(countries), size=max(10, int(0.8 * len(countries))), replace=False))\r\n        Xs = X[np.ix_(idx, idx)]\r\n        if len(idx) <= len(set(full_labels[idx])):\r\n            continue\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\r\n            n_clusters=len(np.unique(full_labels)),\r\n            metric=\"precomputed\",\r\n            linkage=\"average\",\r\n        )\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(Xs)\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        bootstrap_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"seed\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    for seed in range(5):\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        window_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"window_id\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    bs = pd.DataFrame(bootstrap_rows)\r\n    wd = pd.DataFrame(window_rows)\r\n    summary = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        [\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        ]\r\n    )\r\n    return summary, wd, bs\r\n"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:45:39.471Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"Encontré ya una diferencia metodológica grande: los clusters actuales no solo cambian de valor, sino que invierten la estructura esperada (`exports` elige `k=3` en vez de `2`, `imports` elige `k=2` en vez de `3`) y la estabilidad sale artificialmente perfecta en ventanas. Voy a revisar además si el loader está incorporando series espurias desde archivos especiales, porque eso puede contaminar el `state_long` desde el arranque.","phase":"commentary"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T01:45:59.606Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_8NDIiWV3fkl6tkwwCKLOkB8Y","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.8 seconds\nOutput:\nimport os\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\n\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\nfrom sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score\n\n# ============================================================\n# CONFIG\n# ============================================================\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\n\nSTATE_LONG = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\n# (we will derive step directions from state_long; gc_steps_long not required)\n\nOUT_DIR = str(GC_DATA)  # keep everything together\n\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\n\n# Distance construction\nMIN_OVERLAP_YEARS = 10     # minimum overlapping years to compute pos distance\nMIN_OVERLAP_STEPS = 8      # minimum overlapping steps to compute dir distance\nALPHA_POS = 0.7            # d = alpha*d_pos + (1-alpha)*d_dir\n\n# Clustering\nK_MIN, K_MAX = 2, 12       # candidates for #clusters (hierarchical)\nLINKAGE = \"average\"        # average linkage works well with generic distances\n\n# Year universe (use what's in the data; typically 1977-2022)\n# ============================================================\n\n\n# ============================================================\n# HELPERS\n# ============================================================\ndef arccos_clip(x):\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\n\ndef safe_norm(v, axis=-1, keepdims=False):\n    return np.linalg.norm(v, axis=axis, keepdims=keepdims)\n\ndef build_country_year_arrays(df_flow):\n    \"\"\"\n    df_flow columns: country, year, x,y,z\n    returns:\n      countries (list)\n      years (np array sorted)\n      X: np array (N, T, 3) with NaNs where missing\n      M: mask (N, T) True where present\n    \"\"\"\n    years = np.sort(df_flow[\"year\"].unique())\n    countries = np.sort(df_flow[\"country\"].unique())\n\n    year_to_idx = {y:i for i,y in enumerate(years)}\n    country_to_idx = {c:i for i,c in enumerate(countries)}\n\n    N = len(countries)\n    T = len(years)\n\n    X = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    M = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n\n    for r in df_flow.itertuples(index=False):\n        i = country_to_idx[r.country]\n        t = year_to_idx[r.year]\n        X[i, t, 0] = r.x\n        X[i, t, 1] = r.y\n        X[i, t, 2] = r.z\n        M[i, t] = True\n\n    return countries.tolist(), years, X, M\n\ndef build_step_unit_vectors(X, M):\n    \"\"\"\n    Build unit direction vectors for steps between consecutive *available* years.\n    Returns:\n      U: (N, T, 3) unit vector at year index t meaning direction from t -> next available year\n      MU: (N, T) mask where U defined\n      DT: (N, T) dt in years to next available year (float), NaN if undefined\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    U = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    MU = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n    DT = np.full((N, T), np.nan, dtype=float)\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        idx = np.where(M[i])[0]\n        if idx.size < 2:\n            continue\n        for k in range(idx.size - 1):\n            t0 = idx[k]\n            t1 = idx[k+1]\n            v = X[i, t1] - X[i, t0]  # chord direction\n            n = np.linalg.norm(v)\n            if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\n                continue\n            U[i, t0] = v / n\n            MU[i, t0] = True\n            DT[i, t0] = float(t1 - t0)  # in index units; converted later using years array\n    return U, MU, DT\n\ndef pairwise_pos_distance(X, M, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average great-circle distance (radians) over overlapping years.\n    Returns:\n      Dpos (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    # diagonal\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, M.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        Mi = M[i]\n        Xi = X[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = Mi & M[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Xi[mask], X[j, mask])\n            ang = arccos_clip(dots)  # radians\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(ang))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef pairwise_dir_distance(U, MU, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average directional mismatch over overlapping step-years:\n      d = mean(1 - dot(u_i, u_j))\n    Returns:\n      Ddir (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = U.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, MU.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        MUi = MU[i]\n        Ui = U[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = MUi & MU[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Ui[mask], U[j, mask])\n            mismatch = 1.0 - dots\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(mismatch))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef robust_normalize(D):\n    \"\"\"\n    Normalize by median of finite off-diagonal values.\n    \"\"\"\n    finite = np.isfinite(D)\n    # exclude diagonal\n    idx = np.where(finite & (~np.eye(D.shape[0], dtype=bool)))\n    vals = D[idx]\n    if vals.size == 0:\n        return D, np.nan\n    med = np.median(vals)\n    if med <= 0 or not np.isfinite(med):\n        return D, med\n    return D / med, med\n\ndef fill_missing_with_penalty(D, factor=1.5):\n    \"\"\"\n    Replace NaNs with a penalty = factor * max_finite.\n    \"\"\"\n    D2 = D.copy()\n    finite = np.isfinite(D2)\n    if not finite.any():\n        raise ValueError(\"Distance matrix has no finite entries.\")\n    maxv = np.nanmax(D2[finite])\n    penalty = factor * maxv if maxv > 0 else 1.0\n    D2[~finite] = penalty\n    np.fill_diagonal(D2, 0.0)\n    return D2, penalty\n\ndef run_hierarchical_clustering(D_pre, countries, flow, out_prefix):\n    \"\"\"\n    Chooses k by best silhouette over K_MIN..K_MAX, then fits final model.\n    Writes labels and silhouette table.\n   import os\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\n\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\nfrom sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score\n\n# ============================================================\n# CONFIG\n# ============================================================\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\n\nSTATE_LONG = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\n# (we will derive step directions from state_long; gc_steps_long not required)\n\nOUT_DIR = str(GC_DATA)  # keep everything together\n\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\n\n# Distance construction\nMIN_OVERLAP_YEARS = 10     # minimum overlapping years to compute pos distance\nMIN_OVERLAP_STEPS = 8      # minimum overlapping steps to compute dir distance\nALPHA_POS = 0.7            # d = alpha*d_pos + (1-alpha)*d_dir\n\n# Clustering\nK_MIN, K_MAX = 2, 12       # candidates for #clusters (hierarchical)\nLINKAGE = \"average\"        # average linkage works well with generic distances\n\n# Year universe (use what's in the data; typically 1977-2022)\n# ============================================================\n\n\n# ============================================================\n# HELPERS\n# ============================================================\ndef arccos_clip(x):\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\n\ndef safe_norm(v, axis=-1, keepdims=False):\n    return np.linalg.norm(v, axis=axis, keepdims=keepdims)\n\ndef build_country_year_arrays(df_flow):\n    \"\"\"\n    df_flow columns: country, year, x,y,z\n    returns:\n      countries (list)\n      years (np array sorted)\n      X: np array (N, T, 3) with NaNs where missing\n      M: mask (N, T) True where present\n    \"\"\"\n    years = np.sort(df_flow[\"year\"].unique())\n    countries = np.sort(df_flow[\"country\"].unique())\n\n    year_to_idx = {y:i for i,y in enumerate(years)}\n    country_to_idx = {c:i for i,c in enumerate(countries)}\n\n    N = len(countries)\n    T = len(years)\n\n    X = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    M = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n\n    for r in df_flow.itertuples(index=False):\n        i = country_to_idx[r.country]\n        t = year_to_idx[r.year]\n        X[i, t, 0] = r.x\n        X[i, t, 1] = r.y\n        X[i, t, 2] = r.z\n        M[i, t] = True\n\n    return countries.tolist(), years, X, M\n\ndef build_step_unit_vectors(X, M):\n    \"\"\"\n    Build unit direction vectors for steps between consecutive *available* years.\n    Returns:\n      U: (N, T, 3) unit vector at year index t meaning direction from t -> next available year\n      MU: (N, T) mask where U defined\n      DT: (N, T) dt in years to next available year (float), NaN if undefined\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    U = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    MU = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n    DT = np.full((N, T), np.nan, dtype=float)\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        idx = np.where(M[i])[0]\n        if idx.size < 2:\n            continue\n        for k in range(idx.size - 1):\n            t0 = idx[k]\n            t1 = idx[k+1]\n            v = X[i, t1] - X[i, t0]  # chord direction\n            n = np.linalg.norm(v)\n            if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\n                continue\n            U[i, t0] = v / n\n            MU[i, t0] = True\n            DT[i, t0] = float(t1 - t0)  # in index units; converted later using years array\n    return U, MU, DT\n\ndef pairwise_pos_distance(X, M, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average great-circle distance (radians) over overlapping years.\n    Returns:\n      Dpos (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    # diagonal\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, M.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        Mi = M[i]\n        Xi = X[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = Mi & M[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Xi[mask], X[j, mask])\n            ang = arccos_clip(dots)  # radians\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(ang))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef pairwise_dir_distance(U, MU, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average directional mismatch over overlapping step-years:\n      d = mean(1 - dot(u_i, u_j))\n    Returns:\n      Ddir (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = U.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, MU.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        MUi = MU[i]\n        Ui = U[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = MUi & MU[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Ui[mask], U[j, mask])\n            mismatch = 1.0 - dots\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(mismatch))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef robust_normalize(D):\n    \"\"\"\n    Normalize by median of finite off-diagonal values.\n    \"\"\"\n    finite = np.isfinite(D)\n    # exclude diagonal\n    idx = np.where(finite & (~np.eye(D.shape[0], dtype=bool)))\n    vals = D[idx]\n    if vals.size == 0:\n        return D, np.nan\n    med = np.median(vals)\n    if med <= 0 or not np.isfinite(med):\n        return D, med\n    return D / med, med\n\ndef fill_missing_with_penalty(D, factor=1.5):\n    \"\"\"\n    Replace NaNs with a penalty = factor * max_finite.\n    \"\"\"\n    D2 = D.copy()\n    finite = np.isfinite(D2)\n    if not finite.any():\n        raise ValueError(\"Distance matrix has no finite entries.\")\n    maxv = np.nanmax(D2[finite])\n    penalty = factor * maxv if maxv > 0 else 1.0\n    D2[~finite] = penalty\n    np.fill_diagonal(D2, 0.0)\n    return D2, penalty\n\ndef run_hierarchical_clustering(D_pre, countries, flow, out_prefix):\n    \"\"\"\n    Chooses k by best silhouette over K_MIN..K_MAX, then fits final model.\n    Writes labels and silhouette table.\n   import os\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\n\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\nfrom sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score\n\n# ============================================================\n# CONFIG\n# ============================================================\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\n\nSTATE_LONG = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\n# (we will derive step directions from state_long; gc_steps_long not required)\n\nOUT_DIR = str(GC_DATA)  # keep everything together\n\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\n\n# Distance construction\nMIN_OVERLAP_YEARS = 10     # minimum overlapping years to compute pos distance\nMIN_OVERLAP_STEPS = 8      # minimum overlapping steps to compute dir distance\nALPHA_POS = 0.7            # d = alpha*d_pos + (1-alpha)*d_dir\n\n# Clustering\nK_MIN, K_MAX = 2, 12       # candidates for #clusters (hierarchical)\nLINKAGE = \"average\"        # average linkage works well with generic distances\n\n# Year universe (use what's in the data; typically 1977-2022)\n# ============================================================\n\n\n# ============================================================\n# HELPERS\n# ============================================================\ndef arccos_clip(x):\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\n\ndef safe_norm(v, axis=-1, keepdims=False):\n    return np.linalg.norm(v, axis=axis, keepdims=keepdims)\n\ndef build_country_year_arrays(df_flow):\n    \"\"\"\n    df_flow columns: country, year, x,y,z\n    returns:\n      countries (list)\n      years (np array sorted)\n      X: np array (N, T, 3) with NaNs where missing\n      M: mask (N, T) True where present\n    \"\"\"\n    years = np.sort(df_flow[\"year\"].unique())\n    countries = np.sort(df_flow[\"country\"].unique())\n\n    year_to_idx = {y:i for i,y in enumerate(years)}\n    country_to_idx = {c:i for i,c in enumerate(countries)}\n\n    N = len(countries)\n    T = len(years)\n\n    X = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    M = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n\n    for r in df_flow.itertuples(index=False):\n        i = country_to_idx[r.country]\n        t = year_to_idx[r.year]\n        X[i, t, 0] = r.x\n        X[i, t, 1] = r.y\n        X[i, t, 2] = r.z\n        M[i, t] = True\n\n    return countries.tolist(), years, X, M\n\ndef build_step_unit_vectors(X, M):\n    \"\"\"\n    Build unit direction vectors for steps between consecutive *available* years.\n    Returns:\n      U: (N, T, 3) unit vector at year index t meaning direction from t -> next available year\n      MU: (N, T) mask where U defined\n      DT: (N, T) dt in years to next available year (float), NaN if undefined\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    U = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    MU = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\n    DT = np.full((N, T), np.nan, dtype=float)\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        idx = np.where(M[i])[0]\n        if idx.size < 2:\n            continue\n        for k in range(idx.size - 1):\n            t0 = idx[k]\n            t1 = idx[k+1]\n            v = X[i, t1] - X[i, t0]  # chord direction\n            n = np.linalg.norm(v)\n            if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\n                continue\n            U[i, t0] = v / n\n            MU[i, t0] = True\n            DT[i, t0] = float(t1 - t0)  # in index units; converted later using years array\n    return U, MU, DT\n\ndef pairwise_pos_distance(X, M, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average great-circle distance (radians) over overlapping years.\n    Returns:\n      Dpos (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    # diagonal\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, M.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        Mi = M[i]\n        Xi = X[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = Mi & M[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Xi[mask], X[j, mask])\n            ang = arccos_clip(dots)  # radians\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(ang))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef pairwise_dir_distance(U, MU, min_overlap):\n    \"\"\"\n    Average directional mismatch over overlapping step-years:\n      d = mean(1 - dot(u_i, u_j))\n    Returns:\n      Ddir (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\n    \"\"\"\n    N, T, _ = U.shape\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\n\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, MU.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\n\n    for i in range(N):\n        MUi = MU[i]\n        Ui = U[i]\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\n            mask = MUi & MU[j]\n            c = int(mask.sum())\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\n            if c < min_overlap:\n                continue\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Ui[mask], U[j, mask])\n            mismatch = 1.0 - dots\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(mismatch))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef robust_normalize(D):\n    \"\"\"\n    Normalize by median of finite off-diagonal values.\n    \"\"\"\n    finite = np.isfinite(D)\n    # exclude diagonal\n    idx = np.where(finite & (~np.eye(D.shape[0], dtype=bool)))\n    vals = D[idx]\n    if vals.size == 0:\n        return D, np.nan\n    med = np.median(vals)\n    if med <= 0 or not np.isfinite(med):\n        return D, med\n    return D / med, med\n\ndef np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Ui[mask], U[j, mask])\n            mismatch = 1.0 - dots\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(mismatch))\n    return D, Over\n\ndef robust_normalize(D):\n    \"\"\"\n    Normalize by median of finite off-diagonal values.\n    \"\"\"\n    finite = np.isfinite(D)\n    # exclude diagonal\n    idx = np.where(finite & (~np.eye(D.shape[0], dtype=bool)))\n    vals = D[idx]\n    if vals.size == 0:\n        return D, np.nan\n    med = np.median(vals)\n    if med <= 0 or not np.isfinite(med):\n        return D, med\n    return D / med, med\n\ndef fill_missing_with_penalty(D, factor=1.5):\n    \"\"\"\n    Replace NaNs with a penalty = factor * max_finite.\n    \"\"\"\n    D2 = D.copy()\n    finite = np.isfinite(D2)\n    if not finite.any():\n        raise ValueError(\"Distance matrix has no finite entries.\")\n    maxv = np.nanmax(D2[finite])\n    penalty = factor * maxv if maxv > 0 else 1.0\n    D2[~finite] = penalty\n    np.fill_diagonal(D2, 0.0)\n    return D2, penalty\n\ndef run_hierarchical_clustering(D_pre, countries, flow, out_prefix):\n    \"\"\"\n    Chooses k by best silhouette over K_MIN..K_MAX, then fits final model.\n    Writes labels and silhouette table.\n   \r\n=== silhouette ===\r\nCELL 78\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_mean ===\r\n\r\n=== window_ARI_vs_full_mean ===\r\n\r\n=== AgglomerativeClustering ===\r\nCELL 78\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== alpha_pos ===\r\nCELL 78\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n=== min_overlap_years ===\r\nCELL 78\r\n\r\n---\r\n"}}

Make `Dpos/Ddir/Dcombo` CSV export format match legacy exactly, including index handling.\n4. Inspect `load_state_long()` to eliminate the extra `31` import state rows so the state universe matches legacy before clustering.\n5. Begin Patch\n*** Add File: C:\\Python\\Geoanalisis\\run_full_pipeline_with_progress.py\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import logging\n+import sys\n+import time\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+SRC_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent / \"src\"\n+if str(SRC_DIR) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(SRC_DIR))\n+\n+from geoanalisis.config import DEFAULT_CONFIG\n+from geoanalisis.pipelines.run_pipeline import run_selected_stages\n+from geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\n+\n+\n+def configure_logging(progress_log_path: Path) -> None:\n+    progress_log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    formatter = logging.Formatter(\"%(asctime)s %(levelname)-8s %(name)s %(message)s\")\n+    root = logging.getLogger()\n+    root.setLevel(logging.INFO)\n+    root.handlers.clear()\n+\n+    stream = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\n+    stream.setFormatter(formatter)\n+    root.addHandler(stream)\n+\n+    file_handler = logging.FileHandler(progress_log_path, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    file_handler.setFormatter(formatter)\n+    root.addHandler(file_handler)\n+\n+\n+def main() -> int:\n+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n+    parser.add_argument(\"--run-id\", required=True)\n+    args = parser.parse_args()\n+\n+    config = DEFAULT_CONFIG\n+    initialize_project_tree(config)\n+    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, args.run_id)\n+    progress_log_path = run_dir / \"logs\" / \"progress.log\"\n+    status_path = run_dir / \"logs\" / \"run_status.json\"\n+    configure_logging(progress_log_path)\n+\n+    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.full_run\")\n+    stages = list(config.stage_names)\n+    stage_started = time.perf_counter()\n+    logger.info(\"FULL RUN START run_id=%s dataset=%s\", args.run_id, config.dataset_version)\n+    logger.info(\"Artifacts root: %s\", run_dir / \"artifacts\")\n+\n+    for idx, stage in enumerate(stages, start=1):\n+        logger.info(\"QUEUE %d/%d %s\", idx, len(stages), stage)\n+\n+    try:\n+        results = run_selected_stages(\n+            config,\n+            run_id=args.run_id,\n+            stages=stages,\n+            make_stage_01_figures=True,\n+            make_stage_06_figures=True,\n+            progress_log_path=progress_log_path,\n+            status_path=status_path,\n+        )\n+    except Exception:\n+        logger.exception(\"FULL RUN FAILED run_id=%s\", args.run_id)\n+        return 1\n+\n+    total_elapsed = time.perf_counter() - stage_started\n+    logger.info(\"FULL RUN COMPLETE run_id=%s elapsed=%.2fs\", args.run_id, total_elapsed)\n+    for stage in stages:\n+        logger.info(\"RESULT %s %s\", stage, results.get(stage, {}))\n+    logger.info(\"Status file: %s\", status_path)\n+    logger.info(\"Progress log: %s\", progress_log_path)\n+    return 0\n+\n+\n+if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n+    raise SystemExit(main())\n*** End Patch\n"}}

seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 03: barycentros globales y por pais.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nimport shutil\r\nimport stat\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.barycenters import (\r\n    build_barycenter_artifact_paths,\r\n    compute_country_barycenters,\r\n    compute_global_barycenters,\r\n    detect_all_country_codes,\r\n    load_centroids,\r\n    render_legacy_special_maps,\r\n    write_legacy_special_country_trade_file,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str, make_figures: bool = True) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_03_barycenters\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    artifacts = build_barycenter_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"03_barycenters\")\r\n    stage01_dir = build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"01_geo\") / \"data\"\r\n    centroids_path = stage01_dir / \"country_centroids_augmented.csv\"\r\n    if not centroids_path.exists():\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Stage 03 requires Stage 01 centroids at {centroids_path}\")\r\n    centroids = load_centroids(centroids_path)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\"Stage 03 started for dataset %s and run %s\", config.dataset_version, run_id)\r\n    global_df = compute_global_barycenters(config, centroids, artifacts.global_barycenter_path)\r\n    focus_written = compute_country_barycenters(\r\n        config, centroids, list(config.focus_countries), artifacts.data_dir\r\n    )\r\n    all_codes = detect_all_country_codes(config)\r\n    all_written = compute_country_barycenters(config, centroids, all_codes, artifacts.data_dir)\r\n\r\n    # compatibility copies for legacy-named special files\r\n    usa_path = artifacts.data_dir / f\"barycenter_USA_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    if usa_path.exists():\r\n        write_legacy_special_country_trade_file(usa_path, artifacts.usa_trade_path, \"us\")\r\n\r\n    china_path = artifacts.data_dir / f\"barycenter_CHN_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    if china_path.exists():\r\n        shutil.copyfile(china_path, artifacts.china_trade_path)\r\n\r\n    if make_figures:\r\n        render_legacy_special_maps(\r\n            artifacts.global_barycenter_path,\r\n            artifacts.usa_trade_path,\r\n            artifacts.china_trade_path,\r\n            config.natural_earth_shapefile_path,\r\n            artifacts.fig_dir,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    temp_legacy_check = artifacts.data_dir / \"_tmp_barycenter_usa_trade_legacy_check.csv\"\r\n    if temp_legacy_check.exists():\r\n        try:\r\n            temp_legacy_check.chmod(stat.S_IWRITE)\r\n            temp_legacy_check.unlink()\r\n        except PermissionError:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Stage 03 could not remove temporary file: %s\", temp_legacy_check)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 03 complete. focus=%d all=%d global_rows=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(focus_written),\r\n        len(all_written),\r\n        len(global_df),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"global_barycenter_path\": str(artifacts.global_barycenter_path),\r\n        \"usa_trade_path\": str(artifacts.usa_trade_path),\r\n        \"china_trade_path\": str(artifacts.china_trade_path),\r\n    }\r\n"}}
