{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:48:29.965Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_gOA2KDTrxht28907NdB2EZ7m","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\n\"\"\"Stage 05: autocorrelacion espacial con Moran's I.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport logging\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.moran import (\r\n    aggregate_year_global,\r\n    aggregate_year_product,\r\n    build_moran_artifact_paths,\r\n    build_weights_from_od,\r\n    moran_row,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _load_sitc_labels(reference_path: Path, code_col: str, label_col: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(reference_path, sep=\"\\t\", dtype=str).fillna(\"\")\r\n    df[code_col] = df[code_col].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n    df[label_col] = df[label_col].astype(str).str.strip()\r\n    labels = {}\r\n    for row in df[[code_col, label_col]].itertuples(index=False):\r\n        code, label = row\r\n        labels[code] = f\"{code}-{label}\" if label else code\r\n    return labels\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _render_figures(\r\n    global_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    sitc2_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    sitc3_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    fig_dir: Path,\r\n    config: ProjectConfig,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    sitc2_labels = _load_sitc_labels(\r\n        config.dataset_reference_dir / \"sitc2-2digit.txt\",\r\n        \"sitc2\",\r\n        \"nickname2\",\r\n    )\r\n    sitc3_labels = _load_sitc_labels(\r\n        config.dataset_reference_dir / \"sitc2-3digit.txt\",\r\n        \"sitc3\",\r\n        \"nickname3\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    for flow, outfile in [\r\n        (\"exports\", \"moran_global_exports.png\"),\r\n        (\"imports\", \"moran_global_imports.png\"),\r\n    ]:\r\n        sub = global_df[global_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))\r\n        ax.plot(sub[\"year\"], sub[\"moran_i\"], linewidth=2)\r\n        ax.axhline(0.0, color=\"black\", linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)\r\n        ax.set_xlabel(\"Year\")\r\n        ax.set_ylabel(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / outfile, dpi=300)\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    def heatmap(df: pd.DataFrame, code_col: str, labels: dict[str, str], outname: str) -> None:\r\n        pivot = df.pivot(index=code_col, columns=\"year\", values=\"moran_i\").sort_index()\r\n        ylabels = [labels.get(str(code), str(code)) for code in pivot.index]\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 14 if code_col == \"sitc2\" else 24), dpi=200)\r\n        im = ax.imshow(\r\n            pivot.values.astype(float),\r\n            aspect=\"auto\",\r\n            interpolation=\"nearest\",\r\n            cmap=\"RdBu_r\",\r\n            vmin=-0.20,\r\n            vmax=0.20,\r\n        )\r\n        ax.set_xticks(range(len(pivot.columns)))\r\n        ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) if i % 2 == 0 else \"\" for i, y in enumerate(pivot.columns)], rotation=90)\r\n        ax.set_yticks(range(len(pivot.index)))\r\n        ax.set_yticklabels(ylabels, fontsize=4 if code_col == \"sitc3\" else 5)\r\n        fig.colorbar(im, ax=ax).set_label(\"Moran's I\")\r\n        fig.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / outname, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc2\", sitc2_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc2_df[sitc2_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc2\", sitc2_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc2_level_imports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"exports\"], \"sitc3\", sitc3_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_exports.png\")\r\n    heatmap(sitc3_df[sitc3_df[\"flow\"] == \"imports\"], \"sitc3\", sitc3_labels, \"heatmap_moran_sitc3_level_imports.png\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef rerender_figures(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_moran_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"05_moran\", tag)\r\n    global_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.global_path)\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.sitc2_path, dtype={\"sitc2\": str})\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.read_csv(artifacts.sitc3_path, dtype={\"sitc3\": str})\r\n    _render_figures(global_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, artifacts.fig_dir, config)\r\n    return {\"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir), \"fig_dir\": str(artifacts.fig_dir)}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_05_moran\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    tag = f\"{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}\"\r\n    artifacts = build_moran_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"05_moran\", tag)\r\n    od_path = build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"01_geo\") / \"data\" / \"OD_Matrix.csv\"\r\n    if not od_path.exists():\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Stage 05 requires Stage 01 OD matrix at {od_path}\")\r\n\r\n    w, codes = build_weights_from_od(od_path)\r\n    global_rows = []\r\n    sitc2_rows = []\r\n    sitc3_rows = []\r\n\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        trade_path = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not trade_path.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        exp, imp = aggregate_year_global(trade_path, config.trade_value_column)\r\n        row_exp = moran_row(exp, codes, w)\r\n        row_imp = moran_row(imp, codes, w)\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"exports\", **row_exp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n        global_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"flow\": \"imports\", **row_imp, \"exp_zero_share\": row_exp[\"zero_share\"], \"imp_zero_share\": row_imp[\"zero_share\"], \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp2, imp2 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 2)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp2[\"product\"]) | set(imp2[\"product\"])):\r\n            r2e = moran_row(exp2[exp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r2i = moran_row(imp2[imp2[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r2e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc2_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc2\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r2i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n        exp3, imp3 = aggregate_year_product(trade_path, config.trade_value_column, 3)\r\n        for product in sorted(set(exp3[\"product\"]) | set(imp3[\"product\"])):\r\n            r3e = moran_row(exp3[exp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            r3i = moran_row(imp3[imp3[\"product\"] == product][[\"code\", \"value\"]], codes, w)\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"exports\", **r3e, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n            sitc3_rows.append({\"year\": year, \"sitc3\": product, \"flow\": \"imports\", **r3i, \"exp_not_locatable_codes\": 0, \"imp_not_locatable_codes\": 0})\r\n\r\n    global_df = pd.DataFrame(global_rows)\r\n    sitc2_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc2_rows)\r\n    sitc3_df = pd.DataFrame(sitc3_rows)\r\n    global_df.to_csv(artifacts.global_extended_path, index=False)\r\n    global_canonical_df = global_df.drop(columns=[\"zero_share\"], errors=\"ignore\")\r\n    global_canonical_df.to_csv(artifacts.global_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc2_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc2_path, index=False)\r\n    sitc3_df.to_csv(artifacts.sitc3_path, index=False)\r\n    _render_figures(global_canonical_df, sitc2_df, sitc3_df, artifacts.fig_dir, config)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 05 complete. global_rows=%d sitc2_rows=%d sitc3_rows=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(global_df),\r\n        len(sitc2_df),\r\n        len(sitc3_df),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"global_path\": str(artifacts.global_path),\r\n        \"global_extended_path\": str(artifacts.global_extended_path),\r\n        \"sitc2_path\": str(artifacts.sitc2_path),\r\n        \"sitc3_path\": str(artifacts.sitc3_path),\r\n    }\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T12:48:29.966Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_19mJmjwbpZQen5gQIpdcwsBF","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport math\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom esda.moran import Moran\r\nfrom libpysal.weights import W\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass MoranArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n    global_path: Path\r\n    global_extended_path: Path\r\n    sitc2_path: Path\r\n    sitc3_path: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_moran_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path, tag: str) -> MoranArtifacts:\r\n    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\r\n    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\r\n    return MoranArtifacts(\r\n        stage_dir=stage_dir,\r\n        data_dir=data_dir,\r\n        fig_dir=fig_dir,\r\n        global_path=data_dir / f\"moran_global_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\r\n        global_extended_path=data_dir / f\"moran_global_S2_{tag}_normal_inference_extended.csv\",\r\n        sitc2_path=data_dir / f\"moran_sitc2_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\r\n        sitc3_path=data_dir / f\"moran_sitc3_S2_{tag}_normal_inference.csv\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef log10_1p(x: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:\r\n    return np.log10(1.0 + np.maximum(x, 0.0))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef norm_cdf(z: float) -> float:\r\n    return 0.5 * (1.0 + math.erf(z / math.sqrt(2.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef two_sided_p_from_z(z: float) -> float:\r\n    return 2.0 * (1.0 - norm_cdf(abs(z)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_weights_from_od(od_path: Path, epsilon_factor: float = 1e-3) -> tuple[W, list[str]]:\r\n    od = pd.read_csv(od_path)\r\n    od[\"origin\"] = od[\"origin\"].astype(str)\r\n    od[\"destination\"] = od[\"destination\"].astype(str)\r\n    od[\"distance_km\"] = pd.to_numeric(od[\"distance_km\"], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n    od = od.dropna(subset=[\"origin\", \"destination\", \"distance_km\"])\r\n    min_positive = od.loc[od[\"distance_km\"] > 0, \"distance_km\"].min()\r\n    epsilon = float(min_positive * epsilon_factor) if pd.notna(min_positive) else 1e-6\r\n    od[\"distance_km\"] = od[\"distance_km\"].replace(0, epsilon)\r\n    od[\"weight\"] = 1.0 / od[\"distance_km\"]\r\n    codes = sorted(set(od[\"origin\"]) | set(od[\"destination\"]))\r\n    neighbors = {code: [] for code in codes}\r\n    weights = {code: [] for code in codes}\r\n    for _, row in od.iterrows():\r\n        origin = row[\"origin\"]\r\n        dest = row[\"destination\"]\r\n        if origin == dest:\r\n            continue\r\n        neighbors[origin].append(dest)\r\n        weights[origin].append(float(row[\"weight\"]))\r\n    w = W(neighbors, weights, silence_warnings=True)\r\n    w.transform = \"R\"\r\n    return w, codes\r\n\r\n\r\ndef aggregate_year_global(trade_path: Path, value_col: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    con = duckdb.connect()\r\n    exports = con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\r\n        GROUP BY exporter\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n    ).df()\r\n    imports = con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\r\n        GROUP BY importer\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n    ).df()\r\n    con.close()\r\n    exports[\"code\"] = exports[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    imports[\"code\"] = imports[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    return exports, imports\r\n\r\n\r\ndef aggregate_year_product(trade_path: Path, value_col: str, product_digits: int) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    con = duckdb.connect()\r\n    exports = con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter AS code,\r\n               SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, {product_digits}) AS product,\r\n               SUM({value_col}) AS value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\r\n        GROUP BY exporter, product\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n    ).df()\r\n    imports = con.execute(\r\n        f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT importer AS code,\r\n               SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, {product_digits}) AS product,\r\n               SUM({value_col}) AS value\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\r\n        GROUP BY importer, product\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n    ).df()\r\n    con.close()\r\n    exports[\"code\"] = exports[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    imports[\"code\"] = imports[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    exports[\"product\"] = exports[\"product\"].astype(str).str.zfill(product_digits)\r\n    imports[\"product\"] = imports[\"product\"].astype(str).str.zfill(product_digits)\r\n    return exports, imports\r\n\r\n\r\ndef moran_row(values_df: pd.DataFrame, codes: list[str], w: W) -> dict[str, float]:\r\n    s = pd.Series(0.0, index=codes, dtype=float)\r\n    if not values_df.empty:\r\n        vals = values_df.groupby(\"code\")[\"value\"].sum()\r\n        s.loc[vals.index.intersection(s.index)] = vals.loc[vals.index.intersection(s.index)].astype(float)\r\n    x = log10_1p(s.to_numpy(dtype=float))\r\n    mor = Moran(x, w, two_tailed=True)\r\n    z = float((mor.I - mor.EI) / math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\")\r\n    p = two_sided_p_from_z(z) if not math.isnan(z) else float(\"nan\")\r\n    return {\r\n        \"n\": len(codes),\r\n        \"moran_i\": float(mor.I),\r\n        \"mean_H0\": float(mor.EI),\r\n        \"variance_H0\": float(mor.VI_norm),\r\n        \"z\": z,\r\n        \"p_value\": p,\r\n        \"ci_5\": float(mor.I - 1.96 * math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n        \"ci_95\": float(mor.I + 1.96 * math.sqrt(mor.VI_norm)) if mor.VI_norm > 0 else float(\"nan\"),\r\n        \"zero_share\": float((s == 0).mean()),\r\n    }\r\n"}}

np\n@@\n class MoranArtifacts:\n@@\n     sitc3_path: Path\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(frozen=True)\n+class MoranContext:\n+    w: W\n+    codes: list[str]\n+    code_to_idx: dict[str, int]\n+    n_codes: int\n@@\n-def build_weights_from_od(od_path: Path, epsilon_factor: float = 1e-3) -> tuple[W, list[str]]:\n+def build_weights_from_od(od_path: Path, epsilon_factor: float = 1e-3) -> tuple[W, list[str]]:\n     od = pd.read_csv(od_path)\n     od[\"origin\"] = od[\"origin\"].astype(str)\n     od[\"destination\"] = od[\"destination\"].astype(str)\n     od[\"distance_km\"] = pd.to_numeric(od[\"distance_km\"], errors=\"coerce\")\n     od = od.dropna(subset=[\"origin\", \"destination\", \"distance_km\"])\n@@\n     od[\"distance_km\"] = od[\"distance_km\"].replace(0, epsilon)\n     od[\"weight\"] = 1.0 / od[\"distance_km\"]\n     codes = sorted(set(od[\"origin\"]) | set(od[\"destination\"]))\n-    neighbors = {code: [] for code in codes}\n-    weights = {code: [] for code in codes}\n-    for _, row in od.iterrows():\n-        origin = row[\"origin\"]\n-        dest = row[\"destination\"]\n-        if origin == dest:\n-            continue\n-        neighbors[origin].append(dest)\n-        weights[origin].append(float(row[\"weight\"]))\n+    od = od[od[\"origin\"] != od[\"destination\"]].copy()\n+    grouped = od.groupby(\"origin\", sort=True)\n+    neighbors = grouped[\"destination\"].agg(list).to_dict()\n+    weights = grouped[\"weight\"].agg(lambda s: [float(v) for v in s]).to_dict()\n+    for code in codes:\n+        neighbors.setdefault(code, [])\n+        weights.setdefault(code, [])\n     w = W(neighbors, weights, silence_warnings=True)\n     w.transform = \"R\"\n     return w, codes\n \n \n-def aggregate_year_global(trade_path: Path, value_col: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\n-    con = duckdb.connect()\n-    exports = con.execute(\n+def build_moran_context(od_path: Path, epsilon_factor: float = 1e-3) -> MoranContext:\n+    w, codes = build_weights_from_od(od_path, epsilon_factor=epsilon_factor)\n+    return MoranContext(\n+        w=w,\n+        codes=codes,\n+        code_to_idx={code: idx for idx, code in enumerate(codes)},\n+        n_codes=len(codes),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def aggregate_year_all(\n+    con: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection,\n+    trade_path: Path,\n+    value_col: str,\n+) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\n+    exports_3 = con.execute(\n         f\"\"\"\n         SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM (\n+            SELECT\n+                exporter,\n+                SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, 3) AS product3,\n+                {value_col}\n+            FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        )\n+        GROUP BY exporter, product3\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    imports_3 = con.execute(\n+        f\"\"\"\n+        SELECT importer AS code, SUM({value_col}) AS value\n+        FROM (\n+            SELECT\n+                importer,\n+                SUBSTR(LPAD(CAST(commoditycode AS VARCHAR), 4, '0'), 1, 3) AS product3,\n+                {value_col}\n+            FROM read_parquet('{trade_path}')\n+        )\n+        GROUP BY importer, product3\n+        \"\"\"\n+    ).df()\n+    exports_3[\"code\"] = exports_3[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    imports_3[\"code\"] = imports_3[\"code\"].astype(str)\n+    exports_3[\"product\"] = exports_3[\"product3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\n+    imports_3[\"product\"] = imports_3[\"product3\"].astype(str).str.zfill(3)\n+\n+    exports_2 = (\n+        exports_3.assign(product=exports_3[\"product\"].str[:2])\n+        .groupby([\"code\", \"product\"], as_index=False, {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:47:30.989Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"I continued with `Stage 05`, but the result is mixed: parity is preserved, but runtime got worse, not better.\n\n**What changed**\n- In [moran.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/moran.py#L26) I added:\n  - `MoranContext`\n  - `build_moran_context()`\n  - `aggregate_year_all()`\n  - `aggregate_year_global_from_product()`\n  - `moran_row_fast()`\n- In [moran.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/moran.py#L45) I also replaced the row-wise `iterrows()` weights build with grouped list construction.\n- In [stage_05_moran.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/pipelines/stage_05_moran.py#L115) I changed the stage to:\n  - reuse one DuckDB connection\n  - derive global totals from the product-level aggregation\n  - avoid repeated `df[df[\"product\"] == ...]` filtering by grouping once and reusing those groups\n  - preserve legacy row ordering for SITC2/SITC3\n\n**Canonical output parity**\nValidated against `2026-03-10_005_full-pipeline`:\n- global CSVs: numerically identical up to machine precision\n- SITC2/SITC3 CSVs: numerically identical up to machine precision\n- figure set: identical `6` PNG outputs\n\nArtifacts from the rerun:\n- [05_moran optimized run](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/runs/trade_s2_v001/2026-03-11_003_stage05-opt2/artifacts/05_moran)\n\n**Runtime**\n- optimized clean rerun run_id: `2026-03-11_003_stage05-opt2`\n- Stage 05 runtime: `6223.688s` (~103.7 min)\n\nThis is slower than the prior modular implementation, so this first Stage 05 optimization pass is **not a net performance win**.\n\n**Interpretation**\n- The changes are analytically safe: outputs still match.\n- But the attempted consolidation moved too much work into Python-side grouping/loop overhead, so real wall-clock time increased.\n- Conclusion: `Stage 03` optimization is good and should keep.\n- `Stage 05` optimization, in its current form, should **not** be promoted as the final performance fix.\n\nIf you want, the next step should be a **second, narrower Stage 05 diagnosis** focused on why the current attempt regressed and which part should be rolled back or reworked before any further code change.","phase":"final_answer"}}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:49:25.521Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_VWj0vMlkmkXIoYatEJ9sGzrt","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.5 seconds\nOutput:\n===== CELL 96 =====\r\n**Hurricane Barycenter**\r\n\r\n===== CELL 97 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Mercator maps of country barycenters (\"stars\") for ALL countries\r\n# - One map for exports, one map for imports\r\n# - No labels\r\n# - Basemap: Natural Earth countries, gray, no Antarctica\r\n# - Points: spherical barycenter per country (across ALL years in the file)\r\n#\r\n# Inputs:\r\n#   1) STATE_FILE: gc_state_long_demeaned.csv (must contain raw x,y,z OR demeaned x_demean,y_demean,z_demean)\r\n#   2) SHAPEFILE:  Natural Earth admin_0 countries shapefile (EPSG:4326)\r\n#\r\n# Output:\r\n#   - gc_country_barycenters_exports.png\r\n#   - gc_country_barycenters_imports.png\r\n# ============================================================\r\n\r\nimport os\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ----------------------------\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\nSTATE_FILE = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long_demeaned.csv\")\r\n\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\r\n\r\n# Use RAW for interpretable geography. If you only have demeaned, set True.\r\nUSE_DEMEANED = False  # <-- set True ONLY if raw x,y,z are not available\r\n\r\n# Basemap styling\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"#f2f2f2\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"#cfcfcf\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE_W = 0.35\r\n\r\n# Point styling (publish-friendly, no labels)\r\nEXPORT_POINT_COLOR = \"#b2182b\"  # deep red\r\nIMPORT_POINT_COLOR = \"#2166ac\"  # deep blue\r\nPOINT_SIZE = 10\r\nPOINT_ALPHA = 0.85\r\nPOINT_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nPOINT_EDGE_W = 0.25\r\n\r\nDPI = 300\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Geometry helpers\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef arccos_clip(x):\r\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\r\n\r\ndef spherical_mean_unitvec(V):\r\n    s = np.sum(V, axis=0)\r\n    n = np.linalg.norm(s)\r\n    if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\r\n        return np.array([np.nan, np.nan, np.nan], dtype=float)\r\n    return s / n\r\n\r\ndef unitvec_to_latlon_deg(v):\r\n    x, y, z = float(v[0]), float(v[1]), float(v[2])\r\n    lat = np.degrees(np.arcsin(np.clip(z, -1.0, 1.0)))\r\n    lon = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    if lon <= -180:\r\n        lon += 360\r\n    elif lon > 180:\r\n        lon -= 360\r\n    return float(lat), float(lon)\r\n\r\ndef assert_exists(path):\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file: {path}\")\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Compute barycenters per country\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef compute_country_barycenters(state_df, flow):\r\n    df = state_df[state_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    if df.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\"country\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n\r\n    # Drop non-finite vectors\r\n    ok = np.isfinite(df[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]]).all(axis=1)\r\n    df = df[ok].copy()\r\n    if df.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\"country\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n\r\n    out = []\r\n    for c, gc in df.groupby(\"country\", sort=True):\r\n        V = gc[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n\r\n        # normalize rows defensively\r\n        norms = np.linalg.norm(V, axis=1)\r\n        keep = np.isfinite(norms) & (norms > 0)\r\n        V = V[keep]\r\n        if V.shape[0] == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        V = V / norms[keep][:, None]\r\n\r\n        star = spherical_mean_unitvec(V)\r\n        if not np.isfinite(star).all():\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        lat, lon = unitvec_to_latlon_deg(star)\r\n        out.append({\"country\": c, \"lat\": lat, \"lon\": lon})\r\n\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(out)\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Plot map\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef plot_barycenters(world_3857, pts_ll, flow):\r\n    pts = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        pts_ll,\r\n        geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(pts_ll[\"lon\"], pts_ll[\"lat\"]),\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n\r\n    # Basemap (no Antarctica)\r\n    world_3857.plot(\r\n        ax=ax,\r\n        color=BASEMAP_FACE,\r\n        edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE,\r\n        linewidth=BASEMAP_EDGE_W,\r\n        zorder=1\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    color = EXPORT_POINT_COLOR if flow == \"exports\" else IMPORT_POINT_COLOR\r\n\r\n    pts.plot(\r\n        ax=ax,\r\n        color=color,\r\n        markersize=POINT_SIZE,\r\n        alpha=POINT_ALPHA,\r\n        edgecolor=POINT_EDGE,\r\n        linewidth=POINT_EDGE_W,\r\n        zorder=5\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_title(f\"{flow.capitalize()} country barycenters (Mercator)\", fontsize=14)\r\n\r\n    out = os.path.join(GC_BASE, f\"gc_country_barycenters_{flow}.png\")\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    plt.savefig(out, dpi=DPI, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n    print(f\"✓ Saved: {out}\")\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# MAIN\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef main():\r\n    assert_exists(STATE_FILE)\r\n    assert_exists(SHAPEFILE)\r\n\r\n    state = pd.read_csv(STATE_FILE)\r\n    state[\"year\"] = state[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    if USE_DEMEANED:\r\n        needed = {\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x_demean\", \"y_demean\", \"z_demean\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"{STATE_FILE} missing columns: {sorted(miss)}\")\r\n        state = state.rename(columns={\"x_demean\": \"x\", \"y_demean\": \"y\", \"z_demean\": \"z\"})\r\n    else:\r\n        needed = {\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"{STATE_FILE} missing RAW columns: {sorted(miss)}.\\n\"\r\n                \"Set USE_DEMEANED=True only if you intentionally want demeaned barycenters.\"\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    state = state[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].copy()\r\n\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    else:\r\n        world = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n    # Remove Antarctica and junk codes, then project to Mercator\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"].notna() & (world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"-99\")].copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    world_3857 = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    for flow in FLOWS:\r\n        pts = compute_country_barycenters(state, flow)\r\n        if pts.empty:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No barycenters computed for flow={flow}.\")\r\n            continue\r\n        plot_barycenters(world_3857, pts, flow)\r\n\r\n    print(\"\\nDone.\")\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    main()\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 98 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Country barycenter trajectories (year-to-year great-circle paths)\r\n# - Two maps: exports and imports\r\n# - Mercator EPSG:3857, no Antarctica\r\n# - Trajectories are drawn as great-circle interpolations between yearly barycenters\r\n#\r\n# Inputs:\r\n#   - gc_state_long_demeaned.csv  (must contain raw x,y,z or demeaned)\r\n#   - Natural Earth shapefile (EPSG:4326)\r\n#\r\n# Outputs:\r\n#   - gc_trajectories_exports.png\r\n#   - gc_trajectories_imports.png\r\n# ============================================================\r\n\r\nimport os\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import LineString\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ----------------------------\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\nSTATE_FILE = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long_demeaned.csv\")\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\r\n\r\n# Use raw geography vectors (recommended). Set True only if raw x,y,z missing.\r\nUSE_DEMEANED = False\r\n\r\n# Years to plot (inclusive). Use None to use full available range.\r\nYEAR_MIN = 1980\r\nYEAR_MAX = 2022\r\n\r\n# Trajectory detail: points per segment (year->year). 20 is smooth enough.\r\nPTS_PER_SEGMENT = 20\r\n\r\n# Plot control to avoid spaghetti:\r\n# - \"all\": draw all countries\r\n# - \"topN\": draw only top N countries by number of years present\r\n# - \"subset\": draw only ISO3 in SELECT_COUNTRIES\r\nMODE = \"all\"\r\nTOP_N = 60\r\nSELECT_COUNTRIES = [\"USA\", \"CHN\", \"DEU\", \"JPN\", \"MEX\", \"BRA\", \"IND\"]\r\n\r\n# Basemap styling\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"#f2f2f2\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"#cfcfcf\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE_W = 0.35\r\n\r\n# Line styling (publish-friendly)\r\nEXPORT_LINE = \"#b2182b\"  # deep red\r\nIMPORT_LINE = \"#2166ac\"  # deep blue\r\nLINE_W = 0.55\r\nLINE_ALPHA = 0.20\r\n\r\n# Start/end markers (optional; keep subtle)\r\nDRAW_ENDPOINTS = True\r\nSTART_MARKER = \"o\"\r\nEND_MARKER = \"s\"\r\nMARKER_SIZE = 8\r\nMARKER_ALPHA = 0.35\r\nMARKER_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nMARKER_EDGE_W = 0.25\r\n\r\nDPI = 300\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Helpers (spherical interpolation)\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef assert_exists(path):\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file: {path}\")\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_rows(V):\r\n    n = np.linalg.norm(V, axis=1)\r\n    keep = np.isfinite(n) & (n > 0)\r\n    V2 = V[keep] / n[keep][:, None]\r\n    return V2, keep\r\n\r\ndef slerp(u, v, t):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Spherical linear interpolation between unit vectors u and v.\r\n    u, v: (3,) unit vectors\r\n    t: float in [0,1]\r\n    returns: (3,) unit vector\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    dot = float(np.clip(np.dot(u, v), -1.0, 1.0))\r\n    omega = np.arccos(dot)\r\n    if omega < 1e-12:\r\n        return u.copy()\r\n    so = np.sin(omega)\r\n    return (np.sin((1 - t) * omega) / so) * u + (np.sin(t * omega) / so) * v\r\n\r\ndef unitvec_to_lonlat_deg(p):\r\n    x, y, z = float(p[0]), float(p[1]), float(p[2])\r\n    lat = np.degrees(np.arcsin(np.clip(z, -1.0, 1.0)))\r\n    lon = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    # normalize lon to (-180, 180]\r\n    if lon <= -180:\r\n        lon += 360\r\n    elif lon > 180:\r\n        lon -= 360\r\n    return lon, lat\r\n\r\ndef build_country_lines(df_country, pts_per_segment=PTS_PER_SEGMENT):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df_country: rows for a single country+flow with columns year,x,y,z (unit-ish)\r\n    returns: list of shapely LineString in lon/lat\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    dfc = df_country.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    V = dfc[[\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n    Vn, keep = _normalize_rows(V)\r\n    if Vn.shape[0] < 2:\r\n        return [], None, None\r\n\r\n    years = dfc[\"year\"].to_numpy(int)[keep]\r\n    # Build segments only where consecutive years exist (t -> t+1)\r\n    # If you want to connect across gaps, change this logic.\r\n    lines = []\r\n    start_ll = None\r\n    end_ll = None\r\n\r\n    for i in range(len(years) - 1):\r\n        y0, y1 = years[i], years[i+1]\r\n        if y1 != y0 + 1:\r\n            continue  # skip gaps; avoids long jumps across missing years\r\n        u = Vn[i]\r\n        v = Vn[i+1]\r\n        pts = []\r\n        for k in range(pts_per_segment + 1):\r\n            t = k / pts_per_segment\r\n            p = slerp(u, v, t)\r\n            lon, lat = unitvec_to_lonlat_deg(p)\r\n            pts.append((lon, lat))\r\n        if not start_ll:\r\n            start_ll = pts[0]\r\n        end_ll = pts[-1]\r\n        lines.append(LineString(pts))\r\n\r\n    return lines, start_ll, end_ll\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# MAIN\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef main():\r\n    assert_exists(STATE_FILE)\r\n    assert_exists(SHAPEFILE)\r\n\r\n    state = pd.read_csv(STATE_FILE)\r\n    state[\"year\"] = state[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    if USE_DEMEANED:\r\n        needed = {\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x_demean\",\"y_demean\",\"z_demean\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"{STATE_FILE} missing columns: {sorted(miss)}\")\r\n        state = state.rename(columns={\"x_demean\":\"x\",\"y_demean\":\"y\",\"z_demean\":\"z\"})\r\n    else:\r\n        needed = {\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"{STATE_FILE} missing RAW columns: {sorted(miss)}.\\n\"\r\n                \"Set USE_DEMEANED=True only if you intentionally want demeaned trajectories.\"\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    state = state[[\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"]].copy()\r\n    state[\"country\"] = state[\"country\"].astype(str).str.upper()\r\n\r\n    # Filter years\r\n    if YEAR_MIN is not None:\r\n        state = state[state[\"year\"] >= YEAR_MIN].copy()\r\n    if YEAR_MAX is not None:\r\n        state = state[state[\"year\"] <= YEAR_MAX].copy()\r\n\r\n    # Basemap -> Mercator\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    else:\r\n        world = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"].notna() & (world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"-99\")].copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    world_3857 = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    for flow in FLOWS:\r\n        df = state[state[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n        if df.empty:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No data for flow={flow}\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        # choose which countries to draw\r\n        if MODE == \"subset\":\r\n            use_countries = sorted(set([c.upper() for c in SELECT_COUNTRIES]))\r\n        else:\r\n            counts = df.groupby(\"country\")[\"year\"].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)\r\n            if MODE == \"topN\":\r\n                use_countries = counts.head(TOP_N).index.tolist()\r\n            else:\r\n                use_countries = counts.index.tolist()\r\n\r\n        line_geoms = []\r\n        start_pts = []\r\n        end_pts = []\r\n\r\n        for c in use_countries:\r\n            dfc = df[df[\"country\"] == c]\r\n            if dfc.shape[0] < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            lines, start_ll, end_ll = build_country_lines(dfc, pts_per_segment=PTS_PER_SEGMENT)\r\n            if not lines:\r\n                continue\r\n            line_geoms.extend(lines)\r\n            if DRAW_ENDPOINTS and start_ll and end_ll:\r\n                start_pts.append(start_ll)\r\n                end_pts.append(end_ll)\r\n\r\n        if not line_geoms:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No trajectories drawn for flow={flow} (check YEAR range / missing data).\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        lines_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=line_geoms, crs=\"EPSG:4326\").to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n        # Endpoints (optional)\r\n        if DRAW_ENDPOINTS:\r\n            start_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n                geometry=gpd.points_from_xy([p[0] for p in start_pts], [p[1] for p in start_pts]),\r\n                crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n            ).to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\") if start_pts else None\r\n\r\n            end_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n                geometry=gpd.points_from_xy([p[0] for p in end_pts], [p[1] for p in end_pts]),\r\n                crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n            ).to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\") if end_pts else None\r\n        else:\r\n            start_gdf = end_gdf = None\r\n\r\n        # Plot\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))\r\n        ax.set_axis_off()\r\n\r\n        world_3857.plot(ax=ax, color=BASEMAP_FACE, edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE,\r\n                        linewidth=BASEMAP_EDGE_W, zorder=1)\r\n\r\n        line_color = EXPORT_LINE if flow == \"exports\" else IMPORT_LINE\r\n        lines_gdf.plot(ax=ax, c\r\n\r\n===== CELL 99 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport glob\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import LineString\r\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ============================================================\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\n# Your per-country files:\r\n#   barycenter_ABW_1977_2022.csv, barycenter_USA_1977_2022.csv, ...\r\nBARY_GLOB = os.path.join(GC_BASE, f\"barycenter_*_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}*.csv\")\r\n\r\nYEAR_MIN = TRADE_YEAR_START\r\nYEAR_MAX = TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# East/West classification threshold per year (degrees longitude)\r\nDLON_THRESH_DEG = 2.0\r\n\r\n# Optional densification of each yearly segment in lon/lat (0 = none)\r\nPTS_PER_SEGMENT = 0\r\n\r\n# Basemap\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"#f2f2f2\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"#cfcfcf\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE_W = 0.35\r\n\r\n# Trajectories\r\nLINE_W = 0.55\r\nALPHA = 0.22\r\nCOLOR_EAST = \"#b2182b\"   # red\r\nCOLOR_WEST = \"#2166ac\"   # blue\r\nCOLOR_UNCL = \"#7f7f7f\"   # gray\r\n\r\nDPI = 300\r\n\r\n# Projection\r\nPROJ_PRIMARY = \"ESRI:54030\"   # Robinson\r\nPROJ_FALLBACK = \"ESRI:54009\"  # Mollweide\r\n\r\n# Output\r\nOUT_EXPORTS = str(GC_FIG / \"gc_trajectories_exports_publish.png\")\r\nOUT_IMPORTS = str(GC_FIG / \"gc_trajectories_imports_publish.png\")\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# HELPERS\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef assert_exists(path):\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file: {path}\")\r\n\r\ndef pick_projection(world_gdf):\r\n    try:\r\n        world_gdf.to_crs(PROJ_PRIMARY)\r\n        return PROJ_PRIMARY\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return PROJ_FALLBACK\r\n\r\ndef unwrap_lon(lon_deg_array):\r\n    lon_rad = np.deg2rad(lon_deg_array.astype(float))\r\n    lon_unw = np.unwrap(lon_rad)\r\n    return np.rad2deg(lon_unw)\r\n\r\ndef densify_segment(lon0, lat0, lon1, lat1, n=0):\r\n    if not n or n <= 0:\r\n        return [(lon0, lat0), (lon1, lat1)]\r\n    xs = np.linspace(lon0, lon1, n + 2)\r\n    ys = np.linspace(lat0, lat1, n + 2)\r\n    return list(zip(xs, ys))\r\n\r\ndef read_country_barycenter(path):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Reads your schema:\r\n      country, lat_exports, lon_exports, exports_weight,\r\n              lat_imports, lon_imports, imports_weight, year\r\n    Returns a dataframe with year and the relevant lon/lat columns for both flows.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(path)\r\n\r\n    required = {\r\n        \"country\", \"year\",\r\n        \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\",\r\n        \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\",\r\n    }\r\n    missing = required - set(df.columns)\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"{os.path.basename(path)} missing columns: {sorted(missing)}\")\r\n\r\n    df = df.copy()\r\n    df[\"year\"] = df[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    for c in [\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]:\r\n        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n\r\n    df = df[(df[\"year\"] >= YEAR_MIN) & (df[\"year\"] <= YEAR_MAX)].copy()\r\n    return df\r\n\r\ndef build_segments_for_flow(df, flow):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    flow in {\"exports\",\"imports\"}\r\n    Returns 3 lists of LineString in lon/lat: east, west, unclear\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    if flow == \"exports\":\r\n        latcol, loncol = \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"\r\n    else:\r\n        latcol, loncol = \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"\r\n\r\n    d = df[[\"year\", loncol, latcol]].rename(columns={loncol: \"lon\", latcol: \"lat\"}).copy()\r\n    d = d[np.isfinite(d[\"lon\"]) & np.isfinite(d[\"lat\"])].sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\n    if d.shape[0] < 2:\r\n        return [], [], []\r\n\r\n    years = d[\"year\"].to_numpy(int)\r\n    lons = d[\"lon\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n    lats = d[\"lat\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n    lons_unw = unwrap_lon(lons)\r\n\r\n    east, west, uncl = [], [], []\r\n\r\n    for i in range(len(years) - 1):\r\n        y0, y1 = years[i], years[i + 1]\r\n        if y1 != y0 + 1:\r\n            continue  # skip gaps\r\n\r\n        dlon = lons_unw[i + 1] - lons_unw[i]\r\n\r\n        pts = densify_segment(lons[i], lats[i], lons[i + 1], lats[i + 1], n=PTS_PER_SEGMENT)\r\n        seg = LineString(pts)\r\n\r\n        if dlon > DLON_THRESH_DEG:\r\n            east.append(seg)\r\n        elif dlon < -DLON_THRESH_DEG:\r\n            west.append(seg)\r\n        else:\r\n            uncl.append(seg)\r\n\r\n    return east, west, uncl\r\n\r\ndef plot_flow(world_4326, flow, out_path):\r\n    files = sorted(glob.glob(BARY_GLOB))\r\n    print(f\"[INFO] {flow}: found {len(files)} barycenter files matching {os.path.basename(BARY_GLOB)}\")\r\n    if not files:\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"No barycenter files found at: {BARY_GLOB}\")\r\n\r\n    east_lines, west_lines, uncl_lines = [], [], []\r\n\r\n    for fp in files:\r\n        # skip Antarctica barycenter if present\r\n        if os.path.basename(fp).upper().startswith(\"BARYCENTER_ATA_\"):\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            df = read_country_barycenter(fp)\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] Skipping {os.path.basename(fp)}: {e}\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        e, w, u = build_segments_for_flow(df, flow)\r\n        east_lines.extend(e)\r\n        west_lines.extend(w)\r\n        uncl_lines.extend(u)\r\n\r\n    if not (east_lines or west_lines or uncl_lines):\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No valid segments constructed for {flow} in {YEAR_MIN}-{YEAR_MAX}.\")\r\n\r\n    proj = pick_projection(world_4326)\r\n\r\n    world = world_4326.copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"].notna() & (world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"-99\")].copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    world_p = world.to_crs(proj)\r\n\r\n    def to_proj(lines):\r\n        if not lines:\r\n            return None\r\n        g = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=lines, crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n        return g.to_crs(proj)\r\n\r\n    east_g = to_proj(east_lines)\r\n    west_g = to_proj(west_lines)\r\n    uncl_g = to_proj(uncl_lines)\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, color=BASEMAP_FACE, edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE, linewidth=BASEMAP_EDGE_W, zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    # draw unclear first, then directional\r\n    if uncl_g is not None:\r\n        uncl_g.plot(ax=ax, color=COLOR_UNCL, linewidth=LINE_W, alpha=ALPHA, zorder=2)\r\n    if west_g is not None:\r\n        west_g.plot(ax=ax, color=COLOR_WEST, linewidth=LINE_W, alpha=ALPHA, zorder=3)\r\n    if east_g is not None:\r\n        east_g.plot(ax=ax, color=COLOR_EAST, linewidth=LINE_W, alpha=ALPHA, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Legend (no title on map)\r\n    legend_title = \"Trajectory of Export Barycenters\" if flow == \"exports\" else \"Trajectory of Import Barycenters\"\r\n    handles = [\r\n        Line2D([0], [0], color=COLOR_EAST, lw=2, label=\"Eastbound\"),\r\n        Line2D([0], [0], color=COLOR_WEST, lw=2, label=\"Westbound\"),\r\n        Line2D([0], [0], color=COLOR_UNCL, lw=2, label=\"Unclear\"),\r\n    ]\r\n    ax.legend(\r\n        handles=handles,\r\n        title=legend_title,\r\n        loc=\"lower left\",\r\n        frameon=True,\r\n        framealpha=0.95,\r\n        edgecolor=\"#cccccc\",\r\n        fontsize=9,\r\n        title_fontsize=10\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    plt.savefig(out_path, dpi=DPI, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    print(f\"✓ Saved: {out_path}\")\r\n    print(f\"  segments: east={len(east_lines)}, west={len(west_lines)}, unclear={len(uncl_lines)}\")\r\n    print(f\"  projection: {proj}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# RUN\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef main():\r\n    assert_exists(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    else:\r\n        world = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n    plot_flow(world, \"exports\", OUT_EXPORTS)\r\n    plot_flow(world, \"imports\", OUT_IMPORTS)\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    main()\r\n\r\n\r\n"}}

initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_04_clustering\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    artifacts = build_clustering_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"04_clustering\")\r\n    bary_glob = str(\r\n        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\r\n        / \"data\"\r\n        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    )\r\n    state_long = load_state_long(bary_glob)\r\n    state_long.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    features = compute_features(state_long)\r\n    features.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    summaries = []\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        dpos, ddir, dcombo, dover = pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long, flow=flow)\r\n        dpos.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dpos.csv\")\r\n        ddir.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Ddir.csv\")\r\n        dcombo.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dcombo.csv\")\r\n        dover.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_overlap_years.csv\")\r\n\r\n        sil, clusters = select_clusters(dcombo, flow=flow)\r\n        sil.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_silhouette.csv\", index=False)\r\n        clusters.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_clusters.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        attractors = compute_attractors(state_long, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        attractors.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_attractors.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        summary, wd, bs = stability_summary(dcombo, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        summaries.append(summary)\r\n        wd.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_window_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n        bs.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_bootstrap_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    pd.concat(summaries, ignore_index=True).to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_stability_summary.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 04 complete. states=%d features=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(state_long),\r\n        len(features),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"state_long_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\"),\r\n        \"features_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\"),\r\n    }\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:49:46.361Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_h0bFZIFV0LOkdYGU55IeBfSr","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.8 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import (\r\n    adjusted_rand_score,\r\n    normalized_mutual_info_score,\r\n    silhouette_score,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\nPERIODS_5 = [\r\n    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\r\n    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\r\n    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\r\n    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\r\n    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat_r)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\n\r\ndef xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\r\n    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\r\n    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\r\n    return lat, lon\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\r\n    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\r\n    return np.arccos(dot)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\r\n    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\r\n        country = infer_country(fp)\r\n        if not country:\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\r\n            continue\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\r\n            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n            weight_col = (\r\n                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\r\n            )\r\n            if flow == \"imports\":\r\n                weight_col = (\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\r\n                )\r\n            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\r\n            sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\r\n            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\r\n            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for (country, flow), g in state_long.groupby([\"country\", \"flow\"], sort=True):\r\n        g = g.sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        n_obs = len(g)\r\n        if n_obs == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        if n_obs > 1:\r\n            step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\r\n            step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\r\n            path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\r\n            net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\r\n            net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\r\n            bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\r\n            ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\r\n            mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\r\n            mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\r\n            bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n            bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\r\n            turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\r\n            turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\r\n            mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\r\n            step_km = np.array([])\r\n            bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\r\n        row = {\r\n            \"country\": country,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"n_obs\": n_obs,\r\n            \"start_year\": int(g[\"year\"].min()),\r\n            \"end_year\": int(g[\"year\"].max()),\r\n            \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\r\n            \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\r\n            \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\r\n            \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\r\n            \"straightness\": straightness,\r\n            \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\r\n            \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\r\n            \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\r\n        }\r\n        for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\r\n            sub = g[(g[\"year\"] >= start) & (g[\"year\"] <= end)]\r\n            row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(len(sub))\r\n            if len(sub):\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(sub[\"x\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(sub[\"y\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(sub[\"z\"].mean())\r\n            else:\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\r\n        for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\r\n            a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\r\n            a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\r\n                rad = km = np.nan\r\n            else:\r\n                rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\r\n                km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\r\n        rows.append(row)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\r\n    state = {\r\n        c: sub[sub[\"country\"] == c].sort_values(\"year\").set_index(\"year\")[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"lat\", \"lon\"]]\r\n        for c in countries\r\n    }\r\n    n = len(countries)\r\n    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\r\n        for j, b in enumerate(countries):\r\n            if i >= j:\r\n                continue\r\n            ya = state[a].index.to_numpy()\r\n            yb = state[b].index.to_numpy()\r\n            overlap_years = sorted(set(ya).intersection(set(yb)))\r\n            if len(overlap_years) >= min_overlap_years:\r\n                xa = state[a].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                xb = state[b].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\r\n            else:\r\n                pos = np.nan\r\n            steps_a_years = [y for y in ya[:-1] if y + 1 in ya]\r\n            steps_b_years = [y for y in yb[:-1] if y + 1 in yb]\r\n            overlap_steps = sorted(set(steps_a_years).intersection(set(steps_b_years)))\r\n            if len(overlap_steps) >= min_overlap_steps:\r\n                dirs = []\r\n                for y in overlap_steps:\r\n                    aa0 = state[a].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    aa1 = state[a].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb0 = state[b].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb1 = state[b].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    ba = initial_bearing_deg(aa0[0], aa0[1], aa1[0], aa1[1])\r\n                    bb = initial_bearing_deg(bb0[0], bb0[1], bb1[0], bb1[1])\r\n                    diff = abs(ba - bb)\r\n                    diff = min(diff, 360 - diff)\r\n                    dirs.append(diff / 180.0)\r\n                direc = float(np.mean(dirs))\r\n            else:\r\n                direc = np.nan\r\n            if np.isnan(pos):\r\n                pos = 3.0\r\n            if np.isnan(direc):\r\n                direc = 1.0\r\n            combo = alpha_pos * pos + (1 - alpha_pos) * direc\r\n            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\r\n            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\r\n            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = len(overlap_years)\r\n    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\r\n    return (\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    k_values = []\r\n    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\r\n    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\r\n            score = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\r\n    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\r\n    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\r\n    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": countries,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"cluster\": labels,\r\n            \"k_selected\": best_k,\r\n            \"silhouette_selected\": float(sil[sil[\"k\"] == best_k][\"silhouette\"].iloc[0]),\r\n            \"missing_penalty_used\": 3.0,\r\n            \"linkage\": \"average\",\r\n            \"alpha_pos\": 0.7,\r\n            \"min_overlap_years\": 10,\r\n            \"min_overlap_steps\": 8,\r\n        }\r\n    ).sort_values([\"cluster\", \"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    return sil, clusters\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_attractors(state_long: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    merged = sub.merge(clusters_df[[\"country\", \"cluster\"]], on=\"country\", how=\"inner\")\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for cluster, g in merged.groupby(\"cluster\"):\r\n        last = g.sort_values(\"year\").groupby(\"country\").tail(1).copy()\r\n        star_x = float(last[\"x\"].mean())\r\n        star_y = float(last[\"y\"].mean())\r\n        star_z = float(last[\"z\"].mean())\r\n        norm = math.sqrt(star_x**2 + star_y**2 + star_z**2)\r\n        star_x, star_y, star_z = star_x / norm, star_y / norm, star_z / norm\r\n        star_lat, star_lon = xyz_to_latlon(star_x, star_y, star_z)\r\n\r\n        dir_vectors = []\r\n        end_years = []\r\n        for country, gc in g.groupby(\"country\"):\r\n            gc = gc.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n            if len(gc) < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            a = gc.iloc[-2][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            b = gc.iloc[-1][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            dv = b - a\r\n            if np.linalg.norm(dv) == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            dir_vectors.append(dv / np.linalg.norm(dv))\r\n            end_years.append(int(gc[\"year\"].max()))\r\n        if dir_vectors:\r\n            dv = np.mean(np.vstack(dir_vectors), axis=0)\r\n            dv = dv / np.linalg.norm(dv)\r\n            dir_lat, dir_lon = xyz_to_latlon(dv[0], dv[1], dv[2])\r\n            dir_x, dir_y, dir_z = dv.tolist()\r\n        else:\r\n            dir_lat = dir_lon = dir_x = dir_y = dir_z = np.nan\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"cluster\": int(cluster),\r\n                \"attractor_type\": \"endpoint\",\r\n                \"star_lat\": star_lat,\r\n                \"star_lon\": star_lon,\r\n                \"star_x\": star_x,\r\n                \"star_y\": star_y,\r\n                \"star_z\": star_z,\r\n                \"dir_lat\": dir_lat,\r\n                \"dir_lon\": dir_lon,\r\n                \"dir_x\": dir_x,\r\n                \"dir_y\": dir_y,\r\n                \"dir_z\": dir_z,\r\n                \"n_countries\": int(g[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_endpoints_used\": int(last[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_lastdirs_used\": int(len(dir_vectors)),\r\n                \"end_year_min\": int(min(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n                \"end_year_max\": int(max(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"cluster\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stability_summary(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    full_labels = clusters_df.set_index(\"country\").loc[countries, \"cluster\"].to_numpy()\r\n    window_rows = []\r\n    bootstrap_rows = []\r\n    for seed in range(10):\r\n        rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\r\n        idx = np.sort(rng.choice(len(countries), size=max(10, int(0.8 * len(countries))), replace=False))\r\n        Xs = X[np.ix_(idx, idx)]\r\n        if len(idx) <= len(set(full_labels[idx])):\r\n            continue\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\r\n            n_clusters=len(np.unique(full_labels)),\r\n            metric=\"precomputed\",\r\n            linkage=\"average\",\r\n        )\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(Xs)\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        bootstrap_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"seed\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    for seed in range(5):\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        window_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"window_id\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    bs = pd.DataFrame(bootstrap_rows)\r\n    wd = pd.DataFrame(window_rows)\r\n    summary = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        [\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        ]\r\n    )\r\n    return summary, wd, bs\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:50:25.420Z","type":"event_msg","payload":{"type":"agent_message","message":"**Stage 04 Performance Diagnosis**\n\n**1. Legacy: what existed**\nYes, the legacy notebook had all-country visualizations after the heading **“Hurricane Barycenter”**:\n\n- `Cell 97`: **“Mercator maps of country barycenters (\"stars\") for ALL countries”**\n  - plotted one point per country for all countries\n  - no sampling\n- `Cell 98`: **“Country barycenter trajectories (year-to-year great-circle paths)”**\n  - this is the section you named\n  - it supported `MODE = \"all\" | \"topN\" | \"subset\"`\n  - in the notebook as written, the default was `MODE = \"all\"`\n  - so legacy was configured to plot all trajectories, not a sample\n  - sampling/subsetting was explicit and optional, not implicit\n- `Cell 99`: publish-style all-country trajectory maps from per-country barycenter files\n  - also effectively all-country, not sampled\n\nSo the legacy notebook did have all-country trajectory plotting, and the specific trajectory section was implemented as a separate plotting block over `gc_state_long_demeaned.csv`, with explicit optional controls for `topN` or `subset`, but defaulting to `all`.\n\n**2. Current modular Stage 04**\nThe current modular implementation in [stage_04_clustering.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/pipelines/stage_04_clustering.py) generates:\n\n- `gc_state_long.csv`\n- `gc_features_country_flow.csv`\n- pairwise distance matrices\n- silhouette outputs\n- clusters\n- attractors\n- stability outputs\n\nIt does **not** generate trajectory figures or any all-country visualization inside Stage 04.\n\nThe current code path:\n- loads all country barycenter files into `state_long`\n- computes full clustering inputs for all countries\n- does not call any plotting function\n- does not write figures in the critical compute path\n\nSo:\n- all-country plotting logic is **missing** from modular Stage 04\n- full all-country state preparation **is present**\n- figure generation is **not** inside the critical path\n\n**3. Stage 04 cost centers**\nConceptually, current Stage 04 cost is dominated by:\n\n1. `input loading / file I/O`\n- reading all `barycenter_<ISO3>_*.csv` files in `load_state_long()`\n- moderate cost\n\n2. `feature engineering`\n- `compute_features(state_long)`\n- per country-flow sequential calculations over yearly trajectories\n- moderate cost\n\n3. `trajectory distance matrices`\n- `pairwise_distance_matrices(...)`\n- this is the main hotspot\n- pairwise nested loops over all country pairs\n- overlap checks and directional comparisons per pair\n- roughly quadratic in number of countries, with nontrivial per-pair work\n\n4. `clustering`\n- `select_clusters(...)`\n- moderate cost relative to matrix construction\n\n5. `attractors`\n- `compute_attractors(...)`\n- relatively small cost\n\n6. `stability calculations`\n- `stability_summary(...)`\n- currently not the main runtime cost in this modular version\n- important note: current implementation is simplified and likely cheaper than a full legacy-style stability procedure\n\n7. `plotting / figure generation`\n- in current modular Stage 04: essentially none\n\n8. `writing outputs`\n- writing several large CSV matrices is noticeable but secondary to matrix computation\n\n**4. Is all-country trajectory plotting a plausible major slowdown?**\n**No, likely secondary** in the current modular pipeline.\n\nMore precise answer:\n- In the **legacy notebook**, all-country plotting existed and could be nontrivial, especially `Cell 98` with great-circle interpolation and many segments.\n- In the **current modular Stage 04**, trajectory plotting is not being run at all.\n- Therefore it cannot be the main bottleneck of the current Stage 04 runtime.\n\nSo the answer for the modular pipeline is:\n- **No, likely secondary**\n- and in practice **not active at all**, because those figures are not generated in the current Stage 04 path\n\n**5. Legacy vs modular behavior**\n**Legacy**\n- had all-country barycenter stars map\n- had all-country trajectory maps\n- trajectory plotting section had explicit `MODE` controls, but default was `all`\n- plotting lived as separate notebook cells after the main clustering products\n\n**Modular now**\n- no Stage 04 plotting\n- full all-country state preparation still happens\n- clustering uses full country universe\n- no explicit sampling/subsetting for clustering inputs\n\n**Is modular doing extra plotting work?**\n- No\n\n**Is modular doing extra plotting-preparation work that legacy did not?**\n- Not specifically for plotting\n- But modular Stage 04 still prepares full all-country state for clustering, which legacy also needed for its all-country clustering workflow\n\n**6. More likely Stage 04 bottlenecks**\nThe strongest bottleneck is **pairwise distance matrix construction** in [clustering.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/clustering.py), specifically [pairwise_distance_matrices](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/clustering.py).\n\nWhy:\n- nested country-pair loops\n- repeated set intersections for overlap years\n- repeated per-pair extraction from pandas objects\n- repeated bearing calculations inside overlap-step loops\n- this scales badly with broad all-country coverage\n\nSecondary bottlenecks:\n- writing large `Dpos`, `Ddir`, `Dcombo`, `overlap` CSVs\n- `compute_features()` over all country-flows\n\nNot the main bottleneck:\n- attractors\n- current clustering selection itself\n- current plotting, because none is executed\n\n**7. Highest-impact safe optimizations for Stage 04**\n\n**Safe optimizations that should preserve canonical outputs**\n1. Pre-index `state_long` into compact NumPy arrays per country-flow before pairwise loops.\n- Expected speedup: high\n- Risk: medium\n- Result-change risk: low if formulas stay identical\n\n2. Optimize `pairwise_distance_matrices()` to avoid repeated pandas slicing and repeated `set(...)` construction inside the nested loops.\n- Expected speedup: very high\n- Risk: medium\n- Result-change risk: low\n\n3. Reuse precomputed yearly step/bearing structures per country before pairwise directional comparisons.\n- Expected speedup: high\n- Risk: medium\n- Result-change risk: low\n\n4. Avoid computing all four matrices through repeated Python object conversions when arrays can be filled directly and wrapped into DataFrames only once.\n- Expected speedup: medium\n- Risk: low to medium\n- Result-change risk: low\n\n5. Delay DataFrame/CSV materialization until after numeric computation is complete.\n- Expected speedup: medium\n- Risk: low\n- Result-change risk: none\n\n**Optional reductions in exploratory plotting scope**\n- If trajectory figures are later restored, then yes, make sampling explicit:\n  - `topN` or curated subset for exploratory maps\n  - keep full-country plotting only for optional publish or diagnostic outputs\n- This would reduce plotting cost, but it is not relevant to the current bottleneck because plotting is not active now\n\n**Risky methodological changes**\n- reducing country universe for clustering\n- changing overlap thresholds\n- changing distance penalties for missing overlap\n- changing `alpha_pos`\n- changing clustering model or silhouette selection logic\n- changing stability methodology\n\nThose would alter clustering results, so they are not performance-only optimizations.\n\n**8. Specific conclusion**\nYou should **not** prioritize reducing all-country trajectory plotting as the Stage 04 performance fix, because the current modular Stage 04 is not spending its time there.\n\nFinal answer:\n- Legacy did include all-country trajectory plotting, and it defaulted to plotting **all**, not a sample.\n- Current modular Stage 04 does **not** plot trajectories at all.\n- Therefore the current bottleneck is **not** all-country trajectory plotting.\n- The real bottleneck is the **full pairwise trajectory-distance computation over all countries**, plus associated pandas-heavy overlap and direction logic.\n- If trajectory plotting is restored later, it should probably be treated as **optional/exploratory** and allowed to use `topN/subset` controls, but that is not the main performance issue today.","phase":"final_answer"}}
