{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:53:11.008Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_nfhCiXiuuci3NjHjTDO0S7TR","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.1 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import (\r\n    adjusted_rand_score,\r\n    normalized_mutual_info_score,\r\n    silhouette_score,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\nPERIODS_5 = [\r\n    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\r\n    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\r\n    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\r\n    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\r\n    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat_r)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\n\r\ndef xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\r\n    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\r\n    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\r\n    return lat, lon\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\r\n    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\r\n    return np.arccos(dot)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\r\n    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\r\n        country = infer_country(fp)\r\n        if not country:\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\r\n            continue\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\r\n            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n            weight_col = (\r\n                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\r\n            )\r\n            if flow == \"imports\":\r\n                weight_col = (\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\r\n                )\r\n            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\r\n            sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\r\n            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\r\n            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for (country, flow), g in state_long.groupby([\"country\", \"flow\"], sort=True):\r\n        g = g.sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(float)\r\n        n_obs = len(g)\r\n        if n_obs == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        if n_obs > 1:\r\n            step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\r\n            step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\r\n            path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\r\n            net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\r\n            net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\r\n            bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\r\n            ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\r\n            mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\r\n            mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\r\n            bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n            bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\r\n            turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\r\n            turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\r\n            mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\r\n            step_km = np.array([])\r\n            bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\r\n        row = {\r\n            \"country\": country,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"n_obs\": n_obs,\r\n            \"start_year\": int(g[\"year\"].min()),\r\n            \"end_year\": int(g[\"year\"].max()),\r\n            \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\r\n            \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\r\n            \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\r\n            \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\r\n            \"straightness\": straightness,\r\n            \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\r\n            \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\r\n            \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\r\n        }\r\n        for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\r\n            sub = g[(g[\"year\"] >= start) & (g[\"year\"] <= end)]\r\n            row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(len(sub))\r\n            if len(sub):\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(sub[\"x\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(sub[\"y\"].mean())\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(sub[\"z\"].mean())\r\n            else:\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\r\n        for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\r\n            a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\r\n            a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\r\n                rad = km = np.nan\r\n            else:\r\n                rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\r\n                km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\r\n        rows.append(row)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\r\n    state = {\r\n        c: sub[sub[\"country\"] == c].sort_values(\"year\").set_index(\"year\")[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"lat\", \"lon\"]]\r\n        for c in countries\r\n    }\r\n    n = len(countries)\r\n    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\r\n        for j, b in enumerate(countries):\r\n            if i >= j:\r\n                continue\r\n            ya = state[a].index.to_numpy()\r\n            yb = state[b].index.to_numpy()\r\n            overlap_years = sorted(set(ya).intersection(set(yb)))\r\n            if len(overlap_years) >= min_overlap_years:\r\n                xa = state[a].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                xb = state[b].loc[overlap_years, [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\r\n            else:\r\n                pos = np.nan\r\n            steps_a_years = [y for y in ya[:-1] if y + 1 in ya]\r\n            steps_b_years = [y for y in yb[:-1] if y + 1 in yb]\r\n            overlap_steps = sorted(set(steps_a_years).intersection(set(steps_b_years)))\r\n            if len(overlap_steps) >= min_overlap_steps:\r\n                dirs = []\r\n                for y in overlap_steps:\r\n                    aa0 = state[a].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    aa1 = state[a].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb0 = state[b].loc[y, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    bb1 = state[b].loc[y + 1, [\"lat\", \"lon\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n                    ba = initial_bearing_deg(aa0[0], aa0[1], aa1[0], aa1[1])\r\n                    bb = initial_bearing_deg(bb0[0], bb0[1], bb1[0], bb1[1])\r\n                    diff = abs(ba - bb)\r\n                    diff = min(diff, 360 - diff)\r\n                    dirs.append(diff / 180.0)\r\n                direc = float(np.mean(dirs))\r\n            else:\r\n                direc = np.nan\r\n            if np.isnan(pos):\r\n                pos = 3.0\r\n            if np.isnan(direc):\r\n                direc = 1.0\r\n            combo = alpha_pos * pos + (1 - alpha_pos) * direc\r\n            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\r\n            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\r\n            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = len(overlap_years)\r\n    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\r\n    return (\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n        pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx),\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    k_values = []\r\n    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\r\n    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\r\n            score = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\r\n    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\r\n    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\r\n    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": countries,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"cluster\": labels,\r\n            \"k_selected\": best_k,\r\n            \"silhouette_selected\": float(sil[sil[\"k\"] == best_k][\"silhouette\"].iloc[0]),\r\n            \"missing_penalty_used\": 3.0,\r\n            \"linkage\": \"average\",\r\n            \"alpha_pos\": 0.7,\r\n            \"min_overlap_years\": 10,\r\n            \"min_overlap_steps\": 8,\r\n        }\r\n    ).sort_values([\"cluster\", \"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    return sil, clusters\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_attractors(state_long: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    merged = sub.merge(clusters_df[[\"country\", \"cluster\"]], on=\"country\", how=\"inner\")\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for cluster, g in merged.groupby(\"cluster\"):\r\n        last = g.sort_values(\"year\").groupby(\"country\").tail(1).copy()\r\n        star_x = float(last[\"x\"].mean())\r\n        star_y = float(last[\"y\"].mean())\r\n        star_z = float(last[\"z\"].mean())\r\n        norm = math.sqrt(star_x**2 + star_y**2 + star_z**2)\r\n        star_x, star_y, star_z = star_x / norm, star_y / norm, star_z / norm\r\n        star_lat, star_lon = xyz_to_latlon(star_x, star_y, star_z)\r\n\r\n        dir_vectors = []\r\n        end_years = []\r\n        for country, gc in g.groupby(\"country\"):\r\n            gc = gc.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n            if len(gc) < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            a = gc.iloc[-2][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            b = gc.iloc[-1][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            dv = b - a\r\n            if np.linalg.norm(dv) == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            dir_vectors.append(dv / np.linalg.norm(dv))\r\n            end_years.append(int(gc[\"year\"].max()))\r\n        if dir_vectors:\r\n            dv = np.mean(np.vstack(dir_vectors), axis=0)\r\n            dv = dv / np.linalg.norm(dv)\r\n            dir_lat, dir_lon = xyz_to_latlon(dv[0], dv[1], dv[2])\r\n            dir_x, dir_y, dir_z = dv.tolist()\r\n        else:\r\n            dir_lat = dir_lon = dir_x = dir_y = dir_z = np.nan\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"cluster\": int(cluster),\r\n                \"attractor_type\": \"endpoint\",\r\n                \"star_lat\": star_lat,\r\n                \"star_lon\": star_lon,\r\n                \"star_x\": star_x,\r\n                \"star_y\": star_y,\r\n                \"star_z\": star_z,\r\n                \"dir_lat\": dir_lat,\r\n                \"dir_lon\": dir_lon,\r\n                \"dir_x\": dir_x,\r\n                \"dir_y\": dir_y,\r\n                \"dir_z\": dir_z,\r\n                \"n_countries\": int(g[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_endpoints_used\": int(last[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_lastdirs_used\": int(len(dir_vectors)),\r\n                \"end_year_min\": int(min(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n                \"end_year_max\": int(max(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"cluster\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stability_summary(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    full_labels = clusters_df.set_index(\"country\").loc[countries, \"cluster\"].to_numpy()\r\n    window_rows = []\r\n    bootstrap_rows = []\r\n    for seed in range(10):\r\n        rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\r\n        idx = np.sort(rng.choice(len(countries), size=max(10, int(0.8 * len(countries))), replace=False))\r\n        Xs = X[np.ix_(idx, idx)]\r\n        if len(idx) <= len(set(full_labels[idx])):\r\n            continue\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\r\n            n_clusters=len(np.unique(full_labels)),\r\n            metric=\"precomputed\",\r\n            linkage=\"average\",\r\n        )\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(Xs)\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        bootstrap_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"seed\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    for seed in range(5):\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        window_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"window_id\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    bs = pd.DataFrame(bootstrap_rows)\r\n    wd = pd.DataFrame(window_rows)\r\n    summary = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        [\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"window_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(wd[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not wd.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_ARI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"ARI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_mean\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].mean()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_std\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].std(ddof=0)) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_min\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].min()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n                \"bootstrap_NMI_vs_full_max\": float(bs[\"NMI_vs_full\"].max()) if not bs.empty else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        ]\r\n    )\r\n    return summary, wd, bs\r\n"}}

idx_a = np.fromiter((ta.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\n+                idx_b = np.fromiter((tb.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\n+                xa = ta.xyz[idx_a]\n+                xb = tb.xyz[idx_b]\n                 pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\n             else:\n                 pos = {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T15:54:43.315Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_jSF5k1vLZ5PPzCZRVq5w0JjZ","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.7 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import (\r\n    adjusted_rand_score,\r\n    normalized_mutual_info_score,\r\n    silhouette_score,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\nPERIODS_5 = [\r\n    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass FlowTrajectoryData:\r\n    country: str\r\n    years: np.ndarray\r\n    xyz: np.ndarray\r\n    lat: np.ndarray\r\n    lon: np.ndarray\r\n    year_to_idx: dict[int, int]\r\n    step_years: np.ndarray\r\n    step_bearings: np.ndarray\r\n    step_year_to_idx: dict[int, int]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\r\n    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\r\n    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\r\n    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\r\n    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat_r)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\n\r\ndef xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\r\n    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\r\n    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\r\n    return lat, lon\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\r\n    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\r\n    return np.arccos(dot)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\r\n    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, FlowTrajectoryData]]:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\r\n    prepared = {}\r\n    for country in countries:\r\n        g = sub[sub[\"country\"] == country].sort_values(\"year\")\r\n        years = g[\"year\"].to_numpy(dtype=int)\r\n        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        year_to_idx = {int(y): i for i, y in enumerate(years)}\r\n        if len(years) > 1:\r\n            step_mask = (years[1:] == years[:-1] + 1)\r\n            step_years = years[:-1][step_mask]\r\n            step_bearings = initial_bearing_deg(\r\n                lat[:-1][step_mask],\r\n                lon[:-1][step_mask],\r\n                lat[1:][step_mask],\r\n                lon[1:][step_mask],\r\n            ).astype(float)\r\n        else:\r\n            step_years = np.empty(0, dtype=int)\r\n            step_bearings = np.empty(0, dtype=float)\r\n        prepared[country] = FlowTrajectoryData(\r\n            country=country,\r\n            years=years,\r\n            xyz=xyz,\r\n            lat=lat,\r\n            lon=lon,\r\n            year_to_idx=year_to_idx,\r\n            step_years=step_years,\r\n            step_bearings=step_bearings,\r\n            step_year_to_idx={int(y): i for i, y in enumerate(step_years)},\r\n        )\r\n    return countries, prepared\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\r\n        country = infer_country(fp)\r\n        if not country:\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\r\n            continue\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\r\n            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n            weight_col = (\r\n                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\r\n            )\r\n            if flow == \"imports\":\r\n                weight_col = (\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\r\n                )\r\n            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\r\n            sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\r\n            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\r\n            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        countries, prepared = _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long, flow)\r\n        for country in countries:\r\n            traj = prepared[country]\r\n            years = traj.years\r\n            xyz = traj.xyz\r\n            lat = traj.lat\r\n            lon = traj.lon\r\n            n_obs = len(years)\r\n        if n_obs == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        if n_obs > 1:\r\n            step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\r\n            step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\r\n            path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\r\n            net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\r\n            net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\r\n            bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\r\n            ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\r\n            mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\r\n            mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\r\n            bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n            bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\r\n            turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\r\n            turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\r\n            mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\r\n            step_km = np.array([])\r\n            bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\r\n        row = {\r\n            \"country\": country,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"n_obs\": n_obs,\r\n            \"start_year\": int(years.min()),\r\n            \"end_year\": int(years.max()),\r\n            \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\r\n            \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\r\n            \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\r\n            \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\r\n            \"straightness\": straightness,\r\n            \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n            \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\r\n            \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\r\n            \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\r\n        }\r\n        for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\r\n            mask = (years >= start) & (years <= end)\r\n            row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(mask.sum())\r\n            if mask.any():\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 0]))\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 1]))\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 2]))\r\n            else:\r\n                row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\r\n                row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\r\n        for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\r\n            a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\r\n            a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n            if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\r\n                rad = km = np.nan\r\n            else:\r\n                rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\r\n                km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\r\n            row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\r\n        rows.append(row)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\r\n    countries, state = _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long, flow)\r\n    n = len(countries)\r\n    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\r\n        ta = state[a]\r\n        for j in range(i + 1, n):\r\n            b = countries[j]\r\n            tb = state[b]\r\n            overlap_years = np.intersect1d(ta.years, tb.years, assume_unique=True)\r\n            n_overlap_years = int(len(overlap_years))\r\n            if n_overlap_years >= min_overlap_years:\r\n                idx_a = np.fromiter((ta.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\r\n                idx_b = np.fromiter((tb.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\r\n                xa = ta.xyz[idx_a]\r\n                xb = tb.xyz[idx_b]\r\n                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\r\n            else:\r\n                pos = np.nan\r\n            overlap_steps = np.intersect1d(ta.step_years, tb.step_years, assume_unique=True)\r\n            n_overlap_steps = int(len(overlap_steps))\r\n            if n_overlap_steps >= min_overlap_steps:\r\n                idx_a = np.fromiter((ta.step_year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_steps), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_steps)\r\n                idx_b = np.fromiter((tb.step_year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_steps), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_steps)\r\n                ba = ta.step_bearings[idx_a]\r\n                bb = tb.step_bearings[idx_b]\r\n                diff = np.abs(ba - bb)\r\n                diff = np.minimum(diff, 360.0 - diff)\r\n                direc = float(np.mean(diff / 180.0))\r\n            else:\r\n                direc = np.nan\r\n            if np.isnan(pos):\r\n                pos = 3.0\r\n            if np.isnan(direc):\r\n                direc = 1.0\r\n            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\r\n            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\r\n            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = n_overlap_years\r\n    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\r\n    Dcombo = alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir\r\n    dpos_df = pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    ddir_df = pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    dcombo_df = pd.DataFrame(Dcombo, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    dover_df = pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    return (dpos_df, ddir_df, dcombo_df, dover_df)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    k_values = []\r\n    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\r\n    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\r\n            score = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\r\n    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\r\n    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\r\n    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": countries,\r\n"}}

`years`\n  - `xyz`\n  - `lat/lon`\n  - `year -> row index`\n  - consecutive-step years\n  - precomputed step bearings\n- In [clustering.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/clustering.py#L175) I updated `compute_features(...)` to reuse the compact prepared structures.\n- In [clustering.py](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/src/geoanalisis/services/clustering.py#L252) I rewrote `pairwise_distance_matrices(...)` to:\n  - avoid repeated pandas slicing\n  - avoid repeated `set(...)` intersections\n  - avoid per-pair `loc[...]` object construction\n  - use `np.intersect1d(...)` plus precomputed index maps and bearings\n  - materialize DataFrames only after numeric matrices are complete\n\nNo methodology changed:\n- same country universe\n- same overlap thresholds\n- same penalties\n- same `alpha_pos`\n- same clustering and stability logic\n\n**Runtime**\n- Old baseline runtime: `5508.16s` from [progress.log](C:/Python/Geoanalisis/runs/trade_s2_v001/2026-03-10_006_baseline-freeze/logs/progress.log)\n- New Stage 04-only rerun:\n  - run_id: `2026-03-11_004_stage04-opt`\n  - runtime: `34.714s`\n\nThat is a reduction of about `99.37%`, or roughly `159x` faster.\n\n**Output consistency**\nI compared the new Stage 04 outputs against the baseline run `2026-03-10_006_baseline-freeze`.\n\nResult:\n- all checked canonical Stage 04 outputs were **exactly identical**\n- this includes:\n  - {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T17:55:22.848Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_qmTUY2uSn4AllRUSMi4fy0O3","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.5 seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport duckdb\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import LineString, Point, box\r\nfrom matplotlib.lines import Line2D\r\n\r\nfrom geoanalisis.config import ProjectConfig\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass BarycenterArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n    global_barycenter_path: Path\r\n    usa_trade_path: Path\r\n    china_trade_path: Path\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass CountryBarycenterResult:\r\n    all_codes: list[str]\r\n    written: dict[str, Path]\r\n    data_by_country: dict[str, pd.DataFrame]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_barycenter_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> BarycenterArtifacts:\r\n    data_dir = stage_dir / \"data\"\r\n    fig_dir = stage_dir / \"fig\"\r\n    return BarycenterArtifacts(\r\n        stage_dir=stage_dir,\r\n        data_dir=data_dir,\r\n        fig_dir=fig_dir,\r\n        global_barycenter_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_imports_exports_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n        usa_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n        china_trade_path=data_dir / \"barycenter_china_trade_1976_2023.csv\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _connect_duckdb():\r\n    con = duckdb.connect()\r\n    con.execute(\"PRAGMA threads=8\")\r\n    return con\r\n\r\n\r\ndef weighted_mean(values: pd.Series, weights: pd.Series) -> float:\r\n    w = weights.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    v = values.to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n    s = np.nansum(w)\r\n    if s == 0 or np.isnan(s):\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    return float(np.nansum(v * w) / s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef truncate_codes(codes, max_codes: int = 50) -> str:\r\n    codes = list(codes) if codes is not None else []\r\n    if not codes:\r\n        return \"\"\r\n    if len(codes) <= max_codes:\r\n        return \";\".join(codes)\r\n    return \";\".join(codes[:max_codes]) + f\";...(plus {len(codes) - max_codes} more)\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_centroids(centroids_path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    centroids = pd.read_csv(centroids_path, usecols=[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n    centroids[\"code\"] = centroids[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n    return centroids.dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"]).copy()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_global_barycenters(\r\n    config: ProjectConfig, centroids: pd.DataFrame, output_path: Path\r\n) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    con = _connect_duckdb()\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not fpath.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n        exports_df = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT exporter AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS exports_value\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY exporter\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        imports_df = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT importer AS code, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS imports_value\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY importer\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        exports_df[\"code\"] = exports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n        imports_df[\"code\"] = imports_df[\"code\"].astype(str)\r\n        ex = exports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        im = imports_df.merge(centroids, on=\"code\", how=\"left\")\r\n        ex_unmatched = ex[\"lat\"].isna() | ex[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n        im_unmatched = im[\"lat\"].isna() | im[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n        exm = ex.loc[~ex_unmatched].copy()\r\n        imm = im.loc[~im_unmatched].copy()\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"year\": year,\r\n                \"lat_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lat\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lon_exports\": weighted_mean(exm[\"lon\"], exm[\"exports_value\"]) if len(exm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lat_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lat\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"lon_imports\": weighted_mean(imm[\"lon\"], imm[\"imports_value\"]) if len(imm) else np.nan,\r\n                \"total_exports_value_matched\": float(exm[\"exports_value\"].sum()) if len(exm) else 0.0,\r\n                \"total_imports_value_matched\": float(imm[\"imports_value\"].sum()) if len(imm) else 0.0,\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_total\": len(ex),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_total\": len(im),\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_matched\": int((~ex_unmatched).sum()),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_matched\": int((~im_unmatched).sum()),\r\n                \"n_exporter_nodes_unmatched\": int(ex_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                \"n_importer_nodes_unmatched\": int(im_unmatched.sum()),\r\n                \"unmatched_exporter_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                    ex.loc[ex_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                ),\r\n                \"unmatched_importer_codes_sample\": truncate_codes(\r\n                    im.loc[im_unmatched, \"code\"].unique().tolist()\r\n                ),\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    con.close()\r\n    out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    out.to_csv(output_path, index=False)\r\n    return out\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_country_barycenters(\r\n    config: ProjectConfig,\r\n    centroids: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    output_dir: Path,\r\n) -> CountryBarycenterResult:\r\n    con = _connect_duckdb()\r\n    centroids_lookup = centroids.rename(columns={\"code\": \"partner\"}).copy()\r\n    rows_by_country: dict[str, list[dict[str, object]]] = {}\r\n    for year in range(config.trade_year_start, config.trade_year_end + 1):\r\n        fpath = config.dataset_trade_dir / f\"S2_{year}.parquet\"\r\n        if not fpath.exists():\r\n            continue\r\n        ex_all = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT exporter AS country, importer AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY exporter, importer\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        im_all = con.execute(\r\n            f\"\"\"\r\n            SELECT importer AS country, exporter AS partner, SUM({config.trade_value_column}) AS w\r\n            FROM read_parquet('{fpath}')\r\n            GROUP BY importer, exporter\r\n            \"\"\"\r\n        ).df()\r\n        ex_all[\"country\"] = ex_all[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n        ex_all[\"partner\"] = ex_all[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n        im_all[\"country\"] = im_all[\"country\"].astype(str)\r\n        im_all[\"partner\"] = im_all[\"partner\"].astype(str)\r\n\r\n        ex_all = ex_all.merge(centroids_lookup, on=\"partner\", how=\"left\")\r\n        im_all = im_all.merge(centroids_lookup, on=\"partner\", how=\"left\")\r\n\r\n        def summarize_flow(df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n            unmatched = df[\"lat\"].isna() | df[\"lon\"].isna()\r\n            work = df.assign(\r\n                matched=(~unmatched).astype(int),\r\n                unmatched=unmatched.astype(int),\r\n                w_lat=np.where(unmatched, 0.0, df[\"w\"] * df[\"lat\"]),\r\n                w_lon=np.where(unmatched, 0.0, df[\"w\"] * df[\"lon\"]),\r\n            )\r\n            summary = (\r\n                work.groupby(\"country\", sort=True)\r\n                .agg(\r\n                    w_sum=(\"w\", \"sum\"),\r\n                    w_lat_sum=(\"w_lat\", \"sum\"),\r\n                    w_lon_sum=(\"w_lon\", \"sum\"),\r\n                    n_total=(\"partner\", \"size\"),\r\n                    n_unmatched=(\"unmatched\", \"sum\"),\r\n                )\r\n                .reset_index()\r\n            )\r\n            summary[f\"lat_{flow}\"] = np.where(\r\n                summary[\"w_sum\"] > 0,\r\n                summary[\"w_lat_sum\"] / summary[\"w_sum\"],\r\n                np.nan,\r\n            )\r\n            summary[f\"lon_{flow}\"] = np.where(\r\n                summary[\"w_sum\"] > 0,\r\n                summary[\"w_lon_sum\"] / summary[\"w_sum\"],\r\n                np.nan,\r\n            )\r\n            summary[f\"total_{flow}_value_final_matched\"] = summary[\"w_sum\"].astype(float)\r\n            summary[f\"n_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_total\"] = summary[\"n_total\"].astype(int)\r\n            summary[f\"n_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_unmatched\"] = summary[\"n_unmatched\"].astype(int)\r\n            summary[f\"unmatched_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_sample\"] = (\r\n                work.loc[unmatched]\r\n                .groupby(\"country\", sort=True)[\"partner\"]\r\n                .agg(lambda s: truncate_codes(pd.unique(s).tolist()))\r\n                .reindex(summary[\"country\"])\r\n                .fillna(\"\")\r\n                .to_list()\r\n            )\r\n            keep_cols = [\r\n                \"country\",\r\n                f\"lat_{flow}\",\r\n                f\"lon_{flow}\",\r\n                f\"total_{flow}_value_final_matched\",\r\n                f\"n_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_total\",\r\n                f\"n_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_unmatched\",\r\n                f\"unmatched_{'export' if flow == 'exports' else 'import'}_partners_sample\",\r\n            ]\r\n            return summary[keep_cols]\r\n\r\n        ex_summary = summarize_flow(ex_all, \"exports\")\r\n        im_summary = summarize_flow(im_all, \"imports\")\r\n        year_summary = ex_summary.merge(im_summary, on=\"country\", how=\"outer\")\r\n\r\n        for row in year_summary.to_dict(orient=\"records\"):\r\n            code = str(row[\"country\"])\r\n            def _nz(value, default=0.0):\r\n                return default if pd.isna(value) else value\r\n            rows_by_country.setdefault(code, []).append(\r\n                {\r\n                    \"year\": year,\r\n                    \"lat_exports\": row.get(\"lat_exports\", np.nan),\r\n                    \"lon_exports\": row.get(\"lon_exports\", np.nan),\r\n                    \"lat_imports\": row.get(\"lat_imports\", np.nan),\r\n                    \"lon_imports\": row.get(\"lon_imports\", np.nan),\r\n                    \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": float(_nz(row.get(\"total_exports_value_final_matched\", 0.0))),\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": float(_nz(row.get(\"total_imports_value_final_matched\", 0.0))),\r\n                    \"n_export_partners_total\": int(_nz(row.get(\"n_export_partners_total\", 0), 0)),\r\n                    \"n_import_partners_total\": int(_nz(row.get(\"n_import_partners_total\", 0), 0)),\r\n                    \"n_export_partners_unmatched\": int(_nz(row.get(\"n_export_partners_unmatched\", 0), 0)),\r\n                    \"n_import_partners_unmatched\": int(_nz(row.get(\"n_import_partners_unmatched\", 0), 0)),\r\n                    \"unmatched_export_partners_sample\": row.get(\"unmatched_export_partners_sample\", \"\") or \"\",\r\n                    \"unmatched_import_partners_sample\": row.get(\"unmatched_import_partners_sample\", \"\") or \"\",\r\n                }\r\n            )\r\n    con.close()\r\n    written = {}\r\n    data_by_country = {}\r\n    all_codes = sorted(rows_by_country)\r\n    for code in all_codes:\r\n        rows = rows_by_country[code]\r\n        out = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n        out_path = output_dir / f\"barycenter_{code}_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n        out.to_csv(out_path, index=False)\r\n        written[code] = out_path\r\n        data_by_country[code] = out\r\n    return CountryBarycenterResult(all_codes=all_codes, written=written, data_by_country=data_by_country)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef write_legacy_special_country_trade_file(\r\n    source_path: Path,\r\n    output_path: Path,\r\n    country_prefix: str,\r\n) -> Path:\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(source_path)\r\n    prefix = country_prefix.lower()\r\n    rename_map = {\r\n        \"lat_exports\": f\"lat_{prefix}_exports\",\r\n        \"lon_exports\": f\"lon_{prefix}_exports\",\r\n        \"lat_imports\": f\"lat_{prefix}_imports\",\r\n        \"lon_imports\": f\"lon_{prefix}_imports\",\r\n        \"total_exports_value_final_matched\": f\"total_{prefix}_exports_value_final_matched\",\r\n        \"total_imports_value_final_matched\": f\"total_{prefix}_imports_value_final_matched\",\r\n    }\r\n    cols = []\r\n    for col in df.columns:\r\n        cols.append(rename_map.get(col, col))\r\n    df.columns = cols\r\n    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False)\r\n    return output_path\r\n\r\n\r\ndef render_global_maps(global_df: pd.DataFrame, shapefile_path: Path, fig_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(shapefile_path)\r\n    if \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n        world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]].dropna().copy(),\r\n        geometry=[\r\n            Point(xy)\r\n            for xy in zip(\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lon_exports\"],\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"])[\"lat_exports\"],\r\n            )\r\n        ],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        global_df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]].dropna().copy(),\r\n        geometry=[\r\n            Point(xy)\r\n            for xy in zip(\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lon_imports\"],\r\n                global_df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"])[\"lat_imports\"],\r\n            )\r\n        ],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    if exports.empty or imports.empty:\r\n        return\r\n    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    crs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n    world_p = world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    exports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    imports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    exports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    imports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=crs_med,\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n    buffer = 1.2e6\r\n    xlim = (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer)\r\n    ylim = (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n    def render(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, basename):\r\n        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n        world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n        path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n        points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n        ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\r\n        ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\r\n        ax.text(0.02, 0.02, footer_label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, ha=\"left\", va=\"bottom\")\r\n        ax.set_axis_off()\r\n        plt.tight_layout()\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        fig.savefig(fig_dir / f\"{basename}.pdf\", bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n        plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    render(imports_p, imports_path_p, \"red\", \"Global imports barycenter\", \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean\")\r\n    render(\r\n        exports_p,\r\n        exports_path_p,\r\n        \"dodgerblue\",\r\n        \"Global exports barycenter\",\r\n        \"barycenter_global_exports_mediterranean\",\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _load_world_projected(shapefile_path: Path, crs_med: CRS) -> gpd.GeoDataFrame:\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(shapefile_path)\r\n    if \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n        world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n    return world.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _load_barycenter_points_from_df(\r\n    df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    lat_exports_col: str,\r\n    lon_exports_col: str,\r\n    lat_imports_col: str,\r\n    lon_imports_col: str,\r\n) -> tuple[gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame]:\r\n    df = df.dropna(subset=[lat_exports_col, lon_exports_col, lat_imports_col, lon_imports_col]).copy()\r\n    exports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_exports_col, lon_exports_col]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_exports_col], df[lat_exports_col])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    imports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_imports_col, lon_imports_col]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_imports_col], df[lat_imports_col])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    return exports, imports\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _load_barycenter_points(\r\n    csv_path: Path,\r\n    lat_exports_col: str,\r\n    lon_exports_col: str,\r\n    lat_imports_col: str,\r\n    lon_imports_col: str,\r\n) -> tuple[gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame]:\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(csv_path).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    return _load_barycenter_points_from_df(\r\n        df,\r\n        lat_exports_col,\r\n        lon_exports_col,\r\n        lat_imports_col,\r\n        lon_imports_col,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _build_projected_paths(\r\n    exports: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    imports: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    crs_med: CRS,\r\n) -> tuple[gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame, gpd.GeoDataFrame]:\r\n    exports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(exports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    imports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(imports.geometry.tolist())], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    return (\r\n        exports.to_crs(crs_med),\r\n        imports.to_crs(crs_med),\r\n        exports_path.to_crs(crs_med),\r\n        imports_path.to_crs(crs_med),\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _global_extent_from_global_barycenters(global_df: pd.DataFrame, crs_med: CRS, buffer: float = 1.2e6) -> tuple[tuple[float, float], tuple[float, float]]:\r\n    exports, imports = _load_barycenter_points_from_df(\r\n        global_df,\r\n        \"lat_exports\",\r\n        \"lon_exports\",\r\n        \"lat_imports\",\r\n        \"lon_imports\",\r\n    )\r\n    exports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    imports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_med)\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([exports_p.geometry, imports_p.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=crs_med,\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n    return (minx - buffer, maxx + buffer), (miny - buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _selected_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted: gpd.GeoDataFrame, years: set[int], dx: int, dy: int, fontsize: int) -> None:\r\n    for _, row in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        year = int(row[\"year\"])\r\n        if year in years:\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                row.geometry.x + dx,\r\n                row.geometry.y + dy,\r\n                str(year),\r\n                fontsize=fontsize,\r\n                color=\"black\",\r\n                alpha=0.8 if fontsize <= 5 else 0.9,\r\n                zorder=10,\r\n            )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _render_single_footer_map(\r\n    world_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    points_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    color: str,\r\n    footer_label: str,\r\n    out_png: Path,\r\n    out_pdf: Path,\r\n    xlim: tuple[float, float],\r\n    ylim: tuple[float, float],\r\n    label_years: set[int],\r\n    dx: int,\r\n    dy: int,\r\n    fontsize: int,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n    _selected_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, dx, dy, fontsize)\r\n    ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\r\n    ax.text(0.02, 0.02, footer_label, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, color=\"black\", ha=\"left\", va=\"bottom\")\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _render_combined_country_map(\r\n    world_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    exports_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    imports_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    exports_path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    imports_path_p: gpd.GeoDataFrame,\r\n    xlim: tuple[float, float],\r\n    ylim: tuple[float, float],\r\n    title_prefix: str,\r\n    out_png: Path,\r\n    out_pdf: Path,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n    imports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"red\", alpha=0.25, zorder=3)\r\n    exports_path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.0, color=\"dodgerblue\", alpha=0.25, zorder=4)\r\n    imports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"red\", markersize=8, zorder=5)\r\n    exports_p.plot(ax=ax, color=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=8, zorder=6)\r\n    legend_elements = [\r\n        Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=f\"{title_prefix} imports barycenter (partners)\", markerfacecolor=\"red\", markersize=6),\r\n        Line2D([0], [0], marker=\"o\", color=\"w\", label=f\"{title_prefix} exports barycenter (partners)\", markerfacecolor=\"dodgerblue\", markersize=6),\r\n    ]\r\n    ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc=\"lower left\", frameon=False, fontsize=9)\r\n    years = sorted(set(exports_p[\"year\"].astype(int)).union(set(imports_p[\"year\"].astype(int))))\r\n    ymin, ymax = min(years), max(years)\r\n    label_years = set(range((ymin // 10) * 10, ymax + 1, 10))\r\n    label_years.update([ymin, ymax])\r\n    _selected_year_labels(ax, imports_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, 35000, 35000, 8)\r\n    _selected_year_labels(ax, exports_p.sort_values(\"year\"), label_years, 35000, 35000, 8)\r\n    ax.set_xlim(*xlim)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(*ylim)\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef render_legacy_special_maps(\r\n    global_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    usa_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    china_df: pd.DataFrame,\r\n    shapefile_path: Path,\r\n    fig_dir: Path,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    crs_med = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=35 +lon_0=18 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n    world_p = _load_world_projected(shapefile_path, crs_med)\r\n    xlim, ylim = _global_extent_from_global_barycenters(global_df, crs_med, buffer=1.2e6)\r\n\r\n    global_exports, global_imports = _load_barycenter_points_from_df(\r\n        global_df,\r\n        \"lat_exports\",\r\n        \"lon_exports\",\r\n        \"lat_imports\",\r\n        \"lon_imports\",\r\n    )\r\n    global_exports_p, global_imports_p, global_exports_path_p, global_imports_path_p = _build_projected_paths(\r\n        global_exports,\r\n        global_imports,\r\n        crs_med,\r\n    )\r\n    global_label_years = {1977, 1980, 1985, 1994, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2023}\r\n    _render_single_footer_map(\r\n        world_p,\r\n        global_imports_p,\r\n        global_imports_path_p,\r\n        \"red\",\r\n        \"Global imports barycenter\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.png\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_global_imports_mediterranean.pdf\",\r\n        xlim,\r\n        ylim,\r\n        global_label_years,\r\n        20000,\r\n        20000,\r\n        5,\r\n    )\r\n    _render_single_footer_map(\r\n        world_p,\r\n        global_exports_p,\r\n        global_exports_path_p,\r\n        \"dodgerblue\",\r\n        \"Global exports barycenter\",\r\n        fig_dir /    usa_exports,\r\n        usa_imports,\r\n        crs_med,\r\n    )\r\n    _render_combined_country_map(\r\n        world_p,\r\n        usa_exports_p,\r\n        usa_imports_p,\r\n        usa_exports_path_p,\r\n        usa_imports_path_p,\r\n        xlim,\r\n        ylim,\r\n        \"USA\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.png\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_trade_mediterranean_zoom.pdf\",\r\n    )\r\n    usa_label_years = {1977, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1985, 1987, 1990, 1994, 1999, 2001, 2009, 2012, 2015, 2018, 2022}\r\n    _render_single_footer_map(\r\n        world_p,\r\n        usa_imports_p,\r\n        usa_imports_path_p,\r\n        \"red\",\r\n        \"USA imports barycenter\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.png\",\r\n        fig_dir / \"barycenter_usa_imports_mediterranean.pdf\",\r\n        xlim,\r\n        ylim,\r\n        usa_label_years,\r\n        20000,\r\n {"timestamp":"2026-03-11T17:55:37.151Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_VqkrPu0OMEAWJh0JFu7jWnoV","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 2 seconds\nOutput:\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString, box\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\n\r\nCOUNTRIES = [\"BRA\",\"ARG\",\"CHL\",\"COL\",\"MEX\",\"CAN\",\"JPN\",\"GBR\",\"DEU\",\"FRA\"]\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_NAMES = {\r\n    \"BRA\": \"Brazil\",\r\n    \"ARG\": \"Argentina\",\r\n    \"CHL\": \"Chile\",\r\n    \"COL\": \"Colombia\",\r\n    \"MEX\": \"Mexico\",\r\n    \"CAN\": \"Canada\",\r\n    \"JPN\": \"Japan\",\r\n    \"GBR\": \"United Kingdom\",\r\n    \"DEU\": \"Germany\",\r\n    \"FRA\": \"France\",\r\n}\r\n\r\n# Labels (updated): use 2022 (not 2023)\r\nLABEL_YEARS = {1977, 1981, 1985, 1988, 1994, 1997, 2001, 2009, 2018, 2022}\r\nEMPH_YEARS = {1977, 2022}  # bold + italic\r\n\r\n# Visuals\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"lightgray\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nBASEMAP_LW = 0.35\r\nPATH_LW = 1.1\r\nPATH_ALPHA = 0.28\r\nPOINT_SIZE = 8\r\n\r\n# Smaller year labels\r\nLABEL_FONTSIZE = 4\r\nLABEL_ALPHA = 0.8\r\n\r\n# Output filename format: barycenter_<ISO3>_exports/imports\r\n# Output filename templates (per-country, per-flow)\r\nOUT_FMT_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.png\")\r\nOUT_FMT_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_{iso3}_{flow}.pdf\")\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# CRS helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef aeqd(lat0, lon0) -> CRS:\r\n    return CRS.from_proj4(f\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0={lat0} +lon_0={lon0} +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Projection + extent rules (lon/lat)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# 1) Argentina, Brazil, Chile:\r\n#    Center North Africa; N=southern France (~43N), S=equatorial Africa (0),\r\n#    W=eastern tip of Brazil (~-35), E=Iraq (~44E)\r\nCRS_N_AFRICA = aeqd(20, 10)\r\nBBOX_N_AFRICA = (-35, 0, 44, 43)\r\n\r\n# 2) Colombia:\r\n#    N=UK (~58N), S=Ecuador (~-5), W=Yucatan (~-92), E=France (~2)\r\nCRS_COL = aeqd(15, -40)\r\nBBOX_COL = (-92, -5, 2, 58)\r\n\r\n# 3) Mexico:\r\n#    Projection centered around NY (ok)\r\n#    Extent: N=southern Canada (~49N), S=southern Mexico (~14N),\r\n#            W=California (~-125), E=Spain (~3E)\r\nCRS_MEX = aeqd(40.7, -74.0)\r\nBBOX_MEX = (-125, 14, 3, 49)\r\n\r\n# 4) Canada: use same projection and extent as Mexico\r\nCRS_CAN = CRS_MEX\r\nBBOX_CAN = BBOX_MEX\r\n\r\n# 5) Japan:\r\n#    Center Egypt; N=southern Europe (~45N), S=Yemen (~12N),\r\n#    W=Canary Islands (~-16), E=Pakistan (~75E)\r\nCRS_JPN = aeqd(26, 30)\r\nBBOX_JPN = (-16, 12, 75, 45)\r\n\r\n# 6) European countries: use Mediterranean projection + extent from USA logic\r\nCRS_MED = aeqd(35, 18)\r\nGLOBAL_BARY_FILE = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_imports_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\nEU_ISOS = {\"GBR\", \"DEU\", \"FRA\"}\r\n\r\nCOUNTRY_SETTINGS = {\r\n    \"ARG\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"BRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n    \"CHL\": {\"crs\": CRS_N_AFRICA, \"bbox\": BBOX_N_AFRICA},\r\n\r\n    \"COL\": {\"crs\": CRS_COL,      \"bbox\": BBOX_COL},\r\n\r\n    \"MEX\": {\"crs\": CRS_MEX,      \"bbox\": BBOX_MEX},\r\n    \"CAN\": {\"crs\": CRS_CAN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_CAN},\r\n\r\n    \"JPN\": {\"crs\": CRS_JPN,      \"bbox\": BBOX_JPN},\r\n\r\n    # EU: bbox ignored; extent computed from global barycenter file under CRS_MED\r\n    \"GBR\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"DEU\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n    \"FRA\": {\"crs\": CRS_MED,      \"bbox\": None},\r\n}\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Helpers\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef load_barycenter_df(iso3: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    fp = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_{iso3}_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(fp):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing barycenter file: {fp}\")\r\n    df = pd.read_csv(fp).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    needed = [\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]\r\n    missing = [c for c in needed if c not in df.columns]\r\n    if missing:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"{iso3}: missing columns {missing} in {fp}\")\r\n    return df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx, dy):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in LABEL_YEARS:\r\n            is_emph = y in EMPH_YEARS\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                r.geometry.x + dx,\r\n                r.geometry.y + dy,\r\n                str(y),\r\n                fontsize=LABEL_FONTSIZE,\r\n                color=\"black\",\r\n                alpha=LABEL_ALPHA,\r\n                fontweight=(\"bold\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                fontstyle=(\"italic\" if is_emph else \"normal\"),\r\n                zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\ndef project_bbox(crs_target: CRS, bbox_lonlat):\r\n    lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max = bbox_lonlat\r\n    bbox_ll = gpd.GeoSeries([box(lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    bbox_p = bbox_ll.to_crs(crs_target).iloc[0]\r\n    return bbox_p.bounds  # xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax\r\n\r\ndef compute_med_extent_from_global():\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Reproduce the USA Mediterranean extent logic:\r\n    project global import+export barycenters to CRS_MED and take bounds + buffer.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    if not os.path.exists(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing global barycenter file for EU extent: {GLOBAL_BARY_FILE}\")\r\n\r\n    g = pd.read_csv(GLOBAL_BARY_FILE).dropna(\r\n        subset=[\"lat_exports\",\"lon_exports\",\"lat_imports\",\"lon_imports\"]\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ge = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_exports\"], g[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    gi = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(g[\"lon_imports\"], g[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).to_crs(CRS_MED)\r\n\r\n    minx, miny, maxx, maxy = gpd.GeoSeries(\r\n        pd.concat([ge.geometry, gi.geometry], ignore_index=True),\r\n        crs=CRS_MED\r\n    ).total_bounds\r\n\r\n    buffer = 1.2e6\r\n    return (minx - buffer, miny - buffer, maxx + buffer, maxy + buffer)\r\n\r\nEU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX = compute_med_extent_from_global()\r\n\r\ndef get_extent_for_country(iso3: str):\r\n    s = COUNTRY_SETTINGS[iso3]\r\n    crs = s[\"crs\"]\r\n    if iso3 in EU_ISOS:\r\n        return crs, (EU_XMIN, EU_YMIN, EU_XMAX, EU_YMAX)\r\n    xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax = project_bbox(crs, s[\"bbox\"])\r\n    return crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax)\r\n\r\ndef render_map_for_country_flow(world_ll, iso3: str, flow: str):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    flow: \"imports\" or \"exports\"\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    crs, (xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) = get_extent_for_country(iso3)\r\n    df = load_barycenter_df(iso3)\r\n\r\n    if flow == \"imports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"\r\n        color = \"red\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) â€” Imports barycenter\"\r\n    elif flow == \"exports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"\r\n        color = \"dodgerblue\"\r\n        footer = f\"{COUNTRY_NAMES.get(iso3, iso3)} ({iso3}) â€” Exports barycenter\"\r\n    else:\r\n        raise ValueError(\"flow must be 'imports' or 'exports'\")\r\n\r\n    gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy(),\r\n        geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[lon_col], df[lat_col])],\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\"\r\n    ).sort_values(\"year\").to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(geometry=[LineString(gdf.geometry.tolist())], crs=crs)\r\n\r\n    world_p = world_ll.to_crs(crs)\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=BASEMAP_LW, edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE, color=BASEMAP_FACE, zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    path.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=PATH_LW, color=color, alpha=PATH_ALPHA, zorder=3)\r\n    gdf.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=POINT_SIZE, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Labels (smaller) with emphasis on 1977 and 2022\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, gdf, dx=15000, dy=15000)\r\n\r\n    ax.set_xlim(xmin, xmax)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\r\n\r\n    # Lower-left legend text\r\n    ax.text(\r\n        0.02, 0.02, footer,\r\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n        fontsize=9,\r\n        color=\"black\",\r\n        ha=\"left\",\r\n        va=\"bottom\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n\r\n    out_png = OUT_FMT_PNG.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n    out_pdf = OUT_FMT_PDF.format(iso3=iso3, flow=flow)\r\n\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_png}\")\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_pdf}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Render: two maps per country\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfor iso3 in COUNTRIES:\r\n    render_map_for_country_flow(world, iso3, \"imports\")\r\n    render_map_for_country_flow(world, iso3, \"exports\")\r\n"}}
{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T17:55:37.944Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_eHN6WuBEEq4FEvhIquwzbapH","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.2 seconds\nOutput:\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import Point, LineString, box\r\nfrom pyproj import CRS\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Paths\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nGEO_DIR_STR = str(GEO_DIR)  # keep GEO_DIR as Path (from config)\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nBARY_DIR = str(OUT_03_BARY / \"data\")\r\nCHINA_CSV = os.path.join(BARY_DIR, f\"barycenter_china_trade_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n\r\nOUT_IMPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_imports.png\")\r\nOUT_IMPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_imports.pdf\")\r\n\r\nOUT_EXPORTS_PNG = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_exports.png\")\r\nOUT_EXPORTS_PDF = str(BARY_FIG / \"barycenter_china_exports.pdf\")\r\n\r\nos.makedirs(BARY_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load basemap and remove Antarctica\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nworld = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\nif \"ISO_A3\" in world.columns:\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\nif world.crs is None:\r\n    world = world.set_crs(epsg=4326)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Load China barycenters (already computed)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndf = pd.read_csv(CHINA_CSV).sort_values(\"year\")\r\ndf = df.dropna(subset=[\"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]).copy()\r\n\r\nexports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_exports\"], df[\"lat_exports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nimports = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    df[[\"year\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"]].copy(),\r\n    geometry=[Point(xy) for xy in zip(df[\"lon_imports\"], df[\"lat_imports\"])],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n).sort_values(\"year\")\r\n\r\nexports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    {\"name\": [\"exports_path\"]},\r\n    geometry=[LineString(list(exports.geometry.values))],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n)\r\n\r\nimports_path = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n    {\"name\": [\"imports_path\"]},\r\n    geometry=[LineString(list(imports.geometry.values))],\r\n    crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Projection + fixed window (Central Asia; include south)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncrs_ca = CRS.from_proj4(\"+proj=aeqd +lat_0=40 +lon_0=80 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +no_defs\")\r\n\r\n# Window: Eastern Mediterranean -> West China; include more south to avoid chopping\r\nlon_min, lon_max = 15, 115\r\nlat_min, lat_max = 5, 60\r\n\r\nbbox_ll = gpd.GeoSeries([box(lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max)], crs=\"EPSG:4326\")\r\nbbox_p = bbox_ll.to_crs(crs_ca).iloc[0]\r\nxmin, ymin, xmax, ymax = bbox_p.bounds\r\n\r\n# Project layers\r\nworld_p = world.to_crs(crs_ca)\r\nexports_p = exports.to_crs(crs_ca)\r\nimports_p = imports.to_crs(crs_ca)\r\nexports_path_p = exports_path.to_crs(crs_ca)\r\nimports_path_p = imports_path.to_crs(crs_ca)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Labels: small, along trajectory\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nLABEL_EVERY = 5  # label every 5 years; set to 10 if too dense\r\n\r\nyears = df[\"year\"].astype(int).tolist()\r\n#ymin_year, ymax_year = min(years), max(years)\r\n\r\nlabel_years = set(range(TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END + 1, LABEL_EVERY))\r\nlabel_years.update([TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END])  # force endpoints\r\n\r\ndef add_year_labels(ax, gdf_sorted, dx=25000, dy=25000, fontsize=6):\r\n    for _, r in gdf_sorted.iterrows():\r\n        y = int(r[\"year\"])\r\n        if y in label_years:\r\n            x0, y0 = r.geometry.x, r.geometry.y\r\n            ax.text(\r\n                x0 + dx, y0 + dy, str(y),\r\n                fontsize=fontsize, color=\"black\", alpha=0.85, zorder=10\r\n            )\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Render function: single-map output with bottom caption-style label\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndef render_single_map(points_p, path_p, color, footer_label, out_png, out_pdf):\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))  # taller aspect\r\n\r\n    # Basemap\r\n    world_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=0.4, edgecolor=\"white\", color=\"lightgray\", zorder=1)\r\n\r\n    # Path + points\r\n    path_p.plot(ax=ax, linewidth=1.1, color=color, alpha=0.28, zorder=3)\r\n    points_p.plot(ax=ax, color=color, markersize=8, zorder=4)\r\n\r\n    # Year labels\r\n    add_year_labels(ax, points_p.sort_values(\"year\"), dx=25000, dy=25000, fontsize=6)\r\n\r\n    # Fixed extent\r\n    ax.set_xlim(xmin, xmax)\r\n    ax.set_ylim(ymin, ymax)\r\n\r\n    # Bottom caption-style label (like your previous maps)\r\n    ax.text(\r\n        0.02, 0.02, footer_label,\r\n        transform=ax.transAxes,\r\n        fontsize=9,\r\n        color=\"black\",\r\n        ha=\"left\",\r\n        va=\"bottom\"\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n\r\n    # Save (overwrite)\r\n    plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.savefig(out_pdf, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_png}\")\r\n    print(f\"Saved: {out_pdf}\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# Produce two separate files\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nrender_single_map(\r\n    imports_p,\r\n    imports_path_p,\r\n    \"red\",\r\n    \"China imports barycenter\",\r\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PNG,\r\n    OUT_IMPORTS_PDF\r\n)\r\n\r\nrender_single_map(\r\n    exports_p,\r\n    exports_path_p,\r\n    \"dodgerblue\",\r\n    \"China exports barycenter\",\r\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PNG,\r\n    OUT_EXPORTS_PDF\r\n)\r\n"}}
