{"timestamp":"2026-03-11T18:52:08.484Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"function_call_output","call_id":"call_4QeZAqREYtE1SHxAvQNo4KVY","output":"Exit code: 0\nWall time: 1.7 seconds\nTotal output lines: 3013\nOutput:\n===== CELL 70 =====\r\n**Gravitational Clustering**\r\n\r\nCompute barycenter trajectories (imports and exports separately).\r\n\r\nCompute derived features: velocity, heading, displacement, curvature, break-period shifts.\r\n\r\nDefine a trajectory distance (synchronized + directional) and cluster countries.\r\n\r\nFor each cluster, compute a fixed “attractor” as a prototype (endpoint-based or direction-based).\r\n\r\nValidate stability (cluster robustness over time windows / bootstrap years) and finalize.\r\n\r\n===== CELL 71 =====\r\n1. **Barycenters for all countries**\r\n\r\n===== CELL 72 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport duckdb\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# PATHS\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nTRADE_DIR = str(DATAVERSE_DIR)\r\n\r\nCENTROID_FILE = str(CENTROIDS_OUT)\r\n\r\n# Output for gravitational clustering (canonical directory)\r\nGRAV_DIR = GC_DATA\r\nOUT_DIR   = str(GRAV_DIR)   # canonical output dir for per-country barycenter files\r\nos.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)\r\n\r\nSTART_YEAR, END_YEAR = TRADE_YEAR_START, TRADE_YEAR_END\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# LOAD CENTROIDS (authoritative)\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncentroids = pd.read_csv(CENTROID_FILE)\r\n\r\n# required columns\r\nassert {\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"}.issubset(centroids.columns)\r\n\r\ncentroids = centroids[[\"code\", \"lat\", \"lon\"]].dropna()\r\ncentroids = centroids.set_index(\"code\")\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# DUCKDB CONNECTION\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\ncon = duckdb.connect()\r\n\r\n# container for results (append then split by country)\r\nrows = []\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# MAIN LOOP\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfor year in range(START_YEAR, END_YEAR + 1):\r\n    path = os.path.join(TRADE_DIR, f\"S2_{year}.parquet\")\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        continue\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Processing {year}\")\r\n\r\n    df = con.execute(f\"\"\"\r\n        SELECT exporter, importer, value_final\r\n        FROM read_parquet('{path}')\r\n        WHERE value_final IS NOT NULL\r\n          AND value_final > 0\r\n    \"\"\").df()\r\n\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    # EXPORTS: country i → partners j\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    exp = (\r\n        df\r\n        .merge(centroids, left_on=\"importer\", right_index=True, how=\"inner\")\r\n        .groupby(\"exporter\", as_index=False)\r\n        .apply(lambda x: pd.Series({\r\n            \"lat_exports\": np.average(x[\"lat\"], weights=x[\"value_final\"]),\r\n            \"lon_exports\": np.average(x[\"lon\"], weights=x[\"value_final\"]),\r\n            \"exports_weight\": x[\"value_final\"].sum()\r\n        }), include_groups=False)\r\n        .reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    # IMPORTS: partners j → country i\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    imp = (\r\n        df\r\n        .merge(centroids, left_on=\"exporter\", right_index=True, how=\"inner\")\r\n        .groupby(\"importer\", as_index=False)\r\n        .apply(lambda x: pd.Series({\r\n            \"lat_imports\": np.average(x[\"lat\"], weights=x[\"value_final\"]),\r\n            \"lon_imports\": np.average(x[\"lon\"], weights=x[\"value_final\"]),\r\n            \"imports_weight\": x[\"value_final\"].sum()\r\n        }), include_groups=False)\r\n        .reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    # COMBINE\r\n    # --------------------------------------------------------\r\n    year_df = (\r\n        exp.merge(\r\n            imp,\r\n            left_on=\"exporter\",\r\n            right_on=\"importer\",\r\n            how=\"outer\"\r\n        )\r\n        .rename(columns={\"exporter\": \"country\"})\r\n        .drop(columns=[\"importer\"])\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    year_df[\"year\"] = year\r\n    rows.append(year_df)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# FINAL DATASET\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nbary = pd.concat(rows, ignore_index=True)\r\n\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\n# WRITE ONE FILE PER COUNTRY\r\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\r\nfor country, g in bary.groupby(\"country\"):\r\n    out = os.path.join(\r\n        OUT_DIR,\r\n        f\"barycenter_{country}_{START_YEAR}_{END_YEAR}.csv\"\r\n    )\r\n    g.sort_values(\"year\").to_csv(out, index=False)\r\n\r\nprint(\"✓ Barycenters computed for all countries\")\r\nprint(f\"✓ Output directory: {OUT_DIR}\")\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 75 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ============================================================\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\n\r\n# Input pattern: one file per country\r\nIN_GLOB = os.path.join(GC_BASE, f\"barycenter_*_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\")\r\n\r\n# Outputs\r\nOUT_STATE_LONG   = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\r\nOUT_STEPS_LONG   = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_steps_long.csv\")\r\nOUT_FEATURES     = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\")\r\n\r\n# Earth radius for km conversions (optional)\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\n\r\n# Minimum observations for period mean position\r\nMIN_OBS_PER_PERIOD = 2\r\n\r\n# Break-period definitions (inclusive bounds)\r\n# You can change these freely; code uses whatever years exist.\r\nPERIODS = [\r\n    (f\"P1_{TRADE_YEAR_START + 1}_1988\", TRADE_YEAR_START + 1, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# GEOMETRY HELPERS (sphere-safe)\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef deg2rad(x):\r\n    return np.deg2rad(x)\r\n\r\ndef wrap_pi(angle_rad):\r\n    \"\"\"Wrap to [-pi, pi].\"\"\"\r\n    return (angle_rad + np.pi) % (2 * np.pi) - np.pi\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_unitvec(lat_deg, lon_deg):\r\n    \"\"\"lat/lon in degrees -> unit vector (x,y,z).\"\"\"\r\n    lat = deg2rad(lat_deg)\r\n    lon = deg2rad(lon_deg)\r\n    clat = np.cos(lat)\r\n    x = clat * np.cos(lon)\r\n    y = clat * np.sin(lon)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\ndef gc_distance_rad_from_dot(dot):\r\n    \"\"\"Great-circle distance in radians from dot product, with clipping.\"\"\"\r\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(dot, -1.0, 1.0))\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1_deg, lon1_deg, lat2_deg, lon2_deg):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Initial bearing from point 1 to point 2.\r\n    Returns bearing in degrees [0, 360).\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    lat1 = deg2rad(lat1_deg)\r\n    lat2 = deg2rad(lat2_deg)\r\n    dlon = deg2rad(lon2_deg - lon1_deg)\r\n\r\n    y = np.sin(dlon) * np.cos(lat2)\r\n    x = np.cos(lat1) * np.sin(lat2) - np.sin(lat1) * np.cos(lat2) * np.cos(dlon)\r\n    brng = np.arctan2(y, x)  # [-pi, pi]\r\n    brng_deg = (np.rad2deg(brng) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n    return brng_deg\r\n\r\ndef circ_mean_deg(angles_deg):\r\n    \"\"\"Circular mean for degrees in [0,360).\"\"\"\r\n    a = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(angles_deg, dtype=float))\r\n    a = a[~np.isnan(a)]\r\n    if a.size == 0:\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    s = np.mean(np.sin(a))\r\n    c = np.mean(np.cos(a))\r\n    mu = np.arctan2(s, c)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(mu) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\ndef circ_var_unit(angles_deg):\r\n    \"\"\"Circular variance in [0,1], using mean resultant length.\"\"\"\r\n    a = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(angles_deg, dtype=float))\r\n    a = a[~np.isnan(a)]\r\n    if a.size == 0:\r\n        return np.nan\r\n    R = np.hypot(np.mean(np.cos(a)), np.mean(np.sin(a)))\r\n    return 1.0 - R\r\n\r\ndef spherical_mean_unitvec(xyz):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Spherical mean of unit vectors.\r\n    xyz: array shape (n,3)\r\n    Returns unit vector (3,) or (nan,nan,nan) if undefined.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    xyz = np.asarray(xyz, dtype=float)\r\n    xyz = xyz[~np.isnan(xyz).any(axis=1)]\r\n    if xyz.shape[0] == 0:\r\n        return np.array([np.nan, np.nan, np.nan])\r\n    v = xyz.sum(axis=0)\r\n    norm = np.linalg.norm(v)\r\n    if norm == 0 or np.isnan(norm):\r\n        return np.array([np.nan, np.nan, np.nan])\r\n    return v / norm\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# I/O + FEATURE PIPELINE\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef parse_country_from_filename(fp):\r\n    # barycenter_<ISO3>_1977_2022.csv\r\n    base = os.path.basename(fp)\r\n    parts = base.split(\"_\")\r\n    if len(parts) < 2:\r\n        return None\r\n    return parts[1]\r\n\r\ndef flow_specs():\r\n    # We compute separately for exports and imports\r\n    return [\r\n        (\"exports\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"exports_weight\"),\r\n        (\"imports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\", \"imports_weight\"),\r\n    ]\r\n\r\ndef build_state_long_for_country(country, df):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Build long state table for this country for both flows.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    out_rows = []\r\n    for flow, latc, lonc, wc in flow_specs():\r\n        if latc not in df.columns or lonc not in df.columns:\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        sub = df[[\"year\", latc, lonc] + ([wc] if wc in df.columns else [])].copy()\r\n        sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", latc, lonc])\r\n        if sub.empty:\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n        sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n        sub = sub.rename(columns={latc: \"lat\", lonc: \"lon\"})\r\n        if wc in sub.columns:\r\n            sub = sub.rename(columns={wc: \"weight\"})\r\n        else:\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = np.nan\r\n\r\n        x, y, z = latlon_to_unitvec(sub[\"lat\"].astype(float), sub[\"lon\"].astype(float))\r\n        sub[\"x\"] = x\r\n        sub[\"y\"] = y\r\n        sub[\"z\"] = z\r\n\r\n        # Keep canonical order\r\n        sub = sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]].sort_values(\"year\")\r\n        out_rows.append(sub)\r\n\r\n    if out_rows:\r\n        return pd.concat(out_rows, ignore_index=True)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"lat\",\"lon\",\"x\",\"y\",\"z\",\"weight\"])\r\n\r\ndef build_steps_for_country_flow(state_sub):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    state_sub: rows for a single (country, flow) sorted by year, with x,y,z,lat,lon.\r\n    Creates step records using consecutive available years (not necessarily year+1).\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    state_sub = state_sub.sort_values(\"year\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    n = len(state_sub)\r\n    if n < 2:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\r\n            \"country\",\"flow\",\"year_from\",\"year_to\",\"dt_years\",\r\n            \"dist_rad\",\"dist_km\",\"velocity_rad_per_year\",\"velocity_km_per_year\",\r\n            \"bearing_deg\",\"turning_angle_deg\"\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n    rows = []\r\n    bearings = []\r\n\r\n    for idx in range(n - 1):\r\n        r1 = state_sub.iloc[idx]\r\n        r2 = state_sub.iloc[idx + 1]\r\n        y1, y2 = int(r1[\"year\"]), int(r2[\"year\"])\r\n        dt = y2 - y1\r\n        if dt <= 0:\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        dot = float(r1[\"x\"] * r2[\"x\"] + r1[\"y\"] * r2[\"y\"] + r1[\"z\"] * r2[\"z\"])\r\n        dist_rad = float(gc_distance_rad_from_dot(dot))\r\n        dist_km = dist_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n\r\n        v_rad = dist_rad / dt\r\n        v_km = dist_km / dt\r\n\r\n        brng = float(initial_bearing_deg(r1[\"lat\"], r1[\"lon\"], r2[\"lat\"], r2[\"lon\"]))\r\n        bearings.append(brng)\r\n\r\n        rows.append({\r\n            \"country\": r1[\"country\"],\r\n            \"flow\": r1[\"flow\"],\r\n            \"year_from\": y1,\r\n            \"year_to\": y2,\r\n            \"dt_years\": dt,\r\n            \"dist_rad\": dist_rad,\r\n            \"dist_km\": dist_km,\r\n            \"velocity_rad_per_year\": v_rad,\r\n            \"velocity_km_per_year\": v_km,\r\n            \"bearing_deg\": brng,\r\n            # turning angle filled after we have bearings\r\n            \"turning_angle_deg\": np.nan,\r\n        })\r\n\r\n    steps = pd.DataFrame(rows)\r\n    if steps.empty:\r\n        return steps\r\n\r\n    # Turning angle for consecutive bearings (requires 3 points -> 2 steps)\r\n    # turning angle at step j (from step j-1 to step\r\n\r\n===== CELL 78 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import silhouette_score\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ============================================================\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\n\r\nSTATE_LONG = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\r\n# (we will derive step directions from state_long; gc_steps_long not required)\r\n\r\nOUT_DIR = str(GC_DATA)  # keep everything together\r\n\r\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\r\n\r\n# Distance construction\r\nMIN_OVERLAP_YEARS = 10     # minimum overlapping years to compute pos distance\r\nMIN_OVERLAP_STEPS = 8      # minimum overlapping steps to compute dir distance\r\nALPHA_POS = 0.7            # d = alpha*d_pos + (1-alpha)*d_dir\r\n\r\n# Clustering\r\nK_MIN, K_MAX = 2, 12       # candidates for #clusters (hierarchical)\r\nLINKAGE = \"average\"        # average linkage works well with generic distances\r\n\r\n# Year universe (use what's in the data; typically 1977-2022)\r\n# ============================================================\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# HELPERS\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef arccos_clip(x):\r\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\r\n\r\ndef safe_norm(v, axis=-1, keepdims=False):\r\n    return np.linalg.norm(v, axis=axis, keepdims=keepdims)\r\n\r\ndef build_country_year_arrays(df_flow):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df_flow columns: country, year, x,y,z\r\n    returns:\r\n      countries (list)\r\n      years (np array sorted)\r\n      X: np array (N, T, 3) with NaNs where missing\r\n      M: mask (N, T) True where present\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    years = np.sort(df_flow[\"year\"].unique())\r\n    countries = np.sort(df_flow[\"country\"].unique())\r\n\r\n    year_to_idx = {y:i for i,y in enumerate(years)}\r\n    country_to_idx = {c:i for i,c in enumerate(countries)}\r\n\r\n    N = len(countries)\r\n    T = len(years)\r\n\r\n    X = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\r\n    M = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\r\n\r\n    for r in df_flow.itertuples(index=False):\r\n        i = country_to_idx[r.country]\r\n        t = year_to_idx[r.year]\r\n        X[i, t, 0] = r.x\r\n        X[i, t, 1] = r.y\r\n        X[i, t, 2] = r.z\r\n        M[i, t] = True\r\n\r\n    return countries.tolist(), years, X, M\r\n\r\ndef build_step_unit_vectors(X, M):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Build unit direction vectors for steps between consecutive *available* years.\r\n    Returns:\r\n      U: (N, T, 3) unit vector at year index t meaning direction from t -> next available year\r\n      MU: (N, T) mask where U defined\r\n      DT: (N, T) dt in years to next available year (float), NaN if undefined\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\r\n    U = np.full((N, T, 3), np.nan, dtype=float)\r\n    MU = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=bool)\r\n    DT = np.full((N, T), np.nan, dtype=float)\r\n\r\n    for i in range(N):\r\n        idx = np.where(M[i])[0]\r\n        if idx.size < 2:\r\n            continue\r\n        for k in range(idx.size - 1):\r\n            t0 = idx[k]\r\n            t1 = idx[k+1]\r\n            v = X[i, t1] - X[i, t0]  # chord direction\r\n            n = np.linalg.norm(v)\r\n            if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            U[i, t0] = v / n\r\n            MU[i, t0] = True\r\n            DT[i, t0] = float(t1 - t0)  # in index units; converted later using years array\r\n    return U, MU, DT\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_pos_distance(X, M, min_overlap):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Average great-circle distance (radians) over overlapping years.\r\n    Returns:\r\n      Dpos (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\r\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    N, T, _ = X.shape\r\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\r\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\r\n\r\n    # diagonal\r\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\r\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, M.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\r\n\r\n    for i in range(N):\r\n        Mi = M[i]\r\n        Xi = X[i]\r\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\r\n            mask = Mi & M[j]\r\n            c = int(mask.sum())\r\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\r\n            if c < min_overlap:\r\n                continue\r\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Xi[mask], X[j, mask])\r\n            ang = arccos_clip(dots)  # radians\r\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(ang))\r\n    return D, Over\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_dir_distance(U, MU, min_overlap):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Average directional mismatch over overlapping step-years:\r\n      d = mean(1 - dot(u_i, u_j))\r\n    Returns:\r\n      Ddir (N,N) with NaNs where insufficient overlap\r\n      Over (N,N) overlap counts\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    N, T, _ = U.shape\r\n    D = np.full((N, N), np.nan, dtype=float)\r\n    Over = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=int)\r\n\r\n    np.fill_diagonal(D, 0.0)\r\n    np.fill_diagonal(Over, MU.sum(axis=1).astype(int))\r\n\r\n    for i in range(N):\r\n        MUi = MU[i]\r\n        Ui = U[i]\r\n        for j in range(i+1, N):\r\n            mask = MUi & MU[j]\r\n            c = int(mask.sum())\r\n            Over[i, j] = Over[j, i] = c\r\n            if c < min_overlap:\r\n                continue\r\n            dots = np.einsum(\"ij,ij->i\", Ui[mask], U[j, mask])\r\n            mismatch = 1.0 - dots\r\n            D[i, j] = D[j, i] = float(np.mean(mismatch))\r\n    return D, Over\r\n\r\ndef robust_normalize(D):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Normalize by median of finite off-diagonal values.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    finite = np.isfinite(D)\r\n    # exclude diagonal\r\n    idx = np.where(finite & (~np.eye(D.shape[0], dtype=bool)))\r\n    vals = D[idx]\r\n    if vals.size == 0:\r\n        return D, np.nan\r\n    med = np.median(vals)\r\n    if med <= 0 or not np.isfinite(med):\r\n        return D, med\r\n    return D / med, med\r\n\r\ndef fill_missing_with_penalty(D, factor=1.5):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Replace NaNs with a penalty = factor * max_finite.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    D2 = D.copy()\r\n    finite = np.isfinite(D2)\r\n    if not finite.any():\r\n        raise ValueError(\"Distance matrix has no finite entries.\")\r\n    maxv = np.nanmax(D2[finite])\r\n    penalty = factor * maxv if maxv > 0 else 1.0\r\n    D2[~finite] = penalty\r\n    np.fill_diagonal(D2, 0.0)\r\n    return D2, penalty\r\n\r\ndef run_hierarchical_clustering(D_pre, countries, flow, out_prefix):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Chooses k by best silhouette over K_MIN..K_MAX, then fits final model.\r\n    Writes labels and silhouette table.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    D_filled, penalty = fill_missing_with_penalty(D_pre, factor=1.5)\r\n\r\n    sil_rows = []\r\n    best = {\"k\": None, \"sil\": -np.inf, \"labels\": None}\r\n\r\n    for k in range(K_MIN, K_MAX + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\r\n            n_clusters=k,\r\n            metric=\"precomputed\",\r\n            linkage=LINKAGE\r\n        )\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(D_filled)\r\n\r\n        # silhouette with precomputed distances requires finite matrix\r\n        sil = silhouette_score(D_filled, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        sil_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": sil})\r\n\r\n        if sil > best[\"sil\"]:\r\n            best = {\"k\": k, \"sil\": sil, \"labels\": labels}\r\n\r\n    sil_df = pd.DataFrame(sil_rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"k\"])\r\n    sil_path = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, f\"{out_prefix}_{flow}_silhouette.csv\")\r\n    sil_df.to_csv(sil_path, index=False)\r\n\r\n    labels_df = pd.DataFrame({\r\n        \"country\": countries,\r\n        \"flow\": flow,\r\n        \"cluster\": best[\"labels\"],\r\n        \"k_selected\": best[\"k\"\r\n\r\n===== CELL 79 =====\r\n**For each cluster, compute a fixed “attractor” as a prototype (endpoint-based or direction-based).**\r\n\r\n===== CELL 80 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ============================================================\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\n\r\nSTATE_LONG = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long.csv\")\r\n\r\nCLUSTERS_EXPORTS = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_exports_clusters.csv\")\r\nCLUSTERS_IMPORTS = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_imports_clusters.csv\")\r\n\r\nOUT_EXPORTS = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_exports_attractors.csv\")\r\nOUT_IMPORTS = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_imports_attractors.csv\")\r\nOUT_ALL     = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_attractors_all.csv\")\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# SPHERE H…15288 tokens truncated…-----\r\ndef arccos_clip(x):\r\n    return np.arccos(np.clip(x, -1.0, 1.0))\r\n\r\ndef spherical_mean_unitvec(V):\r\n    s = np.sum(V, axis=0)\r\n    n = np.linalg.norm(s)\r\n    if not np.isfinite(n) or n == 0:\r\n        return np.array([np.nan, np.nan, np.nan], dtype=float)\r\n    return s / n\r\n\r\ndef unitvec_to_latlon_deg(v):\r\n    x, y, z = float(v[0]), float(v[1]), float(v[2])\r\n    lat = np.degrees(np.arcsin(np.clip(z, -1.0, 1.0)))\r\n    lon = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    if lon <= -180:\r\n        lon += 360\r\n    elif lon > 180:\r\n        lon -= 360\r\n    return float(lat), float(lon)\r\n\r\ndef assert_exists(path):\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file: {path}\")\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Compute barycenters per country\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef compute_country_barycenters(state_df, flow):\r\n    df = state_df[state_df[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    if df.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\"country\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n\r\n    # Drop non-finite vectors\r\n    ok = np.isfinite(df[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]]).all(axis=1)\r\n    df = df[ok].copy()\r\n    if df.empty:\r\n        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[\"country\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n\r\n    out = []\r\n    for c, gc in df.groupby(\"country\", sort=True):\r\n        V = gc[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n\r\n        # normalize rows defensively\r\n        norms = np.linalg.norm(V, axis=1)\r\n        keep = np.isfinite(norms) & (norms > 0)\r\n        V = V[keep]\r\n        if V.shape[0] == 0:\r\n            continue\r\n        V = V / norms[keep][:, None]\r\n\r\n        star = spherical_mean_unitvec(V)\r\n        if not np.isfinite(star).all():\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        lat, lon = unitvec_to_latlon_deg(star)\r\n        out.append({\"country\": c, \"lat\": lat, \"lon\": lon})\r\n\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(out)\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Plot map\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef plot_barycenters(world_3857, pts_ll, flow):\r\n    pts = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\r\n        pts_ll,\r\n        geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(pts_ll[\"lon\"], pts_ll[\"lat\"]),\r\n        crs=\"EPSG:4326\",\r\n    ).to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))\r\n    ax.set_axis_off()\r\n\r\n    # Basemap (no Antarctica)\r\n    world_3857.plot(\r\n        ax=ax,\r\n        color=BASEMAP_FACE,\r\n        edgecolor=BASEMAP_EDGE,\r\n        linewidth=BASEMAP_EDGE_W,\r\n        zorder=1\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    color = EXPORT_POINT_COLOR if flow == \"exports\" else IMPORT_POINT_COLOR\r\n\r\n    pts.plot(\r\n        ax=ax,\r\n        color=color,\r\n        markersize=POINT_SIZE,\r\n        alpha=POINT_ALPHA,\r\n        edgecolor=POINT_EDGE,\r\n        linewidth=POINT_EDGE_W,\r\n        zorder=5\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    ax.set_title(f\"{flow.capitalize()} country barycenters (Mercator)\", fontsize=14)\r\n\r\n    out = os.path.join(GC_BASE, f\"gc_country_barycenters_{flow}.png\")\r\n    plt.tight_layout()\r\n    plt.savefig(out, dpi=DPI, bbox_inches=\"tight\")\r\n    plt.close(fig)\r\n    print(f\"✓ Saved: {out}\")\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# MAIN\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef main():\r\n    assert_exists(STATE_FILE)\r\n    assert_exists(SHAPEFILE)\r\n\r\n    state = pd.read_csv(STATE_FILE)\r\n    state[\"year\"] = state[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    if USE_DEMEANED:\r\n        needed = {\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x_demean\", \"y_demean\", \"z_demean\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"{STATE_FILE} missing columns: {sorted(miss)}\")\r\n        state = state.rename(columns={\"x_demean\": \"x\", \"y_demean\": \"y\", \"z_demean\": \"z\"})\r\n    else:\r\n        needed = {\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"{STATE_FILE} missing RAW columns: {sorted(miss)}.\\n\"\r\n                \"Set USE_DEMEANED=True only if you intentionally want demeaned barycenters.\"\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    state = state[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].copy()\r\n\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    else:\r\n        world = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n\r\n    # Remove Antarctica and junk codes, then project to Mercator\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"].notna() & (world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"-99\")].copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    world_3857 = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    for flow in FLOWS:\r\n        pts = compute_country_barycenters(state, flow)\r\n        if pts.empty:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No barycenters computed for flow={flow}.\")\r\n            continue\r\n        plot_barycenters(world_3857, pts, flow)\r\n\r\n    print(\"\\nDone.\")\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    main()\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 98 =====\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# Country barycenter trajectories (year-to-year great-circle paths)\r\n# - Two maps: exports and imports\r\n# - Mercator EPSG:3857, no Antarctica\r\n# - Trajectories are drawn as great-circle interpolations between yearly barycenters\r\n#\r\n# Inputs:\r\n#   - gc_state_long_demeaned.csv  (must contain raw x,y,z or demeaned)\r\n#   - Natural Earth shapefile (EPSG:4326)\r\n#\r\n# Outputs:\r\n#   - gc_trajectories_exports.png\r\n#   - gc_trajectories_imports.png\r\n# ============================================================\r\n\r\nimport os\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nimport geopandas as gpd\r\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\r\nfrom shapely.geometry import LineString\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ----------------------------\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\nSTATE_FILE = os.path.join(GC_BASE, \"gc_state_long_demeaned.csv\")\r\nSHAPEFILE = str(NE_SHP)\r\n\r\nFLOWS = [\"exports\", \"imports\"]\r\n\r\n# Use raw geography vectors (recommended). Set True only if raw x,y,z missing.\r\nUSE_DEMEANED = False\r\n\r\n# Years to plot (inclusive). Use None to use full available range.\r\nYEAR_MIN = 1980\r\nYEAR_MAX = 2022\r\n\r\n# Trajectory detail: points per segment (year->year). 20 is smooth enough.\r\nPTS_PER_SEGMENT = 20\r\n\r\n# Plot control to avoid spaghetti:\r\n# - \"all\": draw all countries\r\n# - \"topN\": draw only top N countries by number of years present\r\n# - \"subset\": draw only ISO3 in SELECT_COUNTRIES\r\nMODE = \"all\"\r\nTOP_N = 60\r\nSELECT_COUNTRIES = [\"USA\", \"CHN\", \"DEU\", \"JPN\", \"MEX\", \"BRA\", \"IND\"]\r\n\r\n# Basemap styling\r\nBASEMAP_FACE = \"#f2f2f2\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE = \"#cfcfcf\"\r\nBASEMAP_EDGE_W = 0.35\r\n\r\n# Line styling (publish-friendly)\r\nEXPORT_LINE = \"#b2182b\"  # deep red\r\nIMPORT_LINE = \"#2166ac\"  # deep blue\r\nLINE_W = 0.55\r\nLINE_ALPHA = 0.20\r\n\r\n# Start/end markers (optional; keep subtle)\r\nDRAW_ENDPOINTS = True\r\nSTART_MARKER = \"o\"\r\nEND_MARKER = \"s\"\r\nMARKER_SIZE = 8\r\nMARKER_ALPHA = 0.35\r\nMARKER_EDGE = \"white\"\r\nMARKER_EDGE_W = 0.25\r\n\r\nDPI = 300\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# Helpers (spherical interpolation)\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef assert_exists(path):\r\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Missing file: {path}\")\r\n\r\ndef _normalize_rows(V):\r\n    n = np.linalg.norm(V, axis=1)\r\n    keep = np.isfinite(n) & (n > 0)\r\n    V2 = V[keep] / n[keep][:, None]\r\n    return V2, keep\r\n\r\ndef slerp(u, v, t):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Spherical linear interpolation between unit vectors u and v.\r\n    u, v: (3,) unit vectors\r\n    t: float in [0,1]\r\n    returns: (3,) unit vector\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    dot = float(np.clip(np.dot(u, v), -1.0, 1.0))\r\n    omega = np.arccos(dot)\r\n    if omega < 1e-12:\r\n        return u.copy()\r\n    so = np.sin(omega)\r\n    return (np.sin((1 - t) * omega) / so) * u + (np.sin(t * omega) / so) * v\r\n\r\ndef unitvec_to_lonlat_deg(p):\r\n    x, y, z = float(p[0]), float(p[1]), float(p[2])\r\n    lat = np.degrees(np.arcsin(np.clip(z, -1.0, 1.0)))\r\n    lon = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    # normalize lon to (-180, 180]\r\n    if lon <= -180:\r\n        lon += 360\r\n    elif lon > 180:\r\n        lon -= 360\r\n    return lon, lat\r\n\r\ndef build_country_lines(df_country, pts_per_segment=PTS_PER_SEGMENT):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df_country: rows for a single country+flow with columns year,x,y,z (unit-ish)\r\n    returns: list of shapely LineString in lon/lat\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    dfc = df_country.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n    V = dfc[[\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n    Vn, keep = _normalize_rows(V)\r\n    if Vn.shape[0] < 2:\r\n        return [], None, None\r\n\r\n    years = dfc[\"year\"].to_numpy(int)[keep]\r\n    # Build segments only where consecutive years exist (t -> t+1)\r\n    # If you want to connect across gaps, change this logic.\r\n    lines = []\r\n    start_ll = None\r\n    end_ll = None\r\n\r\n    for i in range(len(years) - 1):\r\n        y0, y1 = years[i], years[i+1]\r\n        if y1 != y0 + 1:\r\n            continue  # skip gaps; avoids long jumps across missing years\r\n        u = Vn[i]\r\n        v = Vn[i+1]\r\n        pts = []\r\n        for k in range(pts_per_segment + 1):\r\n            t = k / pts_per_segment\r\n            p = slerp(u, v, t)\r\n            lon, lat = unitvec_to_lonlat_deg(p)\r\n            pts.append((lon, lat))\r\n        if not start_ll:\r\n            start_ll = pts[0]\r\n        end_ll = pts[-1]\r\n        lines.append(LineString(pts))\r\n\r\n    return lines, start_ll, end_ll\r\n\r\n# ----------------------------\r\n# MAIN\r\n# ----------------------------\r\ndef main():\r\n    assert_exists(STATE_FILE)\r\n    assert_exists(SHAPEFILE)\r\n\r\n    state = pd.read_csv(STATE_FILE)\r\n    state[\"year\"] = state[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n\r\n    if USE_DEMEANED:\r\n        needed = {\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x_demean\",\"y_demean\",\"z_demean\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(f\"{STATE_FILE} missing columns: {sorted(miss)}\")\r\n        state = state.rename(columns={\"x_demean\":\"x\",\"y_demean\":\"y\",\"z_demean\":\"z\"})\r\n    else:\r\n        needed = {\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"}\r\n        miss = needed - set(state.columns)\r\n        if miss:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"{STATE_FILE} missing RAW columns: {sorted(miss)}.\\n\"\r\n                \"Set USE_DEMEANED=True only if you intentionally want demeaned trajectories.\"\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    state = state[[\"country\",\"flow\",\"year\",\"x\",\"y\",\"z\"]].copy()\r\n    state[\"country\"] = state[\"country\"].astype(str).str.upper()\r\n\r\n    # Filter years\r\n    if YEAR_MIN is not None:\r\n        state = state[state[\"year\"] >= YEAR_MIN].copy()\r\n    if YEAR_MAX is not None:\r\n        state = state[state[\"year\"] <= YEAR_MAX].copy()\r\n\r\n    # Basemap -> Mercator\r\n    world = gpd.read_file(SHAPEFILE)\r\n    if world.crs is None:\r\n        world = world.set_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    else:\r\n        world = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:4326\")\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"].notna() & (world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"-99\")].copy()\r\n    world = world[world[\"ISO_A3\"] != \"ATA\"].copy()\r\n    world_3857 = world.to_crs(\"EPSG:3857\")\r\n\r\n    for flow in FLOWS:\r\n        df = state[state[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n        if df.empty:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No data for flow={flow}\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        # choose which countries to draw\r\n        if MODE == \"subset\":\r\n            use_countries = sorted(set([c.upper() for c in SELECT_COUNTRIES]))\r\n        else:\r\n            counts = df.groupby(\"country\")[\"year\"].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False)\r\n            if MODE == \"topN\":\r\n                use_countries = counts.head(TOP_N).index.tolist()\r\n            else:\r\n                use_countries = counts.index.tolist()\r\n\r\n        line_geoms = []\r\n        start_pts = []\r\n        end_pts = []\r\n\r\n        for c in use_countries:\r\n            dfc = df[df[\"country\"] == c]\r\n            if dfc.shape[0] < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            lines, start_ll, end_ll = build_country_lines(dfc, pts_per_segment=PTS_PER_SEGMENT)\r\n            if not lines:\r\n                continue\r\n            line_geoms.extend(lines)\r\n            if DRAW_ENDPOINTS and start_ll and end_ll:\r\n                start_pts.append(start_ll)\r\n                end_pts.append(end_ll)\r\n\r\n        if not line_geoms:\r\n            print(f\"[WARN] No trajectories drawn for flow={flow} (check YEAR range / missing data).\")\r\n           \r\n\r\n===== CELL 100 =====\r\n## Stage 04 — Barycenter Motion Indices (Speed & Drift)\r\n\r\nComputes three motion indices per country and flow (exports / imports), derived from the year-to-year sequence of trade barycenters:\r\n\r\n| Index | Description |\r\n|-------|-------------|\r\n| **Speed** (km/yr) | Mean great-circle distance between consecutive annual barycenters |\r\n| **E-W Drift** (km/yr) | Mean eastward component of each step; positive = drifting toward Asia |\r\n| **Instability** | Fraction of steps where the bearing reverses by more than 90° |\r\n\r\n**Inputs:** per-country barycenter files in `output/05_gravitational_clustering/data/` (written by the *Barycenters for all countries* cell above).\r\n\r\n**Outputs:** `motion_indices_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv` and `motion_indices_imports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv` in the same directory.\r\n\r\n\r\n===== CELL 101 =====\r\nimport os\r\nimport glob\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# CONFIG\r\n# ============================================================\r\nGC_BASE = str(GC_DATA)\r\n\r\n# Input: per-country barycenter files written by the \"Barycenters for all countries\" cell.\r\n# Files follow the pattern: barycenter_<ISO3>_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\r\nBARY_GLOB = os.path.join(\r\n    GC_BASE,\r\n    f\"barycenter_*_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\"\r\n)\r\n\r\n# Output files\r\nOUT_EXPORTS = os.path.join(\r\n    GC_BASE,\r\n    f\"motion_indices_exports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\"\r\n)\r\nOUT_IMPORTS = os.path.join(\r\n    GC_BASE,\r\n    f\"motion_indices_imports_{TRADE_YEAR_START}_{TRADE_YEAR_END}.csv\"\r\n)\r\n\r\n# Minimum step distance (km) to include a step in bearing calculations.\r\n# Steps shorter than this are considered positional noise and excluded\r\n# from E-W drift and instability to prevent spurious direction changes.\r\nMIN_STEP_KM: float = 75.0\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM: float = 6371.0088\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# GEOMETRY HELPERS (spherical)\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef haversine_km(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    \"\"\"Great-circle distance in km between two lat/lon points (degrees).\"\"\"\r\n    R = EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n    lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2 = map(np.radians, [lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2])\r\n    dlat = lat2 - lat1\r\n    dlon = lon2 - lon1\r\n    a = np.sin(dlat / 2)**2 + np.cos(lat1) * np.cos(lat2) * np.sin(dlon / 2)**2\r\n    return 2 * R * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0, 1)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Initial bearing from (lat1, lon1) → (lat2, lon2), in degrees [0, 360).\r\n    Uses the spherical-geometry formula; inputs in degrees.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2 = map(np.radians, [lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2])\r\n    dlon = lon2 - lon1\r\n    y = np.sin(dlon) * np.cos(lat2)\r\n    x = np.cos(lat1) * np.sin(lat2) - np.sin(lat1) * np.cos(lat2) * np.cos(dlon)\r\n    brng = np.degrees(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    return (brng + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef bearing_change_deg(b1, b2):\r\n    \"\"\"Absolute angular difference between two bearings (0-180°).\"\"\"\r\n    diff = abs(b1 - b2) % 360.0\r\n    return min(diff, 360.0 - diff)\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# PER-COUNTRY COMPUTATION\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef compute_motion_indices(df, flow, min_step_km=MIN_STEP_KM):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df: DataFrame with columns year, lat_{flow}, lon_{flow}\r\n    Returns a dict of motion indices for this country+flow, or None if columns are absent.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    if flow == \"exports\":\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\"\r\n    else:\r\n        lat_col, lon_col = \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"\r\n\r\n    # Guard: skip files that don't carry the expected per-country schema.\r\n    # (e.g. barycenter_usa_trade_*.csv uses lat_us_exports instead of lat_exports)\r\n    required = {\"year\", lat_col, lon_col}\r\n    if not required.issubset(df.columns):\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n    d = (\r\n        df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]]\r\n        .rename(columns={lat_col: \"lat\", lon_col: \"lon\"})\r\n        .dropna(subset=[\"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n        .sort_values(\"year\")\r\n        .reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    if len(d) < 2:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n    years = d[\"year\"].to_numpy()\r\n    lats  = d[\"lat\"].to_numpy()\r\n    lons  = d[\"lon\"].to_numpy()\r\n\r\n    # Only consecutive year-pairs (no gaps)\r\n    mask = (np.diff(years) == 1)\r\n    if mask.sum() == 0:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n    # Step distances (all consecutive pairs)\r\n    dists = haversine_km(lats[:-1], lons[:-1], lats[1:], lons[1:])[mask]\r\n    bearings_all = np.array([\r\n        initial_bearing_deg(lats[i], lons[i], lats[i+1], lons[i+1])\r\n        for i in np.where(mask)[0]\r\n    ])\r\n\r\n    # Speed: mean km/yr over all valid consecutive steps\r\n    avg_speed_km_yr = float(np.mean(dists)) if dists.size > 0 else np.nan\r\n\r\n    # Filter short steps before computing bearing-based indices (A.5 fix)\r\n    long_mask = dists >= min_step_km\r\n    dists_long    = dists[long_mask]\r\n    bearings_long = bearings_all[long_mask]\r\n\r\n    if dists_long.size == 0:\r\n        ew_drift_km_yr = np.nan\r\n        instability    = np.nan\r\n    else:\r\n        # E-W drift: mean eastward displacement per step = d * sin(bearing)\r\n        # Positive → net eastward (toward Asia); negative → net westward\r\n        ew_components = dists_long * np.sin(np.radians(bearings_long))\r\n        ew_drift_km_yr = float(np.mean(ew_components))\r\n\r\n        # Instability: fraction of consecutive long steps where bearing reverses > 90°\r\n        if bearings_long.size < 2:\r\n            instability = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            changes = np.array([\r\n                bearing_change_deg(bearings_long[k], bearings_long[k+1])\r\n                for k in range(len(bearings_long) - 1)\r\n            ])\r\n            instability = float(np.mean(changes > 90.0))\r\n\r\n    return {\r\n        \"n_steps_total\":     int(dists.size),\r\n        \"n_steps_long\":      int(dists_long.size),\r\n        \"avg_speed_km_yr\":   avg_speed_km_yr,\r\n        \"ew_drift_km_yr\":    ew_drift_km_yr,\r\n        \"instability\":       instability,\r\n        \"min_step_km_used\":  min_step_km,\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\n# ============================================================\r\n# MAIN\r\n# ============================================================\r\ndef main():\r\n    files = sorted(glob.glob(BARY_GLOB))\r\n    if not files:\r\n        raise FileNotFoundError(\r\n            f\"No barycenter files found at:\\n  {BARY_GLOB}\\n\"\r\n            \"Make sure the \\'Barycenters for all countries\\' cell has been run first.\"\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    print(f\"Found {len(files)} barycenter files. Computing motion indices …\")\r\n\r\n    results = {\"exports\": [], \"imports\": []}\r\n\r\n    for fp in files:\r\n        try:\r\n            df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            print(f\"  [WARN] Could not read {os.path.basename(fp)}: {e}\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        # Skip Antarctica\r\n        fname = os.path.basename(fp).upper()\r\n        if fname.startswith(\"BARYCENTER_ATA_\"):\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        # Country code from filename: barycenter_<ISO3>_<START>_<END>.csv\r\n        parts = os.path.basename(fp).split(\"_\")\r\n        if len(parts) < 2:\r\n            continue\r\n        country = parts[1]\r\n\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            idx = compute_motion_indices(df, flow)\r\n            if idx is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            idx[\"country\"] = country\r\n            idx[\"flow\"]    = flow\r\n            results[flow].append(idx)\r\n\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        out = pd.DataFrame(results[flow])\r\n        if out.empty:\r\n            print(f\"  [WARN] No results for flow={flow}\")\r\n            continue\r\n\r\n        col_order = [\r\n            \"country\", \"flow\",\r\n            \"avg_speed_km_yr\", \"ew_drift_km_yr\", \"instability\",\r\n            \"n_steps_total\", \"n_steps_long\", \"min_step_km_used\",\r\n        ]\r\n        out = out[col_order].sort_values(\"country\").reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n        out_path = OUT_EXPORTS if flow == \"exports\" else OUT_IMPORTS\r\n        o\r\n\r\n"}}

ProjectConfig\r\nfrom geoanalisis.services.clustering import (\r\n    build_clustering_artifact_paths,\r\n    compute_attractors,\r\n    compute_features,\r\n    load_state_long,\r\n    pairwise_distance_matrices,\r\n    select_clusters,\r\n    stability_summary,\r\n)\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.paths import build_stage_dir\r\nfrom geoanalisis.utils.run_structure import initialize_project_tree, initialize_run_tree\r\n\r\n\r\ndef run(config: ProjectConfig, run_id: str) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(\"geoanalisis.stage_04_clustering\")\r\n    initialize_project_tree(config)\r\n    run_dir = initialize_run_tree(config, run_id)\r\n    artifacts = build_clustering_artifact_paths(run_dir / \"artifacts\" / \"04_clustering\")\r\n    bary_glob = str(\r\n        build_stage_dir(config, run_id, \"03_barycenters\")\r\n        / \"data\"\r\n        / f\"barycenter_*_{config.trade_year_start}_{config.trade_year_end}.csv\"\r\n    )\r\n    state_long = load_state_long(bary_glob)\r\n    state_long.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    features = compute_features(state_long)\r\n    features.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    summaries = []\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        dpos, ddir, dcombo, dover = pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long, flow=flow)\r\n        dpos.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dpos.csv\")\r\n        ddir.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Ddir.csv\")\r\n        dcombo.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_Dcombo.csv\")\r\n        dover.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_overlap_years.csv\")\r\n\r\n        sil, clusters = select_clusters(dcombo, flow=flow)\r\n        sil.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_silhouette.csv\", index=False)\r\n        clusters.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_clusters.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        attractors = compute_attractors(state_long, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        attractors.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_attractors.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n        summary, wd, bs = stability_summary(dcombo, clusters, flow=flow)\r\n        summaries.append(summary)\r\n        wd.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_window_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n        bs.to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / f\"gc_{flow}_bootstrap_detail.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    pd.concat(summaries, ignore_index=True).to_csv(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_stability_summary.csv\", index=False)\r\n\r\n    logger.info(\r\n        \"Stage 04 complete. states=%d features=%d output=%s\",\r\n        len(state_long),\r\n        len(features),\r\n        artifacts.stage_dir,\r\n    )\r\n    return {\r\n        \"run_dir\": str(run_dir),\r\n        \"stage_dir\": str(artifacts.stage_dir),\r\n        \"state_long_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_state_long.csv\"),\r\n        \"features_path\": str(artifacts.data_dir / \"gc_features_country_flow.csv\"),\r\n    }\r\n"}}

seconds\nOutput:\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport glob\r\nimport math\r\nimport re\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom sklearn.cluster import AgglomerativeClustering\r\nfrom sklearn.metrics import (\r\n    adjusted_rand_score,\r\n    normalized_mutual_info_score,\r\n    silhouette_score,\r\n)\r\n\r\n\r\nEARTH_RADIUS_KM = 6371.0088\r\nPERIODS_5 = [\r\n    (\"P1_1977_1988\", 1977, 1988),\r\n    (\"P2_1989_2001\", 1989, 2001),\r\n    (\"P3_2002_2009\", 2002, 2009),\r\n    (\"P4_2010_2018\", 2010, 2018),\r\n    (\"P5_2019_2022\", 2019, 2022),\r\n]\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    stage_dir: Path\r\n    data_dir: Path\r\n    fig_dir: Path\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\r\nclass FlowTrajectoryData:\r\n    country: str\r\n    years: np.ndarray\r\n    xyz: np.ndarray\r\n    lat: np.ndarray\r\n    lon: np.ndarray\r\n    year_to_idx: dict[int, int]\r\n    step_years: np.ndarray\r\n    step_bearings: np.ndarray\r\n    step_year_to_idx: dict[int, int]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_clustering_artifact_paths(stage_dir: Path) -> ClusteringArtifacts:\r\n    return ClusteringArtifacts(stage_dir=stage_dir, data_dir=stage_dir / \"data\", fig_dir=stage_dir / \"fig\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef latlon_to_xyz(lat, lon):\r\n    lat_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat, float))\r\n    lon_r = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon, float))\r\n    x = np.cos(lat_r) * np.cos(lon_r)\r\n    y = np.cos(lat_r) * np.sin(lon_r)\r\n    z = np.sin(lat_r)\r\n    return x, y, z\r\n\r\n\r\ndef xyz_to_latlon(x, y, z):\r\n    lon = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x))\r\n    hyp = np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2)\r\n    lat = np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(z, hyp))\r\n    return lat, lon\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_rad_xyz(a, b):\r\n    dot = np.clip(np.sum(a * b, axis=-1), -1.0, 1.0)\r\n    return np.arccos(dot)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef gc_km_latlon(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    l1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    l2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float))\r\n    a = np.sin((p2 - p1) / 2) ** 2 + np.cos(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.sin((l2 - l1) / 2) ** 2\r\n    return EARTH_RADIUS_KM * 2 * np.arcsin(np.sqrt(np.clip(a, 0.0, 1.0)))\r\n\r\n\r\ndef initial_bearing_deg(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2):\r\n    p1 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat1, float))\r\n    p2 = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lat2, float))\r\n    dl = np.deg2rad(np.asarray(lon2, float) - np.asarray(lon1, float))\r\n    y = np.sin(dl) * np.cos(p2)\r\n    x = np.cos(p1) * np.sin(p2) - np.sin(p1) * np.cos(p2) * np.cos(dl)\r\n    return (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(y, x)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef infer_country(fp: str) -> str | None:\r\n    m = re.search(r\"^barycenter_([A-Za-z]{3})_\", Path(fp).name)\r\n    return m.group(1).upper() if m else None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, FlowTrajectoryData]]:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    countries = sorted(sub[\"country\"].unique())\r\n    prepared = {}\r\n    for country in countries:\r\n        g = sub[sub[\"country\"] == country].sort_values(\"year\")\r\n        years = g[\"year\"].to_numpy(dtype=int)\r\n        lat = g[\"lat\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        lon = g[\"lon\"].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        xyz = g[[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(dtype=float)\r\n        year_to_idx = {int(y): i for i, y in enumerate(years)}\r\n        if len(years) > 1:\r\n            step_mask = (years[1:] == years[:-1] + 1)\r\n            step_years = years[:-1][step_mask]\r\n            step_bearings = initial_bearing_deg(\r\n                lat[:-1][step_mask],\r\n                lon[:-1][step_mask],\r\n                lat[1:][step_mask],\r\n                lon[1:][step_mask],\r\n            ).astype(float)\r\n        else:\r\n            step_years = np.empty(0, dtype=int)\r\n            step_bearings = np.empty(0, dtype=float)\r\n        prepared[country] = FlowTrajectoryData(\r\n            country=country,\r\n            years=years,\r\n            xyz=xyz,\r\n            lat=lat,\r\n            lon=lon,\r\n            year_to_idx=year_to_idx,\r\n            step_years=step_years,\r\n            step_bearings=step_bearings,\r\n            step_year_to_idx={int(y): i for i, y in enumerate(step_years)},\r\n        )\r\n    return countries, prepared\r\n\r\n\r\ndef load_state_long(bary_glob: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    parts = []\r\n    for fp in sorted(glob.glob(bary_glob)):\r\n        country = infer_country(fp)\r\n        if not country:\r\n            continue\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(fp)\r\n        if {\"year\", \"lat_exports\", \"lon_exports\", \"lat_imports\", \"lon_imports\"} - set(df.columns):\r\n            continue\r\n        for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n            lat_col = f\"lat_{flow}\"\r\n            lon_col = f\"lon_{flow}\"\r\n            weight_col = (\r\n                \"total_exports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                if \"total_exports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                else \"total_exports_value_matched\"\r\n            )\r\n            if flow == \"imports\":\r\n                weight_col = (\r\n                    \"total_imports_value_final_matched\"\r\n                    if \"total_imports_value_final_matched\" in df.columns\r\n                    else \"total_imports_value_matched\"\r\n                )\r\n            sub = df[[\"year\", lat_col, lon_col]].copy()\r\n            sub[\"country\"] = country\r\n            sub[\"flow\"] = flow\r\n            sub[\"lat\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lat_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"lon\"] = pd.to_numeric(sub[lon_col], errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub[\"weight\"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get(weight_col, np.nan), errors=\"coerce\")\r\n            sub = sub.dropna(subset=[\"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\"])\r\n            x, y, z = latlon_to_xyz(sub[\"lat\"], sub[\"lon\"])\r\n            sub[\"x\"], sub[\"y\"], sub[\"z\"] = x, y, z\r\n            parts.append(sub[[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\", \"lat\", \"lon\", \"x\", \"y\", \"z\", \"weight\"]])\r\n    if not parts:\r\n        raise ValueError(f\"No compatible barycenter files found for {bary_glob}\")\r\n    out = pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\r\n    out[\"year\"] = out[\"year\"].astype(int)\r\n    out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=[\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"], keep=\"first\")\r\n    return out.sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\", \"year\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_features(state_long: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for flow in [\"exports\", \"imports\"]:\r\n        countries, prepared = _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long, flow)\r\n        for country in countries:\r\n            traj = prepared[country]\r\n            years = traj.years\r\n            xyz = traj.xyz\r\n            lat = traj.lat\r\n            lon = traj.lon\r\n            n_obs = len(years)\r\n            if n_obs == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            if n_obs > 1:\r\n                step_rad = gc_rad_xyz(xyz[:-1], xyz[1:])\r\n                step_km = step_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n                path_len_rad = float(np.nansum(step_rad))\r\n                path_len_km = float(np.nansum(step_km))\r\n                net_disp_rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(xyz[[0]], xyz[[-1]])[0])\r\n                net_disp_km = net_disp_rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n                straightness = float(net_disp_km / path_len_km) if path_len_km > 0 else np.nan\r\n                bearings = initial_bearing_deg(lat[:-1], lon[:-1], lat[1:], lon[1:])\r\n                ang = np.deg2rad(bearings)\r\n                mean_sin = float(np.mean(np.sin(ang)))\r\n                mean_cos = float(np.mean(np.cos(ang)))\r\n                bearing_mean = (np.rad2deg(np.arctan2(mean_sin, mean_cos)) + 360.0) % 360.0\r\n                bearing_circ_var = 1.0 - float(np.sqrt(mean_sin**2 + mean_cos**2))\r\n                turns = np.abs(np.diff(bearings))\r\n                turns = np.where(turns > 180, 360 - turns, turns)\r\n                mean_abs_turn = float(np.mean(turns)) if len(turns) else np.nan\r\n            else:\r\n                path_len_rad = path_len_km = net_disp_rad = net_disp_km = straightness = np.nan\r\n                step_km = np.array([])\r\n                bearing_mean = bearing_circ_var = mean_abs_turn = np.nan\r\n            row = {\r\n                \"country\": country,\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"n_obs\": n_obs,\r\n                \"start_year\": int(years.min()),\r\n                \"end_year\": int(years.max()),\r\n                \"net_disp_rad\": net_disp_rad,\r\n                \"net_disp_km\": net_disp_km,\r\n                \"path_len_rad\": path_len_rad,\r\n                \"path_len_km\": path_len_km,\r\n                \"straightness\": straightness,\r\n                \"mean_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.mean(step_km)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n                \"std_speed_km_per_year\": float(np.std(step_km, ddof=0)) if len(step_km) else np.nan,\r\n                \"bearing_mean_deg\": bearing_mean,\r\n                \"bearing_circ_var\": bearing_circ_var,\r\n                \"mean_abs_turn_deg\": mean_abs_turn,\r\n            }\r\n            for label, start, end in PERIODS_5:\r\n                mask = (years >= start) & (years <= end)\r\n                row[f\"{label}_nobs\"] = int(mask.sum())\r\n                if mask.any():\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_x\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 0]))\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_y\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 1]))\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_z\"] = float(np.mean(xyz[mask, 2]))\r\n                else:\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_x\"] = np.nan\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_y\"] = np.nan\r\n                    row[f\"{label}_z\"] = np.nan\r\n            for i in range(len(PERIODS_5) - 1):\r\n                a, b = PERIODS_5[i], PERIODS_5[i + 1]\r\n                a_vec = np.array([row[f\"{a[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{a[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n                b_vec = np.array([row[f\"{b[0]}_x\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_y\"], row[f\"{b[0]}_z\"]], float)\r\n                if np.isnan(a_vec).any() or np.isnan(b_vec).any():\r\n                    rad = km = np.nan\r\n                else:\r\n                    rad = float(gc_rad_xyz(a_vec[None, :], b_vec[None, :])[0])\r\n                    km = rad * EARTH_RADIUS_KM\r\n                row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_rad\"] = rad\r\n                row[f\"shift_{a[0]}_to_{b[0]}_km\"] = km\r\n            rows.append(row)\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"country\", \"flow\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef pairwise_distance_matrices(state_long: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, alpha_pos: float = 0.7, min_overlap_years: int = 10, min_overlap_steps: int = 8):\r\n    countries, state = _prepare_flow_trajectories(state_long, flow)\r\n    n = len(countries)\r\n    Dpos = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Ddir = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    Dover = np.zeros((n, n), float)\r\n    for i, a in enumerate(countries):\r\n        ta = state[a]\r\n        for j in range(i + 1, n):\r\n            b = countries[j]\r\n            tb = state[b]\r\n            overlap_years = np.intersect1d(ta.years, tb.years, assume_unique=True)\r\n            n_overlap_years = int(len(overlap_years))\r\n            if n_overlap_years >= min_overlap_years:\r\n                idx_a = np.fromiter((ta.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\r\n                idx_b = np.fromiter((tb.year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_years), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_years)\r\n                xa = ta.xyz[idx_a]\r\n                xb = tb.xyz[idx_b]\r\n                pos = float(np.mean(gc_rad_xyz(xa, xb)))\r\n            else:\r\n                pos = np.nan\r\n            overlap_steps = np.intersect1d(ta.step_years, tb.step_years, assume_unique=True)\r\n            n_overlap_steps = int(len(overlap_steps))\r\n            if n_overlap_steps >= min_overlap_steps:\r\n                idx_a = np.fromiter((ta.step_year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_steps), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_steps)\r\n                idx_b = np.fromiter((tb.step_year_to_idx[int(y)] for y in overlap_steps), dtype=int, count=n_overlap_steps)\r\n                ba = ta.step_bearings[idx_a]\r\n                bb = tb.step_bearings[idx_b]\r\n                diff = np.abs(ba - bb)\r\n                diff = np.minimum(diff, 360.0 - diff)\r\n                direc = float(np.mean(diff / 180.0))\r\n            else:\r\n                direc = np.nan\r\n            if np.isnan(pos):\r\n                pos = 3.0\r\n            if np.isnan(direc):\r\n                direc = 1.0\r\n            Dpos[i, j] = Dpos[j, i] = pos\r\n            Ddir[i, j] = Ddir[j, i] = direc\r\n            Dover[i, j] = Dover[j, i] = n_overlap_years\r\n    idx = pd.Index(countries, name=\"country\")\r\n    Dcombo = alpha_pos * Dpos + (1 - alpha_pos) * Ddir\r\n    dpos_df = pd.DataFrame(Dpos, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    ddir_df = pd.DataFrame(Ddir, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    dcombo_df = pd.DataFrame(Dcombo, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    dover_df = pd.DataFrame(Dover, index=idx, columns=idx)\r\n    return (dpos_df, ddir_df, dcombo_df, dover_df)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef select_clusters(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str, max_k: int = 12):\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    k_values = []\r\n    max_k = min(max_k, max(2, len(countries) - 1))\r\n    for k in range(2, max_k + 1):\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n        if len(set(labels)) < 2:\r\n            score = np.nan\r\n        else:\r\n            score = silhouette_score(X, labels, metric=\"precomputed\")\r\n        k_values.append({\"flow\": flow, \"k\": k, \"silhouette\": float(score)})\r\n    sil = pd.DataFrame(k_values)\r\n    best_k = int(sil.sort_values([\"silhouette\", \"k\"], ascending=[False, True]).iloc[0][\"k\"])\r\n    model = AgglomerativeClustering(n_clusters=best_k, metric=\"precomputed\", linkage=\"average\")\r\n    labels = model.fit_predict(X)\r\n    clusters = pd.DataFrame(\r\n        {\r\n            \"country\": countries,\r\n            \"flow\": flow,\r\n            \"cluster\": labels,\r\n            \"k_selected\": best_k,\r\n            \"silhouette_selected\": float(sil[sil[\"k\"] == best_k][\"silhouette\"].iloc[0]),\r\n            \"missing_penalty_used\": 3.0,\r\n            \"linkage\": \"average\",\r\n            \"alpha_pos\": 0.7,\r\n            \"min_overlap_years\": 10,\r\n            \"min_overlap_steps\": 8,\r\n        }\r\n    ).sort_values([\"cluster\", \"country\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n    return sil, clusters\r\n\r\n\r\ndef compute_attractors(state_long: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\r\n    sub = state_long[state_long[\"flow\"] == flow].copy()\r\n    merged = sub.merge(clusters_df[[\"country\", \"cluster\"]], on=\"country\", how=\"inner\")\r\n    rows = []\r\n    for cluster, g in merged.groupby(\"cluster\"):\r\n        last = g.sort_values(\"year\").groupby(\"country\").tail(1).copy()\r\n        star_x = float(last[\"x\"].mean())\r\n        star_y = float(last[\"y\"].mean())\r\n        star_z = float(last[\"z\"].mean())\r\n        norm = math.sqrt(star_x**2 + star_y**2 + star_z**2)\r\n        star_x, star_y, star_z = star_x / norm, star_y / norm, star_z / norm\r\n        star_lat, star_lon = xyz_to_latlon(star_x, star_y, star_z)\r\n\r\n        dir_vectors = []\r\n        end_years = []\r\n        for country, gc in g.groupby(\"country\"):\r\n            gc = gc.sort_values(\"year\")\r\n            if len(gc) < 2:\r\n                continue\r\n            a = gc.iloc[-2][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            b = gc.iloc[-1][[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"]].to_numpy(float)\r\n            dv = b - a\r\n            if np.linalg.norm(dv) == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            dir_vectors.append(dv / np.linalg.norm(dv))\r\n            end_years.append(int(gc[\"year\"].max()))\r\n        if dir_vectors:\r\n            dv = np.mean(np.vstack(dir_vectors), axis=0)\r\n            dv = dv / np.linalg.norm(dv)\r\n            dir_lat, dir_lon = xyz_to_latlon(dv[0], dv[1], dv[2])\r\n            dir_x, dir_y, dir_z = dv.tolist()\r\n        else:\r\n            dir_lat = dir_lon = dir_x = dir_y = dir_z = np.nan\r\n        rows.append(\r\n            {\r\n                \"flow\": flow,\r\n                \"cluster\": int(cluster),\r\n                \"attractor_type\": \"endpoint\",\r\n                \"star_lat\": star_lat,\r\n                \"star_lon\": star_lon,\r\n                \"star_x\": star_x,\r\n                \"star_y\": star_y,\r\n                \"star_z\": star_z,\r\n                \"dir_lat\": dir_lat,\r\n                \"dir_lon\": dir_lon,\r\n                \"dir_x\": dir_x,\r\n                \"dir_y\": dir_y,\r\n                \"dir_z\": dir_z,\r\n                \"n_countries\": int(g[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_endpoints_used\": int(last[\"country\"].nunique()),\r\n                \"n_lastdirs_used\": int(len(dir_vectors)),\r\n                \"end_year_min\": int(min(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n                \"end_year_max\": int(max(end_years)) if end_years else np.nan,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values([\"flow\", \"cluster\"]).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stability_summary(distance_df: pd.DataFrame, clusters_df: pd.DataFrame, flow: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:\r\n    X = distance_df.to_numpy(float)\r\n    countries = distance_df.index.astype(str).tolist()\r\n    full_labels = clusters_df.set_index(\"country\").loc[countries, \"cluster\"].to_numpy()\r\n    window_rows = []\r\n    bootstrap_rows = []\r\n    for seed in range(10):\r\n        rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\r\n        idx = np.sort(rng.choice(len(countries), size=max(10, int(0.8 * len(countries))), replace=False))\r\n        Xs = X[np.ix_(idx, idx)]\r\n        if len(idx) <= len(set(full_labels[idx])):\r\n            continue\r\n        model = AgglomerativeClustering(\r\n            n_clusters=len(np.unique(full_labels)),\r\n            metric=\"precomputed\",\r\n            linkage=\"average\",\r\n        )\r\n        labels = model.fit_predict(Xs)\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels[idx], labels)\r\n        bootstrap_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"seed\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    for seed in range(5):\r\n        ari = adjusted_rand_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(full_labels, full_labels)\r\n        window_rows.append({\"flow\": flow, \"window_id\": seed, \"ARI_vs_full\": ari, \"NMI_vs_full\": nmi})\r\n    bs = pd.DataFrame(bootstrap_rows)\r\n    wd = pd.DataFrame(window_rows)\r\n    summary = pd.DataFrame(\r\n"}}
